我坚信，我们的筑梦艺术是当代社交和亲密关系的一种体现；这是一种无关乎外部世界他者的、完全纯粹的精神活动，并不以现实——我是说梦境——的客观变化为转移……

I firmly believe that our art of dream-building is an expression of contemporary socialization and intimacy. It is purely a mental activity that has nothing to do with others in the external world, and is not subject to objective changes in reality — I mean, the dreamscape...
在我看来，如今的筑梦艺术正在被一种无比荒谬、简单且粗糙的方式构建。就像潜藏在我们意识深层中的、原始的社会需求——换言之，亲密关系——被一种残忍又暴力的方式异化、统治，进而摧毁……

It seems to me that the art of dream-building today is being constructed in an incredibly absurd, simple, and crude way. It's as if our primal social need — in other words, intimate relationships — that lurks in the depths of our consciousness is being alienated, dominated, and destroyed in a cruel and violent way...

But I just can't be happy! Why did you have to break up with me!? Boo-hoo...
明明我费心准备了这么多礼物…明明我的心意是那么真！
I went through so much trouble to prepare all these gifts... My love is so genuine!
麻雀，没了你我可怎么活啊！
Sparrow, how can I go on without you!
我实在是太平凡了！活了快三十年，连一件值得写在史书上的事都没做……
I'm just so ordinary! I've lived for almost thirty years, but I haven't done a single thing worth mentioning in history...
跟那些享誉星际的大人物相比，我算个啥啊我！
I'm nothing compared to those cosmic superstars!
看开点，兄弟，何必把目光放得那么宏大？
Look at the bright side, mate. Why do you have to think it that way?
光是能来到梦境，就已经证明了你的不平凡——真正的普通人既付不起房费，也不会收到邀请。
The fact that you're here in the Dreamscape proves you're extraordinary. Real ordinary people can't afford a room and won't get invited.
总有些人在现实就活得匆匆，到了梦里也急吼吼的，不知道为了什么……
There are always people who rush through life in reality and even in the Dreamscape. I wonder why...
现实酒店的房间按天收费。咱们有点积蓄，还能待一段时间…但那些穷游的家伙，就得分秒必争了。
Rooms in the hotel in reality are charged daily. We have some savings and can stay here for some time... but those poor travelers will have to seize every moment.
唉，有时候，就这么静静地看着水也挺好。让生活慢一点……
Well, sometimes it's just nice to sit back and watch the water... enjoying your life at a slow pace...
现实已经很累了，来到梦里不就是为了放松嘛。
Reality is exhausting. Coming to the Dreamscape is all about getting relaxed, right?
咦，怎么投不进币，刚还好好的……
Hey, why can't I insert coins? It was working just now...
小赌怡情，大赌伤身；及时收手，切勿沉迷。
A small gamble for leisure's sake, but don't risk more than you can take.
嘿，这游艺机…长这么大我还是头一回见！
Hey, this slot machine... I've never seen anything like this before!
哼…我偏要继续玩，难道你还能反抗不成？
Hmph... will you stop me if I insist on playing?
赌狗赌狗，赌到最后，一无所有。
Foolish bets will lead to empty pockets.
哎，这玩意怎么还骂人呐？！
Hey, why is this damned machine jinxing me!?
我抢到知更鸟的票了，真是千钧一发！
I got the tickets for Robin's concert! That was a close call!
真的？太酷了！你怎么做到的？
Really? Awesome! How did you get them?
有俩座位靠近厕所，一开始没人愿意占，我手快给抢到了。
There were two seats near the restroom that no one initially wanted, so I quickly grabbed them.
呃…先不吐槽梦里居然有厕所这回事，那地方视角能好吗？
Ummm... setting aside the oddity of having a restroom in a dream, can you actually see anything from that angle?
哎哟，有票看就不错了！要是这次没去上知更鸟的演唱会，之后有你后悔的。
Hey, you should be grateful we've even got tickets! You'll definitely regret it if you miss Robin's concert!
那好，我去准备看演出用的礼服。
Fine, I'll go prepare my outfit for the concert.
此刻在你眼前有报纸一份，斑驳字迹潦草涂遍它全身；
A newspaper lies before you, scribbles abound. In its heart, bitterness, a desire profound.
世人只得见它披挂的时讯，你却偏摸索它跼蹐的灵魂；
The world knows it for its garments, its headlines bold, but you seek its essence, its stories untold.
那么，你可听闻，它心中无限苦闷——生为报纸非所愿，它只想做个蹩脚诗人！
Despite birth as a paper, its plea resonates true. Yearning to be a poet, terrible through and through!
…我觉得城市的高空绿化还有进步的空间……
...I think there's still room for improvement in the city's overhead greenery...
…在我看来，他们最好及时调整本地的落户政策，不然迟早要出问题……
...In my opinion, they'd better adjust their local settlement policy in time, or there'll be problems sooner or later...
…鉴于美梦剧团近来频频遭袭，我认为家族有必要出台「梦境造物保护法」，你觉得呢……
...Considering the recent attacks on the Sweet Dreams Troupe, I think The Family should introduce a protection act for the Dreamscape creations... What do you think?
别一直「汪」来「汪」去的，你到底是同意还是反对啊！
Don't just give me "woof"! Are you agreeing or disagreeing?
汪…呃，我是说——有没有可能，我只是一条狗？
Woof... Uh, I mean, is it possible that I'm just an ordinary dog?
它们都说我们两个酒瓶在一起挺奇怪的……
They all say it is weird for us two bottles to stay together...
原来我只觉得那些家伙多管闲事，但现在…和我在一起你真的开心吗？
I thought those people were just nosy, but now... are you really happy with me?
你不说我都忘了，公园那边冰淇淋杂耍表演就要开始了，我们快过去吧。
Oh, thank you for reminding me! I almost forgot the ice cream acrobatic show at the park is about to start. Let's go there.
…我想了很久，要不我们还是分……
...I've been thinking about this. Maybe we should just break...
嗯，我也喜欢海胆味的那支，看起来特别滑稽。
Yeah, I prefer the sea urchin flavor, too! It looks so funny!
你■■■到底有没有在听我说话啊！
Are you even ■■■■■■■ listening to me!?
好好好，看完表演我们再去影城转转。
Alright, alright, we'll visit the movie theme park after the show.
「我发现你今天有点怪，怪可爱」……
"You look a bit unusual today, unusually cute..."
嗯…通过词性变换造就承续与转折，从而实现「幽默」效果……
Hmmm... using word changes to create continuations and twists... and thus effects of "humor"...
「我知道你是什么血型——你是我的理想型」？
"I know your blood type... you're my ideal type"...
以相同语素为基础进行概念偷换…是个新思路，但是在不熟悉该语言的前提下，容易造成认知混乱……
Conceptual replacement based on the same morphemes... It's a new idea, but prone to cognitive dissonance when familiarity with that language is low...
你笑什么，是我的分析有问题吗？果然，对我来说你们有机生命的情感表达方式还是太复杂了……
What are you laughing at? Is my analysis incorrect? Indeed, the way you organic beings express your emotions is much too complicated for me...
不不不，我觉得你已经充分掌握了这门艺术精髓，可以去实践一下了。
No, not at all. Actually, I think you've grasped the essence of this art well enough to practice it.
实践？是说让我去「开展一段邂逅」吗？
Practice? Do you mean I should have an encounter?
不，我是让你去说单口相声。
No, I'm asking you to do a comedy skit.
I can't figure it out! I just can't!
你说它一个美梦排排乐，劝我戒赌？是它有病、我有病、还是我俩都有病？！！
What the heck? This Dreamy Slots is urging me to quit gambling? Am I off my rocker, is it made, or are we both insane?
克、克劳迪娅小姐！啊啊啊——是活的克劳迪娅小姐！
C—Claudia! Oh my god! It's Miss Claudia in the flesh!
终于见到本人了！好耶！不枉咱们在这里蹲了足足一个礼拜……
Finally, in person! Yeah! Staying here for a week is paying off...
嘘！小点声！你这样把人吓跑了怎么办？
Shush! Keep your voice down! What if you scare her away?
呃…冷静…好、我冷静…冷静…呼，好多了……
Uh... yeah... I'll chill... Yeah... I'm much better now...
要说还是你靠谱啊，直面偶像竟然还能面不改色。走吧，咱们现在过去假装偶遇，趁机要个签名！
You're so awesome! You've managed to keep your cool while facing your idol. Let's just pretend to "accidentally" bump into her and maybe ask for an autograph!
…嗯？周围也没什么状况啊…你还在等什么？
...Huh? What are you waiting for...? There's nothing around here.
我…我紧张不行吗！等我先做一下心理建设！
I... I'm getting nervous, okay? Let me calm down a bit first!
…做了大半个月，都快完工了，结果突然跟我说什么「不够惊险」，关键他之前也没提过这个需求啊……
...I've been working on it for a month. Now it's almost done, and he suddenly told me it's not "thrilling" enough... but he never mentioned that requirement before...
太过分了，那你怎么处理的？
That's tough. How did you handle it?
还能怎么处理，改呗，结果几天后我拿着设计稿去找他——就是之前给你看过那个——又被打回去了……
What else could I do? I made some changes and presented the new design to him a few days later — the one I showed you earlier — and I got rejected again...
为什么啊，那个不是挺好的吗？
是不是觉得离谱？更离谱的还在后面呢——这次我全方位多角度地确认了他的需求，又花了一个礼拜给出一版设计……
Ridiculous, right? Guess what happened next? I considered his requirements comprehensively and holistically and spent another week coming up with a new version...
是「蜘蛛小径花园」吗？那个我看了，感觉特别好！
It's the Spider Path Garden, right? That's an awesome design!
And then it got rejected again.
哼…他看了半天，最后和我说，「要不咱们还是用第一版方案吧」。
Well... He hesitated for a long time and finally said... "Maybe let's just use the initial plan."
这都多少起袭击事件了，到底什么人啊，一天到晚就盯着「美梦剧团」祸害……
How many attacks have there been? Those culprits seem to target only the Sweet Dreams Troupe... Why?
真是！简直丧心病狂，竟然对那些可爱…咳！我是说，竟然如此肆无忌惮地破坏匹诺康尼的公共财产！
They're insane! They dare to harm those lovely... Ahem! I mean, they dare to vandalize the public property of Penacony! That's unacceptable!
…最麻烦的是谣言已经在宾客之间传开了，多离谱的都有…要是再不赶紧处理掉那家伙，保不准要出什么大乱子。
...The worst part is that super wild rumors have already spread among the guests... Things might escalate into a big mess if the culprit remains at large.
没错！只要那坏东西一天没落网，美梦剧团就一天免不了担惊受怕……
Exactly! The Sweet Dreams Troupe won't be free from fear until they catch the culprits...
哎你知道吗，就在刚才还有个「骰子」问我什么时候能抓到犯人呢。可怜的小东西，这些日子肯定吓坏了……
You know? Just earlier, a "die" asked me when we'll catch the culprit. Poor little thing must be scared these days...
我之前是不是提醒过你？！你说，我是不跟你强调好几回了……
Didn't I warn you before? I've told you several times...
就你什么都知道！要真那么大能耐，你怎么不提前把错漏给处理了啊，当什么事后大聪明。
You think you know everything!? If you're so capable, why didn't you just handle the problem beforehand? Yeah, easy to see it now, right?
哼，没用的老东西，多大年纪了还不懂收敛脾气，活该没一次吵架赢得过我。
Tsk, you just can't control your temper, you old idiot. That's why you've never won an argument with me. You deserve it.
这次的项目又累又危险，还不知道什么时候能结束…唉，可真是个苦差事啊……
This project is exhausting and dangerous, and I've no idea when it'll be over... *sigh* A tough job, really...
算了，还是聊点开心的吧。修缮完成后你想去哪里？
Forget about it. Let's talk about something happy. Where do you want to go once it's all fixed up?
「蓝调的时刻」吧，看看能不能来一场浪漫的邂逅……
Blue Hour, I guess. Maybe I'll have a romantic encounter or something...
不错，确实该好好休息一下。我都想好了，等到完成手头的工作，我就回一趟老家，和未婚妻结……
Sounds great. It's about time to take a break. As for me, once this project is done, I'll go back to my hometown and get married....
等等等—别说了！你还想不想回去了？！
Wait, wait! Stop! NEVER say something like that!
被打开的宝箱…就像被喝光的苏乐达瓶，只会从梦境里消失……
Just like an empty SoulGlad bottle... An opened chest will vanish from the Dreamscape...
我还有梦想，还有大好青春。真不想就这样结束啊……
I'm still young! I still have lots of time to live! I don't want to end it here...
如果有选择的话，我其实想做一只小猫……
If I was given a choice, I want to be a kitten...
It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.
It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.
我们是不是在哪里见过？
Have we met each other before?
I think I've seen your face on a wanted poster.
It should be our turn soon.
Gotta figure out what to say first.
Ahem, if it's okay with you...
Aren't you here just to say hi?
Why are you such a nervous wreck?
I'm applying for a loan from The Family.
What a coincidence! I'm here for a loan too.
Which compartment did I put it...
Maybe they need to give us queue numbers.
您好，请问有什么需要吗？
所以我们究竟还要等多久啊？这都已经快两个小时了吧！
So just how much longer do we have to wait? It's almost been two hours!
It must be our turn soon...
知不知道时间就是金钱啊！啊？如果按分钟来算，我现在至少已经损失了<unbreak>21864</unbreak>苜蓿币了……
Don't you know time is money!? Huh? If I'm calculating by the minute, I've already lost <unbreak>21,864</unbreak> Alfalfa credits...
明明上周才重新整理过，现在又想不起来了。
I just went through and organized this again last week and it's already slipped my mind.
也不知道在梦里多吃脑花管不管用……
I don't even know if eating brains helps with memory in a dream...
谐乐大典在即，现在又出了这种事，您看……
The Charmony Festival is just round the corner and now something like this happens. Look...
孩子，不要恐慌，更不要让疑虑拖累了行义的脚步。
Child, do not panic. You must not allow your doubts to slow the footsteps of righteousness.
这些乱象终会被斧正。在此之前，我们应当保持对{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}道路的坚定。
This chaos will all be righted eventually. Until then, we must maintain our resolution to the path of the {RUBY_B#"Harmony"}Great One{RUBY_E#}.
Why won't they let us in?
Is there something going on inside?
A scoop? I want ice cream, too!
There are loads of people here!
This is a good place for a rest.
Boss, the actors are striking again!
It's fine, I still have the contract.
I found the one leading them!
He said he's going to the IPC.
Not only will they pay the penalty...
They want to buy the whole theme park!
抱歉，我们不提供相关服务…
Sorry, we do not offer those services...
It's not even been that long.
You're already too tired to move?
Lying down at home is the best...
Friend! Have you not heard of me?
I am a representative sent by the IPC!
Oh, then I am the Watchmaker.
Look, this is the investment plan...
The theme park sees a lot of footfalls.
There's no way you'll make a loss.
If you have a problem go ask them on the left.
Shh. She's been having trouble sleeping lately.
The Family keeps giving her extra work.
I hope I can help her take care of some of it.
How did it end up like this...
这不是一般人能修好的吧？
This isn't an easy fix, is it?
Oh no, I dropped my phone!
See! What did I tell you?
It's fine, we're in a dream...
It'll be back the next time I enter.
The theme park has three themed areas...
You can take as many pictures as you like here...
还可以和动漫人物握手~
You can even shake hands with cartoon characters~
得用内置摄像记录下来。
I have to record this on my built-in camera.
There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...
Please be aware of your safety at all times.
There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...
Please be aware of your safety at all times.
I'm here to keep an eye on the situation.
Nice, now do a cool pose...
This is going to be the best one!
Let me give you some light...
你简直是全宇宙的明星！
要是有一位主角就好了…
If only we had a main character...
这里应该演一段对手戏。
We should act out a fight scene here.
A tense and exciting espionage scene...
Don't breathe, we don't want to get caught!
…他是如此沉稳可靠、如此帅气逼人…一切敌人都将在他的利爪与獠牙面前不堪一击……
...He's so calm and reliable, so strong and handsome... No enemy could stand against his sharp claws and ferocious fangs...
…等等，你这到底是看上了个什么玩意？
...Wait, what kind of nonsense has got you hooked this time?
不许你这么说他！他是完美的！
Don't speak about him like that! He is perfect!
行吧，所以你那位心上人究竟是…？
Fine, so this man you've fallen for is...?
当然是伟大的、迷人的哈努兄弟——的立牌！
Of course it is the great and mesmerizing Hanu's... character stand!
你这是什么反应？别忘了这可是梦里，一堆礼物盒都能说话，美梦排排乐为什么就不能爱上立牌？
What is that reaction? This is a dream you know! If a pile of presents can talk, then why can't a Dreamy Slots machine fall in love with a character stand?
啊…这就是有机生物特有的美吗…毛茸茸、软乎乎……
Ah... Is this the beauty unique to organic organisms... So fluffy and warm...
如果传说中的「伊德莉拉」也是这般模样，我一定至死不渝地信仰「纯美」……
If this is what the legendary "Idrila" is like, I would follow the Beauty to my death!
这世界上真的有谁能拒绝毛茸茸吗！反正我不行！
Is there anyone in this world that can resist something fluffy like this? I know I can't!
…说起这个，你到底什么时候才能让我摸摸你的绒球？它看起来手感真的……
...Come to think of it, when are you going to let me touch your fluff ball? It looks so...
下午好，怀特曼先生，我谨代表家族向您发出邀请——各位家人已决定向您敞开怀抱。
Good afternoon, Mr. Whiteman. As a representative of The Family, I would like to extend a sincere invitation to join us... Our members have decided to open their arms to you.
您是一位优秀的设计师，想必会与隐夜鸫的家人们有许多共同话题。另一方面，梦境里的琐事最近愈发增多，我们需要新的筑梦师来协助维护这场美梦。

You are an outstanding designer, I am sure that you would have much to discuss with the Nightingale Family members. What's more, there has been a rise in trifling affairs in the Dreamscape of late, and we require Dreamweavers to assist in maintaining this beautiful dream.
I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?
您有权拒绝，不过那样我们会感到深深的遗憾。
You have the right to refuse, but we would be extremely regretful should that be your decision.
I need to consider this offer first.
当然可以，我们会在这里等待您的答复。
Of course, I shall be here awaiting your answer.
所以，我们现在是那种关系了吗？
So... Are we buds now or what?
还不是时候，我希望能在一个更浪漫的场合听你说这句话。
Hmmm. Maybe not yet. Ask me later during a show or something.
不如等到《寻星顽童》重映的时候再说吧。在影院的散场灯光下，我想我会同意的。
How about we wait for the Urchin Starhunters to perform again and speak then? Maybe I'll think you're my friend when there's a bit more light and noise.
终于达成了，我们的夙愿…过了快半个琥珀纪，我们总算攒够了追梦的钱。
It's finally here, our long-held wish has come true... It's been half an Amber Era, but we finally saved enough to come and chase our dreams!
你也很欣慰吧，亲爱的？可惜凭我的寿命，怕是没法陪你再来一次了。
Are you happy too, my love? It's just a shame that with my old age, I may not be able to come here with you again.
至少这一次，我们要尽情游玩、不留遗憾……
At least this time, I will indulge to my heart's content and leave no regrets...
老者身边的智械始终一言不发。或许他不能理解这种忧伤，又或是他找不出适合安慰的话语、唯有沉默。

The Intellitron by the old lady's side remained silent through this whole exchange. Perhaps he cannot comprehend this kind of sorrow, or perhaps he cannot find the words to comfort her and has nothing but silence to offer.
咱们都等了多久了，他人呢？连个影子都没见着。
How long has it been, where is he? There's no sign of him anywhere!
嗯…可能他刚巧有什么事呢，要不再等等？
Hmm... Maybe he has something he needs to do, why don't we wait a little longer?
等等等——就知道等！自从和他一起约看电影，我就再没见到过片头！
Wait, wait, wait... Is that all you ever say!? Ever since we started to go to movies with him, I've missed the opening credits every time!
你说我这样会不会被认出来？我好歹也算个小明星诶。
Do you think they'll recognize me like this? I am a bit of a minor celebrity, after all.
我认为与其担心被狗仔队偷拍，你不如多关注下宇宙毁灭的可能性——至少后者比前者概率高得多。
I think, rather than worrying about being snapped by the paparazzi, you should spend your time thinking about the destruction of the universe... At least that is actually likely!
什么？你知道要是没了我，匹诺康尼影视界会有多大的损失吗？！
What!? Do you know what would happen to the Penacony Visioscape if I weren't around!?
我明白，这大概就像高能物理学界失去了小亚当。
I do. It would be like if the high-energy physics world lost Little Adam.
我在上个琥珀纪手搓出的一台计算机，在进行第六次四则运算后就卡死、崩溃了。
It's a computer that I built by hand in the last Amber Era. It crashed and fell apart after completing its sixth formula.
How long has it been, where is he?
Why don't we wait a little longer?
We'd like to invite you to join The Family.
I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?
Shh, now is not the time!
Let's wait for the Urchin Starhunters to come back on.
我们的夙愿终于达成了…
Are you happy too, my love?
我这样会不会被认出来？
Do you think they'll recognize me like this?
我相信狗仔队没那么闲。
I don't think the paparazzi are that bored...
How could he be so cute!?
This one's a bit worn out...
Better find someone to fix it.
比赛都结束了谁关心这个？
Did you place a bid on this competition?
再输下去，裤子都要赔光了。
