You ask it about fortune for today, but it remains mute. Perhaps because it's just a decorative item.
它并非简单的雕塑，而是一艘能够正常行驶的航模。
It is not a simple sculpture, but a model ship that can operate along a route as per its designations.
天舶司会定期举办微型星槎竞速赛，活动口号是：「快快快！冲冲冲！星槎战士在行动！」
The Sky-Faring Commission regularly holds micro-starskiff racing competitions, with the slogan: "Quick quick quick! Rush rush rush! Starskiff Guardians take action!"
这架微型星槎的载重量不足一个帕姆，还是不要指望用它做逃生舱了。
This micro starskiff has a payload capacity of less than one Pom-Pom, so it's best not to expect it to serve as an escape pod.
魔方秘社为「潜在高价值用户」特别赠送的纪念品，旨在鼓励用户随时随地枘凿六合。
The Hex Club presents this special souvenir to "potential high-value users" to encourage them to explore the Hexanexus anytime, anywhere.
只要人类还躺着睡觉，便携式掌上游戏机就还有市场——便携版枘凿六合的设计者如此坚信着。
As long as humanity continues to sleep lying down, there will be a market for portable handheld gaming consoles — so believes the designer of the portable Hexanexus.
没有一丝使用痕迹，已经有点吃灰了。
It shows no signs of use and is already gathering dust.
钟表小子站在收藏架上，露出温暖亲切的笑容。
Clockie stands on the display shelf, wearing a warm and friendly smile.
具备闹铃功能，能够用一百句钟表小子经典台词叫你起床。
Equipped with an alarm function, it can wake you up with a hundred classic lines from Clockie.
「滴~答~{NICKNAME}！早上好！美梦小镇新的一天开始了~」
"Tick~ tock~ {NICKNAME}! Good morning! A new day has begun in Dreamville~"
{TEXTJOIN#87}交接完成后附赠的实体纪念品，相比梦中，它带给你更加真实的触感。
The physical souvenir provided after the {TEXTJOIN#87} was handed over to you offers a more tangible sensation than that in your dreams.
你仔细打量这艘属于自己的船，船身的每道弧度在你眼里都是如此完美。
You carefully examine your personal ship. Every curve of the hull appears perfect in your eyes.
你轻轻拨动船头，模型在悬浮力场里滴溜溜地打了个转。
Gently nudging the bow, the model spins gracefully in the hovering force field.
你想起了在垃圾桶王国的冒险奇旅，想起了并肩作战的伙伴们。
You recall the adventurous journey in the Trashcan Kingdom and think of your comrades who fought alongside you.
它们赴汤蹈火，深信你能够带领自己推翻塔塔洛夫，赢回被剥夺已久的尊严与自由。
They ventured through hell and high water, firmly believing you could lead them to overthrow Tatalov and regain their long-lost dignity and freedom.
虽然只是一场梦，醒来还是很感动。
Although it was just a dream, waking up still leaves you moved.
垃圾糕正在你的房间里休息。看到你来了，它向你友好地道了一声「喵」。
The trash cake is resting in your room. Upon seeing you, it greets you with a friendly "Meow."
金属桶盖手感冰凉又光滑…它不会是什么冷血动物吧？
The metal lid feels cold and smooth... It can't be a cold-blooded creature, can it?
你想到了「回家故意不摸宠物」挑战，并决定实验一番——垃圾糕怡然自得地舔着尾巴，完全不顾你火热的眼神。
You recall the "Challenge of Ignoring Your Pet on Purpose" and decide to give it a try — while the trash cake happily licks its tail, completely unfazed by your eager gaze.
你输了，在这场精神角力里。
垃圾猫糕的桶里是什么呢？
What's inside the trash cat cake's can?
你敲了敲桶身，发出清脆的声响…你最终还是克制住了掀开桶盖的冲动。
You tap the can, producing a crisp sound... but ultimately, you suppress the impulse to lift the lid.
你开始装修房间后，这只扑满也随即拓展了自己的探索范围。如今它在你的房间里漫步，好奇地嗅着每一个角落。
After you started redecorating your room, this trotter also expanded its exploratory range. Now it wanders around your room, curiously sniffing every corner.
Why not play with it a little?
它热情地蹭向你的手背，对你的关注感到十分兴奋。
It eagerly rubs against your hand, feeling very excited by your attention.
扑满发出兴奋的声音，时不时拱起鼻子做出回应。它很开心。
The trotter lets out a squeal of excitement, scrunching up its nose frequently in response. It's very happy.
扑满的鼻子格外敏感，有什么东西正在酝酿......
The trotter's nose is extremely sensitive. Something seems to be brewing...
一个巨大的喷嚏...幸亏以太灵没有鼻涕。
It is a gigantic sneeze... Thankfully Aether Spirits don't have snot.
扑满的逃跑天赋同样反映在它身体的各个部位上。你试图抓住它灵巧的耳朵，手速却怎么都不够用。
The trotter's instinct for escape is reflected in every part of its body. You try to catch its dexterous ears, but your hand is just not fast enough.
听见了吗？那是胜利的哼声。
Did you hear that? That's the oink of victory.
银河中有句箴言：「扑满的屁股摸不得」，即便它又小又可爱。
There is a saying across the cosmos: "One must never touch a trotter's butt," no matter how cute or small it is.
你的举动让扑满很不满，它也该得到尊重。
The trotter is very displeased with what you have done. It deserves respect, too.
扑满看上去还很精神。人不能把有限的精力投入到无限的玩弄扑满中去。
The trotter still looks full of energy, but people can't afford to put all of their limited energy into endless play sessions with trotters.
Declare the room rules to it.
这里是你的地盘，你的地盘，必须得听你的。
This is your territory. Your territory, and it must listen to you.
它对「床」的兴趣不大。还是在地上打滚比较自由。
It doesn't seem very interested in the bed. Rolling around on the floor feels freer.
它的意思是：「就分我一口嘛！」
Its response means, "Just share a bite with me!"
它小声应答。似乎在避免「喧哗」。
It answers softly, as if trying to avoid making noise.
As if it could play on the computer!
In any case, it has to obey!
对于一只自由自在的扑满来说，这些规则委实太严苛了。
For a free-spirited trotter, these rules are indeed too strict.
For now, ask it to leave.
只有收到邀请函的客人才能进入你的私人空间！
Only guests with an invitation can enter your private space!
这沙发好软啊…感觉是个睡觉的好地方。
This sofa is so soft... It feels like a good place to sleep.
Hehe, just flop down and sleep~
Maybe it's better not to sleep here.
怎么一觉醒来，我回到自己的房间了？
How did I wake up back in my room?
并不是梦游哦～有人小心翼翼地将你送了回来。
No, it's not sleepwalking — someone carefully brought you back.
没错，那人小心翼翼，生怕将你惊醒。
That's right. That person was cautious, afraid of waking you.
是哪位好心人送我回来的？
Which kind-hearted person brought me back?
这并不重要，因为列车组的每个人都会这样做。他们每个人都时刻关爱着你，也时刻关爱着彼此。
It doesn't matter, because everyone in the Express Crew would do the same. Each one cares for you and for each other.
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「造物引擎模型」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Engine of Creation model."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「穷观阵摆件」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Matrix of Prescience ornament."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「星槎航模」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Model Starskiff."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「枘凿六合便携版」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Portable Hexanexus."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「钟表小子闹钟」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Clockie Alarm Clock."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「{TEXTJOIN#87}模型」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "{TEXTJOIN#87} model."
你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「垃圾桶摆件」上。
As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Trashcan ornament."
当星宿的回响散去，你的耳边接踵而来的是…浪潮的声音？
As the echoes of the constellations fall silent, the next sound to meet your ears is... waves?
陌生的呼唤带着渴望，将你的神识引入池中……
The unfamiliar call carries a longing to take your soul's essence into the pool...
Listen to the Voice of Constellation
A place for just the two of us...
抵达了行进路线的下一站
You have arrived at the next step along your route
「奇迹宝珠」让此处的时间流向发生了改变，暂时无法开启追忆残像
Miracle Orbs have altered the flow of time in this area. Fragments of Recollection cannot be activated at the moment.
每一场伟大冒险的背后，都离不开大地兽的身影！你好，陌生人，看你的眼神，你也像我一样喜欢大地兽，对吗？
No grand adventure is complete without a dromas! Hey there, stranger. Judging by that glint in your eyes, you're a fan of dromas just like me, right?
我是伊阿宋，目前管理着这支商队「阿尔戈」。奥赫玛的大地兽都是我的好朋友，它们也是多亏了我才有自己的名字。
I'm Iason, the manager of this caravan "Argo." All dromas in Okhema are my good friends, and I'm the one who gave each of them a name.
大地兽的名字都是你取的？
是啊。阿斯忒里翁、欧斐摩斯、卡斯托尔、波鲁克斯、还有最强壮的赫拉克勒斯——个顶个的好名字。
Exactly. Asterion, Euphemus, Castor, Pollux, and the mightiest of them all, Heracles — all solid names.
What does your caravan trade in?
什么都做！「阿尔戈」原本只做大宗货物的运输，但现在如你所见，大家都不容易，我们也要尽己所能。
Everything! Argo used to just carry bulk goods, but times have been rough, so we've expanded our business.
最近世道挺乱，你要是有什么东西想从外面运进奥赫玛来，或者就是想买一些稀奇物件，找我们「阿尔戈」下单，那是最安全的。赫拉克勒斯像黄金裔一样值得信赖！
Things aren't as calm as they used to be. If you need to move anything into Okhema or find something rare, Argo's your safest bet. Trust me, Heracles is just as dependable as the Chrysos Heirs!
据说在遥远的黄金世，有一艘会飞的大船叫做阿尔戈，而他的船主也叫做伊阿宋。那位伊阿宋用飞船载着他的大地兽朋友纵横世界、见义勇为，就像今天的黄金裔一样。

Legend has it that in the Era Chrysea eons ago, there was this massive airship called Argo, whose captain was also named Iason. Iason sailed the world with his dromas buddies, helping out those in need, much like the Chrysos Heirs do these days.
朋友，看你的眼神就知道，你也向往着和大地兽伙伴一起冒险的生活，没错吧？
Friend, I can see that spark in your eyes — the yearning for adventure with your dromas buddies. Am I right?
哎呀，这你可找对人了，那边工坊里的人都说我是「大地兽偶像制作人」，没有人比我更懂大地兽们的故事。你想听谁的？
You've found the dromas master! Down at the workshop, they all call me the Dromas Idol Producer! When it comes to those marvelous creatures, I'm your go-to person! Whose story catches your eye?
从{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}庇护下的第一个生命，到大地兽第一次行走世间，阿斯忒利翁已经经历许多。

Asterion has been on quite the journey, starting from the time they were chosen as the first living being under the protection of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, all the way to when the young dromas began exploring the world.
不幸的是，过去的伟大冒险也让它内心伤痕累累，患上了名为{RUBY_B#不愿见人}广场恐惧症{RUBY_E#}的焦虑障碍。
Unfortunately, those arduous adventures have taken their toll on Asterion, causing a deep anxiety disorder known as {RUBY_B#Reluctance to Meet People}agoraphobia{RUBY_E#}.
如果你看到它总是把头藏在{RUBY_B#兽舍}自家{RUBY_E#}的篷布里面，还请体量下一位迟暮英雄只愿安度晚年的心情。
If you ever catch Asterion seeking solace in their {RUBY_B#barn}sanctuary{RUBY_E#}, please remember they're just an old hero looking for a quiet retirement.
欧斐摩斯是阿斯忒利翁的战友，也是除了赫拉克勒斯之外最强壮的大地兽。欧斐摩斯曾跟随着我，在黑潮侵袭之前抢救出了科尔基斯的稀世珍宝——
Euphemus is a close comrade of Asterion's, and the mightiest dromas after Heracles. We once made it to Corchis just before the black tide hit and managed to salvage its legendary treasures...
Four crates packed with rubber ducks!
唉，那一趟可实在点背，四个那么大的箱子，我还以为肯定装了什么金银财宝——结果价值还抵不过路途上的开销。
Yeah, that was an unlucky trip, I admit. I was hoping for some real treasures in those crates, but those rubber ducks barely covered our costs.
早知道应该就地打开那几个箱子，让橡皮鸭子们跟着黑潮随波逐流拉倒……
I should have just popped open those crates right there and let those ducks ride the black tide...
大地兽卡斯托尔、波鲁克斯
Let's talk about Castor and Pollux.
卡斯托尔和波鲁克斯是两头年轻的大地兽，卡斯托尔比波鲁克斯稍稍年长一点，它们都还不曾经历那些考验生死的冒险。
Castor and Pollux are a pair of young dromases. Castor is a bit older than Pollux, and neither has faced any life-or-death adventures yet.
不过，为了它们将来的生计着想，我拟了一份非常有吸引力的简历，可以把它们包装成一对前所未有的双胞胎组合！来来来，我念给你听听：
However, in preparation for their future business, I've concocted a cool pitch that could make them the ultimate duo! Let me share it with you!
受{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}黄金之茧{RUBY_E#}的垂青，命运为我们带来了一对罕见的孪生大地兽——卡斯托尔与波鲁克斯！诞生自{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}的它们拥有非凡的自信与默契，就像两位尚未接受洗礼但命中已注定成为英雄的黄金裔！

Through the {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Chrysalis of Gold{RUBY_E#}'s grace, we present to you a rare pair of twin dromases, Castor and Pollux! Hailing from {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, these two boast impressive teamwork and confidence, much like two Chrysos Heirs gearing up for their heroic fate!
…阿格莱雅大人应该不会把这当成虚假宣传吧？
...Lady Aglaea won't consider this false advertising, right?
哈哈，你总算问到了，我最喜欢的赫拉克勒斯！听着，赫拉克勒斯不光是所有现役的大地兽里最强壮、最聪明的——就算是萨白尼从黑潮里复活，那里也找不到比它更好的大地兽～

Aha! You've finally brought up my favorite, Heracles! Let me tell you, he's not just the strongest and smartest dromas around today — Even if Sabany came back from the black tide, no dromas there would outshine him!
这些年来，赫拉克勒斯跟着我完成了无数不可能的任务，我挑选了其中最困难的十二次，将它们称为「赫拉克勒斯的十二试炼」。
Heracles has been my loyal partner through countless impossible tasks. Among them, I've dubbed the toughest twelve challenges he faced as The Twelve Trials of Heracles.
想了解一下吗？这是我给赫拉克勒斯专门撰写的故事，你也收一本吧。
Eager to hear more about his adventures? I've penned an epic just for Heracles. Here, take a copy.
Wish you all the best in your business.
哈哈，借您吉言。改天说不定还指望着您照顾生意呢，再会啊～
Thank you! Feel free to swing by and grab anything that catches your eye! Catch you later!
Wish you all the best in your business.
哈哈，借您吉言。改天说不定还指望着您照顾生意呢，再会啊～
Thank you! Feel free to swing by and grab anything that catches your eye! Catch you later!
What rare stuff do you have?
好嘞！不过你可别笑我，小店最近存货不多，仅剩的都是些大地兽纪念品了。
Feel free to pick out anything that catches your eye. Sadly, my stock's running low these days, and all I've got left are dromas souvenirs.
这位客人，最后一只黄金裔陶罐刚刚卖出。如果你是为此而来，对不住让你白跑一趟了！
The last Chrysos Heir dolium just got snatched up, dear customer. If that's what you came for, I'm sorry for the disappointment!
哈哈，看来是我误会您的来意了。只怪近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的。
Haha, it looks like I misread your interest. Lately, it seems like everyone who stops by is on the hunt for that specific line of products.
哈哈，看来是我误会您的来意了。只怪近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的。
Haha, it looks like I misread your interest. Lately, it seems like everyone who stops by is on the hunt for that specific line of products.
我都预购十年了还没货！
I placed an order for a dolium ten years ago! And it still hasn't arrived!
向您再次致歉！尽管这店还没开过十年。近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的，一直缺少库存。
My apologies once again! Even though my shop has been around for a decade, most recent visitors have been on the lookout for my Chrysos Heir Dolia, and I've never managed to keep enough in stock.
某日我望见在城里巡逻的白厄大人，灵光一闪将奥赫玛黄金裔们的英雄事迹绘制在了陶罐之上。
As for their origin, one day, while spotting Lord Phainon patrolling the city, I felt inspired and painted the epic tales of Okhema's Chrysos Heirs on a dolium.
大人们神武英勇，容貌悦人，定是「黄金之茧」墨涅塔的蝶翼扇动让鳞粉落在他们身上，才生出如此完美的人来！
Their courage and elegance must come from the fluttering wings of Mnestia, the Chrysalis of Gold! Their magical powder must have imbued them with such perfection!
我的陶罐自然也沾染了这份荣耀，如今每到发售日，黄金裔的崇拜者都要将我这小店围得水泄不通。
Naturally, my dolia carry this same honor. Now, fans of the Chrysos Heirs flock to my humble shop on sale days.
说实话，我还怪不习惯的，毕竟不久前我还是个穷困潦倒、无人理睬的街头陶罐小画家，终日闷在自己的世界，偶尔在那儿街对角的广场边上支个铺，画点陶罐卖来糊口。

Honestly, it's all a bit surreal to me. Not too long ago, I was still a struggling artist lost in my thoughts, setting up a booth on the plaza across the street, painting on dolia here and there to make ends meet.
这黄金裔陶罐卖脱销后，我店面开起来了，人也小有名气，明日我还要去云石天宫，为某位元老老爷的大寿作副画像。

After the frenzy over these Chrysos Heir Dolia, I opened this shop and gained some recognition. Tomorrow, I'm off to the Marmoreal Palace to paint a portrait for a distinguished elder's grand birthday bash!
只不过…总觉得少了点什么……
I get where that comes from!
想不到，您貌如初生的新月般年轻，竟对人生领悟如此透彻。
It's remarkable to see someone as young as a new crescent moon with such profound insights into life.
Isn't it amazing to achieve both fame and fortune?
…您瞧，此刻{RUBY_B#五大时刻之三}明晰时{RUBY_E#}时光正好，就不提昨日苦闷啦。
...Let's just bask in the bright light of the {RUBY_B#Third of the Five Moments}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} and forget the days of sorrow.
除了陶罐，我这儿还卖四处寻来的奇珍古玩，也是我的心头好，看到感兴趣的请和我讲。
Apart from the Dolia, I also offer a range of ancient artifacts I've gathered from all over. If anything piques your interest, just let me know.
手绘陶罐，奇珍古玩，价格不贵，随便看随便瞧。
Hand-painted pots and ancient artifacts, all at reasonable prices. Feel free to take a look around.
Let's talk about some other topics...
Of course! What's on your mind?
黄金裔陶罐是正版授权吗？
Are your Chrysos Heir Dolia officially licensed?
那当然，艺术家的版权意识可是很到位的。
Definitely. You know, artists take their copyrights seriously.
我挨个征得过他们的同意，我一度想放弃时，还是他们中的某位大人开导我不要为拥抱商业性而内疚自责。
I secured permission from each heir individually. Even when I had doubts about commercializing them, one wise heir actually reassured me not to feel guilty.
还有位颇为负责的大人，偶尔也会来与我探讨人体绘画之美妙哩，绘制肌肉线条如何流畅又饱满，哪个款式的肩甲能显得身形更加宽阔……

There's another responsible heir who drops by occasionally, discussing the beauty of portraying the human form, the intricate lines of muscles, and the armor styles that highlight the body's figure...
Is that something you can divulge?
无…无可奉告，我不会透露客户隐私的。
I... I'm sorry, but I won't delve into my customers' privacy.
I think I can already guess who that is.
可…可不兴这么说，传出去以为我透露客户隐私了。
Please... don't say anything like that. If that gets out, people might think I've breached my customers' privacy.
为何选择在陶罐上作画？
Why did you choose to paint on dolia?
绘制陶罐是翁法罗斯最古老的记叙方式之一，我喜欢绘制古老的传说，还是要用最传统的方式才有岁月沉淀的韵味。
Because painting on dolia is one of the oldest storytelling traditions in Amphoreus. I prefer to depict ancient legends in the most traditional manner possible for that authentic touch.
况且陶器的器形多样，做各种用途的都有，能将画作悄然融入生活之中，比如城中不少奇美拉砂盆也出自我手。
Plus, pottery offers a canvas of diverse shapes and purposes, allowing me to infuse art into life. You know, I've even crafted many chimera litter trays in this city.
等千万年之后，说不定我的陶罐也会被后人当作古董文物好好研究一番，真期待见到那天呀！
Maybe my dolia will be studied as antiques and relics after thousands of years. If only I could witness that day myself!
哈哈哈！除了味儿有点大，审美一定经得起时间的考验。
Haha! My art will definitely withstand time, even if it comes with a bit of a stink.
翁法罗斯能撑到那天吗？
欧洛尼斯令时间的长河奔流不止，即使你我毁灭，也会浇灌出下一个文明。
Oronyx's grace keeps the river of time flowing. Even if we fade away, a new civilization will eventually bud again.
我当然还是希望翁法罗斯存续，这就要拜托各位黄金裔大人了。
But then again, I do hope Amphoreus endures — a responsibility that rests on all esteemed Chrysos Heirs.
About our unfinished conversation from last time...
我深知我的不知足，但…墨涅塔在上，描绘翁法罗斯的岁月才是我提笔的初衷——从已绝迹的飞狮走兽，到泰坦开天辟地的神话史诗，再到早已消亡的泰坦秘仪……

I know my limits, but... praise Mnestia, chronicling the years of Amphoreus is my original inspiration. I aim to portray everything related to it, from extinct manticores to the Titans' epics, and their long-lost rituals...
可承住我理想的创作，并非如今大家认可我的原因…人们只记得我常为奥赫玛的名流作画，也只爱我笔下的黄金裔。

But people do not currently acknowledge me due to the creations that bear my true dream... People remember me mostly for my paintings of the upper echelon of Okhema and my portrayal of the Chrysos Heirs.
的确，黄金裔的光辉拽起了灵感的丝线，我对他们的神性之美顶礼膜拜，但我不得不承认这其中掺有不少现实的考量……
While the allure of the Chrysos Heirs inspires me and I admire their divine beauty, I have to admit that practicality also played a role in my choice of clients...
这种错位，多少让人有些吃不消啊。
Such complexity can be overwhelming at times.
I'll leave you to your work.
嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.
I'll leave you to your work.
嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.
I'd like to take a look at your dolia and artifacts.
嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.
眼前的少女一动不动，双眼空洞，平等地无视周遭的一切，这份超然在喧闹的市集中显得有些格格不入……
The young woman before you sits frozen, her gaze vacant, seemingly detached from the bustling city around her, lost in a world of her own as if she is surreal...
我这是…重生了吗？前一刻，我还被绑于黎明机器之上，接受我亲生哥哥的判决。眼前的面孔逐渐清晰，只听男人一声令下，顷刻炼化了我体内的泰坦之血……

Did I experience... a rebirth? Just moments ago, I was bound to the Dawn Device, facing my brother's judgment. His visage grew fierce as he uttered the command, instantly eradicating the Titan blood from within me...
…上一世，我是预言中翁法罗斯的救世主。我的降生给所有瑟希斯的信徒带来希望，树庭上下倾尽所有将我养育至预言中对抗黑潮的那一天。

...In my previous life, I was the prophesied savior of Amphoreus. My birth instilled hope in every faithful disciple of Cerces, with the Grove sparing no expense in bringing me up for the day when I am prophesied to stand against the encroaching black tide.
可谁也没想到，我的真实身份竟是塞纳托斯秘传的嫡嫡嫡嫡嫡…嫡长女，注定为世间降下死亡与沉沦。我的哥哥奉瑟希斯之命饮下黄金血，亲手将我斩杀以免祸乱。

Little did they suspect that I was the great-great-great-great... granddaughter of Thanatos' clandestine lineage, fated to sow death and disorder in the realm of mortals. Following Cerces' will, my brother imbibed the golden blood and executed me personally to prevent further calamity.
这一世，我发誓要夺回属于自己的一切……
In this new life, I vow to reclaim what is rightfully mine...
等一下，这也太胡闹了吧！
Wait a sec. This is getting too whimsical!
重生之我是藏书所老板。
The time I was reincarnated as the librarium owner.
唔…刚刚…我应该是梦到了昨晚新写的情节嘿嘿。
Hmm... I guess... I must've been dreaming about the new story I wrote last night, hehehe.
这种晚上赶稿，白天看店补觉的生活，我早都习惯了，可脱口而出创作情节还是头一回，一定是这次的故事写得太有沉浸感了！

I've gotten used to the routine of running the store and sleeping by day, and writing at night, but coming up with a plot on the spot is a first for me. Maybe my tale is just too engrossing this time!
你！就当我刚是在胡言乱语，别和任何人提起，万一传到我哥耳朵里…我就完蛋了。
Hey, you! Forget what I just said and don't mention it to anyone. If my brother finds out... I'm toast.
But it's nice to have dreams, right?
哎…简单来说…他认为我们是瑟希斯的信徒，不应该……
Well... simply put... he thinks that we as followers of Cerces should not...
差不多这个感觉，简单来说…他认为我们是瑟希斯的信徒，不应该……
Well, something like that. Simply put... he thinks that we as followers of Cerces should not...
嘘…有客人来了，一会儿再聊。
Shh... we've got a customer. Let's catch up later.
瑟希斯信徒直营藏书所，想看点什么？
...Cerces Followers' Librarium. How may I help you?
…周边无老哥出没，危机解除！所有事情记得替我保密呀。
...Brother alarm lifted! Remember, what I say is just between us.
上次说到你们信仰瑟希斯……
You mentioned your faith in Cerces...
正是！我家世世代代都是瑟希斯的信徒，以传播学识为己任，这间藏书所也是祖传下来的一份虔诚。我老哥更是个卷王，早早博览群书，去生命花园当学者去了。

Yeah! My family has upheld faith in Cerces for generations, upholding the dissemination of knowledge as a sacred duty, and this librarium is a legacy from our ancestors. My brother is a super duper erudite scholar who read so much that he already earned his place as a Garden of Life scholar.
在我哥这个大学者眼里，我写的这些穿越、逆袭之类的爽文不够入流。要是被他知道了，肯定又要说这种冒险故事有悖于瑟希斯的理性精神，会触犯泰坦之怒。

My brother, the great scholar, thinks my made-up stories about underdogs and reincarnation are indecency. If he found them out, he'd probably say that they don't match Cerces' notion of rationality and could provoke the Titans.
我也只有隐忍，白天配合他之意看店，晚上偷偷写稿。
So, I have to juggle running the store during the day and writing novels in secret at night.
瑟希斯的信徒这么保守吗？
Are followers of Cerces so conservative?
不信仰瑟希斯不就好了？
Why not just give up your faith in Cerces?
欸，千万莫认为是瑟希斯的问题，我的喷涌的灵感也由博古通今的「裂分之枝」赐予。
Hey, don't blame Cerces. All my overflowing inspirations actually come from the Bough of Rift, which can see into the past and future.
要怪就怪我哥。泰奥弗斯，你这个老古板！瑟希斯在我笔下又活出了八百种精彩的神生，不比被你侍奉成个木头泰坦好？
Blame my brother. You old stiff, Theophis! Cerces has lived over <unbreak>800</unbreak> brilliant divine lives through my pen! Isn't that more exciting than being a dull Titan on your altar!?
How can I buy the books you've written?
嘘…别那么大声，隔墙有耳。
Shh... Keep your voice down. You never know who might be listening.
我都摆在后屋的小隔间里，免得被我哥看出破绽，要的话我去给你取两本。
I stash them away in a secret compartment in the back room to keep them safe from my brother's prying eyes. If you're interested, I can fetch you a couple.
说到这儿，我还有另一件头疼事——近期顾客们越来越爱看轻快的读物，情节爽快的故事、<unbreak>30</unbreak>秒速读的搞笑小石板都成了畅销品。

Speaking of that, there's a new challenge for me. Nowadays, customers prefer lighter fiction. Quick-paced plots, humorous tales, and mini comedy tablets featuring <unbreak>30</unbreak>-second stories are flying off the shelves.
供稿的作者越来越多，存书已经多到隔间快藏不下了，得想个法子……
With more authors joining in, I'm running out of space to store their books in my secret compartment. I need to find a solution...
Why don't you talk about it with your brother?
虽说我老抱怨他思想陈旧，其实我并不求他做任何改变。
Even though I complain about his outdated views, deep down I don't really want him to change.
我们的父母很早前就在黑潮灾难中去世了。那时他不过六岁，却要负担起两个人的生活，几年后又张罗着家族藏书所的重建，想尽办法让我的精神也变得富足。

Our parents died in the black tide disaster long ago. He was just a six-year-old child back then, but he had to provide for both of us. As time passed, he worked on rebuilding our family librarium, while also doing the best he could to nurture me intellectually.
即使我已长大成人，他也习惯把我视作自己的责任……只是责任与过度保护的界线不太清晰就是啦嘿嘿。
Even though I'm an adult now, he still feels responsible for me... It's just that the line between care and overprotection is a bit blurry, hehe.
我不怪他，如果瞒着他能让他省份心的话，我宁愿自己辛苦点。
I don't blame him. I'd rather work harder on my own if keeping everything a secret makes life easier for him.
I don't have any other questions.
需要找什么再和我说，有些东西我不摆出来卖……
Let me know what you're looking for. There are books I don't put up for sale...
I don't have any other questions.
需要找什么再和我说，有些东西我不摆出来卖……
Let me know what you're looking for. There are books I don't put up for sale...
I'd like to buy some books.
需要找什么再和我说，有些东西我不摆出来卖……
Let me know what you're looking for. There are books I don't put up for sale...
…昨天到底怎么回事，你为什么没去？
...What happened yesterday? Why didn't you show up?
再说一遍，我已经结婚了，所以请不要再试图给我介绍伴侣了。
Let me be straight: I'm already married. So, please stop trying to set me up with someone else.
那个地位低下的山之民，既没钱也没前途…他哪里配得上你，赶紧把他甩了吧！
That modest Mountain Dweller with no riches or prospects... Does he even measure up to you? Just ditch him!
请不要那么说他，朱诺婶婶。伏尔甘很好，既温柔又有耐心，而且非常踏实肯干……
Please stop badmouthing him, Aunt Juno. Vulcan is a gentle soul. He's caring, patient, and persistent...
那又怎么样，阿芙罗，你就听婶婶一句劝吧：像你这样的大美女，喜欢你的人排起队来都能绕集市一圈了，又何必吊死在一棵树上？
So what, Aphrea? Seriously, take my advice: With your beauty, why settle for him when you could have a queue of admirers eager to do anything just for your attention?
但我也喜欢他，这就够了。
But I'm in love with him. That's what matters.
嗐，你们年轻人想得就是简单…婚姻这东西哪能这么儿戏？你现在一时冲动，以后怕不是要后悔半辈子呢！
Tsk, you youngsters and your idealism... Marriage isn't a game. Rush into things now, and you'll regret it forever!
要我说啊，我给你介绍那位就很好。人家在原本的城邦曾经是个大贵族呢，就算来到了奥赫玛，血统和身份也不是一般人比得了的。
In my view, the man I introduced you to is remarkable. He was a prominent noble in his previous city, and even though he's in Okhema now, his heritage and status make him stand out.
诶呦，几个意思？人家还没嫌弃你呢，你怎么就…别不识好歹啊，我这可是为了你好！
Huh, what do you mean, "no"? It's your fortune that he might choose you, but why are you... Don't be ungrateful! I'm doing this for your sake!
为我好？呵，一般说这句话的人，真正想说的都是：「我其实是为了自己好，而你只是我的工具和踏板。」
For my sake? Hah! You know, when people say "for your sake," what they really mean is, "I'm doing this for myself, and you're just a means to an end."
你、你这孩子，怎么和长辈说话呢？！
W—Watch your tone when talking to your elder!
我记得表妹和我年纪相仿吧，你怎么不给她介绍？哦，我知道了，怕不是她的「品相」不够好，人家瞧不上。
What about my cousin, who's the same age as me? Why didn't you introduce her instead? Let me guess... it's because her appearance doesn't meet his "standards," right?
你…你的礼貌哪去了？！原本多乖巧的孩子啊，肯定是那个傻大个给你带坏了…我就知道那些山之民一个个都上不了台面……
Wh—Where are your manners!? You used to be so kind... but now? Must be the influence of that uncouth Mountain Dweller... I always knew those folks couldn't handle civilized society...
我可不这么觉得。来，照照镜子，好好瞧瞧你这幅气急败坏、却又死活不肯放下架子的嘴脸吧——看到了吗，我们家伏尔甘的模样可比这顺眼多了。
Well, I beg to differ. Take a good look in the mirror and see how worked-up you are over this. Notice that? My Vulcan looks leagues above that.
但朱诺婶婶，你也听我一句劝吧：别再试图干涉我的生活了。
I've got a piece of advice for you too, Aunt Juno. Stay. Out. Of. My. Business.
你也说过吧，喜欢我的人排起队来都能绕集市一圈啦。要是你再惹我伤心难过了，万一哪个疯狂的追求者因此对你做出一些不好的事情，那可就不是我能阻止的了，你说是吧？

Just like you said, I have a queue of admirers eager to do anything just for my attention. If you upset me too much, one of them might do something foolish to you. I can't keep an eye on those men all day, can I?
…你、你竟敢威胁我…你…给我等着！
...H—How dare you threaten me...? Just... just you wait!
名为朱诺的妇人脸色惨白，一边不断小声咒骂着，一边仓惶离去。
The face of the dame named Juno pales as she hurries off, muttering curses under her breath.
呼…看来总算可以清净一阵子了。今天真是个好天气啊~
Phew... Finally, some peace and quiet. Ah, what a lovely day today.
你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?
你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?
你似乎遇到了什么麻烦。
You seem to be in a bit of trouble.
唔…如你所见，我不久前缔结了姻缘，但他们都觉得我的丈夫配不上我。
Well, you see, I recently got married, but everyone is convinced that I'm too good for my husband.
就因为伏尔甘是个外来的山之民…他们甚至问我是不是受到了胁迫才嫁给他，哈哈。
All because Vulcan is an outlander, a Mountain Dweller... They even asked me if I was forced into marrying him, heh.
是啊，山之民怎么了！他只是平时看上去老实木讷，但如果认真交流的话，你就能发现他人其实非常好的！
Beats me! I mean, what's wrong with Mountain Dwellers!? Sure, he might seem a little dull, but once you get to know him, you'll see his heart of gold!
哼，说什么「不堪入目的傻大个」…呸呸呸，要是真贪图个好看的皮囊，我自己照镜子不好吗？明明美丽的灵魂才是最重要的！
Tsk, all this chatter about being "unattractive and dim-witted"... and blah blah... Heh, if I wanted eye candy, I'd just gaze at myself in the mirror. A beautiful soul is what truly counts!
你们的感情究竟怎么样？
How are things really going between you two?
当然是特、别、美、满、啦！你知道吗，我的追求者虽然很多，但他们追求我，更像是想要追求「美」的事物，并将其据为己有。
It's PURE BLISS! You know, while I've had plenty of admirers, they're more interested in possessing something beautiful for themselves.
只有伏尔甘，他看到的始终是真正的那部分「我」——他总是乐意倾听我的想法、尊重我的意愿、理解我的追求，简直就是「灵魂伴侣」！
But only Vulcan sees the real me. He always hears me out, values my thoughts, and supports my ambitions. He's simply my soul mate!
You've definitely got a mind of your own.
谢谢夸奖~其实这都多亏了阿格莱雅阁下的教导，她虽然看上去有点…稍稍有点难以接近，但实际上是一位温柔的人。
Thanks for saying that! It's all thanks to the wisdom of Lady Aglaea. She might come off as... intimidating, but deep down, she has a gentle soul.
她让我学会了很多，尤其是…「美」。这种事物绝非仅限于眼之所见，而是需要用心去感受。
She's taught me a lot, especially about... beauty. It's not just about pleasing the eye, but about nourishing the soul.
那么再见~有需要的话，欢迎随时光临哦。
Catch you later! Drop by anytime if you need a hand with anything.
What do you have in stock?
裁缝铺嘛，当然是售卖布料、制定成衣喽。既然来了，客人不妨看看有没有喜欢的布料？
Since we're a tailor's shop, you can expect to find fabrics and ready-made garments. Take a look around and see if anything catches your eye!
这个白麻布是整个奥赫玛应用最广泛的布料。走在街上你能看见的十个人里，有九个都穿它制成的衣服呢。
White linen is a staple fabric in Okhema. It's everywhere — chances are, nine out of ten people you see are wearing clothes made from it.
瞧瞧，我们店里织布用的白麻都是生命花园培育的新品种，既柔软又透气，垂感还特别好。来，摸摸看——是不是像蝴蝶一样轻盈！
Check this out! The white linen we carry is a new variety grown in the Garden of Life. It's soft, breathable, and drapes like a dream. Here, feel it! It's light as a butterfly, isn't it?
客人不考虑制定一套本地的服饰吗？你的皮肤很白，头发和眼睛的颜色也很漂亮，穿起来一定非常有气质。
Have you thought about ordering a set of our local attire? Your fair skin, lovely hair, and beautiful eye color would make you look stunning in one.
这种紫纱最早起源于自东方的皮利亚城邦，那里的农户会专门喂养一种能吐丝的柞虫。他们将虫丝纺织成纱料，然后用螺旋贝制成的特殊粉末将它们染成紫色。

This purple silk originally came from the city-state of Pyria in the east. Farmers there specialized in raising a unique worm that produced silk. They spun the strands into silk and dyed it purple using a special powder from spiral shells.
不过那个城邦早就已经消失啦，如今市面上能见到的紫纱都是人工合成的，染剂也都换成了蓝菘石和赤叶草。
But Pyria has long been a thing of the past. Today's purple silk is synthetic, and the dye was changed to blue brassica stones and redleaf grass.
由于制作工艺复杂，这种纱料的价格始终比较昂贵。人们一般会用它制作礼服，在祭典之类的场合穿戴。
Due to its intricate method of production, this silk tends to be on the pricier side. It's often used for crafting formal wear at festivals and grand events.
至于平时嘛…哈哈，要是你有那种看上去就特别严肃、总喜欢板着脸的朋友，倒是可以让对方试试。
For everyday wear... Well, if you know someone who's always serious and stern, maybe you could recommend it to them.
哇，客人可真有眼光——你现在看的这匹丝绸由阿格莱雅大人亲手纺织，是本店的镇店之宝哦。
You've got a keen eye! This silk you're looking at is spun by Lady Aglaea herself! It's a gem of this humble shop!
说到这个，就不得不给客人你讲个故事啦：据说曾有位逐火的黄金裔只身狩猎神祇，战斗时泰坦的金血染在她的手上。后来她回到家乡，发现自己纺出的丝线都是华丽的金丝。

Let me share this tale with you! Legend has it that a Flame-Chase Chrysos Heir once battled the gods alone, and her hands were stained with the golden ichor of the Titans. When she returned home, she discovered that all the silk she spun turned a dazzling golden hue.
当然啦，实际上这种金色来源于一种稀有矿石制成的染剂。但这并不影响金丝绸的价格非常昂贵，只有很少数的人才用得起哦。
In fact, its golden color comes from a dye made from a rare ore. But even so, the golden silk is quite pricey and only within reach for a select few.
没关系~有需要的话，欢迎随时光临哦。
No worries at all! Feel free to drop in whenever you need.
不是，我就不明白了，躺着吃饭已经够离谱了，怎么同一道菜里的不同配料还得按顺序吃啊？
Hey, I just don't get it. It's odd enough to eat lying down, and now I have to consume the ingredients in a specific order in a single dish!?
请稍安勿躁，您点的这道「古典拼盘」是奥赫玛的传统美食，历史上人们在食用这道菜时，为了能充分享受其美味，都会按照……
Please calm down. This "Classical Platter" you ordered is a traditional Okhema dish. Historically, to fully appreciate its flavors, people used to follow...
停停停！我是来吃饭的，不是来上历史课的！你个开餐厅的就好好做饭不行吗？这么喜欢教育人，怎么不去云石天宫外面讲课啊？

Wait a sec! I came here to eat, not for a history lesson! This is a restaurant — Can you just focus on serving food!? If you're all about giving lectures, why not do that outside the Marmoreal Palace?
…抱歉给您添麻烦了，但美食为人们带来的从不只是味蕾的刺激，还有精神上的慰藉与享受。所以如果不去了解其所在的文化背景，就……

...I apologize for any inconvenience, but food isn't just about the chemical excitations on your tongue. It's also about finding spiritual comfort. Without understanding the historical and cultural significance, it's...
够了够了！你是不是脑子有病啊？都说了我对这些玩意没兴趣！等等——
Stop it! I've had enough! Are you nuts or what? I already told you I'm not interested! Oh, I see...
好啊，我知道了，你怕不是因为我是个外邦人就故意找茬吧？那我不吃了还不行吗！退钱！
Oh, I get it now. You're trying to mess with an outlander like me, aren't you? Fine, I won't be eating here, I want my money back!
我并无此意，如果您实在不愿意，我也不会勉强……
I meant no offense, dear customer. If you really don't want to learn about history, I won't push any further...
桌上的拼盘被愤怒的食客挥手砸在地上，发出「啪」的一声脆响——
In a fit of rage, the customer hurls his hand, sending the plate on the table crashing to the floor with a loud pop.
我就知道你们这些本地人根本瞧不上外邦的流民！假惺惺地做给谁看呢？什么奥赫玛文化传统，我看被历史淘汰的糟粕还差不多！
I knew you locals wouldn't treat us outlanders with respect! Who are you trying to impress? Talking about Okhema's culture and history? Hah, sounds more like trash destined to be forgotten by time!
嘴上说什么不勉强，实际上我们这些可怜人被勉强得还少吗？我告诉你，就你做的这些破玩意，大地兽都不吃！我……
You say you won't push us, but how many times were we outlanders pushed into things we didn't want? You know what? Even a dromas wouldn't lick the mess you serve! I...
「啪——」的又一声脆响，却是那位暴怒的食客被丢出门外。你很难想象餐厅老板那并不过分健硕的身躯是如何爆发出如此强大的力量的。

Then you hear another loud "pop" as the enraged customer is forcefully thrown out through the door. You can hardly imagine how the seemingly feeble restaurant owner unleashes such a ferocious display of strength.
唯有美食与文化不可亵渎…请不要再出现在这家店了，不然后果自负……
Food and culture must be respected... Please don't ever show up in my place again, or you'll do it at your own risk...
嗯？有新客人啊——欢迎光临，请问您想来点什么？
Hmm? Oh, a new customer. Welcome! What can I get for you today?
Seems like you have some strict rules here.
让您见笑了，规矩谈不上，这家餐厅只有一条底线：绝对不可以糟蹋食物。
I'm sorry for any misunderstanding. We don't have rules, just one principle: Never disrespect food.
除此之外，我很乐意尽己所能，满足顾客们对于食物的一切需求。
For those who appreciate food, I'll do my best to serve top-notch dishes.
You won't throw me out too, will you?
很抱歉让您看到我如此失礼的模样，但请放心……
I'm sorry for showing such an unsightly scene to you, but please rest assured...
相信您怎么都不会是那种肆意糟蹋食物的人，对吧？
I trust you wouldn't deliberately ruin a good dish, right?
刚才那家伙可真没礼貌！
让您见笑了，不过那样的家伙确实没有资格在这里用餐——
I'm sorry for the disturbance, but those who don't value food have no place dining here...
身为一名厨师，我非常乐意虚心听取食客们的意见，但前提是绝对不可以糟蹋食物。
As a chef, I really appreciate hearing what customers think, as long as they show respect for food.
好啦，方才的小插曲就让它过去吧——您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
Well, let's move past that incident. What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?
您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?
What's the deal with eating while lying down?
这个嘛，「躺食」其实是奥赫玛的一种传统习俗。在遥远的黄金世，人们曾认为侧躺在椅子上进食，能够更好地与大地泰坦产生共鸣。
Well, "reclining dining" is actually an old tradition here in Okhema. Back in the ancient Era Chrysea, people believed that reclining on chairs while dining helped them resonate with the Earth Titan.
对他们而言，这样的用餐方式不仅有益身体健康——主要是有助于消化——还能表达对于吉奥里亚的崇敬与感激。
For them, this unique way of eating wasn't just about the health benefits like aiding digestion. It was a gesture of respect and gratitude towards Georios.
至于为什么要推广它…在我看来，若是脱离了文化与传统，再美味的菜肴也都是无根之水，无法长久地流传。
As for why I'm promoting this style... In my opinion, a dish loses its root and can no longer be passed down when it's severed from its cultural roots.
在顺应时代需求的基础上，对传统美食文化做出改良与推广——这就是我的人生目标。
My goal is to preserve and modernize traditional food culture while keeping pace with the new world.
不过…当然啦，我也知道在这种世道下，人们往往都自顾不暇，又怎么愿意花费太多心思去了解食物的历史与文化呢。这也是没办法的事嘛，哈哈……
But I understand... Life's busy these days, and not everyone has time to dive into food history and heritage. Guess that's just the way things are, hah...
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.
What local specialties do you have on the menu?
传说黄金世代的奥赫玛在饮食方面极为精细讲究，甚至可谓铺张奢靡。后来随着黑潮的不断侵蚀，资源愈发匮乏，人们的饮食习惯也渐渐变得朴素起来。

Legend has it that during the Era Chrysea, Okhema's cuisine was meticulous and even extravagant. But as resources dwindled due to the black tide's unceasing invasion, simplicity took over in terms of culinary habits.
本店的宗旨就是用最简单的食材与手法，复刻出历史上那些美味佳肴。在此为您推荐本店的招牌菜——「古典拼盘」。
I'm trying to bring back those lavish historical dishes using the simplest ingredients and techniques. So, I highly recommend our signature dish, the "Classical Platter."
这道菜原本的做法极为复杂，至少需要几十道工序。我在保留其主要风味的基础上极大简化了做法，但进餐顺序仍会影响口感…介意我稍稍为您讲解一下吗？

Originally, this dish was a complex masterpiece with several dozen steps. I've greatly simplified it while retaining its main flavors, but the order you taste the ingredients in is still crucial... Do you mind if I delve into it?
Not at all. I'm all ears.
一刻钟后，一个拼盘被端到你面前。盘中的菜肴分为内外两层：外层半圈是切好的蛋卷、半圈是齐整的肉排；内圈是去皮的苹果块，上面淋着琥珀色的粘稠酱汁。

A quint later, a platter is served before you. The dish is presented in two layers: Egg rolls and flank steak bisect the outer edge in half, while peeled apple chunks doused in a rich amber sauce sit in the center.
首先是前菜——请尝尝您右手边的黄金蛋卷，它由禽蛋配上水犀乳、异果汁小火烧制而成，非常适合开胃。
Now, please enjoy the golden egg rolls on your right first — a mix of poultry egg rolls, aquarhino milk, and a special fruit sauce boiled over low heat, a perfect starter.
滑而不腻的蛋卷在你口中绽放，伴随着鲜乳的微甘与水果的清香。你的胃发出满足的喟叹，但与此同时，你觉得自己更饿了。
The smooth egg roll delights your palate with the sweetness of the milk and the nectarous aroma of the fruit. Your hunger is sated, yet your appetite craves more.
接下来是主菜——请尝尝左边的肉排，它选用新鲜的岩羊肋排肉，配上秘制酱料炭烤而成，无论在营养还是口感层面都能满足大部分人群。
Next, please savor the main course — the juicy rocklamb rib meat on the left, charcoal-grilled in my secret sauce, a balance of nutrition and flavor.
羊排肉肥瘦相间，鲜嫩无比，却没有丝毫膻气。你将自己埋进盘子里，吃相堪比一只饿了三天的浣熊。
The lamb steak is tender, juicy, and incredibly flavorful without the gamey flavor. You devour it eagerly like a hungry raccoon after three days without food.
最后是甜点——整个奥赫玛最新鲜的苹果，配上我改良过的肉桂蜂蜜酱，刚好适合为这一餐做个完美的收尾。
Finally, we've got dessert — the freshest apples in Okhema paired with my upgraded cinnamon honey sauce, a delightful end to your meal.
你的口腔被肉桂强势的辛香所席卷，肉排残余的油脂被一扫而空；但蜂蜜的香甜与苹果的清甜转瞬又让这味道变得柔和起来，成为一种若有似无的余韵。

The spiciness of cinnamon gives a sharp kick, cleansing any lingering greasiness from the lamb. But the pleasant combination of honey and apples instantly softens the experience, leaving a lingering aftertaste.
你久久沉醉于这美妙口感带来的享受中，难以自拔。
Engrossed in the wonderful flavors, you relish each and every bite.
看来您对这道菜的评价还算不错，我的荣幸。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>1000</unbreak>利衡币。
Seems like you're really enjoying this dish. I'm glad you like it. Thank you for your patronage. It's <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.
It's okay, I'll just eat it in my own order.
好的，那么您请自便。祝您有个好胃口。
No problem. Enjoy your meal. Good appetite.
一刻钟后，一个拼盘被端到你面前。盘中的菜肴分为内外两层：外层半圈是切好的蛋卷、半圈是齐整的肉排；内圈是去皮的苹果块，上面淋着琥珀色的粘稠酱汁。

A quint later, a platter is served before you. The dish is presented in two layers: Egg rolls and flank steak bisect the outer edge in half, while peeled apple chunks doused in a rich amber sauce sit in the center.
你尝尝这个、品品那个，囫囵地将拼盘里的菜肴拌在一起吃下——
Trying the ingredients in a haphazard order, you eventually mix everything on the platter and consume it all...
好像挺好吃的，又好像有点怪…总之你也说不出个所以然来。
The taste is pleasant but slightly weird... although you can't quite figure out why.
我方才对您说过，这道菜的食用顺序会影响口感。那么承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>1000</unbreak>利衡币。
As I said, the order in which you savor the ingredients can really change the taste. Thank you for your patronage. It's <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.
哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.
What foreign dishes do you have on the menu?
由于黑潮的缘故，这些年陆续有不少外邦人移居奥赫玛。我有幸从他们那得到了一些食谱，并结合其历史文化进行了复刻与适当的改良。这些是我比较满意的作品——

Over the years, many outlanders have made their home in Okhema due to the black tide. I've been fortunate enough to get some of their recipes and put my own spin on them based on the relevant history and cultures. Here are a couple of my favorites...
很久以前，人们在前往奥赫玛的途中，面临的最大困难并非食物短缺、黑潮泛滥，而是洁净水源的匮乏。这也是「粗制葡萄秘酿」的由来。
In the past, the biggest challenge for travelers heading to Okhema was finding clean water, even worse than lacking food or the threat of the black tide. That's how the Crude Grape Brew came to be.
比起其它秘酿的繁琐制作流程，它只需要一个极为简单的仪式，就能通过法吉娜的赐福快速得到救命的良药——不但洁净无害，甚至含有人体必需的营养成分……

Unlike other brews with elaborate manufacturing processes, this one's a life-saving medicine that can quickly invoke Phagousa's blessing with an extremely simple ritual. It's safe, clean, and even packs essential nutrients...
你好奇地尝了一口所谓的粗制葡萄秘酿——呸呸呸！这分明是草席子泡水的味道！！！
You take a sip of the crude grape brew... EWW! It tastes like a soggy straw mat!!!
你砸吧砸吧嘴，半晌才从这股怪味中回过神来。而此时你才后知后觉地品尝到其中极为浅淡的葡萄味。
It hits your taste buds hard, leaving you stunned by the unexpected flavor. Only later do you catch a very faint hint of grape in the aftertaste.
诶呀，我还没说完呢…这种秘酿既干净又营养，唯一的问题就是口感粗糙、味道非常…独特。不过由于价格便宜又容易制作，迄今为止它仍旧有着不小的市场。
Hey, I'm not done explaining yet... While it's clean and nutritious, its taste is coarse and... well, unique. Still, it's a hit here because it's cheap and easy to make.
这是麦迪特瑞恩文化中一种著名的甜汤，最具特色的就是汤里由蜜果制成的果冻。
This a famous sweet soup from the Mediterrana culture and is famous for its unique feature: A jelly made from figs in the soup.
但在那座城邦覆灭之后，麦迪特瑞恩蜜果也跟着灭绝了。即便后来生命花园又重新培育出了那种果子的改良版，价格上却不怎么亲民。
Sadly, with the fall of the city, Mediterranan figs became extinct. Although the Garden of Life has bred a new version, it's not exactly budget-friendly.
所以我用奥赫玛本地的奶浆果作为代替品——就结果来看，这个尝试还是挺成功的，哈哈。
Therefore, I used our milkberries in Okhema instead, and it was a pretty successful attempt, if I do say so myself!
甜汤的用料非常丰富，各种豆子、葡萄干、芋头块，还有最重要的——奶浆果冻。
This sweet stew is a mix of various ingredients like beans, raisins, yam chunks, and the star of the show: Milkberry jelly.
汤的口感就像它的用料一样，丰富且具有层次感：豆类的软糯、果干的醇甜、芋头的柔韧，以及果冻的清新爽滑。
The texture of the stew is as intricate as its components: The tenderness of the beans, the gentle sweetness of the raisins, the creamy yam, and the refreshing smoothness of the jelly.
You dig in and enjoy it to your heart's content.
哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.
Take a look at the takeout.
你站在名为「法吉娜盲盒」的饮料前。据说欢宴之神要求「宴会上的秘酿不允许标注内容」。从平淡如水到一口晕倒都有可能，以增添宴会的混乱与趣味性。

You stand before a beverage known as "Phagousa Blind Box." It's said that the God of Banquets demands that the "ambrosia at the feasts not have their contents labeled." From a drink as mild as water to one that knocks you out cold with a single sip, it's all about adding chaos and fun to the party.
至少从外观上看，你无法察觉到它与一杯水之间有任何区别——
From the appearance, at least, you can't tell one drink from another —
咕嘟…咕嘟…酸麻的味道自舌尖蔓延，脑袋也开始变得昏沉。
Bloop bloop... A sour, tingling sensation spreads from your tongue, and your head grows heavy.
坏了，饮下女口止匕烈性的一木不，你的目艮前出王见了重重重重影，亻尔有点看不氵青这都是亻十么宇宇宇字宇了。
Uh-oh, after drin king the potent brew, everyt hing around you starts to bbbblur, and y ou see mmmmultiple versions of the same scene. You can't quite make s ense of iiiit all.
亻尔摇了摇头，努力睁大眼睛，向前伸出手手手——
You shaaake your head, strug gling to open your eyes wide. Your haaaands reach out ahead, but—
土不了，亻尔感至刂自己的手止不亻主土地在亶页扌斗，这木不秘酉良的后劲非常弓虽力，你已经彳切底认不氵青这些歹衣刂开的字了，救求攵……

Wait, your haaaands moooove on their own, as if not en tirely under your control. The am bro sia's aftereffects are ki cking in hard, leaving you disori ented. The words before you are nothing more than a jum ble, their mea ning slipping through your fin gers...
衣匠能把它们缝起来吗？
Can a Garmentmaker stitch them back together?
「米的妮丝，我遭您擅场红补，蛮铃把这些乱恰凹的嗯字缝起哎吧！」
"Melody, I know you're greet at twitching, good you grease phoenix these rumbled worlds?"
衣匠答应了你的要求，数道几乎快不可察的光线在眼前掠过，乱码的文字重新被缝到了一起。
The Garmentmaker agrees to help you, and a faint shimmer passes before your eyes as the chaotic text is sewn back together.
我猜您想说「美丽的女士，我知道您擅长缝补，麻烦您把这些乱七八糟的文字缝起来吧！」——而我已经做到了。
I think you meant to say: "My lady, I know you're great at stitching, could you please fix these scrambled words?" — and I've done just that.
毕竟，您眼中的世界倘若如此散乱，实在不符合美观。我已尽力效劳。
After all, if the world you see is in such disarray, it would hardly be beautiful. I've done my best to assist.
Twilight Courtyard? I need to see an eye doctor...
研表究明，文字的乱码并不定一能影阅响读，比如当灰宝你读这完句话后，才发这现里的字全是都乱的。
Studies show that text garbled not does always affect comprehension. For example, Grayie, after this sentence reading, you'll realize that all the words here are jumbled.
人的大脑在理解一些事情时，会根据已经捕捉的信息进行理解，这是正常现象。安心闭上眼睛，我为你施一些加天空的赐福，过一小会，就起好来啦！

The human brain tends to fill in the gaps when processing information, based on what information we already have — it's a natural phenomenon. Close your eyes and relax, I'll grant you a blessing of Sky, and soon, you'll be feeling better!
你不确定刚才眼前的景象和对话的人是否是*真实*的，或者那只是欢宴之神赐予的幻觉。好在文字的完型破坏以及重影皆已消失，你眼中的世界也重归秩序。

You're unsure whether the strange scene before you and the person you conversed with was real or just a hallucination from the God of Banquets. Fortunately, the destruction of language and blurry visuals have vanished, and the world around you has returned to its natural order.
这一杯是跳跳糖一样的口感，一口下去，嘴巴里炸开了无数个微酸的气泡…嗷呜？你好像听到了自己嗓子眼里发出了小奇美拉的叫声……
This drink tastes like popping candy, bursting with countless tangy bubbles the moment it hits your mouth... Awoo? You think you hear a little chimera-like sound coming from your throat...
「砰！」的一声，你变成了一只…小奇美拉？
"Bang!" With a sudden jolt, you've transformed into... a little chimera?
咦？刚才还看到灰宝在这里的，结果只是一只小奇美拉？
Hmm? I just saw Grayie standing here, but now, it's just a little chimera?
能听懂奇美拉对话的风堇，不知能否听懂「风堇，是我！」，但你只是发出「嗷呜」。
Can Hyacine, who understands chimera talk, understand "Hyacine, it's me!"? But all you can manage is an "Awoo."
…抱歉，看来你认识我呢，说起来，灰宝去哪里了？
...Sorry, looks like you recognize me. Speaking of which, where did Grayie go?
太好了，风堇接受过{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}祝福，能听懂你嗷呜了啥。
Great! Hyacine, having received the blessing of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, can now understand your woofs.
Oh. So you're also called Grayie?
...What do you mean? Could it be... You're...
…喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的小奇美拉？怪不得满嘴胡话。
...A little chimera who drank some "Phagousa Blind Box"? No wonder you're babbling nonsense.
那我就先离开了。对了，懂事的小奇美拉可千万不要碰「法吉娜盲盒」哟。
Well, I'll leave you to it. By the way, a wise little chimera should definitely not drink the "Phagousa Blind Box."
「先入为主」对于新信息的理解影响显著…你很难在短时间内向别人解释清楚你就是{NICKNAME}…当然这没关系，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威很快就过效了。

"First impressions" can significantly influence how new information is understood... It's hard to convince others in a short time that you're {NICKNAME}... but that's fine, the power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} will soon wear off.
又是「砰！」的一声，你重新变回了人样。
Another "bang!" and you return to your human form.
幸好，你的变形记只维持了几句嗷呜的时间。究竟是{NICKNAME}梦了奇美拉，还是奇美拉梦了{NICKNAME}，就不得而知了。
Fortunately, your transformation only lasted for a few "awoos." Whether {NICKNAME} dreamed of a chimera or the chimera dreamed of {NICKNAME}... it's hard to say.
你屏住呼吸，这次「法吉娜盲盒」生效的感觉似乎慢了一些……
You hold your breath. The effects of the "Phagousa Blind Box" seem to kick in slower this time...
真是美味极啦…虽然这种廉价的评价很容易脱口而出，但事实上它…平淡如水。
Delicious indeed... Though compliments can be cheap like that, the truth is... it tastes as plain as water.
Get ready before it takes effect...
可是你到底能做什么准备呢？提前通知昏光庭院的人准备好医疗措施、或者提前通知{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}信仰的朋友来帮忙……

But what can you do to get ready? Should you inform the people in Twilight Courtyard to get ready with medical measures, or perhaps notify a friend who follows {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} for help...
说到底，它不一定意味着你会遭遇不测，所以…倒也不必如此消极。
After all, it doesn't necessarily mean something bad is going to happen, so... maybe you need not be so pessimistic.
你静静地站在原地，像是在期待着什么——它也许真的什么效果也没有，但是它也许是有些不太明显的效果等待着你深度挖掘？
You stand still, almost waiting for something — perhaps it will have no effect at all, or perhaps there's a subtle effect waiting for you to discover?
所以它就是一杯普通的水。
So, it's just a cup of water.
感谢您使用我们的服务！请为我们的服务打分：
Thank you for using our service! Please rate our service:
很多构成我们日常生活的点点滴滴都没有机会被「评分」，就比如你平时喝下的一杯普普通通的水，也许很难用「评分」来衡量它的重要性。
Many aspects of our daily lives rarely get a chance to be "rated," like the ordinary glass of water you drink. It's hard to measure the importance of something so simple with a "rating."
别因为评分限制了你对美好的想象力！
But don't let a rating limit your imagination of what could be wonderful!
它一定存在着什么隐藏效果！
There must be some hidden effect here!
这周内必然会一笔小财进账。
This week will bring a small windfall.
数量不多，买点小零食吧。
It won't be much, but maybe enough for some snacks.
必然能收获一段独处的时间。
It's certain to get a moment of solitude.
拿来干什么呢？打游戏，看视频，还是发呆？
What to do with that time? Play games, watch videos, or just zone out?
必然见到久未见面的老朋友。
Meeting with an old friend one hasn't seen in a while is on the table.
要是见到了，你可要想起来哦。
When you meet them, don't forget to remember this moment.
即便这是一杯没有任何附加效果的秘酿，也有一个祝福「始终保持着期待」送给你。
Even if this is just an ordinary ambrosia with no extra effects, there's still a blessing of "always keep hope alive" for you.
This time, it seems like your vision doesn't go black.
咕咚咕咚…秘酿全部下肚，你无法用任何词汇描述它的口感，因为它令你的大脑一片空白，眼前也出现了渐入的白……
Bloop bloop... the ambrosia goes down in one go, and you can't describe its taste with any words, because it leaves your mind completely blank, and your vision starts to fade into a whit-
耳边传来心电图机「哔哔」的声音，也许是有人在正在观察你的每个心跳周期。
You hear the "beep beep" sound of an electrocardiogram in your ears. Maybe someone is observing every heartbeat cycle.
根据你的经验，这样的声音是能够转化成波形图的，你开始屏息凝神想象一个画面——
Based on your experience, this sound could be transformed into a waveform. You begin to focus, imagining a picture in your mind —
...Where am I? Am I... in the bath?
...Why do I always say that every time I wake up?
你当时正准备越过悬锋城，对吧？没想到闯进了奥赫玛军队的埋伏，和我们一样。还有旁边这个{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒也是。

You were just about to cross Castrum Kremnos, right? You didn't expect to get into an ambush by the forces of Okhema, just like us and this believer of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} over there.
我不是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒，你也别添乱了。
I'm not a believer of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Don't make things more complicated.
你不记得发生了什么是吧？喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的人大多都是你这样。
You don't remember what happened, do you? Just like most people who drink the "Phagousa Blind Box."
你当时叫嚷着「我好想吃红土饲料啊」，就跑出浴场了，十个人也拉不住你。
You yelled "I want to eat Redsoil Feed!" and ran off the bath. Many people tried to stop you but couldn't hold you back.
很正常，人的体质不同。而你曾经就在极度混乱的情况下，在面对全副武装的奥赫玛士兵围剿时全部闪避，趁他们反应过来之前，你就来到这里了。

It's normal. People's constitutions are different. Even though you were extremely confused, you managed to perfectly evade every attack from a group of fully-armed Okheman soldiers, and before they could react, you ended up here.
你在大地兽面前凶狠偷吃它们的红土，突然站直了「咣」地一下倒在地上…然后大人们没了办法，先把你放在这*大地兽看不见的地方*，等着大地兽消气。

You stood boldly before the dromases and viciously ate their redsoil, but then suddenly, you straightened up and collapsed to the ground with a loud crash... The adults had no choice but to place you somewhere out of the dromases' sight and wait for them to calm down.
We are in charge of watching over you.
…我宁愿相信我是被传送来的。
...I'd rather believe I was teleported here.
没事，你们这样的大人都过得很辛苦的，我理解。
It's fine. You adults have it tough, I understand.
…你们俩都是扎格列斯信徒吧。
...You two are both followers of Zagreus, aren't you?
都说了我不是了，你愿意信就信。
I told you I'm not. Believe what you want.
你走吧，这里已经没有你的事了。
这一杯秘酿是经过烧制的陶土的味道，粗糙，却又带着几分厚重感，像是树庭的哲学家们会喜欢的味道，也许是哲学家们需要这样的手段激发哲思——

This ambrosia has the taste of fired clay — rough, yet with a certain heaviness, like something philosophers from the Grove would appreciate. Maybe they need this kind of taste to spark philosophical thought—
我明白了现状了。我有道德洁癖，所以，我是{NICKNAME}的超我。
I understand the situation now. I have a moral obsession, so I am {NICKNAME}'s superego.
通常来说，{NICKNAME}不会这么快理解现状的。但是既然你这么说了，我愿意相信我自己，我们应该分别是本我，自我，超我。
Usually, {NICKNAME} wouldn't understand the situation so quickly. But since you said it, I'm willing to believe in myself. We should be the id, ego, and superego.
那么我和{F#她}{M#他}谁是本我，谁是自我？
So, between me and {F#her}{M#him}, who's the id, and who's the ego?
「本我」代表着原始的冲动和欲望，追求满足避免痛苦，不受社会规范和道德约束。
"Id" represents primal impulses and desires, seeking to satisfy urges and avoid pain, unrestrained by social norms or morals.
相对的，「超我」代表着道德和规范，遵循「完美原则」，经常和「本我」发生冲突。
In contrast, the "superego" represents morality and regulations, following the "perfection principle," often in conflict with the "id."
而「自我」就相当于一种平衡，在冲动和自我规范之间协调……
And the "ego" serves as a balance, mediating between impulses and self-regulation...
我不清楚，另一个我你觉得呢？
I'm not sure. What do you think, other me?
我感觉我比较纯粹，应该是「本我」。
I feel like I'm more pure, so I think I'm the "id."
我也很纯粹的，不如说*我们*都很纯粹。
I'm very pure too. Or rather, we are all very pure.
看起来就我有选项，我是自我。
Looks like I'm the only one who has options to choose from. I'm the ego.
有道理，但是道理也不多，就当你是「自我」吧。
Makes sense, but not too much. Fine, treat yourself as the "ego."
这只是个代称，不代表着我真的就是「本我」，你懂吗？不然咱们得叫{NICKNAME}1号，2号，3号了，太蠢了。
This is just a placeholder, not that I'm really the "id," you know? Otherwise, we'd have to call ourselves {NICKNAME} No.1, No.2, No.3, which would be stupid.
所以机会难得，你有什么想问自己的吗？
So, this is a rare opportunity — anything you want to ask yourself?
{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威持续不了多久，问吧。
The power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} won't last long, so ask away.
我究竟是什么性格的开拓者？
What kind of Trailblazer am I really?
悲观开拓者，热血开拓者，沉默开拓者…这些成就奖励在列车上就能完成，记得拿。
Pessimistic Trailblazer, Hot-Blooded Trailblazer, Reserved Trailblazer... these Achievements can be completed on the Express. Don't forget to collect them.
I could ask you the same question.
我的抽卡运气能不能再好些？
Can I get some better luck in the pulls?
抽卡运气能不能再好一些？我{F#大姐}{M#大哥}问你话呢。
Can {F#she}{M#he} get some better luck in the pulls? You heard {F#her}{M#him}.
能！如果我说话有用，我确实想说「能」。
Sure! If my words are useful, I'd say "Sure."
但是我没有那个本事，所以，你应该适度娱乐，理性消费。
But I don't have that kind of ability, so you should play in moderation and spend rationally.
理性要是有用的话，要警察做什么！
If rationality really worked, what would we need the police for?
…你确实挺「本我」的。「自我」，别听{F#她}{M#他}的。
我自说自话，是不是有点怪？
Am I talking to myself? Is that weird?
*我*的形象早就崩塌过了，但*我*建议你还是再维护一下。
My image has already crumbled, but I suggest you try to maintain it a bit more.
喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的人就是这副德行，大家都习惯了，别在意。
People who drink the "Phagousa Blind Box" usually end up like this. Everyone's used to it. Don't mind it.
不同选项之间差距好像有点大？
Seems like the options are a bit too different?
这不是说明我的想法比较自由，大家也对我很包容嘛。
Doesn't that just mean my thoughts are free, and everyone's very tolerant of me?
用符合道德规范的选项铺垫一下，不就是方便我选有病的选项吗？
Setting things up with morally acceptable options... isn't it just making it easier for me to pick the messed-up ones?
以上仅代表「本我」自己的说法。
The above is just the "id's" own take.
这么多问题你就让我问一个啊？
So many questions, and I only get to ask one?
都说了，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威持续不了多久——换句话说，你可以下次问其他的问题。
I told you, the power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} won't last long — so you may save other questions for the next time.
嗨，这不就是自己骗自己，下次还要再喝这什么破盲盒嘛。
Hey, isn't this just fooling myself? Why should I drink that Blind Box again?
可问题是下次喝了盲盒也不一定是这个效果啊？
But the Blind Box might not have the same effect next time, right?
真正的问题难道不是，这几个选项也不一定是*我*想问的？
Isn't the real question that — these options aren't necessarily what I wanted to ask anyway?
Don't think too much about it.
你和自己相谈甚欢。突发奇想，干脆下次让你自己的快乐、担忧、愤怒、讨厌、害怕一起登场如何？可惜咱们没有那么多的颜色，人稍微一多就分不出谁是谁了。

You chat with yourself in good spirits. A sudden thought crosses your mind — what if next time, all your joy, worry, anger, dislike, and fear all show up at once? Too bad we don't have that many colors, and once there are too many people, it's hard to tell one another.
你清醒了不少，眼前两位自己也随即消失。
You're much more clear-headed now, and the two versions of yourself before your eyes quickly disappear.
冷静下来一想，你们仨要是分别叫灰宝，灰安，灰宁的…好像也不是不行。
Thinking it over, you realize if the three of you were named Grayie, Grayanne, and Graynnon... it doesn't sound too bad.
这一杯秘酿混入了甜香的果肉，口感绵软，微微带着籽粒，令人回想起站在淋浴头下大嚼水果的感觉。就像是回到了没有蕉绿的过去，人类还不是人类的时候……

This ambrosia is mixed with sweet and fragrant fruits, with a soft texture and faintly crunchy seeds, bringing to mind the feeling of standing under the shower while munching on fruit. It's like you've traveled back to a time without bananxiety, back when humans weren't quite human yet...
天杀的原始博士还在追我。
That blasted Dr. Primitive is still chasing me!
翁法罗斯也能有模因污染？
Can Amphoreus even get memetic pollution?
An island full of bananas! Bananas~
冷静，这并非原始博士所为…这只是借用了你脑海中对于「原始」的想象。
Calm down. This isn't the work of Dr. Primitive... it's just based on the concept of "primal" in your brain.
如果说一口法吉娜盲盒能让人类变成猴子，你有没有想过猴子再尝一口盲盒会怎么样？
If drinking the Phagousa Blind Box could turn humans into monkeys, have you ever thought about what would happen if a monkey drinks it?
W—Wait... I can regress even further?
进化有无限的可能，这说明了，退化也有……
Evolution has infinite possibilities, so that means... regression could also...
...Could I end up turning back into a human?
法吉娜盲盒可不是什么猴子开关！接着喝下去你只会继续退化……
The Phagousa Blind Box isn't a monkey switch! If you keep drinking, you'll only keep regressing...
即便是这样，你还敢继续喝吗？
Even so, do you still dare to drink more?
Of course. I'll double the fun!
…退化路线出现了分歧，需要你提前选择。
...The regression path has diverged. You need to make a preemptive choice.
Regress to a life in the sky.
怎么也飞不出，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天界，原来你是一只，酒醉的蝴蝶。
You can fly, but you never escape {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s hands. Turns out, you're just a drunken butterfly.
Regress to a life in the earth.
Regress to a life in the water.
{NICKNAME} regresses — The baby seal, sacred beast of Phagousa!
Regress to the beginning of the story.
幸好！这一切都只是你喝了法吉娜盲盒之后产生的狂想，它不是真的。
Fortunately, this is all just a wild fantasy after you drank the Phagousa Blind Box. It's not real.
上当了，可恶的法吉娜盲盒，这不是退化，这只是变化！
I've been tricked! Damn the Phagousa Blind Box. This isn't regression. Just alteration!
看来还是猴子更加适合你现在的精神状态！
Seems like a monkey suits your current mental state better!
趁你的身体还没有彻底反应过来，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威已经褪去，你又重新变回了人类的模样。
Before your body fully reacts, the power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} fades away, and you turn back into a human.
…说不定，你就是从这样的东西进化而来的呢？
...Maybe this is what you evolved from?
「扎格列斯之手」会挡住你的去路，是否让它回到原来的位置？
Hand of Zagreus will be blocking your path. Return it to its original position?
今天的橄榄也不错，你可以尝尝…说起来，赫卡特的探险小队昨天又出城了。
These olives today taste pretty good. You should try some... By the way, Hecate's expedition squad set off on another adventure yesterday.
嗯？最近他们活动得还挺频繁…哦哦，确实不错，给我称一些吧。
Yeah, they've been moving around a lot lately... Oh, these olives are really something. I'll have a few more.
听说他们正准备深入探索东北边那片区域，那里很久都没人去过了吧，会不会有什么危险……
I heard they're prepping for an in-depth exploration up northeast, but that area's been deserted for ages, right? Wonder if there are any dangers lurking...
危险肯定是有的，但那小姑娘的能力你又不是不知道，就算真遇上什么发疯的泰坦眷属，想全身而退也不难吧。
There are always dangers, but you know how skilled she is, right? Even if she bumps into some wild Titankins, she can probably finagle her way out unscathed.
话虽如此…上个月不是才有个探险队遭遇了黑潮，死伤惨重吗。哎，要不然你给占卜一下？
True, but... didn't one of the expeditions get struck by the black tide and suffer heavy losses last month? Hmm, maybe you could do a little divination for me?
你啊…行吧，这次给你算便宜点。
Come on... Fine, I'll cut you a deal this time.
名为卡森德拉的老妇人从怀中掏出一架小天秤放在桌上，又在水果堆中随手拿了苹果、石榴各一颗，分别放在两侧的托盘上。

The woman named Cassondra pulls out a small scale from her pocket, placing it on the table. Then, she casually picks up an apple and a pomegranate from the fruit pile, setting them on the opposing scale trays.
天秤左右摇晃半晌，最终石榴所在的那侧稍稍翘起。
The scale teeters for a moment before tipping slightly in favor of the pomegranate.
瞧吧，就说不用担心，塔兰顿说了：「危机如鹰隼时时盘旋于顶，机警如狡狐引其脱出绝境」——只要多留心，总归不会有什么大问题。
See? Told you not to worry. Remember what Talanton teaches us, "Though danger may swoop like an eagle, let your vigilance guide you like a clever fox." Stay alert, and you'll be just fine.
干嘛？就一颗苹果一颗石榴而已，你不会还打算要回去吧？「公正之秤」在上，你可不能克扣我的正当酬劳。
What's up? It's just an apple and a pomegranate. You're not going to take them back now, are you? Praise the Scale of Justice, this is my fair payment for the service.
哦，塔兰顿肯定不允许我再额外给你几个蜜果尝尝。哎，那可是今天{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}新采回来的，鲜嫩得很……
Ah, got it. In that case, I suppose Talanton wouldn't approve of me slipping you a few extra figs. What a pity. They were picked at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, and they look so fresh...
别别，谁说我不要的！我这就帮你品鉴品鉴…嗯，味道确实不错…哎？有贵客上门了呀，我就先不打搅了。
Oh, wait, wait! I'll never say no to figs! Let me try some for you... Hmm, these do taste great... Oh? Do you have a customer now? I'll leave you to it.
欢迎光临…哎呀，你就是白厄阁下带回来的外邦客人吧？看起来可真讨人喜欢。
Welcome... Hey, you must be the outlander brought back by Lord Phainon, right? You seem like quite the charming one.
欢迎来到奥赫玛，年轻人，对这边的生活还适应吗？
Welcome to Okhema, young one. How are you finding life here so far?
哈哈，初来乍到时大家多少都会有些不适应。不过要是待得久了，你就会发现奥赫玛还是挺宜居的——无论气候、环境还是生活节奏。
Aha, it can take some time for everyone to get used to things at first, but once you do, you'll see that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.
Living here is a real bliss!
哈哈，那真是太好了。作为受到刻法勒庇佑的圣城，奥赫玛并没有受到黑潮的影响，无论气候、环境还是生活节奏都非常宜人。

Aha! That's great to hear! This holy city, blessed by Kephale, remains unharmed by the black tide. Over time, you'll find that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.
Some people here seem a bit unfriendly.
这样啊…不过初来乍到时，大家其实多少都会有些不适应的。不过要是待得久了，你就会发现这里的居民其实还都挺好相处的。
I see... It can take some time for everyone to get used to things at first, but once you do, you'll find that the people here are actually pretty friendly.
希望你和你的同伴能够尽快融入这里，年轻人。以及如果有什么需要的话，我非常乐意提供一些力所能及的帮助。
I hope you and your companions settle in quickly, young one. If you need anything, don't hesitate to ask for my help.
又见面了，年轻人。要来看看今天新采的水果吗？
Here we meet again, young one. Interested in checking out the fresh fruits picked today?
我有什么能帮你做的吗？
Do you need my help with anything?
哈哈，谢谢你，年轻人。但用不着这么客气，我本来就很喜欢小孩子，只要你能多来和我聊聊天，我就已经很开心啦。
Haha, thank you, but there's no need to be a stranger, young one. I enjoy spending time with you young folks. Feel free to drop by anytime for a chat, and that would already make me very happy.
不过…这么说来我倒是有个不情之请。半年前我的女儿和女婿一起跟随一支探险队出城探索，至今了无音讯。
But then again... I do have a small favor to ask. Half a year ago, my daughter and son-in-law went on an expedition away from the city, and they haven't been heard from since.
虽然…但如果你之后有机会出城的话，可以顺带帮我留意一下他们的消息吗？真的非常感谢！
So... if you ever find yourself leaving the city, could you be on the lookout for any information about them? I'd really appreciate it!
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
好呀，欢迎你随时再来，年轻人。
Sure! You're always welcome here, young one.
I'd like to check out the fresh fruits here.
当然没问题，如果有什么想吃的，你可以直接尝尝。
Sure thing. Feel free to sample anything that catches your eye.
苹果是奥赫玛——或者说整个翁法罗斯——最常见的水果，而你手中这个是经过多次改良的品种，营养更加丰富，保鲜时间也更长。

Apples are the most common fruit here in Okhema — perhaps in all of Amphoreus. This apple in your hand is from a cultivar that has been genetically improved multiple times, bred to be extra nutritious and stay fresh for longer.
无论是鲜果，还是其经过加工后制成的果酱、果脯、果干或罐头，都是深受探险者们喜爱的补给。
Whether it's fresh apples, apple jams, preserves, or dried apples, they're all quite popular as supplies among explorers.
你看看手中色泽鲜艳、光可鉴人的苹果，一口咬了下去——
Gazing at the brightly-colored and resplendent apple in your hand, you take a hearty bite...
「咔嚓——」如此清脆可口！「咔嚓——」这般甘甜多汁！
*crunch* So crisp and juicy! *crunch* So sweet and refreshing!
「咔嚓咔嚓咔嚓——」你三口并作两口，眨眼间便将拳头大小的苹果啃了个干净。
*crunch* *crunch* You keep taking bites out of the apple, and the fist-sized fruit is consumed almost instantly.
哈哈，看来还算和你的口味。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>20</unbreak>利衡币。
Aha, looks like you like it. That'll be <unbreak>20</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!
石榴啊…这种水果可是悬锋人的最爱。据说在他们的传统中，石榴汁因为色泽好似鲜血，就被视作可以补气回血、活络身心的灵药呢。
Pomegranate... that's the favorite fruit for Kremnoans. Pomegranate juice, with its blood-like color, is seen as a revitalizing elixir for both body and mind in their customs.
说来黄金裔中那位万敌阁下就来自悬锋城，他偶尔路过这里时，总会买些石榴。托他的福，这种水果的销量一直不错。

Speaking of which, Lord Mydeimos among the Chrysos Heirs hails from Castrum Kremnos. He always picks up some pomegranates whenever he swings by. Thanks to him, the sales of pomegranates have been thriving.
你剥开紧实光滑的果皮，只见颗颗红宝石般的饱满籽粒堆叠镶嵌，好似某种别致的工艺品。
You peel back the smooth and tight skin, revealing the ruby-red seeds neatly arranged like an intricate artifact.
你抓起一把石榴籽塞了满口——真的假的？！果核竟然也能吃，而且口感还和仙人快乐茶里的珍珠如此相似！
You scoop up a handful of those seeds and pop them in your mouth... Really!? Even the cores are edible, boasting a texture akin to the sticky rice balls found in Immortal's Delight.
诶呀，看起来你应该会和那位万敌阁下非常有共同语言呢。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>100</unbreak>利衡币。
Oh, it looks like you and Lord Mydeimos share a similar taste. That'll be <unbreak>100</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!
这是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果。传说中这种果子为法吉娜所钟爱，用它制成的秘酿能给人带来精神与肉体的双重疗愈。
This is the Mediterrana fig. Legend has it that it was Phagousa's favorite, and the ambrosia made from it could heal both body and soul.
这种蜜果原本已经随着城邦的覆灭而绝迹多年，但三年前有支探险队成功深入麦迪特瑞恩城的废墟，带回了尚未腐烂的枯种。
This fig had been extinct for years after that city's fall, but three years ago, an expedition braved the ruins of Mediterrana and retrieved withered seeds that hadn't rotted.
后来「智慧花园」的园丁们提取了其中的生命质素，对那些种子进行改良与再培育，才又有了现在的麦迪特瑞恩蜜果。
Later, the Gardeners in the Garden of Wisdom extracted the life essence within, improved and re-cultivated those seeds, and recreated the Mediterrana figs you see today.
你看看手中紫红色的梨形果实，轻松地撕开薄如蝉翼的果皮，露出其中的鲜红嫩肉。
Examining the pear-shaped purplish fruit in your hand, you easily peel back the extraordinarily thin skin and expose the vibrant red flesh inside.
只消一小口，唇齿暗自生香；又一口，喉舌余韵回甘；再一口，脏腑如沐清泉。
A small nip reveals a deep fragrance that envelops your lips and tongue. Another nip leaves a sweet lingering aftertaste. Another nip refreshes your innards like a cool spring.
整个果子下肚，你感觉自己整个人神清气爽，所有疲惫仿佛都消失不见。
Upon eating the entire fruit, a sense of rejuvenation washes over you, as if all traces of fatigue have dissipated.
怎么样，这种蜜果是不是很神奇？可惜它的产量不是很高，所以价格稍贵一些。那么承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>500</unbreak>利衡币。
Pretty incredible, right? Unfortunately, it's a bit pricey due to its limited availability. That'll be <unbreak>500</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!
I think I'm good for now.
好呀，欢迎你随时再来，年轻人。
Sure! You're always welcome here, young one.
Hello, outlander. Have you eaten yet?
吉奥里亚告诉我们，饿着肚子打不赢。等我职歇，可以来找我，给你做点。
Georios says you shouldn't fight while hungry. When I'm done with work, come find me. I'll make you something to eat.
Yeah, I did. How about you?
还没吃，吉奥里亚告诉我们，饿着肚子打不赢。等我职歇，做点东西吃。
Not yet. Georios says you shouldn't fight while hungry. When I'm done with work, I'll make myself something to eat.
正好你来了，异乡人。帮我想想。
Now that you're here, outlander. Help me with this.
门扉时三刻，我打到一只嘟噜。串成串，一定好吃。问你，盐烤？酱烤？或者……
I caught a Dollo at three quints past the Entry Hour, and it would make great skewers. Should I roast it with salt or with sauce? Or...
达利安！别在那鬼扯了！锋狼都溜进来了！
Stop talking nonsense over there, Dorian! The direwolves are coming in!
一头野兽窜进了城里，你本想出手帮忙，但这个卫兵几矛就解决了问题。
A beast scurries into the city. Just as you are about to intervene, the guard swiftly deals with the intruder in a few strikes.
结束后，他立刻就被叫走了，过了好久才垂头丧气地回来。
Once the turmoil settles, he is immediately summoned elsewhere and only comes back after a while, looking downcast.
让队长训了，卫士工作不能懈怠，不能拿安全开玩笑。唉，只好把嘟噜炖掉，请客道歉。
Got told off by the captain for slacking off as a guard and not taking safety seriously. So I had to stew the Dollo for everyone to make up for it.
谢谢，我在工作，这只是基本要求。一码归一码，还是被训了。唉，只好把嘟噜炖掉，请客道歉。
Thank you. That's the basic requirement of my work. But I won't cancel out the fault that got me in trouble, so I had to stew the Dollo for everyone to make up for it.
异乡人，不好意思。要是你饿了，请你吃别的。
I'm sorry, outlander. If you're hungry, I'll cook something else for you.
自我介绍，我是，达利安，吉奥里亚的子民。以前是厨子，现在是卫士。
Let me introduce myself. I'm Dorian, a child of Georios. I used to be a cook, and now I'm a guard.
我会，保卫奥赫玛的安全，不保卫的时候，我会做饭。
I'll be protecting Okhema, and when I'm not, I'll be cooking.
之后，就算认识了，不会拦你。
Now that we know each other, I won't stop you in the future anymore.
Ah, it's you, outlander. Have you eaten yet?
I'm here for a little chat.
好，正好我闲，要长蘑菇了。
Good, I'm free now. I'm so bored that I might as well be growing mushrooms.
Why did you stop being a cook?
Because I didn't have a choice.
我以前，也是异乡人。刚来奥赫玛，元老院的移民官，问我以前做什么。我说，是厨师，是高级厨师。
I was an outlander too. When I came to Okhema, the immigration officer from the Council of Elders asked me what I did, and I told them I was a cook, and a good one.
移民官说：「吉奥里亚给了你强健的体魄，你却只拿它来做饭？」
Then he scolded me, "Georios blessed you with a strong physique, but all you do is whip up meals?"
他们塞给我，盔甲和武器。让我在这，每天站很久。这工作，一点都不适合我。
They shoved armor and weapon into my hands and told me to stand here for long hours every day. But this job isn't suited for me at all.
我当厨师更厉害…但他们说，山之民当厨师，太浪费了。
I'm even more skilled in the kitchen... but they said it's not right for a Mountain Dweller to be a cook. It's a waste of my talents.
Being a guard is a very important profession.
厨师也很伟大。和卫兵一样，都能让人，身体健康。
But cooking is important too. Like guards, cooks help keep people alive and healthy.
我懂，山之民当卫兵，更符合，人们的期待。而且，悄悄做饭，我也还行。
I know, being a guard sounds more like what a Mountain Dweller should do. Plus, I can cook in secret. I can live with that.
吉奥里亚创造我，我不该奢求更多。但我还是难受，想哭。但我是吉奥里亚的子民，哭不出来。
Georios made me, and I shouldn't ask for more, but it still feels bad. I want to cry. But I'm a child of Georios, and I mustn't cry.
Tell me more about your cooking stories!
有很多能说的，我想想。嗯……
There's a lot. Let me think, hmhm...
奥赫玛的菜色，普通，但是诚实。想起以前见过，信仰扎格列斯的人，卖粥。
Okhema's food is simple but honest. I remember meeting a believer of Zagreus who sold congee.
招牌写着，鱼肉粥。吃起来不像。我问，是鱼肉吗？他说：「不全是」
Their sign said "fish meat congee," but it didn't taste like fish. So, I asked, "Is it fish?" The cook said, "Well, not a hundred per cent."
混了什么？「混了云羊肉。」混了多少？「一半一半。」一半是多少？「一条鱼，一只云羊。」
"What else did you add?" "Just some cloudsheep." "How much?" "Half and half, that is." "What do you mean by half?" "One fish, one cloudsheep."
我到过，悬锋城。在那边做饭，很累。
I've been to Castrum Kremnos. Cooking there is tiring.
他们说，我不能用，肉以外的东西，做饭。为了献给尼卡多利。
They said I can't cook with anything that's not meat, because it's for Nikador.
后来才知道，没有这条规定。
Later, I learned there is no such rule.
以前，瑟希斯的信众，会来找我，教我怎么做菜，对身体好。
Cerces' disciples would come to me in the past. They told me how to cook food that is healthy for the body.
但他们说的，不一样。有人说，水果在餐前吃更好，有人说，之后吃更好。
But what they said was confusing. Some said to eat fruit before meals, while others said after.
我猜不透，所以在菜里加水果。大家吃一口菜，吃一口水果。
I can't figure them out, so I started adding fruits to dishes. A bite of the meal, then a bite of fruit.
你一定好奇，我在这里，怎么做饭。
You might wonder how I cook now in this city.
简单的，赞美吉奥里亚，架锅，赞美吉奥里亚，炖，赞美吉奥里亚，装盘。
It's simple. Praise Georios, prepare the pot. Praise Georios, cook the stew. Praise Georios, serve the food.
不管哪种食材，炖出来，味道都不会差。赞美吉奥里亚。
Everything tastes great when stewed. Praise Georios.
我做过的，最好吃的东西，全烧角猪。
The best dish I ever had was a whole roasted hornswine.
材料只有角猪，和一捆绿菜，老家的人，吃了两天，夸了一整个光历年。
The ingredients are just a hornswine and a bunch of veggies. My villagers feasted on it for two days and talked about it for a year.
现在，做不出来了。开始手生。没有角猪。
Can't make it now. No hornswines here, and I'm not as skilled anymore.
我做过的，最失败的菜，刚当上卫兵，炖的粥。
My worst dish was when I started as a guard. I made stew.
没有炊具，用土烧。没有材料，四周找。难喝到塞纳托斯向我招手，只好倒掉。
No pots, so I made do with soil. No ingredients, so I had to find some on the spot. The stew was so awful that Thanatos was waving at me, so I had to throw it out.
好在，没有浪费。野生大地兽，被吸引来了，现在住在城里。
Good thing it wasn't wasted. It attracted wild dromas, and now they live in the city.
How about sharing some stories about guarding the city?
守城无聊，没有什么能说的。
Guarding city is boring. Not much to tell.
…偶尔有东西来。有坏东西，也有人。我做饭的时候，更多。
...Trouble comes sometimes. Bad things, bad people. More bad things when I cook.
我只负责，拦下来。之后黄金裔，还有元老院，会处理。就这些了，守城无聊。
My job is just to stop them, then the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders take over. That's all. Guarding the city is boring.
I hope I never get new stories about guarding the city.
Well, that's it for now. I'll leave you to your duties.
不忙，等你饿了，再来找我，保证好吃。
No duties. Come to me when you're hungry. I'll cook something yummy.
Well, that's it for now. I'll leave you to your duties.
不忙，等你饿了，再来找我，保证好吃。
No duties. Come to me when you're hungry. I'll cook something yummy.
I'm starving. Got anything to eat?
Yeah, fresh from the pot. Take it.
没了，还在做，晚点再来吧。
No, not ready yet. Come back later.
欢迎来到刻法勒广场——看见那群盲信{RUBY_B#全知之神}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的蠢材了没？对着石头、泥巴和颜料做成的偶像倒头便拜，幻想着自己也像故事中的人一样可以得到神明的垂青。

Welcome to Kephale Plaza. See those dim-witted believers devoted to {RUBY_B#God of Omniscience}Kephale{RUBY_E#}? They're all about praying to idols made of stone, mud, and paint, imagining that they would receive the gods' blessing like heroes from legends.
教你一招——如果他们非要拉你加入这些仪式，你内心里虽不情愿，但又觉得盛情难却、不知如何是好，那就说自己是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信徒。包你在所有的迷信场合都能进退自如！

Here's a tip: If they try to rope you into their rituals and you're not feeling it, but you're not sure how to decline their passionate offers, just tell them you follow {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. It's the perfect excuse to sidestep those awkward moments!
Pretend to convert, then repent later?
塞纳托斯能止小儿夜啼？
Can Thanatos terrify crying children into silence?
嗐，没有那么复杂！{RUBY_B#神明}泰坦{RUBY_E#}不过是自然现象当中的一类，塞纳托斯唯一的好处，就是它自动排斥一切繁文缛节。你若是去坟地里办一场演唱会，于{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}而言，也一样无伤大雅。

Hah, it's not that complicated. The {RUBY_B#gods}Titans{RUBY_E#} are just a type of natural phenomena. One good thing about Thanatos is that they automatically repel all mortal cultural codes. Even if you decide to throw a party in the graveyard, it wouldn't bother {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} one bit.
其他泰坦的信徒可就没有这么宽容喽。人们都说，刻法勒厌恶黑暗——结果刻法勒的圣城就连个真正意义的{RUBY_B#夜幕}晚上{RUBY_E#}都没有！…理解了吗，迷信就是这么过分。

The disciples of other Titans aren't so easy-going. They all claim Kephale can't stand darkness. And now you see this holy city of Kephale doesn't even have a proper {RUBY_B#night}evening{RUBY_E#}! ...Do you get it now? That's how unreasonable superstitions get?
你说得未免有点夸张了。
轻信你，那也是一种迷信吧？
Falling for your words... isn't that a superstition in itself?
哈哈，倒也不必较真！俗话说，「矫枉必须过正」——要是没有我们站在风俗的另一端，圣城奥赫玛，恐怕难免要变得过于神圣…那住着多难受啊？

Haha, no need to get all serious! Like they say, "when you push something, you gotta push it far." Without us standing on the other side of morality's scales, the holy city Okhema would become far too holy... and that'd be a pain to live in, don't you think?
都说历史是人们对往事一致认定的说法…这让我对世界的未来忧心忡忡。不论什么年代，人们总是在重复同样的错误。
They say history tends to reflect the collective views of the past... and that's what worries me about the future. Regardless of the era, humans just can't seem to break free from the same mistakes.
不过，你也不用太担心；只要黄金裔还打算将泰坦取而代之，只要普通人里还有像我这样的冒牌信徒，奥赫玛的气氛就还不至于难以忍受…如果他们声称自己信的是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}就更好了！

But hey, don't stress too much. As long as there are Chrysos Heirs aiming to overthrow and become Titans, and there are still ordinary people like me pretending to be devout, Okhema's vibe won't be too suffocating... especially if they claim to worship {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
说说你们冒牌信徒的活动。
Tell me about your activities as imposter believers.
怎么，看来你感兴趣？虽说最近活动经费有点紧张，没法直接邀请你参加…但和你描述一番圣城生活的另一面，我很有兴致！
Curious? Well, we've been tight on funds lately, so I can't really invite you... but if you want to learn more about the other side of life in this holy city, I'd love to spill the beans!
Ask about how they have gatherings.
其实还挺简单的。只要在传信石版的辩论场上匿名留言，「某某时刻，有谁要一起去祭拜塞纳托斯」，自然就有心领神会的家伙加入进来。

Well, it's pretty straightforward. We just post an anonymous message on the teleslate's Forum. "Anyone wants to worship Thanatos together at some Hour?" Insiders who understand what it means will naturally join.
至于具体的「祭拜」形式，那当然完全自由…唱歌跳舞吟诗作画——毫无美感也没有任何关系，只要自己开心就行！毕竟{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}对谁都一视同仁嘛。

When it comes to how we "worship," it's totally up to the individual... Singing, dancing, chanting, painting... even if your work is ugly. It's all about you having fun! After all, {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} treats everyone equally.
当然，这种聚会多少还是见不得人…再怎么说{RUBY_B#公认的黑潮元凶}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}也不是什么良善的泰坦，只不过它和它真正的信徒对一切都毫不在意罢了。

But of course, these gatherings can't exactly be held in broad daylight... After all, {RUBY_B#the black tide's assumed cause}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} isn't exactly a friendly Titan. It's just that they and their true disciples couldn't care less about anything.
实话说，上次我们的集会就被遐蝶小姐劝阻了，说奥赫玛再怎么样也是一座圣城，不可以这样无事生非、小题大作——她人虽然温柔，但那种生人勿近的感觉还是挺可怕的！

To be honest, Castorice dissuaded us at our previous gatherings, saying that Okhema is still a holy city no matter what, and we can't stir up drama like this. While she's gentle most of the time, she can be intimidating with how aloof she is at times!
Ask about how their organization is.
组织？一群享乐主义的{RUBY_B#唯物论}泰坦自然论{RUBY_E#}者怎么可能有什么组织。我们借来塞纳托斯的名号，不就是不想参加那些恼人的迷信仪式？

Organization? Oh, come on, how could a bunch of hedonistic {RUBY_B#materialists}Titan naturalists{RUBY_E#} have an organization? We borrowed Thanatos' name because we wanted to avoid those pesky superstitious rites.
你要知道，膜拜泰坦的人虽多，但真的像祭司那样可以借用泰坦力量的人，其实少之又少。
While many folks worship the Titans, only a handful can actually harness the Titan's powers as the priests do.
大部分人其实不能因为参与仪式获得什么泰坦的恩惠，但他们就是觉得不这么做心里就不平衡、生活就没法宁静——你说可笑不可笑？
Most people don't really get any Titan blessings from participating in these ceremonies, but they won't find inner peace and won't feel right without worshipping. Isn't that ironic?
真正的祭司，比如缇宝大人她们，那我是相当敬重的，也认可他们是人们的组织者——我只是觉得，这样就够了，节外生枝搞迷信实在是累人累己。
I have respect for genuine priests like lady Tribbie and the others, and I acknowledge them as leaders of humanity — but that's enough for me. All that extra superstitious stuff is so exhausting.
Ask about the future of the world.
{RUBY_B#适者登神假说}演化神秘学{RUBY_E#}告诉我们——毁灭，然后新生！
{RUBY_B#The Apotheosis of the Fittest Hypothesis}Evoccultism{RUBY_E#} tells us that — We will be destroyed, then reborn!
…开玩笑的。虽然上面的人都对世界被他们拯救之后究竟会如何所言甚少，但在我看来，这本身就是一种答案。
...Just kidding. The higher-ups rarely reveal anything about what will happen after they save the world, but for me, that lack of an answer is already an answer in itself.
也就是说——没人知道世界的前途究竟会如何。即使黄金裔们也是如此。
In other words, no one really knows what's in store for this world in the future, not even the Chrysos Heirs.
照理说，这应该是一种不负责任的行为…但我们的确生活在一个预言真实存在的世界。即便是那些被奉若神明的泰坦，也无力改变预言——这也就是为什么，我觉得他们没资格高高在上。

To be honest, this isn't being responsible... but we live in a world where prophecies genuinely exist. Even the Titans, who are considered gods, are powerless to change prophecies. That's why I don't think they have the right to be all high and mighty.
从预先知道结果、但完全不知道应该怎样努力的角度来说，黄金裔们已经做得很好了。有些人对他们的苛责才是毫无道理。
Given that the Chrysos Heirs know the outcome but have no idea about how to get there, I think they are already doing a very good job. Some of the criticism they face is just plain unfair.
你别看他们说我愤世嫉俗，我可从来不说黄金裔们的坏话…呃，至少不会说阿格莱雅、遐蝶、还有缇宝那几位的坏话！
You might see people calling me cynical, but I've never badmouthed the Chrysos Heirs... Well, at least not Aglaea, Castorice, or Tribbie!
(That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)
I've got some business to attend to today. Catch you later.
忙一点好哇！我们这些人可能就是太闲了，所以才会庸人自扰——谁知道呢？
Business? Good. Staying busy is good. Being idle can often lead to self-inflicted trouble. Well, who knows?
这是一只普通的箩筐。如你所见，和垃圾桶没有任何相似之处。
What you see before you is simply an ordinary basket. As you can see, it bears no resemblance to a trashcan.
但为何…在众多箩筐之中，只有它吸引到了你的注意？
