However, among all the baskets... why does this particular one capture your attention?
它有着一颗垃圾桶的心！
This basket has the soul of a trashcan!
能看出这只箩筐并非等闲之辈，这一点值得赞许。
It's commendable that you recognize this is no ordinary basket.
不过，没礼貌的家伙——这是私人住宅，风能进、雨能进，唯独没有被邀请的国王不能进。懂？
However, this is my private domain, impolite one. Rain, wind, and sunshine are guests embraced, but not uninvited kings. You understand?
本大侠也是一种自然现象。
But I'm part of nature, too.
云石市集什么时候成私人住宅了？
Since when did Marmoreal Market become a personal property?
…嗯？是我没说清楚吗——这只箩筐是我的家，没有我的许可，你不能乱翻它。这下明白了吗？
...Hmm, did I not make it clear enough? This basket is my home, and you keep your hands off and don't dig through it unless I say otherwise. Got it now?
金色的{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}或许嫌贫爱富，但漆黑的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}会平等地叩响所有房门。
The golden {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} might fancy the rich over the poor, but the dark {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} knocks on every door equally.
偷偷告诉你——我在这里给它们留了一只只有{RUBY_B#神}泰坦{RUBY_E#}才能看见的门铃。
Just between you and me, I've set up a secret doorbell for them, visible only to the {RUBY_B#gods}Titans{RUBY_E#}.
那你可能要失望了，我并没有什么值得讲述的过去。无非是在元老院上班的爷爷遭遇了一场政治刺杀，结果全家只有我幸存了下来。

Then I'm sorry to disappoint. My background is pretty ordinary, except for the fact that my family was targeted in an assassination due to my grandpa's position in the Council of Elders, leaving me as the sole survivor.
别误会——我不缺钱。事实上，我们家在{RUBY_B#上面}黎明云崖{RUBY_E#}的庄园一切如旧；而且，通过这几年的教育，那些仆人也学会了不去关心他们的主人身在何方。

Don't get me wrong: I'm not hurting for money. In fact, our family's mansion in the {RUBY_B#up above}Dawncloud{RUBY_E#} hasn't changed. Over the years, our servants have also learned to not care about where their masters may be.
总之，多亏了这是个承认遗产合法性的城邦…在「再创世」到来之前，只要奥赫玛还没有在黑潮中陷落，我就能无拘无束地生活下去。想睡就睡，想吃就吃，想晒太阳就晒太阳——多好。

Anyway, thanks to this city's acceptance of legal inheritance... I can lead a carefree life until the Era Nova, as long as Okhema remains steadfast against the black tide. I sleep, eat, and soak up the sun whenever I please... What a bliss.
当然，如果你只是想听我随便聊点什么…那我们不妨把话题更明确一些？你是想知道{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}、还是元老院的故事？

But of course, if you're up for some casual chat... How about we pick a more specific topic? Interested in tales about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, or the Council of Elders?
我没有办法知道真正的塞纳托斯是什么样，但我可以和你说说我知道的塞纳托斯。
Well, I may not know what Thanatos is truly like, but I can share how I see Thanatos.
对于那些笃信泰坦的人来说，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}无疑是最可怕的神明。人们说祂催生黑潮，要把毁灭带给{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}。

For devout disciples of the Titans, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is definitely a horrifying deity. They believe they are the mastermind behind the black tide, destined to bring catastrophe upon {RUBY_B#the world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}.
但我要说，塞纳托斯实际上是一个好人——这家伙默默地承受了世人所讨厌的一切，还为那些不容于世的人们提供了绝佳的保护伞。
But in my eyes, Thanatos is actually a good person. That Titan quietly endures all the hatred of the world and even offers a sanctuary for those ostracized by society.
这么说吧…如果你在奥赫玛听谁说自己笃信塞纳托斯，那么有很大的可能，这人只是不愿对泰坦顶礼膜拜，或者懒得参加任何祈求赐福的仪式。
Listen... If someone in Okhema declares themselves a follower of Thanatos, it's likely because they just prefer not to worship the Titans or partake in any rituals that beg for blessings.
毕竟，漆黑的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}可不需要任何人顶礼膜拜，也不会对任何命不该绝的人赐予祝福嘛。
After all, the pitch-black {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} never needs adoration, and won't bestow blessings on anyone whose life is not meant to be over.
我很想说，{RUBY_B#爱与美的泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}其实就是阿格莱雅姐姐的样子…但那是不对的。
I'd love to say that sister Aglaea looks just like {RUBY_B#Titan of Love and Beauty}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}... but that's not the case.
阿格莱雅姐姐不是那位泰坦的一个注脚，黄金裔们，也应该都有自己的理想和追求。
Sister Aglaea isn't just a side note for that Titan, and the same goes for the other Chrysos Heirs. I believe each of them treads their unique path with their own inspirations.
至于墨涅塔嘛…据我所知，那家伙更像是一位手忙脚乱的老妇人，从纷争世到幻灭世，眼睁睁地看着自己手中的绳结越来越没有办法解开。
As for Mnestia... from what I know, that goddess is more like a clumsy old lady. She juggled from Era Bellica to Era Erasa, watching helplessly as the knot in her hands became harder to unravel.
留给{RUBY_B#旧世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}的时间不多了…很多人都悄悄地这么说。
Destiny hasn't got much time left for {RUBY_B#the Old World}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}... That's what many whisper in the shadows.
Tell me more about the Council of Elders.
元老院的故事很简单——那里是一群死人生活的地方。或许有人觉得元老院的存在自有其必要…但我多少算个受害者，显然不可能对你说出这样的话。

It's rather straightforward: The Council of Elders is a place teeming with the living dead. Some may argue the Council of Elders serves its intended functions... but as a victim, that's not the tale I would tell.
当我因为处理一些事情必须回那边的时候…哪怕天光永远大亮，哪怕周遭如闹市一般喧嚣，我还是提着灯也找不见哪怕一个真正的人。
When I had to return there for some business... even amidst the bustling streets, in broad daylight, or when I had a lamp in my hand... I didn't see a living soul.
当然，如果刻薄一点…整个{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}恐怕也没有几个人算是真正地活着。只是…黄金裔们还在这里。所以我不会这么去说。
To be a bit more strict... there might be only a handful truly alive in {RUBY_B#the entire world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}. However... the Chrysos Heirs are here, so I'll hold my tongue on that.
或者这么说吧——翁法罗斯或许真的在被一些我们尚不清楚的秘密支配…但了解那些秘密的人肯定不在元老院里。

Or maybe, let's put it this way: Amphoreus might actually be under the control of enigmatic forces beyond our grasp... But those who hold such knowledge certainly aren't seated in the Council of Elders.
他们只是自以为自己很了解罢了…还不如塞纳托斯或者某位自封的演化神秘学家来得可爱。
They just believe they know what's going on... They're even less endearing than Thanatos or that self-proclaimed Evoccultist.
(That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)
再见，路过的{RUBY_B#一盏灯}有缘人{RUBY_E#}。
…你好。欢迎来到全世界最大的浴场的图书室。理论上你可以从这里借阅到任何一本在奥赫玛出版的书籍——只要不介意填写调书单之后等待几天。

...Greetings. Welcome to the library of the largest bath in the world. Theoretically, you can access any book published in Okhema, as long as you don't mind waiting a few days after filling out a book-transfer form.
算是吧，不过和我一样做这份兼职的外地人还有很多。
Yeah, although many outlanders like me are working here as part-time administrators.
听上去你似乎不满意自己的工作。
Sounds like you're not too excited about your job.
那到不至于。逃难过来打一份临时工而已，没有什么工作热情也很正常吧？
Well, I'm here as a refugee, and this job is just to make ends meet temporarily. So it's natural I'm not too excited about it, right?
…自我介绍一下吧，我的名字是阿波罗尼娅，来奥赫玛避难之前，曾经在一个被黑潮吞没的小城邦里做数学和天文学的研究。
...Let me introduce myself. I'm Apollonia. I used to research math and astronomy in a small city that was later overrun by the black tide.
你可能也知道，天文学在奥赫玛属于禁忌，只有树庭的少数学者可以秘密研究。很不幸，最近逃难来的人实在有点多，他们那里也是僧多粥少，只好把我推荐来浴场工作。

As you might be aware, astronomy research is prohibited in Okhema, and only a few scholars in the Grove secretly manage to sneak a peek. With a flood of recent refugees, they don't have enough work for specialists like me and had to recommend me to work here in this bath.
…当然了，也可能是因为给我写推荐信的那位教授人缘不好。
...Or maybe because the professor who wrote my letter of recommendation wasn't so popular.
俗话说「开卷有益」，坚持用碎片时间来看书，哪怕一天只能看几页，一年下来还是能收获很多。
Reading is nourishment for the soul. Even a few pages each day can accumulate over a year, and you'll learn a great deal.
要是有什么能全职看书的工作，好像也不错啊。
Wouldn't it be a dream to read books all day for a living?
How about telling me more about your research?
咦？你对研究感兴趣？真的？你要是唠这个，我可不困了啊。
Oh, really? You're interested in my research? Well, in that case, I'm all fired up.
聊聊在上一个城邦的研究。
Tell me more about your research from your previous city.
哦？你也对{RUBY_B#圆锥曲线}艾格勒曲线{RUBY_E#}感兴趣？我写过八卷本的《艾格勒曲线论》，只可惜原始稿件都已经被黑潮吞进肚子里了。

Oh? You're interested in {RUBY_B#Conic Section}Aquila Curves{RUBY_E#} too? I penned a comprehensive book called On Aquila Curves spanning eight volumes. It's a shame my manuscripts were lost in the black tide.
不过没关系，我的脑子还在——只要再花一年的时间，我可以把那本书里的所有命题和证明都重新写出来…说不定还能比以前做得更好。
But no worries, I recall all the details. Give me another year, and I'll rewrite all the propositions and methods to prove them... maybe I'll even do better than before!
只是在奥赫玛，天文学…你懂的。虽说《艾格勒曲线论》本身是纯数学的著作，但顶着这个名号，恐怕没什么人愿意和它扯上关系，更不要说资助我出版了。

It's just that... astronomy in Okhema... you know how it is. While On Aquila Curves is a book in pure mathematics, its title might deter people from exploring it, let alone securing a sponsor for publication.
不过没关系——我相信，只要黄金裔能解决预言中的问题，黑夜总有一天会重返天空，繁星将不再是任何人的禁忌。

But no worries... I believe that, as long as the Chrysos Heirs resolve the prophesied issues, the night sky will eventually return. By then, the starry sky will no longer be a forbidden topic anymore.
聊聊来奥赫玛之后的研究。
Tell me more about your research after arriving in Okhema.
上次我听说有不少人已经看腻了浴场里的装潢，就想着能不能从马赛克拼贴入手，帮助大家提供一些新的灵感。
I heard someone griping about how boring the bath's decor looks, and it got me thinking about coming up with some new mosaic designs to bring in some fresh aspirations.
我编了一套石板上的程序，设计算法寻找可以密铺镶嵌的五边形马赛克，总共找出来了<unbreak>15</unbreak>种——只可惜有建筑师后来和我说，五边形的地砖在生产成本上还是有点太超前了。

In the end, I designed a program on the tablet and wrote algorithms to find pentagon-shaped mosaics that could cover the floor smoothly, and I discovered <unbreak>15</unbreak> different patterns. But when I mentioned the idea to an architect, they warned me that mass-producing pentagonal tiles might be too costly.
唉，或许我应该把这个点子推销给云石市集里的哪位赚钱高手，拿去设计点拼图玩具什么的？不过隔行如隔山，这种主意可能在人家那里也不是什么好点子。

Perhaps I should share this idea with some smart vendor at the Marmoreal Market to turn it into producing jigsaws or puzzle toys? But then again, toy design is not my forte, and this whole concept might not click with them.
Tell me more about the Grove.
啊…虽然同为研究者，但我对树庭还真没什么了解。之前说过，有位人缘不好的教授曾经帮我给树庭写了封推荐信——
Well... despite being a researcher, I'm not well-versed in the Grove. As I mentioned, a not-so-popular professor wrote a recommendation letter for me...
「如果有人看见复杂的论述就认为对方的头脑缺乏条理，我力荐这样的人来读一读阿波罗尼娅的这本《艾格勒曲线论》。」
"If individuals tend to presume a lack of mental acuity on the part of the author when faced with intricate explanations, I strongly suggest delving into Apollonia's work — On Aquila Curves."
「此人将会发现，没有哪个有才智的人（不论是多么有天分的），可以将这些知识表述成仅需一目十行的阅读就可以明白的方式。」
"Through this exploration, one will find that no intellectual (regardless of their talent) can articulate such intricate concepts in a manner that can be understood through skim-reading."
——啊。该不会，这也是他不受其他人欢迎的一个方面？
...Hmmm, could that style have contributed to his lack of popularity?
(That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)
Working for a salary is no walk in the park.
彼此彼此！能看得出来，你好像也挺不容易的。有空再聊~
Indeed! I have a feeling that you have had a hard time as well. Talk to you later!
你好，陌生的孩子。世界苦难深重，人生不如意之事也十有八九。但没关系，在这座美丽的圣城里，我们都可以获得片刻的安宁。

Greetings, unfamiliar child. The world is full of agony, and life is brimming with misery and mishaps. However, don't fret about it. We can all obtain a momentary peace here in this beautiful holy city.
老身名为塔瓦纳安娜，来自遥远东方的哈图西里城邦。虽说在黑潮之前，我的家乡也曾像花园一样美丽，但赞美{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}——果然还是{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒庇护下的圣城{RUBY_E#}举世无双。

My name is Tavananna, hailing all the way from Hattusili in the far east. While my homeland was a paradise before the black tide — praise the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#} — its charm would pale in comparison to the splendor of {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city under Kephale's wings{RUBY_E#}.
陌生的孩子，你莫非是初来乍到？无论是这空中的花园、还是隔壁的大浴场，它们都是我们这些闲暇市民，消磨时光的绝佳去处。
Are you new around here, unfamiliar child? Whether it's this hanging gardens or the grand bath nearby, these are the best spots for us citizens to while away the hours when we are idle.
哎呀，忙碌的年轻人，要注意劳逸结合哦。早睡早起、按时吃饭、少喝凉水，啊——遇到不顺心的事就先停下来深吸一口气，慢就是快，磨刀可不误砍柴工啊。

Ah, a busy bee, I see, but remember to balance work and play. Early to bed, early to rise, eat well, and skip those icy drinks... When trouble comes knocking, take a breather, because rushing leads to blunders.
你好像并不在意世界的危机。
Looks like you're not too bothered about all the calamity.
…嗐，你可别被有些咋咋呼呼的年轻人给骗了。总说什么世界末日之类的胡话——哪有的事！这传信石版上天天都在宣讲，元老院和黄金裔的团结坚如磐石，那还能有什么可怕的事？

...Hah, don't let those rowdy youngsters get under your skin. They're making a fair share of doomsayers — it's all just noise! Have you seen what the government posts on teleslates every day? With the Council of Elders and the Chrysos Heirs joining forces, what could possibly go wrong?
孩子啊，你千万别嫌我们这种老人唠叨。来来来，相逢就是缘…这个见面红包，孩子你一定要收下，啊？
Child, please don't mind us oldies nagging. It's fate that's brought us together. Here... this little "greeting gift" is for you. Take it, my child.
别客气，老身也没有什么别的爱好，就喜欢看年轻人开开心心的样子。看着你们年轻人乐呵，老身自己也就一样乐呵，多好的事，哈哈。
You're welcome. I don't have many hobbies besides watching you youngsters enjoy yourselves. Your happiness is mine, so keep that positive vibe going, alright?
人们都说，如果{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为你关上了一扇门，那么它一定还会为你打开一扇窗。
People say: If the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} closes a door to you, you can be certain that they have opened a window somewhere.
就算长棍面包在{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}沉睡之时踪迹难寻，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}也一定会为我们颁赐甜蜜的戚风蛋糕。

Even though baguettes are hard to find while the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} slumbers, rest assured, because the benevolent {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} will certainly bless us with their sweet chiffon cakes.
老奶奶，能和你打听点事吗？
May I ask you something, granny?
哎呀，那当然没有问题。虽说老身也是外地人，知道的东西绝没有那真言狮口多…但你放心，像我们这样年纪大的人，最不缺的反而就是时间。
No problem at all. While I may not be as wise as the Lion's Maw of Truth, and I'm an outlander myself... time is one thing us elders have in abundance.
哦，你想打听这圣城里的事，对吧？照理来说应该推荐你几本书读，不过这年头，传信石版比书可好用多了。来，老身念几段{RUBY_B#公益广告}导善铭文{RUBY_E#}给你听听——

Oh, you're interested in this holy city? Books are great for learning about the city, but these days, teleslates make things so much easier. Here, let me read you a bit from the {RUBY_B#public service announcements}goodwill inscriptions{RUBY_E#}.
「欢迎来到刻法勒庇护的奥赫玛，远道的异乡人。这里是翁法罗斯的最后乐土，也是由黄金裔守护的永恒之城。」
"Outlanders from distant lands, welcome to Okhema, the sanctum under the watchful eye of Kephale. This is the Eternal City, shielded by the vigilant Chrysos Heirs, the last paradise in Amphoreus."
「四方的公民啊——欢迎你们来到这里，我们将张开双臂，和你们同享万世不变的祥和与安乐。」
"Welcome, citizens from all directions. Within these walls, we extend to you our open arms, sharing eternal peace and joy."
看，只要稍稍关注几个{RUBY_B#公众号}云上广场{RUBY_E#}，我们外地人也能对{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}了如指掌。
See? Just follow a few {RUBY_B#public accounts}Nebula Plazas{RUBY_E#}, and even us outlanders can get the lowdown on {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}.
就连我这身衣服，也是在传信石版上，从大裁缝阿芙罗的店里定来的。这年头，真离不了传信石版呐。
I even ordered my dress from the great tailor Aphrea's store using my teleslate. These gadgets have become essential for our daily lives now.
啊，外面的事吗？其实老身也知道，这年头除了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，四下里的确是乱得很。那个黑潮更了不得，哗地一下就淹过去，除了随身细软，那是什么也带不出来。

The outside world? Well, I know it's pretty chaotic out there everywhere except in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}, and that black tide is a real menace. In the blink of an eye, it can swallow a whole city, and you'll barely have enough time to run for your life.
不过你大可放心！只要来了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，有困难找元老院和黄金裔就好。你唯一的烦恼，只可能是无事可做，耐不住寂寞…哈哈。

But everything's safe in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}! If you ever run into trouble, just head to the Council of Elders or find the Chrysos Heirs. Your only trouble might be a bit of boredom... haha.
老身的事？…嗐，老身能有什么故事，每天悠哉游哉，四世同堂幸福得很。
About me...? Oh, my life's simple, enjoying my leisure time and family moments.
…只可惜老伴也好、孩子们也好，一个个都太过忙碌，没有一点闲下来的时间陪老身在花园里坐坐。
...It's a shame my husband and kids are always tied up, too busy to share moments with this old lady.
哦——别往心里去，老身倒也没有非要拉着你坐下唠唠的意思。你忙你的，挺好、挺好！
No need to feel obligated, really. I'm not trying to guilt-trip you into sticking around. Just handle your business! No stress!
(That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)
I'll be out of your hair now.
哈哈，老身知道，年轻人都很忙。想做什么就做什么，挺好的！不过要是身心疲劳了，那就来花园里坐一坐，或者去泡泡温泉…可别把自己累着了，啊。

Aha, you youngsters are always on the move. Always doing whatever you want. Good! And hey, don't forget to take a break in the garden or a dip in the hot spring... Just don't push yourself too hard, okay?
可曾听闻圣山之上，最后的城邦\n不朽神明岿然背负，永恒的太阳
Have you heard of the last city, on the Holy Mountain high?\nWhere the immortal deity carries the sun across the eternal sky?
沉默中黎明未曾逝去\n凝滞里生命尚存希望
Dawn lingers, silent in its eloquent grace.\nHope shines bright amidst the world's stagnant embrace.
失乡人啊，你的前路应往何方？\n黑潮汹涌，混沌肆虐生死惶惶
Homeless, where should you find your way?\nIn black tide and despair, where shadows play.
流亡者啊，你的明日可有念想？\n众神沉寂，命理昏昧人伦癫狂
Exile, what dreams for days to come?\nAmidst silent gods, fate's whisper grows crazed and numb.
寻求那末世之中的乐土吧\n彼处尚存日光、清泉和丰壤
In the end times, seek the promised land.\nSunlight, clear waters, fertile soil, where peace will stand.
去往那仁慈神祇的庭园吧\n彼处仍留笑语、欢宴与佳酿
Within the garden of that merciful god, solace can be found.\nLaughter, feasts, and wine, joy in abundance unbound.
这首「最后的庭园」献给您——可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}。
This poem, "The Last Veranda," is dedicated to you, adorable {F#lady}{M#mister}.
这位可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}，利波向您问好~
Greetings, adorable {F#lady}{M#mister}. Lipos is here, sending you warm regards!
唔…利波在您身上嗅到了广袤天空的味道：浅淡又遥远，但是如此的令人心驰神往。
Hmhm... Lipos senses the vast sky's aroma around you: So close, yet distant, and utterly enchanting.
感谢命运指引我们在此相遇，有什么想听的诗歌吗？利波愿意为您献上全部的收藏~
Thank fate for this moment we share. Any poem striking your fancy today? Lipos got a trove waiting just for you!
感谢命运指引我们在此相遇，有什么想听的诗歌吗？利波愿意为您献上全部的收藏~
Thank fate for this moment we share. Any poem striking your fancy today? Lipos got a trove waiting just for you!
What kinds of poetry are you familiar with?
您想听些什么？古老黄金裔间的情与爱、黄金战争末期的乱世、沿海百邦的崛起与没落…利波这里应有尽有！
What piques your interest? Love amidst the ancient Chrysos Heirs? The aftermath of the Chrysos War's chaos? Or perhaps the rise and fall of those hundred Seaside States...? Lipos is here to serve!
Love amidst the ancient Chrysos Heirs.
哈哈，这类的故事向来最受欢迎~那么这首《阿多尼娅之死》献给您——
Haha, a classic choice indeed! Here's a poem named Adonia's Death just for you...
「天生的绝伦美艳、蒙受诸泰坦垂怜，阿多尼娅的昳丽令万物黯然。」
"Beauty since the cradle, adored by the Titans' gaze. Adonia's brilliance eclipsed all in its blaze."
「墨涅塔的信徒甘在少女石榴裙下俯首，塞纳托斯的使者阴影般于她身侧常伴。」
"Mnestia's disciple bowed to the maiden's grace. While Thanatos' messenger lingered beside her, a solemn hem."
「信徒赠与诗歌、鲜花与昂贵的金绸；使者奉献美酒、石榴与守护之誓言。」
"Verses, blooms, treasures untold by the disciple laid. Wine, pomegranates, vows of protection by the messenger displayed."
「热烈的爱恋岂能辜负，真挚的情意安可亏欠——少女抉择不定，惴惴难安。」
"How should I respond to their love, so fervent and true? Adonia hesitated, turmoil in her heart anew."
「『为我求取泰坦之火吧，』终于，阿多尼娅如是说，『如此方可与我一生相伴。』」
"The one who brings the Titans' fire shall be my eternal mate. So the lady claimed, sealing their fate."
「黄金裔们逐火而去，日复一日、年复一年；远行者尚未归来，而黑潮近在眼前。」
"Chrysos Heirs departed on the quest's call. Years pass, none returned, as the black tide did fall."
「城邦覆没、众人流离 ；阿多尼娅恪守诺言，独留空城翘首以盼。」
"The city crumbled, its people scattered wide. Adonia waited, faithful, till the final tide."
「二人旅途未竟，仓惶归乡；却见万籁死寂，唯有黑潮肆意蔓延。」
"Returners, met with silence's deafening wail. Only the black tide's encroaching violence, a bitter tale."
「信徒悲泣三日自刎而死，血液生出红玫瑰，明媚娇艳。」
"The disciple wept for three days and took his life. Red roses sprung from his blood, vivid and rife."
「使者自此以往沉默不言，昼夜徘徊冥河岸，可怖疯癫。」
"Messenger fell silent, lost in Styx's dark embrace. Madness claimed him, a forlorn, unsettled place."
The aftermath of the Chrysos War's chaos.
唔…那段历史可是相当残酷而混乱呢。那么这首《纷争事纪》献给您——
Ah, those were tumultuous times. Enjoy this poem titled Era of Strifes dedicated to you...
「故事发生在黄金暗淡的世纪，神的纷争让人的世界分崩离析：」
"In a somber age when golden brilliance waned. When divine clashes shook the earthly plane."
「古老的预言无人相信，贪婪和欲念铸就野心；人群中暗流涌动，城邦间烽火燃起。」
"Ancient prophecies dismissed, greed's flames ignited. Conspiracies breed, city-states engage in the fight."
「且看黄金裔们如何堕落，被无尽的欲望吞噬折磨；鲜血染红了河流与大地，战斗的呼喊声仍未止息。」
"Chrysos Heirs, tormented by their insatiable yearning. Bloodied rivers, soil tainted, battle cries echoing, burning."
「直到水源枯干、树木凋敝，天空晦暗、土地贫瘠——无情的战争还在继续，只因满腔欲念未曾止息。」
"Waters dry, trees fade, skies weep, lands stripped bare. Unyielding war rages on, fueled by boundless desire."
「民众颤抖不已，心中充满恐惧；军队蹒跚而行，践踏一切正义。」
"In trembling hearts, fear takes root deep and near. Armies advancing, justice a distant dream. World fractured, crushed beneath the relentless stream."
「荒野支离，纷争的铁蹄粉碎明日的希冀；家园破碎，空洞的眼眶盈满冰冷的泪滴……」
"Homes razed, lifeless eyes shedding icy tears. In a shattered world where hope disappears..."
The rise and fall of the hundred Seaside States.
那些湮灭在历史洪流中的城邦啊…可真令人怀念向往。那么这首《黄金时代》献给您——
The cities lost in history's flow evoke such nostalgia... Please delight in this piece named The Golden Age...
「最初的人们聚集在刻法勒脚下，文明的种子便在翁法罗斯萌芽。请看——」
"At Kephale's feet, humanity's dawn unfurled. Civilization's roots in Amphoreus twirled."
「阿里斯蒂亚的岩石与海浪之间，绵延着大理石寺庙、海浪形喷泉，与宏伟的宫殿；」
"Aristia's shores graced by temples grand. Fountains like waves, palaces that stand."
「麦迪特瑞恩的沃土与和煦日光，滋育了饱满的橄榄、黄金的蜜果、与广阔葡萄园。」
"Mediterrana's embrace, earth rich and warm. Nurturing olives, fruits, vineyards in charm."
「学者与智者在欧瑞尼亚播撒知识与智慧之种；文学与艺术在米里奥斯结出的果实分外甘甜。」
"Aurelia's scholars sow wisdom's seed. Literature and art in Milios freed."
「耶利卡的港口船只往来不息；皮利亚的驼兽络绎无闲。」
"Jericha's ports, alive with ships in array. Pyria's domain, filled with camelbeasts at bay."
「奥凯纳斯的盛会追求肉体极限，竞技者挥汗如雨，喝彩声震天；」
"Okeanas' festivals, mortals push their might. Athletes sweat, cheered in contests and fights."
「阿卡索斯的祭典携来繁华飨宴，游行者载歌载舞，纵情须狂欢。」
"Icatus' celebrations, a blaze of delight. Parades of song, dance, feasting in the night."
「呜呼——诸多奇观美景、早湮灭历史洪流之间，唯余叹惋。」
"Ah... so much beauty, lost to time's cruel hand. A tale of sorrow, slipping like sand."
没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.
Wait, wait. Let's do it next time.
没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.
Do you write your own poems, too?
那当然啦，利波还出版过自己的诗集呢！不仅如此，承蒙恩师的教导，利波还会用泰坦语写诗呢！这可不是谁都能做到的哦~
Certainly! I've even penned my own collection of poems. Under my mentor's tutelage, I even ventured into crafting poetry in Titan language! Quite the extraordinary feat, if I may say so myself!
啊，说起来…您与黄金裔英雄们的故事着实波澜壮阔，所以利波就擅自将它们记录下来啦。请来听听利波为您写的诗吧，希望您能喜欢——
Ah, speaking of that... your epic journey with the Chrysos Heirs has inspired me. Here's a poem I've composed just for you. May it resonate deeply with you...
穿越长夜之幕，临世的闪耀星辰
In the night's embrace, a star so bright. World's shimmering beacon, a radiant light.
蒙受命运降福，神秘的异乡旅人
Destined, veiled in mystery's sheen. An outlander in enigma's serene.
悬锋陷落，灾殃骤起，与英雄共赴——
Amidst rising plague and crumbling Kremnos. The outlander joins heroes, dispelling great woes.
扣响时空之扉、追忆往昔之影
To ring time's bells, recall days of yore. Hunting corrupted gold, lost to the core.
狩猎颓堕神明、还其荣耀安宁
Restoring former glory, the tale untold. In echoes of history, a new chapter unfolds.
没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.
I want to take a bath!
啊，对不起，客人，我走神了。您是…我听说过您的事，从异邦来的，协助黄金裔大人们的战士，对吧？
Ah, apologies, good guest. I was distracted. You are... I've heard about you before — the warrior from foreign lands who fights side by side with Chrysos Heirs, am I correct?
欢迎来到云石天宫，客人。阿格莱雅大人交代过我们，要将您与您的同伴当作贵宾来接待。
Welcome to Marmoreal Palace, good guest. Lady Aglaea has instructed us to receive you and your fine companions as esteemed guests.
Any perks that come with that?
当然，阿格莱雅大人应该已经给您简单介绍过这里了，那请允许我说明一下——
Of course. Lady Aglaea must have told you about this place, but allow me to give you a thorough introduction...
实在抱歉，客人。刚刚我的思绪飘到了万径之门外面，绝非有意要无视您。
My sincerest apologies, good guest. My thoughts wandered out of the Gate of Infinity just now, I absolutely did not mean to ignore you.
不如说，如果您不介意，我希望多跟您聊聊，听您讲讲城外的故事。
Rather, if you don't mind, I would hope to converse further with you, and listen to your tales outside the city.
先不提这些，阿格莱雅大人应该给您简单介绍过这里了，那请允许我补充说明一下您拥有的权益。
These matters aside, Lady Aglaea should have briefed you about this place. Please allow me to elaborate on the privileges you possess.
您可以随意出入浴场、免费使用浴场的各项设施，同时，在需额外付费的项目中享有专属折扣，但一部分贩卖品不在此限。
You can enter and exit the bath anytime, use the bath's various facilities free of charge, and enjoy exclusive discounts on paid amenities, though this offer does not extend to some products.
让人们洗去脏污，获得安宁，是云石天宫创设的初衷，而协助守卫奥赫玛的战士们更加值得敬佩，所以提供对应的服务是我们应该做的。

Allowing people to wash off their taint and attain serenity — that's the original purpose of the Marmoreal Palace. The warriors who assisted in defending Okhema are even more worthy of commendation, so it is only natural that we provide the respective services.
很抱歉，工作人员需要养活自己…再者说，如果太乱来，也不符合塔兰顿的教诲。
Sincerest apologies, but the staff here also need to earn a living... Also, it does not reflect well on Talanton's teachings if a good intention goes astray.
此外图书室、池中餐厅等设施…嗯，这部分还是让浴场的其他同事们为您介绍的好。
As for the reading room, pool restaurant and other amenities... Hmm, I'd better leave their introductions to my bath coworkers.
我要说的就这些了，您可以入场逛逛。我会接着在这发呆，有需要就来找我吧。
This is all I have to say. You may go in and have a look around as you please. I will proceed to daydream here and snap back to reality if you need me.
抱歉，入场请往…啊，是您啊，客人。很高兴再见到您，有什么需要吗？
Apologies, this way to enter... Ah, it is you, my good guest. Glad to see you again, how may I help you?
嗯，您看起来可真清闲，真让人羡慕…虽然我也差不多。
Mm, your apparent idleness is enviable... even if it is similar for me.
怎么每次见你都在发呆？
Why are you always in a daze when I see you?
…我是不是，应该补充说明一下？
就像艺术家们说，欧洛尼斯所代表的永夜是最适合激发创作灵感的事物。而对于我而言，能够激发思考的是它——云石天宫的瀑布。

Just as the artists say, the eternal night that Oronyx symbolizes is a thing most suited to spark the inspiration of creation. And to me, the thing that stimulates my thoughts is this — Marmoreal Palace's waterfall.
听着哗啦啦的水声，很多理不清的思绪都会迎刃而解。代价就是经常被管理员念叨：「消极怠工，小心塞纳托斯上身」。

Myriad knotted thoughts will undo themselves when I listen to its constant splashing barrage. The only price I have to pay is the manager's constant yammering: "Keep slacking off and Thanatos shall take you away."
还好，之前的袭击确实产生了一定影响，好在总体还算安稳。只是…战士或是卫兵之类的客人可能需要我们额外关注一下。
It's all right. The previous attack has had some effect, but everything else is fine. It's just... we need to be more watchful with guests who are warriors or guards in some capacity.
就我的观察来看，受了轻伤而前来泡澡疗愈的客人变得更多了，也有一些老熟客缺勤…希望他们平安无事。
From what I've noticed, there has been a rise in guests with minor injuries coming for a soak, as well as a downturn of regular customers... I hope they are all right.
但…我相信这只是暂时的。奥赫玛的居民一直都很坚强，未来也会是如此——愿刻法勒庇护我们。
But... I believe that this is temporary. Okhema's people have always been hardy, and so will the future — may Kephale protect us.
嗯，要我为阿格莱雅大人做补充，实在是有些惶恐…那我就给您讲些只有我们工作人员才知道的事好了。
Mm, it somewhat terrifies me that I am to elaborate on Lady Aglaea's words... I shall tell you about matters that only staff are privy to then.
云石天宫的历史能追溯到几千个光历年前——对外是这么说的，实际上应该没有这么久。但另一方面，这反倒更加凸显了建造者们的才华。

We claim that the Marmoreal Palace's history dates back to several thousand Light Calendar years, but its history is technically shorter than that. The fact that it's younger than as claimed has only highlighted the talent of its builders.
再说浴池本身，除了中央浴池外，其他池子里并不都是普通的水，还混了一些对身体好的添加物，比如浴盐、牛奶、还有法吉娜的秘酿等等。

As for the baths themselves, apart from the central pool, the water in the other pools is no ordinary water, but mixed with substances that nourish the body, such as bath salts, milk, and Phagousa's ambrosia, among other things.
它们各自具有不同的功效，您可以通过香气来辨别。另外…有人说直接饮用可以获得更好的效果，但我个人非常不建议您这么做。

They all offer different effects, and you can tell the difference from their aroma. Also... some people say that imbibing the bath water directly yields even more effective results, but I strongly suggest against that.
No worries, I won't bother you then.
不会，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
You're not. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.
No worries, I won't bother you then.
不会，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
You're not. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.
没问题，不过城内最近刚刚经历了变故，商品种类还不够齐全，我看看…目前在列的有这些，如果您感兴趣，我可以详细介绍一下。

That's no problem, but the city has recently undergone some changes, and we have a limited selection of merchandise. Let's see... We currently have these for sale. I can introduce them in detail if you're interested.
客人，我们非常感激您的心意，但入会两次实在是对您的财富太不健康了。还是请看看别的吧。
Good guest, we are extremely grateful, but joining the membership twice will be far too harmful to your wealth. Please browse something else.
如果您有意成为浴场的常客，那么办个付费会籍绝对是不二之选。
If you intend to be a regular at our baths, a membership is surely the wisest choice.
Isn't it free to enter the baths?
啊，请不要误会，会籍并不能带来折扣或是积分之类的东西。硬要说的话，这份支出类似于献给法吉娜的礼物——
Ah, please do not misunderstand, membership does not include discounts or membership points. Simply put, this payment is akin to a gift for Phagousa...
…实话实说，其实云石天宫的浴场，一开始并不是免费的，采用的是后付费制。设计者或许有他的道理，但作为客人而言，会有种受到了欺骗的感觉。

...Truth be told, Marmoreal Palace's bath was not meant to be free in the beginning — we employed the pay-as-you-go policy. The designer may have their reasons behind this but it felt more like a scam to our guests when they were asked to pay.
后来就再也没人提起这件事了，但我们保留了付费的渠道——这就是这个会籍的实际意义。所以在入会之后，您会获得来自浴场全体工作人员的敬意！

No one ever brought this matter up later on, but we still kept the payment channel — this is the true meaning of the membership. Which is why you will have the respect of all bath staff if you join our membership!
So that's what it is, huh?
If I may... Would you like to join our membership?
…说实话，我没想到您真的会掏钱。啊，请不要误会，我没有贬低您的意思，只是单纯因为太久没人买过了。
...Honestly, I didn't expect you'd really do this. Ah, please do not misunderstand, I had no intention of disparaging you, it was simply because it's been ages since someone joined our membership.
我这就将您的慷慨付出发布在云石天宫的辩论场里。
I will spread word of your generosity across Marmoreal Palace's debate forum.
「认可」数已经超过了三万？还有其他客人提出想要入会……
Approval numbers have exceeded <unbreak>30,000</unbreak>? And there are other guests who wish to join the membership...
我不知道该说什么好了，客人，您是浴场的英雄。事已至此，若是不给您什么回报，塔兰顿定会判决我们忘恩负义…就让我为您念一段浴场的祷词吧。

I don't know what to say, good guest. You are a hero of the bath. As it stands, if we don't present you a fair reward, Talanton will surely castigate us for our ingratitude... Allow me to chant a bath prayer for you then.
「水中舞动的人，痛饮秘酿的人，为法吉娜与它的追随者欢呼。在海洋上，在风暴中，我们与无常做伴，笑容如影随形。」

"They who sway in water, who savor secret brew, rejoice in Phagousa and their devotee. Over the oceans, within the tempests, we accept transience as constant company, yet among us happiness prevails wondrously."
您的名字会永远记录在云石天宫的历史上——愿法吉娜庇佑您，客人。
Your name will forever be remembered in Marmoreal Palace's annals — may Phagousa protect you, good guest.
嗯，如此不合算的买卖，您会拒绝也没办法，还请不要放在心上。看看其他的吗？
Mm, it is only natural that you refuse such a financial sham. Please do not take it to heart. Will you take a look at the others?
很抱歉，客人，上次那件已经是我们最后的存货了，到货时我会再通知您。
Truly sorry, good guest. That was the last of our available inventory. I will inform you when the new stock arrives.
这是一种浴池添加物，据说能让使用者经历类似于黄金裔「领受神谕」时的体验。另外，好像…只剩最后一件了，是个难得的机会呢，客人。

This is a type of bath additive that is said to grant the user an experience equal to the time when the prophecy was bestowed upon the Chrysos Heirs. Also, it appears that... this is the last in stock. A most rare opportunity, my good guest.
那就让它接着吃灰吧。还有别的需要吗，客人？
Let it keep gathering dust then. Do you need anything else, good guest?
好的，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
Understood. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.
事不宜迟，你回到私人浴池，想要立刻试试……
With no time to waste, you head back to the private bath, eager to try it out...
水质柔软，泡沫适量，浴盐带来的淡淡花香又为室内增添了些许温馨氛围。啊，还有什么比旅途劳顿之后泡个澡更为放松的事呢？

You bath in the soft water in the embrace of nice and rich bubbles, the faint floral fragrance of the bath salts adds a certain cozy touch to the room. Ah, is there anything more relaxing than a bubble bath after a long, labored journey?
虽然不知道「领受神谕时的体验」是不是和公司商品一样的常见噱头，但浴盐本身的品质就已经让它物有所值了——只要没有面前这坨会说话的雾。

You don't know if an "experience akin to when the prophecy was bestowed" is another one of those gimmicky slogans similar to the commercial spam, but the quality of the bath salts itself proves their worth — if not for the talking mist in front of you.
啊，孩子，在我的庭院里过得还舒适吗？
Ah, child, are you doing well in my courtyard?
你看起来有些疑惑，在你面前的是勒法刻，全翁罗法斯最最伟大的泰坦。要想拿留影石机就趁现在了。
You look confused — before you stands Lephake, the greatest Titan in all of Omlophas. If you want to get the photostone, there is no better time than now.
Is this the moment of prophecy bestowal?
神谕？什么神谕？我是来拉票的。
Prophecy? What prophecy? I'm just here to drum up support.
谁？哦，它啊，它是我兄弟，我们俩长得差不多，但它没我这么高大威武！
Who? Oh, that's my brother. We look similar, but Kephale's not as majestic and dignified as I am!
你瞧，又到了泰坦人气投票的月份了。这届的竞争相当激烈，老塞的新专辑确实让很多信徒都失了智，但小墨在时装展上的惊艳亮相也为她带来了不少支持者。

You see, it's the time of the year again for the Titan popularity vote. The competition this time round is quite intense — Ol' Thannie's new album has got all the disciples in a zealous frenzy, and Mnestia's fabulous outfit at the fashion exhibition has garnered plenty of supporters.
不用我说，你应该明白我来找你做什么了吧？要说神谕也确实算。汝将竖耳聆听，虔诚的「白银裔」啊——
Surely you understand what I'm doing here, no? I guess you may call this a moment of prophecy bestowal anyway. Pray perk your ears and listen, devout "Argyros Heir"...
「投票给蓝色的蘑菇，下次购物满十万将立减十利衡币。」
"Cast your vote for the blue mushroom, and receive a discount of ten Balance Coins for your next purchase of a hundred thousand."
{NICKNAME}，你还好吗？你已经在浴池里待了超过两个时刻了。
{NICKNAME}, are you all right? You've been in the bath for more than two hours.
摇了摇仍旧有些发昏的头，你重新回到了公共浴场……
Shaking your still-dizzy head, you notice you have returned to the public bath...
您这个表情…难道是见到扎格列斯本尊了？之前每一位买下来的客人都和您差不多反应…真是太令人好奇了。
That face of yours... Did you meet Zagreus in person? Every customer who bought this reacted similarly to you... How curious.
总之，谢谢惠顾，欢迎下次再来。
In any case, thank you for your patronage. Hope to see you again soon.
热情洋溢的异乡人啊，你如此步履匆匆
O passionate outlander, your pace is in such hurry
奥赫玛敞亮的天光里，随处可见你身影
Your form is seen everywhere within the divine light of Okhema
你穿行街巷、流连市井；却又与半神比肩、与英雄同行
You traverse the streets and bustle the crowds, yet stand shoulder to shoulder with demigods and heroes
聆听「门径」之颂歌、见证「纷争」之新生、围猎恶徒于悬锋…
Listen to the hymns of Passage, witness the rebirth of Strife, and hunt down the wicked in Kremnos...
凡人终生难遇其一，如是精彩纷呈；而你——
A mortal may encounter such brilliance only once in a lifetime. Yet you...
你尚有前途漫漫，方才启程
Your journey has just begun, your path lies yonder ahead of you.
公民大会上人声鼎沸，半神与元老针锋相对
Voices fill the citizens' assembly as demigods and Elders stand in opposition.
有的希求黄金的旧影，有的寻觅再创的门扉
Some yearn for the golden past of Era Chrysea, while others seek the new dawn of Era Nova.
渎神者反成了神之眷属，送葬者终将令死亡回归
A blasphemer becomes Titankin, while an undertaker brings death home.
逐火苦旅尚未停歇，我等岂可止步后退
Our Flame-Chase Journey goes on. We must not falter.
隔着百步之距时，金线就已预知贵客的到来。{NICKNAME}阁下，想在此休息会儿吗？
The golden thread had already foreseen your arrival when you were a hundred steps away, dear customer. Esteemed {NICKNAME}, have you come to rest?
I wish to discuss some things with you.
随意问吧。敞开心扉的闲谈，有时比起沐浴更能令人身心松弛。
Ask as you please. There are times when speaking from the heart can be even more relaxing than a good, warm bath.
领导逐火之旅，很劳累吧？
Leading the Flame-Chase Journey must be exhausting.
处理奥赫玛大小事务、为逐火之旅奔波，或许确实是疲累的生活，但于我而言，不过是重复了无数光阴的日常罢了。

Dealing with the affairs of Okhema and being constantly on the move for the Flame-Chase Journey could perhaps be considered a tiring life. To me, however, it is no more than a daily routine that I have repeated for ages.
劳累的感触对我来说还真有些遥远了。我记得年幼时，半夜馋嘴偷吃神殿里的燕麦粥，被逮住后罚站到天明。那夜我肌酸骨痛，倒是真切地将「累」的感触刻进心中了。

The feeling of exhaustion is one that feels distant to me. I remember when I was young that I greedily snuck into the temple to eat the offerings of oatmeal. I was caught in the act and was punished. I stood in the temple until dawn. That night, my muscles burned and my bones ached. That was when the sensation of "exhaustion" was truly burned into my bones.
原来「金织」大人也有黑历史！
Even the "Goldweaver" has embarrassing childhood stories!
是啊，每个人都有稚趣盎然的时候，但终究会随着{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的步伐流逝，只存于追忆之中。
That's right. We were all young. However, those days shall eventually pass with the march of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to exist only as memories.
我都不敢想那燕麦粥该多好吃！
I can only imagine how delicious those oats must have been!
那确实是暌违已久的美味了。我记得那是吾师与我初见时亲手烹饪的，还放了雅努萨波利斯的特产。

They did indeed have a wonderful flavor that I have not enjoyed for a long time since. I remember my teachers cooked them the first time that we met. They even added some Janusopolis specialty ingredients.
但如今雅努萨波利斯已殁于黄金战争，那滋味也在漫长岁月里消耗殆尽……
However, Janusopolis perished in the Chrysos War and that delicious flavor has long since been lost...
自从归还火种，成为人们口中的半神，曾经刻骨铭心的感触都已如烛烟袅袅散去，这颗承载着世界命运的心也愈发冰冷。兴许不久后，连沐浴都不能使我欢欣了。

Since returning the Coreflame and becoming what people refer to as a demigod, sensations that were once deeply engraved on my heart have faded away like candle smoke. This heart that bears the destiny of this world has also grown cold. Perhaps soon, not even bathing will bring me joy any longer.
What are your hobbies, Lady Aglaea?
如你所见，沐浴。虽然我少有疲惫的心境，但躯体因劳碌产生的沉重之感却会不断积累。定期前来浴场，正是为了将其纾解。

As you can see, I enjoy bathing. Although I rarely experience fatigue, the feeling of heaviness in my body from a busy life does accumulate endlessly. I come to the baths periodically to relieve this burden.
裁布纳衣亦是我所钟情之事。经纬翻飞之间织出与世人之美相衬的华服，能为我带来珍贵的满足感。
Tailoring is also a passion of mine. Weaving warp and weft to create costumes befitting the beauty of this world brings me a precious feeling of satisfaction.
不过…我对衣物的品质要求颇高，称得上完工的成衣屈指可数，大部分都被废弃。
However... I have extremely high requirements for the quality of garments. My works that meet my standards are few and far between, the rest are all discarded.
而那些瑕疵品总会莫名流入奥赫玛的服装市场，标注着我的名字被高价拍卖，成为某位王公贵族的收藏。我虽不乐得见此，但也无权禁止，就随他们去吧。

These rejected items always inexplicably end up flowing into Okhema's clothing market. They're tagged with my name and auctioned for high prices to be added to some aristocrat's collection. Though I do not like this, I cannot forbid it. They can do as they please.
你愿意给他人做衣服吗？
Would you make clothes for others?
有何不可呢？但我希望自己的造物能有与之相称的主人。
Why not? But I do hope there would be people that befit my works.
「浪漫」的承载者、演绎者、求索者、理解者——皆可得我亲手量体裁衣，这亦是我对墨涅塔神权的延续。
Those that bear, interpret, seek, and understand "romance"... They are worthy of my hand-made garments. This is my continuation of Mnestia's divine authority.
以我所见，阁下的仪态十分「美丽」…这并非讽喻或奉承，服装审美有高低之别而无美丑之分，穿衣之人则有美丑之分而无高低之别。

I can see that you are a person of "fine" bearing, {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}. This is no satire or flattery. The disparities of aesthetics lie in the choices of clothing, not the wearers, while the differences of beauty are among the wearers, not their choices of clothing.
最为夺目的华服，穿在人面兽心者身上，也遮蔽不住丑陋；相反，一眼望去朴素无华的服饰，若与适合的人共鸣，也能大放异彩。

Even the most eye-catching finery when draped across the body of a person with an evil heart cannot conceal their ugliness. By contrast, if completely unremarkable clothing is paired with someone who resonates perfectly, it can create a spectacular image.
譬如阁下所着，若仅论其用料与织工，我自然能挑出无数瑕疵。
When it comes to your clothing, I can naturally point out countless flaws in simply the material and craftsmanship.
但沿着金丝，我能感受到这套衣裳上的「浪漫」——庞鸿而不紊乱，如同交汇而不拥堵的道路。我并无信心做出比它更能承载阁下光辉的服饰。

But by following the golden thread, I can sense the "romance" in it... Convoluted but not chaotic, like a bustling crossroad that is never stalled with traffic. I am confident that it would be impossible for me to create anything that would be more suited to your glory.
What do you think of the Chrysos Heirs?
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
悬锋人中的悬锋人，万敌！
The most typical of the Kremnoans, Mydei!
悬锋人中的悬锋人…如此评价迈德漠斯倒也合理，他无疑是最英勇的悬锋人，在战场上，谁也不能将其击倒。
The most typical of the Kremnoans... A fair evaluation of Mydeimos. He is undoubtedly the most heroic warrior among all Kremnoans. He is unstoppable on the battlefield.
但从某种角度上说，他也是最不像悬锋人的悬锋人。
Though, in some ways, he is the least Kremnoan of all.
超可爱的缇宝、缇宁、缇安。
The adorable Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne.
呵…看来你和奥赫玛的居民们一样，都很喜欢吾师。她们确实是黄金裔中最受奥赫玛平民欢迎者，平日里热衷于与街坊打交道，帮人们解决生活中的疑难琐事。

Hah... I see you are just as fond of my teachers as the citizens of Okhema are. They indeed enjoy enormous popularity among the people of Okhema. They spend their days deeply committed to communicating with their neighbors and helping people with both great troubles and trivial affairs.
呵呵…若这些温馨的日常能够稍微冲淡她们所负的沉重命运，我便再欣慰不过了。
Hah... If only such happiness within their daily life could slightly ease the great weight of destiny that they bear... That would bring me true relief.
差点送我去打复活赛的遐蝶。
看来阁下依然对那时的试探耿耿于怀。{NICKNAME}阁下尽可指责我的失礼，但请别对遐蝶心生芥蒂。

I see that you still bear a grudge over her scrutiny. {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}, you may by all means hold me accountable for my discourtesy. However, please do not foster resentment against Castorice.
她只是听命于我，愿为自己所追逐的事物奉上一切，也愿为此敞开那夺去生命的怀抱——即便那是最令她迷惘之事。
She merely heeds my orders and is willing to give everything to obtain what she seeks. Even if that means extending her life-stealing embrace... This can create a confusing paradox for her.
与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
…无缺的英雄。时至今日，我也只能如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。

...The perfect hero. To this day, that is the only opinion I have ever been able to make of Phainon. As the most perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.
等他从创世涡心中凯旋，我们也能离我们的夙愿更进一步。
When he returns triumphant from the Vortex of Genesis, we will be one step closer to our long-held wish.
I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.
无论哪位黄金裔，都是此世不可或缺的英杰。我其实也无权代替这个时代评判他们，因为他们都承载着这个世界的未来。
Every member of the Chrysos Heirs is a hero that this world cannot do without. I have no right to cast appraisal on them on behalf of this era, because they all shoulder the future of this world.
与阁下的交流十分愉快，我很期待再度与你畅谈。
It's been an absolute delight to speak with you, {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}. I look forward to our next talk.
与阁下的交流十分愉快，很期待再度与你畅谈。
It's been an absolute delight to speak with you, {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}. I look forward to our next talk.
呀，小灰！你也来花园这边散心吗？这边风景真的很好，*我们*要是觉得累了，就会来这里远眺。
Ah, Little Gray! You've come to the garden to relax, too? The scenery here is beautiful. We often come here when feeling overwhelmed.
I want to chat with you, Tribbie!
当然可以！小灰想聊些什么呢？又想听*我们*给你唱预言的歌谣吗？
No problem! What would you like to discuss, Little Gray? Do you want to hear our song of prophecy again?
我老分不清你和缇安、缇宁。
I can never tell you, Trianne, and Trinnon apart.
别灰心！许多新朋友都会犯糊涂，所以*我们*为他们编了个用于辨认的口诀，小灰听好咯——
Don't worry! It happens all the time. So, we created a slogan to help people tell the difference. Listen up, Little Gray...
安静的缇宁话最少，活泼的缇安喜欢闹，乖巧的缇宝到处飘！
Quiet Trinnon has little to say, lively Trianne loves to play, and well-behaved Tribbie roams around all day!
怎么样，这下就不会再认错了吧？
What do you think? You won't get us mixed up again from now on, right?
举手！想更了解缇安一些！
I'd like to get to know a bit more about Trianne!
缇安是*我们*三人中最活泼最勇敢的一位啦，虽然和*我们*一样看上去都是小孩子，但她很愿意做一个战士，飞在最前面保护大家！
Trianne is the liveliest and bravest among us. Although she looks like a child like the rest of us, she always dashes headlong into danger and protect everyone as a brave warrior!
正因如此，缇安才主动接过「门匠」的职责，用「百界门」帮助人们从危险的地方脱身。
That is why Trianne actively took on the role of "gatekeeper" and uses the "Century Gate" to help people escape from danger.
只是…希望她不要太勉强自己呀。
I just... I hope that she doesn't overexert herself.
提问！想更了解缇宁一些！
I want to know more about Trinnon!
缇宁在*我们*之中最为冷静，想问题的时候能考虑得面面俱到，大家都说她身上有一股学者的气质。
Trinnon is the most cool-headed among us. When she thinks about a problem, she considers every possible angle. Everyone says that she has the makings of a scholar.
要是再在一个和平繁荣的年代，缇宁说不定真的能做一个满肚子学问的好学者、好老师呢！
If we lived in a time of peace and prosperity, maybe Trinnon could have been a knowledgeable scholar or teacher!
申请！想更了解缇宝一些！
I would like to know more about you, Tribbie!
哎呀…自己评价自己，总觉得有些怪怪的。大家都说缇宝最为乖巧，可在*我们*看来，缇安和缇宁也都很乖呀。

Um... You want to hear Tribbie's comment on Tribbie, huh? Kind of an odd request but sure. Everyone says that Tribbie is the most well-behaved of us. But, we think that Trianne and Trinnon are well-behaved, too.
有时候人们明明说不出理由，却能在心里精准地勾勒出对一个人的印象。比如在*我们*眼中，小灰就特别可靠，是和阿雅和小白他们不一样的那种可靠！

Sometimes people have a clearly defined idea of a person but cannot give an exact reason for it. In our eyes, you are an extremely reliable person, Little Gray! Though you are not Agy or Snowy, you are just as reliable as they are.
嘿嘿，不知道在小灰眼里，缇宝是什么样的呢？
Hehe, Tribbie wonders what she's like in your eyes.
小灰要是实在分不清，其实还有一个笨办法……
If you still cannot tell the difference, there is actually a simpler method...
那就是看*我们*的发型！具体怎么辨别，*我们*就不多说啦，小灰眼睛那么尖，一定能发现的！
Look at our hairstyles! You're observant so we don't need to explain in too much detail. We know you'll see the difference in no time!
缇宝老师，我想学「百界门」！
Master Tribbie, I want to learn how to use the "Century Gate"!
小灰，好有志气！可普通人怎么想都不可能学会「百界门」的啦。
Ambitious, Gray Hair! It is impossible for ordinary folks to understand how to use the "Century Gate."
…不过小灰只是看几眼就能学会欧洛尼斯奇迹，听上去也是一件不可能的事情…难道，小灰真的是天才？
...That being said, you took one look at Oronyx's Miracle and learned how to use it. That should've been equally impossible... Could Tribbie be wrong and you are a genius all along?
好，决定了，*我们*来教你使用百界门，来创造奇迹吧！
Alright, it's decided. We will teach you how to use the Century Gate! Let's create some miracles!
小灰，请你在心底呼唤「万径之门」，感受空间的摇曳，聆听遥远的彼方在你耳边的呢喃……
Gray Hair, please call out the "Gate of Infinity" from the bottom of your heart. Feel the wavering of space and listen to the distant murmurs in your ears...
然后，把你感受到的这股力量，像是撒网一样丢出来！
Then, cast the power that you sense out like it's a net!
…小灰，吓*我们*一跳。但门径好像没打开诶……
...Gray Hair, you scared us! And it doesn't seem that the gate is opened...
不对不对！小灰用力过猛啦，听上去好像要把空间都给消灭掉啦！
No, no! That's far too violent, Gray Hair! It sounds like you want to completely annihilate space itself!
感受不到，不如界域定锚。
I cannot feel it. Shall I use a Space Anchor?
那是什么…难道是*我们*不知道的雅努斯神迹吗？
What is that? Is it some kind of miracle of Janus that we do not know about?
看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！

It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Gray Hair. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!
你们的心灵感应好方便。
Your telepathy must be very convenient.
啊，是说*我们*和缇安、缇宁之间的心灵感应吗？
Oh, you mean the telepathy shared by Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon?
嗯，绝大部分时候都很方便。只要愿意，*我们*三人可以共享感官所触的大部分事物。
Yes, it is, most of the time. As long as we are willing, we can share most of our senses.
比如说，我和缇宁平时不大爱出门，而缇安很喜欢到处游玩。看到漂亮景色的时候，缇安就会分享给*我们*。
For instance, Tribbie and Trinnon are the indoorsy type, but Trianne is the opposite. When Trianne sees a beautiful landscape, she shares it with us through telepathy.
再比如，当阿雅需要派人去到很远的、金线没有布及的地方时，就会让他们带上*我们*中的一人。这样，就算传信石版不管用，阿雅也可以及时了解到第一手信息啦。
Also, when Agy needs to send people to a distant place out of the golden thread's reach, she'll ask one of us to join them. That way, even if teleslates won't work, Agy can reach us in time.
A round of applause for Okhema's greatest messengers!
说得*我们*都不好意思啦。但其实，心灵感应也有不方便的时候哦。
Stop it, we are blushing. Actually, telepathy doesn't always come in handy.
那什么时候会不方便呢？
在情感波动比较剧烈的时候，*我们*会下意识地共享给彼此。比如说，有一人不小心撞到脑袋，另外两个也会疼得叫出声来。
When our emotions are too intense, we will subconsciously share them. For example, if one of us accidentally bangs our head, the others will feel the pain.
曾经发生过这样一件好笑的事情：缇宁在图书馆读到一个叫人难过的故事，忍不住掉起眼泪。
There's a funny story. Trinnon once read a sad story in the library and couldn't help but let out a few sobs.
那时候缇安在云石市集正玩得开心，突然就开始抽噎了。街坊们都被吓到，一个劲儿地往缇安怀里塞好吃的来安慰她呢！

At that moment, Trianne was out having a wonderful time in Marmoreal Market and she suddenly started sobbing too. Seeing that, everyone was worried and shocked. So they tried to stop her from crying by handing Trianne loads of tasty food.
所以假如有一天，小灰看到*我们*忽然掉眼泪，也不要太吃惊哦。
So, if one day you see us suddenly start shedding tears out of nowhere, no need to worry.
Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!
好呀好呀，明天见可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Gray Hair!
Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!
好呀好呀，明天见可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Gray Hair!
哼哼哼~缇安今天心情也很好！准备去把奥赫玛再飞个遍！
Hum-hum-hum! Trianne is in a great mood today as well! Time for a flight over all Okhema again!
圣城…大家都很喜欢这里，远道而来的朋友，希望你也是。
The holy city... Everyone seems to like this place. I hope that you do too, friend from afar!
…人之所以独处，是为了独自享用清静——这么简单的道理，你应当明白吧？
...The reason people spend time alone is to enjoy peace and quiet... You must understand such a simple logic, surely?
There's no need to be so harsh. Let's have a chat.
Fine. What do you wish to say?
尼卡多利是个怎样的泰坦？
What kind of Titan is Nikador?
众所周知——战争之神，恐惧之神，荣耀之神。
As is known to all... Nikador is the God of War, the God of Fear, and the God of Glory.
当然，也有人将其视为蛮愚与暴戾的泰坦，称其为「疯王」…倒也不无道理，对于羔羊来说，野狼的哈欠都足以使其破胆。

Of course, there are those that see Nikador as foolish and violent. They call Nikador the "Mad King"... It does make sense. To a flock of sheep, even a yawn from a wolf is enough to send them into hysteria.
They are dead now, and there will be no more wars!
现在松懈还太早，仍有纷争的眷属在世间徘徊，黑潮也仍在肆虐。只有当战争的目的一并消弭，真正的安宁才能够降临。
It is too early to be so complacent. Titankin of Strife still roam this world, and the black tide rages on. Only when the true purpose of war is eradicated can peace descend.
当生存的危机悬于头顶，是求饶苟延，还是拔剑赴战，即使你不是悬锋人，想必也能给出正确的回答。

When a threat to your survival looms over your head, you have but two options: To beg for mercy and buy time, or to draw your sword and go into battle. I'm sure you do not have to be a Kremnoan to know the right answer.
Fear and glory... Is that not a contradiction?
悬锋人历来将恐惧视作踏向荣耀的道路。尼卡多利之所以令悬锋人誓死相随，正是因为它能将无边恐惧与无上荣耀锻作一炉。
To the Kremnoans, fear is the path to glory. The reason that Kremnoans vow to follow Nikador to their death is so that Nikador can forge limitless fear into endless glory.
纷争泰坦尚未失神的辉煌年代，只有在其威压之下仍能稳持长枪、浴血而立的王储，才有资格继任悬锋之王。

In the glorious era before the Strife Titan fell, only the crown prince who could hold their spear firm under the divine pressure and stand tall under the rain of blood was worthy to become the King of Kremnos.
我能理解奥赫玛人对尼卡多利的嫌怨，但我也希望你明白，尼卡多利给予翁法罗斯的不止痛苦与恐惧。
I can understand the Okhemans' grudge against Nikador. However, I do hope that you will understand that Nikador has gifted more than just suffering and fear to Amphoreus.
在天谴之矛陷入疯溃前，它也曾是翁法罗斯的守护者。纷争的力量，亦可平息纷争。
Before the Lance of Fury fell into madness, they served as the guardian of Amphoreus. The power of Strife is also the queller of strife.
想听听悬锋孤军的来历。
I want to hear about the origins of the Kremnoan Detachment.
呵，这可是个颇长的故事…我就只讲些片段吧。
Hah, that is a long story... Let me give you the abridged version.
不知你是否听闻，我曾与自己的故乡有些过节。出于某些原因，我选择了离开悬锋城，在翁法罗斯各地流亡，悬锋孤军则是愿追随我同行的一众乡友。

I'm not sure if you have heard this before, but I had a few issues with my hometown. I elected to leave Castrum Kremnos for various reasons and wander across Amphoreus. The Kremnoan Detachment was a group of my fellow countrymen who were willing to follow me.
虽是流亡，但他们的锐气比起悬锋军将有过之而无不及。拉冬、哀地里亚、厄涅俄努斯，皆有我等威名传颂。
Though they were exiles, their drive exceeded even that of the soldiers of Kremnos. Word of our might spread across Ladon, Aidonia, and Aenionus.
后来机缘巧合下，我们与奥赫玛结为联盟，为「金织」主持的逐火之旅效力。期间，悬锋孤军战功赫赫，并在征途中杀回王城，令先王败而授首。

Later, we happened to ally ourselves with Okhema and offered our services to the Flame-Chase Journey led by the Goldweaver. During that time, this lone army of Kremnos achieved great military success. Along the expedition, we fought back into their home city and defeated the previous king.
What a chilling story of royal leadership!
或许此番讲述还是太过云淡风轻。在那段征途中，我等经历的磨难与牺牲，绝比言辞要沉重千万倍。
Perhaps this narration is an understatement. The suffering and sacrifices that we experienced during that expedition were heavier than any words could convey.
我自幼离乡，虽流淌着一脉相承的悬锋之血，但对那座王都没有那么眷恋。
I left my hometown at a young age. Though I carry the blood of Castrum Kremnos, I bear no affection for that kingdom.
至于我的同胞们…悬锋人思乡的方式，就是在战场上恣意拼杀。当他们在战场上染血高呼着「宁战死，毋荣归」的时候，我就知道…奥赫玛，无法成为他们真正的家。

As for my kin... the Kremnoans show how much they miss their home by fighting without restraint. When I see them on the battlefield, blood-stained and raising a cry of "valorous death before glorious return," I knew... that Okhema could never be their true home.
就讲这么多吧。如果你有兴趣，也可去找那些真言狮口再问些悬锋孤军的事迹。不过切勿轻信——那群家伙最爱东拼西凑、搬弄是非。

That is all I will say for now. If you are interested, you can go to those Verax Leos and ask about the achievements of the Kremnoan Detachment. But do not trust their every word... They love to piece together stories to stir the pot.
为什么不是你去尼卡多利的试炼？
Why are you not taking the trial of Nikador?
...Phainon is better suited for that than I am.
我看你们打得不相上下呀。
决定谁去承载纷争火种的不只有武力的高低。白厄他…是无缺的「救世主」，由他接纳尼卡多利的神性再合适不过。
It is not merely martial strength that decides who will bear the Coreflame of Strife. Phainon... he is the flawless "Deliverer," and there is no greater candidate to inherit the divinity of Nikador.
只要他能克服内心的恐惧，荣耀自会成为他的冠冕。
As long as he can overcome the fear in his heart, glory shall become his crown.
你害怕自己通不过试炼？
Are you scared that you would not pass the trial?
哼，与尼卡多利的决战都不足为惧，区区试炼有何可怕？但阻止我手握火种的并非泰坦的试炼…而是悬锋城的试炼。

Hmph. If a battle to the death with Nikador could not incite fear in my heart, what could scare me about a mere trial? The thing that stops me from grasping the Coreflame is not the trial of the Titan... but the trial of Castrum Kremnos.
容我打断你的追问，我拒绝接收火种自有我的道理。我不会因你而动摇自己的决定，无需再费口舌。
Allow me to interrupt your interrogation here. I have my own reasons for not accepting the Coreflame. I will not allow my decision to be shaken by your intentions. You may save your breath.
想请你帮我翻译一块石板。
I need your help to translate a slate.
你是从哪儿找到这块石板的？悬锋城么？
Where did you find this slate? Castrum Kremnos?
一段往事罢了，你自己看吧。说起来，你不是得到欧洛尼斯的赐福了么？
Just some stories of the past, take a look for yourself. Come to think of it, did you not receive the benediction of Oronyx?
要是感兴趣，不如去悬锋城转转，说不定能在记忆的尘堆里翻出些有趣的旧史呢。
If you're interested, why not take a look around Castrum Kremnos for yourself? Maybe you will be able to dig up some interesting stories from among the dust of memories.
你还想追问些什么，但万敌别过脸去，对这个话题缄口不言。
Though you have more questions you want to ask, Mydei turns away and remains silent on the topic.
请小心些，{NICKNAME}阁下，别靠太近…抱歉，这只是为了安全，并非对您有什么意见。
Please be careful, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. Don't get too close... Sorry, this is for your safety. I do not have any objection to your presence.
阁下找我，是有什么话想说吗？
Is there something you wish to discuss with me, {F#miss}{M#mister}?
我很乐意…但我平时很少与人打交道，有些不善交流…希望阁下不要介意。
I would love to... although I very rarely converse with others. I am not gifted with communication... Please do not be offended, {F#miss}{M#mister}.
What do you like to do normally?
看书…扫墓…看花…还有做些小手工。
Read books... visit graves... admiring flowers... and make ornaments.
嗯，因为诅咒，我不便与他人同行，只能寻些独处的喜好。
Indeed. It is difficult for me to work alongside others due to my curse. I have no choice but to find hobbies I can enjoy alone.
Let me see what you made.
啊…我身上这些蝴蝶与花的饰品就是……
Ah... I made all of these butterfly and flower accessories on my dress...
奥赫玛所有的藏书我都已经读过，其中尤其偏爱历史与文学。我自己最喜欢的一则故事讲的是公主变成巨龙……
I have read all of the books in the Okhema archives. I prefer books on history and culture. My favorite story is about a princess that becomes a dragon...
请别嘲笑我，传说是跨越万千岁月而诞生的珍贵结晶。比如最广为人知的翁法罗斯泰坦神话，如果你有机会了解，一定会被它的恢弘与精妙所震撼的。

Please do not laugh at me. A legend is a precious crystal that is born over the course of millennia. Take the famous Titan mythology of Amphoreus. If you have time to learn about it, you will be shocked by its vastness and exquisite detail.
至于扫墓…奥赫玛的墓园里，有许多长眠者，都是由我来「入殓」的。我会定期前去清扫他们的坟墓——不知为何，我总担忧他们未能安眠。

As for visiting graves... Many of the deceased around the graveyards of Okhema were personally embalmed by me. I periodically go to their tombs to dust... I'm not sure why but I'm always concerned that somehow they cannot rest in peace.
手工则是因为我想多保留一些美丽的事物。蝴蝶、干花，我会把它们缝到特制的绸布上，让它们看上去好像从未失去生命。
Making ornaments is how I preserve things of beauty, such as butterflies and dried flowers... I sew them onto special silk fabric so they look like they never lost their lives.
为了尽可能不损伤它们，我还特地去找阿格莱雅大人学了些针线手艺。若阁下不嫌弃，我之后也可以送你些做的东西。
I learned sewing techniques from lady Aglaea to ensure that I do not damage them in the process. I could gift you some in the future if you'd like to have some.
奥赫玛的居民都挺怕你的。
The people of Okhema seem to fear you.
这也无可厚非，因为我是圣城的「入殓师」，曾经…更是哀地里亚的督战圣女。在大家眼中，我就是行走的死亡使者。
They cannot be blamed for this. I am the "mortician" in the holy city. I was also once... the holy maiden who oversaw warfare in Aidonia. In their eyes, I am no more than a walking envoy of death.
I would like to hear your story.
我并无来到哀地里亚之前的记忆；据他们说，我被哀地里亚收留以前一直在荒原上彷徨游荡。
I have no memories of the time before I came to Aidonia. From what I'm told, I was merely a drifter who wandered the wastelands until Aidonia took me in.
想听听哀地里亚的故事。
I'd like to hear stories about Aidonia.
哀地里亚是一座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦，居民们视死如归——与悬锋人的渴望战死不同…他们将死亡作为生的幸福归宿。

Aidonia is a city that worships Thanatos. Its residents regard death as their destined end... Unlike the Kremnoans longing to die in battle, the Aidonians see death as the blessed final destination for life.
不过这并不意味着哀地里亚人不珍惜生命。相反，他们认为只有在世间行走磨砺足够长久，才能有坚韧的、足以渡过冥河面见塞纳托斯的灵魂。

However, that does not mean that Aidonians do not treasure life. On the contrary, they believe that it is only by living a long life and tempering oneself will one gain a soul tenacious enough to cross the River of Souls and meet Thanatos.
哀地里亚人在荒原中找到我，坚信我身负死亡泰坦赐福，我的双手能让他们避开冥河、直接面见伟大的塞纳托斯。

The Aidonian found me in the wilds. They strongly believed that I had received the blessing of the Death Titan, that my hands could spare them from the River of Souls and send them straight to the great Thanatos.
因此我被奉为「督战圣女」——哀地里亚人在战场上牺牲的将士，将由我赋以独属于死者的抚慰与尊严。
So, I was revered as the "Maiden of War"... Only I could grant the deceased Aidonian warriors the comfort and respect that they deserve.
给我讲些泰坦的故事吧！
想不到阁下也对翁法罗斯的历史神话故事感兴趣呀！正巧，漫长岁月里我攒了不少有趣的故事，不知阁下想听什么样的？

I never would have thought that you were also interested in the mythological tales of Amphoreus, {F#miss}{M#mister}! As luck would have it, I have collected many interesting stories over my long years. What kind of tale would you like to hear?
I want to hear a formal historical account!
或许要让阁下失望了，翁法罗斯的大部分历史都是由吟游诗人们自遥远的过去带来，再由他人录为文字，如此口口相传，总有失真之处。

I fear you may be disappointed, {F#miss}{M#mister}. The majority of Amphoreus' history comes from bards recounting stories of ancient times. These stories are then recorded into words by third parties. Distortions of the truth are inevitable.
如今，浴场精灵们所讲述的翁法罗斯创世神话，或许是目前最符合阁下想要的「正史」了。
Perhaps the story that best fits the description of "a formal historical account" is the myth of Amphoreus' creation that the bath sprites have been telling.
不过如果阁下不介意，我还有其它一些有趣的故事可以与你分享。
However, I have other interesting stories that I could share with you. That is, if you do not mind.
I want to hear historical rumors and gossip!
如果阁下不介意，我确实有些有趣的故事可以与你分享。
I do have a number of interesting stories that I could share with you. That is, if you do not mind.
For instance... The story of Zagreus.
相传扎格列斯喜欢对其他诸神恶作剧，曾偷走塔兰顿的天平和法吉娜的酒杯。诸神为了遏制它的恶行，就在它身上绑了一颗星星，用于暴露扎格列斯的去向。

Legend has it that Zagreus used to enjoy playing pranks on the other gods, stealing Talanton's scales and Phagousa's wine glass. To put an end to their misdoings, the gods fastened a star to Zagreus' body to reveal their whereabouts at all times.
又比如，法吉娜与吉奥里亚两尊泰坦相看两厌，翁法罗斯的下雨天其实是法吉娜在灌醉艾格勒后对吉奥里亚发出的挑衅。

Another story that I have heard is that the Titans Phagousa and Georios cannot stand each other. Legend states that when it rains in Amphoreus, this is actually Phagousa taunting Georios after having gotten Aquila drunk.
而吉奥里亚与瑟希斯达成盟约，让植物们替自己挡住法吉娜不息的波涛声和雨声。
So, Georios formed an alliance with Cerces to have plants shelter the land and block the sound of Phagousa's endless waves and rain.
还有更吊诡的传说：据说尼卡多利曾经对塔兰顿……
There are even more bizarre legends than these: It is said that Nikador did something to Talanton, which is...
啊，抱歉，一不留神我居然这么多话，耽误了阁下好多时间。我很少有机会能和朋友如此畅聊…真的很谢谢你。
Ah, my apologies. I got caught up in my stories and ended up rambling. I'm so sorry to have wasted your time. I rarely get an opportunity to speak so freely with a friend... I am truly grateful.
That's all I wanted to talk about. Goodbye!
好的，再见，下次有机会再一起聊聊天吧。
Okay, farewell. Let's talk again when we get a chance.
That's all I wanted to talk about. Goodbye!
好的，再见，下次有机会再一起聊聊天吧。
Okay, farewell. Let's talk again when we get a chance.
塞纳托斯在上，请指引我家人的魂灵……
Thanatos above, please, guide the souls of my family...
哦，抱歉。刚才在祈祷，没注意到你。你也是新来的吗？你好，我叫布鲁图斯，刚到这儿没多久。
Oh, my apologies. I was praying and did not notice you. Are you new here, too? Hello, my name is Brutus. I arrived not long ago.
我在为我的家人祈祷，愿他们能享有永恒的安宁。
I was saying a prayer for my family. I wish they may have eternal peace.
我的故乡啊…那是离奥赫玛最近的度假胜地，气候极为舒适…我家后院有座超级大的花园，我妻子在里面种满了她最爱的薄暮玫瑰。
My home... It is the closest scenic holiday spot to Okhema. The climate there is wonderful... My home had a gigantic garden in the rear courtyard. My wife filled it with her favorite dusk roses.
…抱歉，我的措辞有误，那里曾是离奥赫玛最近的度假胜地，嗯…*曾是*。
...Sorry, I should rephrase that. It was the closest scenic holiday spot to Okhema... Was.
…黑潮来的时候，我正在给花园浇水。谁知道那会是最后一次照看那些薄暮玫瑰呢。
...When the black tide came, I was watering the garden. Who knew that would be the last time I tended to those dusk roses...
我妻子特别喜欢那些玫瑰。每天早上她都会摘一朵别在头发上。现在想想，真该多种些的。
My wife loved those roses... Every morning she would pick one and pin it to her hair. Thinking about it now, I should really have planted some more.
本来想投奔这儿的老朋友，结果一到就听说他前段时间...唉，算了。看来这世道，谁也说不准明天会怎样。
I came here to seek shelter with an old friend but, when I arrived, I heard that he just recently... Ah, forget it. I guess no one in this world can ever really know what tomorrow will bring.
至少我还活着，对吧？希望雅努斯能给我指条明路。虽然有时候我也在想，活着到底是幸运还是不幸…如果我是幸运儿，那为什么只有我一个人侥幸存活呢？

At least I'm still alive, right? I hope that Janus will guide me through this misery. Although, sometimes I wonder if I'm actually fortunate to be alive or not... Is it really fortunate to be the sole survivor?
不，在见过黑潮之后，我已经是塞纳托斯的信徒了，我愿用我的余生向塞纳托斯祈祷，只求它能带给我家人永恒的沉眠。
No. Ever after I saw the black tide, I have become a disciple of Thanatos. I will spend the rest of my life praying to Thanatos for the eternal peace of my family.
你要是跟我一样…不信点什么的话，怕是连床都起不来。
If you were me... You'd need something to believe in, or you wouldn't even be able to get out of bed in the morning.
塞纳托斯在上…它应该不会让我家人在黑暗里迷路吧？他们应该能找到安静的地方歇着。我儿子小时候最怕黑了，希望他在那边不会害怕。

By Thanatos above... They would not leave my family lost in the darkness, would they? My family should be able to find a place of peace and quiet to rest. My little son was afraid of the dark. I hope that he is not scared over there.
你知道吗，有时候我会和塞纳托斯说话——都是我单方面提问。我总是一边祈祷，一边在心里问，我家人在那边过得好吗？有没有吃的？冷不冷？可惜，它从不回答。

You know, sometimes I talk to Thanatos — I ask a lot of questions. When I pray, I always wonder if my family is doing well over there, and if they have enough food and clothes to keep themselves warm. Unfortunately, I never got the answers.
哼，我也有想过…我好吃好喝地供奉着它，肯定不是我不够心诚，想来想去……
Hmph. I have also considered... I have offered Thanatos fine food and drink. There's no way that I have not been loyal enough. I keep thinking and...
一定是那个马尔库斯，每次我做祷告，他就在那儿嚷嚷，肯定是他惊扰到塞纳托斯了。
It must be that Marcus. Every time I go to pray, he makes noises. He must have disturbed Thanatos...
What did he do to you?
...Do you want to tell me more about it?
喏，就隔壁那个疯子，我喊他「撒谎精」——天天讲他打仗的事。今天说自己杀了十个怪物，明天又说自己躲在树后面看别人打仗，前后矛盾，嘴里就没一句实话。

Ugh, he's the madman that lives next door. I call him the "braggart"... He is constantly telling stories of battles he's been in, how he killed ten monsters by himself, or how he hid behind a tree and watched others fight them. His stories are self-contradiction itself. You can never trust a single word he says.
最可气的是…他竟然说被卷入黑潮的人都不得安宁！说什么他看到他们队长的脸，总是出现在雾里，什么在黑潮来临的时候，听到同伴喊他进去的声音……

The worst thing of all is that he claims those who are devoured by the black tide will never be at peace! He says that he sees their captain's face in the mist and hears his comrades calling him to join them in the black tide...
塞纳托斯在上，它平等地眷顾每一个逝者，它的神力至高无上…那个马尔库斯，他是怎么敢的？！
The Great Thanatos above! Thanatos has equal mercy for the deceased and supreme powers above all... That Marcus, how dare he utter such nonsense!?
抱歉，我有点太激动了，希望没吓到你。
Sorry, I let myself get carried away. I hope I did not scare you.
塞纳托斯在上，请指引我家人的魂灵…哦，是你啊。有事吗？
By Thanatos above, please guide the souls of my family... Oh, it's you. What's up?
Can you tell me about yourself?
我的事？没什么好说的，就是个普通人罢了。不过既然你好奇…那就大大方方地问吧。
About myself? There's not much to say. I'm just a normal Mountain Dweller. Feel free to ask if you are curious.
…在黑潮来的那天，我刚把晚饭端上桌。孩子们还在吵着要吃点心。谁知道那会是最后一顿饭。现在想想，真该让他们多吃点的。

...On the day the black tide came, I had just put dinner on the table. The children were clamoring that they wanted to eat snacks instead. Who knew that would be the last meal we ever had together? Thinking about it now, I should have made sure they ate more.
你知道吗，我女儿那天还在闹脾气，说爸爸做的饭不好吃。我当时还训了她几句。要是能重来，我一定让她想吃什么就吃什么。
You know what? That day, my daughter was throwing a tantrum and saying that the food I cooked was horrible. I told her off. If I could go back, I would let her have whatever she wanted.
每天睡前我都在想，是不是该多给他们一块糖。现在想想，真该给的……
Every day before I sleep, I think to myself... Should I have let them have some more candy? I really should have done it...
最近我总是做梦，梦见他们还在身边。醒来的时候，那种失落感…哎，只有向塞纳托斯祈祷，我的心才能平静下来……
I keep dreaming lately that they are still here with me. That feeling of loss I experience when I wake up... Ah, only praying to Thanatos can calm my heart...
你好像很讨厌马尔库斯？
You seem to really hate Marcus?
马尔库斯啊，那个「撒谎精」，他总说自己是个老兵，在对抗黑潮的时候还救过人，可他讲的事情前后矛盾，我觉得他好像在编故事，以此作为某种谈资。

Marcus, you mean the "braggart"? He's always talking about how he's a veteran. He says that he saved people when he fought off the black tide. But his stories are so full of contradictions! I can't help but feel like he's making them all up just to make his stories sound cool.
不过…就在几天前，我看到他一个人对着墙说话，听到他在小声说「对不起」，虽然不知道是在对谁说，但我突然觉得他可能比我还可怜。

Although... A few days ago, I saw him alone speaking to a wall. I heard him quietly say: "I'm sorry." I don't know who he was speaking to, but I suddenly felt like he had suffered even more than I have.
活着的人都有自己的苦衷，但我就是不喜欢他这样编排逝者们的往事，这是否有点过于不尊重他们了？所以呀，我对马尔库斯没什么好脸色。
Life is tough for everybody already. I just don't like how he fabricates the stories of those that passed away. It is sheer disrespect. That's why I have no good words to say about that Marcus.
还行吧，我在这儿住不习惯，总觉得少了点什么，可能是因为没有家人在身边吧。
It's fine. I'm not used to living here yet, I always feel like something is missing. I imagine it's because my family aren't by my side.
在我老家有句话：「塞纳托斯要带走的人，任何神都强留不得。」我时常会拿这句话安慰自己，往事已矣，生者还要好好活下去。

There is a saying where I come from: "There is no god powerful enough to hold onto those that Thanatos must take away." I often use this phrase to comfort myself. The past is in the past, and the living must make the most of their lives.
哎，不说这个了…你有去过浴场吗？我泡过一次澡，舒服得差点忘了过去的一切，你有空也可以试试。

Ah, I don't want to talk about this anymore... Have you been to the baths before? I went once. I was so relaxed that I almost forgot about everything that had happened. If you get a moment, you should try them out.
Nothing. I just wanted to say hi.
谢了。这地方冷冰冰的，有人问候一声，感觉好多了。
Thanks. This is a cold place. Having someone check in with me brings warmth to my heart.
那一箭，射穿了它的眼睛…不对，是心脏……
That arrow, it pierced its eye... No, it was its heart...
啊！你是谁？是塞纳托斯派来的使者吗？我...我还没准备好！
Ah! Who are you? A messenger sent by Thanatos? I... I am not ready yet!
Calm down. I'm just a passerby.
Thanatos? What are you talking about?
原来如此...抱歉，我有时分不清现实和幻象。你是新来奥赫玛的吧？我是马尔库斯，曾经的边境守卫。
I see... My apologies. I sometimes struggle to tell the difference between reality and fantasy. You're new to Okhema, right? I am Marcus, and I used to be a border guard.
我应该已经被黑潮带走了...为什么偏偏是我留下来？
I should have been taken by the black tide... Why did it leave me behind?
你能告诉我发生了什么吗？
Can you tell me what happened?
发生了什么…我、我…我记不清…只记得…那天，黑潮来袭，等等，我们是为什么出现在那儿来着？
What happened...? I, I... I can't quite remember... I just remember... That day, the black tide came. Wait, why were we there again?
Are you okay? Do you need help?
我还好，我只是…有点头疼…过去的事有点模糊不清，我再想想……
I'm okay. I just... My head hurts... The past is a blur. Give me a moment...
我想起来了…那天，黑潮来袭，我们奉命守卫边境。
I remember... That day, the black tide attacked, and we were ordered to guard the border.
天空突然被永夜之帷笼罩，欧洛尼斯的预言应验了。然后...然后那些怪物就出现了。数不清的怪物……
The sky was suddenly eclipsed by the Veil of Evernight as the prophecy of Oronyx came to pass. Then... Then the monsters appeared. Endless numbers of them...
我的战友，我的队长...他们一个接一个被黑潮吞噬。不！不是这样的！艾格勒的光芒明明驱散了黑暗！我记得我们胜利了！
My allies, my captain... They were devoured by the black tide one-by-one. No! That's not right! The light of Aquila dispelled the darkness! I remember we were actually victorious!
你相信我吗？我们真的赢了，对吧？刻法勒会赞扬我们的勇气，对吗？
Do you believe me? We were victorious, weren't we? Kephale will praise us for our courage, won't they?
I believe you. You were extremely courageous.
真的吗？谢谢你…这里的人不太相信我，只有你和个别人信我。谢谢你。很少有人愿意听我说这些。
Really? Thank you... The people around here don't trust me very much. Only you and a very small number of people believe me. Thank you. So few are ever willing to listen to me talk about this.
Maybe you need to see a doctor?
医生？不，能带给我安宁的，只有塞纳托斯…但现在还不行，我还不能合眼，我只要一闭上眼，就会看到大家被黑潮吞噬的样子……
A doctor? No, only Thanatos can bring me peace... But I am not ready yet. I cannot close my eyes yet. Every time I do, I see them all being devoured by the black tide...
我常常在想，那些被带走的人，是不是已经在塞纳托斯的国度里找到安宁了？
I keep thinking... Those people that were taken... Have they already found peace in the kingdom of Thanatos?
可我明明记得…我那一箭，射穿了它的眼睛…不对，是心脏…大家被救了出来，我们还一起饮宴庆祝，可是现在…为什么只有..我却被困在这里？他们人呢？

But I clearly remember... That arrow, it pierced its eye... No, it was its heart... Everyone was saved and we held a feast together! But now... Why am I the only one... that is trapped in this place? Where are they all?
好像不对…我记不清了，我真的记不清了……
Something's not right... I can't remember. I really can't...
…我记不清了，我真的记不清了… 哦！是你啊！雅努斯保佑，你还愿意来听我说话。
...I can't remember. I really can't... Oh! It's you! May Janus bless you for coming to speak with me again.
I want to chat with you...
你想聊什么？这里的人不太信任我，很少有人愿意听我絮叨。
What would you like to chat about? The people here don't really trust me. Very few people are willing to listen to my ramblings.
能再和我讲讲你的经历吗？
Can you tell me about what you experienced again?
我的经历？哪一段？是我们如何在尼卡多利的指引下勇敢战斗，还是...我们最后是如何失败的？
What I experienced? Which part? The part about how we battled bravely under the guidance of Nikador? Or... How we were eventually defeated?
让我想想...有一次，我们遇到了一群特别可怕的黑潮生物。它们像是某种巨大的水母，但又带着人的面孔。那些面孔...那些面孔看起来非常眼熟。

Let me think... One time I came across a group of terrifying black tide creatures. They looked like a kind of giant jellyfish, but they had human faces. Those faces... Those faces looked so familiar to me.
我记得我举起弓箭，瞄准了最大的那只。我祈求艾格勒赐予我力量和准头。然后...然后箭矢飞出去了，正中目标！
I remember I raised my bow and hit the biggest one. I prayed to Aquila to give me strength and accuracy. Then... Then I fired my arrow and got a direct hit!
但是...但是那张脸...不，不可能！那是队长的脸！不，这不可能！
But... But that face... No, it can't be! It was my captain's face! No, it couldn't have been!
不不不，这不对，我记得队长在我身边给我递弓箭来着…也许这一切都是扎格列斯的恶作剧。也许我们从未真正战斗过，也许这一切都只是一场可怕的梦..……

No, no, no. That's not right. I remember my captain was by my side handing me bow and arrow... Maybe this was all some kind of trick by Zagreus. Maybe we never actually went into battle. Maybe this was all some terrifying dream...
How have you been feeling lately?
我？我很好，非常好。只是有时候会听到些声音...你听到了吗？那些尖叫声？
Me? I am great. Really great. It's just that I hear voices sometimes... Do you hear them? Those screams?
不，别在意。可能只是风声吧。我有时会去浴池里泡泡，人们说法吉娜的恩赐能洗去一切污秽，但...但为什么我洗不掉那些记忆呢？

No, don't pay them any mind. It's probably just the wind. Sometimes I go to the public baths. People say that Phagousa's blessing can cleanse all impurities, but... But why can it never wash away those memories?
昨晚，我梦见我回到了家乡。一切都那么平静，那么美好。然后突然间，黑潮从地底涌出，吞噬了一切。我想跑，但我的腿像灌了铅一样。

Last night, I dreamt that I returned to my hometown. Everything was so quiet and beautiful. Then, suddenly, the black tide poured out from the earth and devoured everything. I wanted to run, but my legs felt heavy.
有时候我真希望能像那些山之民一样。他们似乎从不被噩梦困扰，也许吉奥里亚给了他们特殊的祝福吧。
Sometimes I wish I could be like the Mountain Dwellers. They never seem to be disturbed by nightmares. Perhaps Georios has given them some kind of special blessing?
需要倾诉的话，可以找我。
If you ever need to talk, you can come to me.
谢谢你。在这个地方，能有人愿意倾听已经是莫大的安慰了。
Thank you. Knowing that there is someone here who is willing to listen to me is already a great comfort.
最近我会去学别人向塞纳托斯祈祷。我恳求他带走我，让我见到我的战友们。但每次，回答我的只有我自己的呼吸声。

Recently I've been praying to Thanatos like the others do around here. I beg Thanatos to take me and allow me to see my comrades again. However, the only response I ever get is the sound of my own breathing.
有时候，我会想象我的战友们现在在哪里。也许他们在欧洛尼斯的怀抱中沉眠？也许他们变成了星星，永远守护着翁法罗斯？
Sometimes I imagine where my comrades are now. Perhaps they are sleeping under the protection of Oronyx? Perhaps they have become stars to watch over Amphoreus for the rest of time?
I don't have any more questions.
I've got to go. Talk to you later.
无论如何，谢谢你来看我。在这个世界上，能有人记得我们曾经战斗过，这就足够了……
Either way, thank you for coming to see me. Just knowing that there is someone in this world that remembers our past battles is enough for me...
奥赫玛的繁荣离不开每一位居民的建设！啊，新面孔！
It is thanks to the hard work of its citizens that Okhema has come to be so prosperous! Ah, a new face!
「人气」？你是说这些听众朋友吗？哈哈，我只不过是个普通的演说家，都是大家赏脸捧场。
"Popular"? You mean my listeners? Haha, I am just a mere orator. It is the people that honor me with their praise.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}刚来奥赫玛啊？欢迎来到我们伟大的城邦！有什么不懂的你可以问我，或者问那些卫兵，知无不言！
Are you new to Okhema, {F#girl}{M#boy}? Welcome to our great city! If you need any help, you can always ask me or the guards. We shall help in any way we can!
不过...你来得正好。我待会儿有个演讲，能帮个忙吗？
Although... Your timing is perfect. I have a speech shortly. Would you help me out?
可以，不过你得先说是什么？
Of course, but you have to tell me what you need first.
太好了！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你真是个热心人，长得俊不说，这心肠也是艾格勒照耀过的，愿艾格勒祝福你！
Wonderful! {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you are truly kind. Not only are you strikingly attractive, but the light of Aquila also shines on your heart. May Aquila bless you!
Best not. I don't really know you.
你看到那杯饮料了吗？能麻烦你帮我递过来吗？演讲太久了我有点口渴。
Do you see that drink over there? Can I ask you to pass it to me? I have been speaking for too long, and I am thirsty.
你注意到水晶杯上有流光闪过，不知是水晶表面的光芒折射，亦或者饮料本身的奇异之处。

You see a flash of light bounce off of the surface of the crystal chalice. You cannot tell if it was light refracting off of the surface of the crystal, or whether there is something unusual about the drink itself.
杯身隐约刻着「法吉娜的祝福」的模糊字样。注意到你的异样，西塞罗清了清嗓子，压低了声音。
There is a faint engraving on the cup that reads: "Blessing of Phagousa." Noticing your suspicion, Cicero clears his throat and lowers his voice.
哦，别在意。这是...法吉娜的祝福！每次演讲前，我都需要这个仪式。你懂的，讨个好彩头。
Oh, don't worry about that. It is... a blessing of Phagousa! I have to do this little ritual before every speech I do. You understand, for good luck.
这会是法吉娜亲赐之圣物吗？你决定——
Could this be a divine object gifted by Phagousa themself? You decide to...
你趁西塞罗不注意，悄悄尝了一口杯中的液体。出乎意料的是，这只是一杯白水，并没有任何特殊之处。

As Cicero looks away, you take your moment to sneak a taste of the liquid in the cup. To your surprise, you realize that it is just a normal glass of plain water. There is nothing special about it at all.
喂——{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你怎么回事？你这样搞，我待会儿的演讲要取消了…没有「祝福」，我、我…这可怎么办呐……
Hey... {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, what have you done? I'm going to have to cancel my speech now... Without my "blessing," I, I... What am I going to do...
It just seems like normal water?
I... can just pour you another cup?
不…你不明白…我不是法吉娜的虔诚信徒，在我心里只有艾格勒泰坦的全知全能才能俘获我的灵魂。
No... You don't understand... I am not a devout disciple of Phagousa. In my heart, only the omniscience and omnipotence of the Titan Aquila can capture my soul.
这杯水是由法吉娜虔诚的信徒——我最好的朋友为我准备的，她在每个晨露初现的时刻向法吉娜祈祷，经过复杂的仪式，才能得到宝贵的「祝福」，庇护我的口舌永不打结。

That glass of water was prepared for me by my friend, a devout disciple of Phagousa. Every morning when the dew hits, she completes a complicated ritual and prays to Phagousa to receive this precious "blessing." The blessing protects me from ever becoming tongue-tied on stage.
只有喝下它，我才有勇气四处开巡回演讲。哎…虽然它喝起来无色无味，但这它的神奇毋庸置疑。
Drinking it is the only thing that grants me the courage to go on tour with my speeches. Ah... Though it may seem unremarkable when you taste it, its magic is undeniable.
啊，谢谢你！现在我感觉好多了。法吉娜在上，庇护我的口舌永不打结！
Ah, thank you! I feel much better now. Great Phagousa above, protect me from ever growing tongue-tied!
Are you a disciple of Phagousa?
不…你不明白…我不是法吉娜的虔诚信徒，在我心里只有艾格勒泰坦的全知全能才能俘获我的灵魂。
No... You don't understand... I am not a devout disciple of Phagousa. In my heart, only the omniscience and omnipotence of the Titan Aquila can capture my soul.
这杯水是由法吉娜虔诚的信徒——我最好的朋友为我准备的，她在每个晨露初现的时刻向法吉娜祈祷，经过复杂的仪式，才能得到宝贵的「祝福」，庇护我的口舌永不打结。

That glass of water was prepared for me by my friend, a devout disciple of Phagousa. Every morning when the dew hits, she completes a complicated ritual and prays to Phagousa to receive this precious "blessing." The blessing protects me from ever becoming tongue-tied on stage.
只有喝下它，我才有勇气四处开巡回演讲。哎…虽然它喝起来无色无味，但这它的神奇毋庸置疑。
Drinking it is the only thing that grants me the courage to go on tour with my speeches. Ah... Though it may seem unremarkable when you taste it, its magic is undeniable.
嘘——请别告诉别人。就当是我和你之间的秘密好了，我不想惹上太多麻烦，免得遭人嫉妒。
Shh... Don't tell anyone. Just keep this a secret between us. I don't want to cause trouble or make others jealous.
在我看来，真正的「永恒」存在于我们的文化之中……
The way I see it, true "eternity" exists in our culture...
喔，是你啊，新来的朋友，今天想聊些什么？
Oh, it's you. What would you like to discuss today, my new friend?
能介绍下奥赫玛的情况吗？
Can you tell me a bit about Okhema?
你想知道奥赫玛的什么？让我想想…就从日常生活说起？
What would you like to know about Okhema? Let me think... Perhaps I should start from daily life?
从总体来说，奥赫玛是一个充满机遇的城市。在这里，每个人都有自己的生活之道。
Generally speaking, Okhema is a city that is bursting with opportunity. Here, everyone has their own ways of life.
但在这其中，有一个小秘密——在奥赫玛，真正的影响力往往来自于你认识谁，而不是你是谁。我听说有一位裁缝，她只给「特别顾客」做衣服，从而建立了一个令人惊叹的人际网。

However, there is a small secret that lies within all this... In Okhema, true influence comes from who you know, not who you are. I hear that there is a tailor who only makes clothes for "VIP clients." With this, she created an unbelievable personal network.
当然，我们都崇尚美德和正直。但同时，懂得如何与人相处、如何展现自己的长处，这些「软实力」同样重要。
Of course we all believe in personal virtues and integrity. However, if you know how to interact with others and also how to showcase your strengths, this kind of "soft power" is equally important.
如果你能在复杂的人际关系中有一些独特的技巧，或许你就能改变自己的生活——又或者，你能改变的不仅仅是你个人的生活。而这，正是奥赫玛的魅力所在。

If you have a unique skill for navigating complex social relationships, there is a chance that you could transform your entire life... Perhaps you will transform even more than just your own life, too. This is where the true charm of Okhema lies.
当然，任何地方都有其不足。我们仍在探索中，愿艾格勒的智慧指引我们前进的道路。
Of course, there is no place in this world that is without fault. We are still exploring. May Aquila's wisdom guide us forward.
能介绍下这里的风俗吗？
Can you tell me a little about the local customs?
