Although I can't achieve the invincibility of great Mydei, I will prove that with proper training, we Okhemans can possess courage and strength rivaling that of the Kremnoans!
哟，难得有给悬锋人说好话的。
Wow, it's rare to hear someone speaking well of the Kremnoans.
是啊，我知道悬锋城有不少坏家伙，伤害了很多其他的城邦…但也有很多好人！像万敌哥哥和他的孤军，愿意保护我们……

Yeah, I know there are plenty of bad folks in Castrum Kremnos who've caused harm to many other cities... but there are also a lot of good people! Like Mydei and his detachment, who are willing to protect us...
"Valorous death before glorious return" — how cool is that!
I guess Mydei is your idol?
那不是当然的吗？无敌又帅气，既是悬锋城的王储，也是奥赫玛的救星……
Isn't that obvious? He's invincible and dashing, not only the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos but also the savior of Okhema...
重要的是，他还愿意教我怎么锻炼！用什么来称赞万敌哥哥都不为过！
Most importantly, he's willing to teach me how to train! No amount of praise for Brother Mydei is too much!
只可惜悬锋孤军只让悬锋人加入…不过没关系，万敌哥哥说了，悬锋城有悬锋城的荣耀，奥赫玛也可以有奥赫玛的荣耀…嘿嘿。
It's just a pity that the Kremnoan Detachment only allows the Kremnoans to join... But it's fine. Mydei said that Castrum Kremnos has its own pride, and Okhema can have its own pride too... Hehe.
怎么样，你要不要也来跟我一起训练？看你人高马大的，直接用悬锋人的锻炼方式也没差！
So, how about it? Want to train with me? You're tall and strong — you could jump straight into the Kremnoan training regimen without a problem!
所以，悬锋人都练什么项目？
What kind of training do the Kremnoans do?
什么吃苦他们就练什么！不过，要说最热门的……
Whatever's the most grueling, that's what they train in! But if you want to know the most popular routine...
…应该是高空折返跑！哦，还有无影寻宝、捷足战舞也比较受欢迎。怎么，你有兴趣？
...It should be high-altitude shuttle runs! Oh, and shadowless treasure hunting and swift-footed dancing are also quite popular. What, are you interested in?
Tell me about the high-altitude shuttle runs.
据说在悬锋人的故乡悬锋城，城外深不见底的壕沟上悬着几条碗口粗的巨大铁链子——那些挑战体力与勇气的人，就会在那几条铁链子上玩折返跑。

It's said that in the homeland of the Kremnoans, Castrum Kremnos, there are massive iron chains, each as wide as a bowl, suspended over the bottomless trenches outside the city. Those who challenge their strength and courage will perform shuttle runs on those chains.
虽然咱们奥赫玛没有他们说的那种铁链，但确实有不少道路都架设在云端。
Although we Okhemans don't have iron chains like that, a lot of our roads are built high in the clouds.
悬锋孤军…也就是那些住在奥赫玛的悬锋人，就会专门挑这些路线来跑步锻炼。
The Kremnoan Detachment, also known as those Kremnoans living in Okhema, specifically choose these routes for their running training.
Tell me about shadowless treasure hunting.
咳咳，严格来说，这个在奥赫玛是犯法的！不过因为不会造成任何严重后果，所以就算被发现了应该也只会被口头警告吧……
Ahem, strictly speaking, this is illegal in Okhema! But since it doesn't cause any serious harm, even if you're caught, you'll probably just get a verbal warning...
据说过去扎格列斯偷走了尼卡多利的武器，让一场战争大败而归，为了牢记这份耻辱，悬锋人会相约进行训练，一人把对方的物品偷走，然后对方要把被藏匿的物品找回来。

It's said that long ago, Zagreus stole Nikador's weapon, leading to a crushing defeat in a war. To remember this humiliation, the Kremnoans started a training routine: One person steals something from the other, and the other has to find the hidden item and get it back.
偷东西的人练习的是潜行与保密的能力，找回东西的人则是练习侦察和寻物的本事。万敌哥哥说无影寻宝风靡之后，悬锋城就再也没有小偷了…至少没有活着的。

Those who steal practice their stealth and secrecy, while those retrieving the items hone their scouting and tracking skills. Mydei said that ever since shadowless treasure hunting became popular, there haven't been any thieves in Castrum Kremnos... or at least, none alive.
哦，这个最接近奥赫玛本身就有的活动！捷足战舞其实就是光脚跳舞…不过动作比较大开大阖，而且是穿戴好盔甲、全副武装地跳。

Oh, this is the activity most similar to what Okhema itself has! Swift-footed dancing is actually just barefoot dancing... but with much larger and more sweeping movements, and it's done while fully armored, armed to the teeth.
更高难度的捷足战舞会在点燃的炭火上进行——参与者需要事先淋湿自己的双脚，趁着水没有干，快速地在炭火上跳完所有的动作，然后一鼓作气平安撤离！

The more advanced version of swift-footed dancing is performed over ignited charcoal — participants must first wet their feet and, while the water is still wet, quickly complete all the movements on the hot coals, then make a swift escape carried by inertia before the water evaporates!
嘿嘿，不是我自夸，别看悬锋人会吃苦，真论锻炼效果，应该还是我自己发明的这个「飞瀑潜立」最有潜力！万敌哥哥都夸过咱呢！
Hehe, not to brag, but even though the Kremnoans endure a lot of hardship, I'd say the training method I invented, Flying Waterfall Stance, has the most potential! Even Brother Mydei has praised it!
I have things to do, so I'll leave you to it.
看来{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}你也是个大忙人啊！没办法啦，那我还是自己一个人练吧。
It seems like you're a busy person too, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I guess I'll just practice on my own then.
哎呀…他这个肱二头肌…感觉能把我夹死……
Oh my... their biceps... feels like they could crush me to death...
啧啧啧…啧啧啧…他这个臀部已经是翘到可以顶一瓶石榴水……
Tsk, tsk, tsk... and their glutes... round enough to balance a bottle of pomegranate juice...
眼前的男人鬼鬼祟祟躲在屏风后，念念有词地望着远处的浴池，却迟迟不肯下水。
The man before you is sneakily hiding behind the screen, mumbling something while staring at the distant bath, yet he hesitates to get in.
What are you sneaking around for!?
哪儿冒出来的，吓我一跳。公共场所，你这话可不兴乱说的。
Where did you come from? You scared me! Hey, you can't just shout things like that in a public place!
我我我只是因为…浴池的温度还没到位。对，我天生体寒，需要等那水热热再下去。
I—I—I was just... waiting for the bath to reach the right temperature. Yes, that's it! I was born with a naturally cold constitution and need the water to be warmer before I can get in.
慌乱的神色、结巴的话语、拙劣的借口，出卖了他的心虚。为了翁法罗斯民众的安危，正义的球棒侠决定问个水落石出。
The panicked expression, stammering words, and clumsy excuses betray his guilt. For the safety of the people of Amphoreus, the Galactic Baseballer of justice decides to get to the bottom of it.
I'll take you to the high-temperature bath.
但这个高温浴池，它太脏了…我皮肤娇嫩，可受不住这种。
But the high-temperature bath... it's too dirty. My delicate skin can't handle that kind of thing.
I'll lend you a private bath.
为何如此坚持，你这样，我怎么好意思开口拒绝…其实…我有脚气！
Why are you being so insistent? With you like this, how can I say no...? Actually... I have athlete's foot!
对，脚气，嘿嘿，你们不会希望闻到我脱鞋的。
Yes, athlete's foot, hehe! You wouldn't want to smell it when I take my shoes off!
I have an upside-down bath machine.
I'll allow you to wear your shoes in the bath!
Enough already!!! Are you done or what?
你和他们都是一路货色，开口闭口就是入浴、泡澡，恨不得吃喝拉撒睡都在水里！
You and them are cut from the same cloth, constantly talking about bathing and soaking, as if you want to eat, drink, relieve yourselves, and sleep all in the water!
嘴上嚷嚷着翁法罗斯人传承浴场文化义不容辞，我看你们呀，只是想趁机秀出你们的健身成果，享受旁人的垂涎。

You keep going on about how the people of Amphoreus are duty-bound to uphold the heritage of bath culture, but I see through you all — you just want to show off your fitness gains and enjoy the envy of others.
不过不是我说，你这肌肉也练得太差了吧。就你这小身板，就不怕下水后被人耻笑吗？
Still, not to be rude, but... your muscles are pretty unimpressive. With a physique like that, aren't you worried about being laughed at when you get in the water?
啊？这是我该考虑的事吗？
Huh? Is that something I need to worry about?
唔！你的这份迟钝…这份厚脸皮…真令人羡慕。
Hmph! Your obliviousness... your shamelessness... how enviable.
I don't let mainstream beauty standards define me.
唔！你的这份洒脱…这份自信…真令人羡慕。
Hmph! Your carefree attitude... your confidence... how enviable.
I've got an inflatable muscle suit.
狡诈！我可不用这种小人手段。
Cunning! I'd never stoop to such petty tricks.
每次踏入浴场，我就如同在锻炼时那样，能感到露出我这细胳膊细腿时的恐慌。
Every time I step into the bath, it feels like stepping into the gym again — I can sense the anxiety of exposing my skinny arms and legs.
而那些强健的青年们闲庭信步，对周遭的歆羡装作不在乎，却又刻意摆出媲美雕塑的优美姿势。人坐在水里，胳膊展得老开，生怕别人看不清他胸肌的轮廓。

Meanwhile, the muscular young men stroll around casually, feigning indifference to the admiration of others, yet deliberately striking poses as elegant as sculptures. They sit in the water with their arms spread wide, as if afraid no one will notice the contours of their chiseled chests.
而我，无论如何努力抡动手上的重物，收获的却是贫瘠的肌肉与嗤嗤的笑声。
But no matter how hard I swing those heavy weights, all I gain are scrawny muscles and mocking laughter.
想问什么就说吧，别在我伤口上撒盐就好……
Feel free to ask whatever you want. Just don't rub salt into my wounds...
I'll be going now. Don't be too upset, okay?
我得再等会儿，看他们什么时候走。哎，都好一阵子没洗澡了。
I'll wait a bit longer to see when they leave. Ugh, it's been a while since I've taken a bath.
差不多就得了，别练了，别练了。练得这么好，就是为了让我感到羞辱么？
That's enough. Stop training already. You've gotten so good. Is it just to make me feel humiliated?
想问什么就说吧，别在我伤口上撒盐就好……
Feel free to ask whatever you want. Just don't rub salt into my wounds...
Why has fitness become so popular?
这可不是一时的风尚，也不是奥赫玛的专属，而是翁法罗斯所有城邦的通病，只是不同地方的狂热程度有高有低。
This is not just a passing trend, nor is it exclusive to Okhema. It is a common affliction in all the city-states of Amphoreus, though the level of fanaticism varies from place to place.
在以前，翁法罗斯还很和平的时代，悬锋城会定期举办祭典，健身也是人气很高的竞技大类呢，听说优胜者会受到贵族女子的青睐呢。

In the peaceful days of old, Amphoreus used to hold regular festivals in Castrum Kremnos, where fitness competitions were also a popular event. I heard that the winners would even gain the favor of aristocratic ladies.
你问大家迷恋健身的原因？这么深奥的事情我哪答得上来，我又不是什么历史学家。
You're asking why everyone is so obsessed with fitness? That's too profound for me to answer — I'm not a historian.
搞不好啊，都是泰坦起的头。看到天边的刻法勒了吗，那强健的体魄，惊人的力量，我估计它也没少练。
It might all have started with the Titans. Do you see Kephale on the horizon? That strong physique, that incredible strength — I bet they've put in a lot of training as well.
我才不要，健身鼓捣出来的死肌肉才没用呢。
I don't want to. Those muscles from fitness training are useless.
等这些哥们上战场就知道了，肌肉需要消耗更多的能量，没有脂肪储备的身材不抗寒、不耐打、不扛饿，一打一个不吱声。

Once these guys get to the battlefield, they'll understand. Muscles consume more energy, and without fat reserves, the body can't withstand the cold, can't take hits, and can't go without food. One hit and they'll go down without a sound.
我、我哪有羡慕他们！我正在准备树庭的考试，我要成为学者，才不要做这种肌肉发达，头脑空空的人！
I—I'm not jealous of them! I'm preparing for the Grove exams. I want to become a scholar, not someone with big muscles and an empty head!
I'll be going now. Don't be too upset, okay?
我得再等会儿，看他们什么时候走。哎，都好一阵子没洗澡了。
I'll wait a bit longer to see when they leave. Ugh, it's been a while since I've taken a bath.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我看你身强体健，有没有兴趣来给我的发明当测试员啊？
{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you look strong and healthy. Would you be interested in testing my invention?
面前的人向你搭话，他一侧的胳膊被一只栩栩如生的义手代替，看上去十分独特。
The person in front of you strikes up a conversation. One of their arms has been replaced with an extremely lifelike prosthetic — it looks very unique.
You also made a simulated universe?
…你说的这「宇宙」是个什么？我不太明白…但恐怕和你想的不太一样，我来给你讲讲。
...What do you mean by "universe"? I don't quite understand... but it's probably not what you think. Let me explain.
哈哈，我不知道你想到了什么，但不用担心，只是个运动用的辅助装具罢了。
Haha, I don't know what you're thinking, but don't worry. It's just a support device for exercise.
那要取决于报酬给多少了。
Well, that depends on how much the reward is.
哈哈，真是个务实的年轻人，但实不相瞒，这方面可能会多少让你失望。先听听情况如何？
Haha, you're quite the pragmatic youngster. But to be honest, this might not meet your expectations. How about we first see what the situation is?
我发明了一双「腿」，穿上它们，哪怕是腿脚不便的人，也能够像扎格列斯的黄金裔一样健步如飞，甚至能一跃千里。不用我多说，你应该能理解它的价值。

I invented a pair of "legs." Once worn, even those with limited mobility can move swiftly like the Chrysos Heirs of Zagreus. They can even leap great distances. You don't need me to elaborate. I'm sure you can understand their value.
剩下的就是进一步测试，得找位有活力的年轻人帮我测测，孩子，你乐见帮我这个忙吗？
Now, the rest is just further testing, and I need a young, energetic person to help me out. Kid, would you like to lend me a hand with this?
好，好，真是个亲切的孩子。放心，不会占用你太多时间。
Ah, good. You're such a friendly kid. Don't worry, it won't take up too much of your time.
你们找到了一处空地，按照博莱斯的指示，你需要随便运动运动，那么——
You find an open area, and following Bolaris' instructions, you begin to move around... so —
你绕着浴场开始跑圈，1！2！1！到家！…怎么卫士们也跟着你跑过来了？
You start running laps around the baths — 1! 2! 1! Home! ...Wait, why are the guards following you now?
速度不错，孩子，但你身后跟的这群人是怎么回事？
Nice speed, kid, but what's with the crowd trailing behind you?
啊？博莱斯先生？您是在测试发明吗？刚看见这位勇士跑的飞快，我们还以为是在抓贼呢！
Huh? Mr. Bolaris? Are you testing your invention? We just saw this warrior running so fast, and we thought they were chasing a thief!
你跳了足足十米高！只是落地时刚好有个客人路过，你差点砸到他。
You jump a full ten meters high! But as you land, a guest happens to walk by, and you nearly crash into them.
我的刻法勒啊！你是从哪蹦出来的？天神，天神降临了！
By Kephale! Where did you jump out from? A god! A god has descended!
好啊，看来这装置成功发挥出了它的效用……
Well, looks like this device is working just as intended...
With the force of trailblazing, jump forward!
你奋力跃向远方，差不多跳了…<unbreak>50</unbreak>米左右吧。
You leap toward the distance with all your might, jumping about... <unbreak>50</unbreak> meters or so.
艾格勒在上，我刚刚说的「一跃千里」只是个广告宣传啊！
By Aquila, I was only using the term "great distances" for advertising purposes!
孩子，转身的时候千万轻一些！别把墙撞出个洞来！
Kid, be careful when you turn around! Don't crash into the wall and make a hole!
在你的帮助下，这位发明家进行了各种测试，一段时间后——
With your help, the inventor carried out all sorts of tests and, after some time...
孩子，我这装置的升级先不提，这数据告诉我，你可能是一位黄金裔……
Kid, let's put aside the upgrade of this device for now, but the data tells me that you might be a Chrysos Heir...
虽然不能断言，但至少体能的水平十分相近。如此独特的样本一百个光历年也难遇一例…孩子，这是个好事，但也要注重休息，别太勉强自己的身体喽……

Although I can't say for certain, at least your level of physical ability is very similar to them. Such a unique specimen is rare, only one in a hundred Light Calendar years... Kid, this is a good thing, but you should also pay attention to rest and not push your body too hard...
无论是民众还是黄金裔，都难以做到完美无瑕，缺憾一词与我们如影随形。
Whether it's the common people or the Chrysos Heirs, perfection is hard to achieve. The word "flaw" follows us like a shadow.
人们应当告诉彼此，这些缺憾绝非过失所致。而我要做的，就是用我的才智倾力相助。
People should tell each other that these flaws are not the result of mistakes. What I must do is use my intelligence to offer my utmost assistance.
博莱斯检视着自己栩栩如生的义肢，留意到了你的到来后，望向了你这边。
While inspecting his lifelike prosthetic, Bolaris notices your arrival and looks over at you.
原谅我这话多的毛病，孩子。是来找大叔我的吗？
Forgive me for getting so carried away talking, child. Are you here to see me?
Are you up for a chat?
好哇…能跟你这样有活力的年轻人多打打交道，可是大叔我的荣幸。
Of course... Being able to talk with an energetic youngster like yourself is a true honor for an old man like myself.
呵，几十年前，这条胳膊被尼卡多利的眷属抢跑了去，留在了拉冬城里。还多亏一位拉冬勇士恰好在附近，不然现在站这跟你说话的就是别人了。
Heh, decades ago, this arm was snatched away by Nikador's kin and left in Ladon City. It was only thanks to a warrior from Ladon being nearby that I can stand here and talk today.
那位勇士不厌其烦地跟我讲艾格勒的故事，说永夜也是因为它的眼睛睁不开，让我看开些。后来才知道，那位勇士也在战争中掉了条腿，接了个粗糙的假肢。

That warrior tirelessly told me the story of Aquila, saying that the evernight was due to their eyes that couldn't be kept open, advising me to take it easy. Later, I learned that the warrior had also lost a leg in the war and replaced it with a crude prosthetic.
那时起我就开始研究各种小物件，给自己做，给邻人做，没多久就造了这手，也给他打了个新假腿，还有空就往天上瞧，等着什么时候问问艾格勒——

Since then, I began researching various little gadgets, making them for myself and for my neighbors. Before long, I created this hand and even crafted a new prosthetic leg for him. Whenever I had the chance, I'd gaze at the sky, waiting for the moment to ask Aquila —
再后来…唉，他在拉冬城毁时丢了命，给他打的腿到头来也没怎么能派上用场，但我这造东西的习惯，倒是养下来了。
Later on... *sigh* he lost his life when Ladon city was destroyed. The prosthetic leg he received didn't end up being of much use, but the habit of creating things, well, that stayed with me.
主要是以小玩意居多…你很好奇，是不是？好，好，我来讲讲。
Mostly small trinkets... You're curious, aren't you? Well, well, let me tell you about them.
拿着浴场来说吧，「能稳稳浮在水上不会晃的桌子」、「靠颜色变化来辨别水温的墙砖」、「几秒就能把水吸干的浴巾」…

Take the bath, for example: "A table that can float steadily on the water without wobbling," "Wall tiles that change color to indicate water temperature," "A towel that can dry off in just a few seconds"...
怎么样，我没说错吧？都是些不值一提的小东西罢了。
How about those? I wasn't wrong, was I? Just some insignificant little things.
Not bad! Do you have any others?
呵，能被你这样有活力的年轻人欣赏，大叔我有点开心。
Hah, being admired by an energetic youngster like yourself... I must admit this has made me smile.
其他的…「壁画颜料改良」、「大地兽的辅助鞍具」、「石板架」、「云石天宫的吉祥物娃娃」……
Other creations... "Improved mural paints," "Support saddles for dromases," "Slate racks," "Mascot dolls for the Marmoreal Palace..."
我有点记不太全了。毕竟和失败的尝试比起来，成功的只有一小部分而已…
I can't quite remember all of it. After all, compared to the failed attempts, there were only a few successes...
大的…大的啊…说起来还真有那么一个，但，唉…我都有点不太愿意提。
A big one... a really big one... Now that you mention it, there is one, but... *sigh*... I'm almost reluctant to bring it up.
在遗迹里偶尔能看到的那只大手，「蛊惑之手」，把那东西拿来用这事，是我出的主意，后来联合着工匠们一起，捣鼓了几个月，就给做成了。
The giant hand occasionally seen in the ruins, the "Bewitching Hands." It was my idea to use that thing. Later, together with the craftsmen, we tinkered with it for a few months and finally made it.
但再怎么说那也是扎格列斯的物件，听说总有人拿它做些偷鸡摸狗上房掀瓦的事。久了，那东西惹出来的麻烦越来越多，老头子我又无能为力，愁啊。

But no matter how you put it, that was an artifact of Zagreus. I heard that some people have been using it for all sorts of sneaky, underhanded deeds — climbing walls, stealing chickens, you name it. Over time, the trouble it caused kept piling up, and here I am, an old man, powerless to do anything about it. It's really troubling.
后来啊，这手被个商人圈了去当商品，还跟我提了一大堆稀奇古怪的要求，我就整个不想管了…帮我个忙，孩子，以后要有人问起来，你可别跟他们讲说是我造的。

Later on, that hand was taken by a merchant to be sold as a commodity. He made all sorts of strange and ridiculous requests, and I just couldn't be bothered anymore... Do me a favor, kid. If anyone asks about it in the future, don't tell them I made it.
What have you been creating recently?
除了那件辅助装具之外，我还在研究人的眼睛，想着什么时候摸透了，能做个真正能看见东西的假眼睛，但总也不顺利……

In addition to that support device, I've also been studying the human eye, hoping that one day I'll figure it out and create a real prosthetic eye that can actually see, but it's always been unsuccessful...
这项发明的出资人劝我不要急，他说，很多事都在所难免，况且他都已经习惯了，再者——
The sponsor of this invention advised me not to rush. He said that many things are inevitable, and besides, he's already gotten used to it. Furthermore —
「即使{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}无法出让它的天空，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}也赐予了我们大地兽作为补偿。」——道理是这个道理。
"Even if {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} cannot give us ownership of their sky, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} has given us dromases as compensation." That is the logic.
话虽如此，能早日解决始终还是更好。哎，这东西可就不能麻烦孩子你了，哈哈。希望在我变成老骨头前能拿出点成果吧。

That being said, problems like this are always better solved sooner than later. Ah, I cannot trouble a child like yourself with such things, haha. I just hope that I can make some progress before I am too old.
I'll leave you to it. See you soon.
好，好，真有礼貌。下次见，愿艾格勒注视着你，孩子。
Good, good, such courtesy. Until next time, may Aquila watch over you, child.
I'll leave you to it. See you soon.
好，好，真有礼貌。下次见，愿艾格勒注视着你，孩子。
Good, good, such courtesy. Until next time, may Aquila watch over you, child.
我看你就是想破坏我们家的声誉！亏我一直以来还当你是好兄弟，真是知人知面不知心！
I think you're just trying to ruin our family's reputation! I always thought of you as a good brother, but turns out I was wrong! You can't judge a person just by their face!
…都说了我兄长不可能做那样的事，况且真论起来，还是你们的嫌疑更大一些吧？
...I've already told you. My brother could never do such a thing. Besides, if we're being honest, your suspicion is far greater than ours, isn't it?
什——你怎么敢如此污蔑我，是不是想打架！
What—? How dare you slander me like that? Are you looking for a fight!?
明明是你挑衅在先，现在还好意思乱发脾气……
You were the one who provoked me first, and now you have the nerve to lose your temper...
眼见两人间火药味越来越浓，你聚精会神地围观着，生怕一不小心错过战斗开始的精彩瞬间。
As the tension between the two keeps building, you watch closely, not wanting to miss the exciting moment when the fight kicks off.
哈哈…这位朋友，你看得还挺津津有味的嘛~那想不想知道他们究竟在吵什么呀？
Haha... Friend, you seem quite intrigued. Would you like to know what exactly they're arguing about?
只需要区区<unbreak>50</unbreak>利衡币，前因后果包给你讲清楚。
It only takes <unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coins. I'll explain everything, including the background, clearly to you.
哈哈，爽快！就知道朋友你是个能处的~
Haha, straightforward! I knew you were someone easy to get along with!
Forget it. I'm not that curious.
唉，行吧行吧，权当是交个朋友，这条消息免费送你了……
*Sigh* Alright, alright, consider it a gesture of friendship. I'll give you this information for free...
喏，那个看上去一点就炸的小伙儿，家里是开杂货店的，主要营生就是给出城的探险队提供物资；
Here, that young man who looks like he might explode at any moment — his family runs a general store. Their main business is supplying expedition teams with provisions when they head out of the city.
至于那个看起来三天没睡的阴沉家伙，隶属于本地一个还算有些名气的探险队，他本人是队长的弟弟。
As for that gloomy guy who looks like he hasn't slept in three days, he belongs to a fairly well-known local expedition team. He's actually the younger brother of the team's leader.
前些日子他们小队出城探索新区域，好巧不巧遇着了黑潮，死伤那叫一个惨重。后来好不容易逃出生天，想要收拾收拾回城的时候，却发现物资出了问题。

A while ago, their squad went out to explore a new area. By sheer bad luck, they ran into the black tide, and the casualties were severe. After barely managing to escape with their lives, they tried to gather themselves and head back to the city, only to find that there was an issue with their supplies.
备用食物都是临期快要腐烂的就不说了，就连医疗包都是边角料凑出来的次品——显然就是出了内鬼嘛。
The backup food was all near expiry and about to spoil, and the medical kits were put together from leftover scraps — clearly, there was an inside job.
这两个家伙为了调查，就跑来浴场打探消息，结果得知了「那个探险队的队长前些时候与老店主达成了某项秘密交易」——这不，就吵起来了嘛~

These two guys, in order to investigate, came to the bath to gather information. They found out that "the captain of that expedition made some secret deal with the old shopkeeper some time ago" — and that's when the argument started~
…我最后说一遍，不要再无理取闹了，动动你那木头一样的小脑袋瓜，仔细回忆一下你到底是来做什么的。
...I'll say it one last time. Stop causing trouble. Use your wooden little brain and think carefully about what you actually came here to do.
我无理取闹？明明是你心虚了吧，这么就想岔开话题？想得美！
Am I being unreasonable? Clearly, it's you who's guilty and trying to change the subject! Nice try!
你瞧，这两个人从小一起长大，多少年的感情了，结果遇到这种事还不是奇美拉咬奇美拉——一嘴毛，哈哈~

Look at that. These two have grown up together, years of friendship, and yet when something like this happens, it's just like a chimera biting another chimera — just as messy as a mouthful of fur, haha~
Ah, that message wasn't from you, was it...
诶呀，我就喜欢你这样的聪明人！你也觉得他们有点吵了对不对，那不如我们来聊点别的吧。
Ah, I just love smart people like you! You think they're a bit noisy too, don't you?
你真的不是假面愚者吗？
Are you really not a Masked Fool?
假面…愚者？那是什么，听起来很有趣啊，你可以待会仔细给我讲讲吗？
The Masked... Fool? What's that? Sounds intriguing — could you tell me about it in detail later?
我说两位——差不多适可为止了吧？其他人可都在往这边看呢，你们确定还要继续娱乐大众吗？
I say, you two — don't you think that's enough? Everyone's staring at you now. Are you sure you want to keep this show going on?
Huh? Weren't you the one who told us —
你在质疑我提供的消息？
Are you questioning the information I provided?
…他不是这个意思，但你说的「达成了某项秘密交易」实在过于暧昧不清……
...That's not what he means. It's just that your "making a secret deal" comment is a bit too vague...
对呀——所以剩下的你们得自己去调查啊。难不成还要我把前因后果掰开揉碎了给你们讲清楚？那可是另外的价钱了哦。
Exactly! Which is why you'll have to figure out the rest yourselves. Or do you expect me to break it all down and explain every detail? That would cost you extra, you know.
唉，算了算了，看在你们这么努力供大家消遣的份上，再追加一份赠品好了——去仔细瞧瞧探险队这几个月的医疗支出吧，运气好的话说不定能捉到只大岩鼠呢。

*Sigh* Fine, fine. Since you've worked so hard entertaining everyone here, I'll throw in a freebie — take a good look at the medical expenses for the expedition team over the past few months. If you're lucky, you might catch a big rock rat.
什么？利比斯叔叔不可能……
我知道了，谢谢你。走吧伊菲斯，有什么事我们回去再说。
I see. Thank you. Let's go, Ifris. We'll talk later if you need.
多谢惠顾，欢迎下次光临~
Thank you for your visit, and we look forward to seeing you again next time~
好啦，吵闹的家伙已经不在了，现在我们可以好好聊聊了吧，来自「异乡」的朋友~
Alright, the noisy ones are gone now. We can have a good chat, can't we, my outlander friend~
「塔拉萨波利斯」，对吧？是个我从来没听说过的名字呢，原来翁法罗斯还有这样一个城邦吗？
Thalassopolis, right? I haven't heard of that name before. So, there's a city like that in Amphoreus?
我见过很多外乡人，也知道不少事情，但瞧瞧你——前所未见的服装样式、与众不同的言谈举止、还有……
I've seen a great many outsiders and know plenty of things, but judging from your novel appearance and unusual behavior, and...
哈哈，来和我讲讲你的家乡吧，朋友，我真的真的很感兴趣~
Haha, come and talk to me about your home, friend. I'm very interested.
嗨——朋友，我们还真是有缘啊！想要聊聊天吗？我随时奉陪哦，免费的~
Hey — friend, what a delightful coincidence it is to meet you! You wanna chat? I'll be here anytime! And for free too!
哈，想来些乐子？那你可找对人喽——放心，我手里的消息向来明码标价，绝对不坑朋友~
Hah. Wanna have some fun? Then you found the right person. Don't worry — I run an honest business. My intel is always clearly priced, and I'd never scam a friend~
诶呀，你终于愿意和我聊这个了？我可是等得法吉娜都要清醒了。
Oh, you're finally willing to talk with me about this? I've been waiting for so long that Phagousa is about to wake up.
那么，快给我讲讲吧——你的「家乡」是个怎样的地方？你又是如何一路来此、路上可有遇到什么稀奇事？
Okay, so talk to me. What is your home like? And what did you encounter on your road here?
你将自己当初在黑塔空间站醒来、而后加入列车的经历「稍稍加工」了一下，讲给了眼巴巴望着你的男人。
You "modified" your experiences about waking up first in the Herta Space Station and then joining the Express to the gawking man.
难以想象…那个名为「黑塔」的瑟希斯眷属竟有如此伟力，能筑起如此宏大精巧的高塔，用以陈列奇珍…这番壮举怕是早已能够堪比塞勒苏斯了。

It's hard to imagine that... This Herta, kin to Cerces, possess such power, is capable of building such a large and intricate tower. And to use that as a display of her rare treasures too... I fear this feat is more than comparable to Thalesus' efforts.
你们那个叫「无名客」的探险队也是…以巨大的驼兽为家周游世界吗？真是浪漫啊~
Your "Nameless" exploration team... Do they also explore the world on the back of a giant beast? How romantic.
你果然是个有趣的人，朋友——难怪从见到你的第一眼起，我就觉得咱俩特别有缘呢。
I knew you were interesting, friend. From the moment I first laid eyes on you, I knew we had a special bond.
你将自己和同伴们这一路的开拓之旅，「略加修饰」了一下，讲给了眼前兴致盎然的男人。
You "slightly polished" your trailblazing expedition experiences with your companions and told them to the exuberant man.
真稀奇，你走过的那些「城邦」，我可是一个都没听说过呢。
How strange. I have never heard of any of these cities you've been to.
哈哈~别紧张，朋友。我没别的意思，只是些感慨罢了。
Haha, don't be nervous, friend. I don't mean anything. Just feeling a bit emotional.
你瞧——我虽有点小手腕，知道得比这里大部分人稍微多了那么一点点，但听完你的故事，却觉得自己现在的日子属实太过无趣啦！
Look... Though I have a little bit of skill, a little bit more capability than most people here, hearing your story makes me think that my life here is too dull!
真想像你一样到处旅行啊~想看看欧洛尼斯的更高处有什么、想瞧瞧塞纳托斯的冥河尽头在哪里……
I really want to adventure about like you. Want to see what waits beyond the heights of Oronyx, and where the end of the Thanatos' River of Souls lies...
你们那个「探险队」还缺不缺人手？不如回程的时候也把我也捎上吧，我很想见见你们那个像兔子一样的雅努斯眷属呢~
Is your exploration team still short-handed? How about you bring me with you on the way back? I really want to see that rabbit-like kin of Janus that you mentioned.
You remind me of someone familiar.
怀着微妙的心情，你给这人简单讲了讲自己与某位「寒腿叔叔」的孽缘。当然，是翁法罗斯本地化版本。
With certain strange emotions, you briefly explained your relationship with a certain Mr. Cold Feet. Of course, you gave them the localized Amphoreus version.
哈哈，那说不定我们真就是失散多年异父异母的亲兄弟呢~
Haha, then maybe we are long-lost brothers that share a single parent.
不过你们那儿的「扎格列斯信徒」可真有趣，还有那个叫「匹诺康尼」的城邦里的「酒馆」……
Though, that follower of Zagreus you talk of does sound interesting. And that tavern in the city of... Penacony, was it?
你不是也还没去过吗，朋友，不如下次我们一起想办法混进去瞧瞧？
You haven't been there either, right? How about next time we both find a way to get in and take a look?
这就要走了吗？唉，我还没聊够呢……
Leaving already? But we haven't talked enough yet...
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
我会想你的，朋友！很想很想~所以你还会来找我的，对吗？
I'll miss you, friend — so, so much. You'll come back and see me, right?
要上吗？要不…还是等明天吧……
Should I go in? Or maybe... maybe I'll wait until tomorrow...
不不不，不能有一丝怀疑…深呼吸，伊克西翁，迎接自己的宿命吧！
No, no, there can't be any doubt. Deep breath, Ixion. Embrace your destiny!
（这个人怎么鬼鬼祟祟的，前面就是黄金裔浴池，他想干什么？）
(What is this person up to, sneaking around like that? The Chrysos Heir bath is right ahead — what does he intend to do?)
欸？我还以为是卫兵呢。刻法勒在上，你鬼鬼祟祟跟在我身后，想对我做什么？
Huh? I thought you were a guard. By Kephale, why are you sneaking around behind me? What are you trying to do?
I should be asking you that.
Oh, playing the victim first, are we?
你听好了，其实我就是预言中的十二黄金裔之一。只不过，阿格莱雅大人她们还没有找到我。
Listen closely. In fact, I am one of the Twelve Chrysos Heirs in the prophecy. It's just Lady Aglaea and the others haven't found me yet.
我从小便听城邦里的人提起，每位黄金裔自出生时便有征兆——我们身上都有区别于常人的独特缺陷。体现在我身上的，是语言能力的不足。

Since I was young, I have heard people in the city talk about it. Each of the Chrysos Heirs has a sign from birth — we all lack something that sets us apart from ordinary people. For me, it manifests in a deficiency in language ability.
有次我与邻居发生了争执，他气急败坏下，说我除了容貌俊俏外一无是处，我当即一个箭步上前拥抱了他。
One time, I had an argument with a neighbor. In a fit of anger, he said I was useless except for my good looks. I immediately took a step forward and hugged him.
后来我姐姐纠正我，他是在损我。可我至今仍不明白，为什么夸我帅是一种咒骂？
Later, my older sister corrected me, saying that he was insulting me. But to this day, I still don't understand — how is calling me handsome an insult?
Living happily is good enough for me.
他们管这叫作「听不懂人话」，这不正是我身为黄金裔独有的缺陷吗？我听不懂人话是因为我的母语是神的语言，但这似乎已经超出了我身边的人的理解能力。

They call it "not understanding human language," which is precisely the flaw unique to me as a Chrysos Heir. The reason I can't understand human speech is my native language is that of the gods. However, this seems to be beyond the comprehension of those around me.
所以，我只好拿出一些铁证了，无论如何我都要冲进那黄金裔浴池一次。
So, I had no choice but to gather some solid evidence. No matter what, I must break into that Chrysos Heir bath at least once.
若我能与白厄前辈一样，沐浴在金血中而不被其侵蚀，城邦的大家才会承认我。
If I could, like senior Phainon, bathe in the golden blood without being corroded by it, then the people of the city would finally acknowledge me.
诶，遵从既定事实怎么能算乐观呢？
Huh? How can following established facts be considered optimism?
我会飞，是因为我知道我能飞，而不是我相信我能飞。
I can fly because I know I can fly, not because I believe I can fly.
Why not just trust that I am Kephale?
我的神啊？！真的是您吗？您终于认可我了吗！
My god!? Is it really you? Have you finally acknowledged me!?
明白了！您以凡人之躯行走在城邦中，这件事还不方便向世人明说。
I understand! You walk among the city's people in mortal form, and it's not yet time to reveal this truth to the world.
放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.
明白了！您以凡人之躯行走在城邦中，这件事还不方便向世人明说。
I understand! You walk among the city's people in mortal form, and it's not yet time to reveal this truth to the world.
放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.
How about sending me <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits first?
我的神啊，我手上没有那么多钱…不过，我会以自己的方式向你证明。
My god, I don't have that much money on me... but I will prove myself to you in my own way.
A surge of courage wells up within!
我决定了，数到1我就冲进那金血！开始——
I've decided. When I count to 1, I'll charge into that golden blood! Starting —
面前的青年丝毫未察觉你的存在。他与身边的浴池总管激烈地争执，央求一份许可与权利。那决心就像赴死的英雄，只不过这片战地在浴场。

The young man before you has not noticed your presence at all. They are too busy locked in a ferocious argument over permissions and rights with the bath manager beside them. Their determination is like that of a dying hero, only their battlefield is actually a bathhouse.
孩子，你怎么又私自闯入这里？幸亏是我先发现了你，如果撞见你的是卫兵……
Child, what are you doing sneaking in here again? You're lucky it was me that found you and not one of the guards...
欧弥利亚婶婶，我发誓这次真的不一样了！就在今日，刻法勒已赐予我第二个征兆，虽然我答应它不能说…我是命中注定的十二黄金裔之一，你要相信我！

Auntie Aumilia, I promise this time is different! Kephale has given me a second sign today. Though I promised them I wouldn't say... I am definitely one of the twelve prophesied Chrysos Heirs. You have to believe me!
哎，伊克西翁，我理解你担心城邦的安危，希望尽自己所能。但万一你失败了呢？那金血，凡人碰了可是要殒命啊！

Ah, Ixion... I know that you are concerned for the safety of the city, and you want to do what you can. But what if you are unsuccessful? If a mortal comes into contact with the golden blood, they will lose their lives!
不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...
…你有考虑过你的姐姐吗？她已经在战争中失去了父母，失去了兄长。如果你也将自己的性命置于危险中，你至少应当先与她道别，再采取行动。

...Have you thought about your sister? She has already lost her father and mother to battle. She lost her older brother too. If you are going to put your life in danger, you should at least bid her farewell before you act.
…我确实没有告诉她是今天。我再等等姐姐，谢谢你，欧弥利亚婶婶。
...You're right. I didn't tell her today was the day. I will wait for her. Thank you, Auntie Aumilia.
等一下，路过的这位老师！
Wait a second! Hey, the master passing by!
我见过你！门口的那个雕像是你们造的对吧！
I've seen you before! You were the one who made that statue at the entrance!
You must have mistaken me for someone else.
我不可能认错！就是那个泛着蓝光的浮空旋转塑像。我亲眼看到你跟一位黑发的同伴，陪同着阿格莱雅大人，在浴场门口放下了那个物件。

I can't be mistaken! It was that floating, rotating sculpture with a bluish glow. I saw it with my own eyes — you and your black-haired companion, accompanied Lady Aglaea, placed that object there at the entrance of the baths.
借浴钉矛？还真是起了个感性独特的名字…
"Space Anchor"? That's quite the poetic and unique name...
Well, it's not really a statue...
我知道的，那肯定是某种崭新的艺术形式，我只是暂且用「雕像」称呼它。
I knew it! It must be some cutting-edge form of artistic expression. I just called it a "statue" as a placeholder.
虽说浴场人来人往，空地上多个什么东西倒是不稀奇。但那作品的样貌实在太前卫了，我每次经过都忍不住多看两眼。

The baths are always crowded, so it's not unusual to find something new being placed here. But the design of that piece was so avant-garde that every time I passed by, I couldn't help but take a second look.
正好让我逮住你了，说什么我也得问出它的材质和制作工艺来。
Now that I've caught you, I'm determined to find out the material and craftsmanship behind it.
You'd have to ask my friend...
这…真是太可惜了。那幽光给我的印象和永夜天帷太像，我原以为您也是一位欧洛尼斯赐福之人呢。
That's... such a pity. The eerie glow reminded me so much of the Evernight Veil. I had thought you were also someone blessed by Oronyx.
实不相瞒，我是这云石天宫的壁画画师，最近灵感枯竭，但此物让我重拾了创作的动力…你应该不介意我照着它画点什么吧？

To be honest, I am a mural artist for this Marmoreal Palace. Recently, I've been struggling with a lack of inspiration, but this object has reignited my creative drive... I hope you wouldn't mind if I used it as a reference for my work?
拟人…别说，真是个好主意！画名我都想好了！就叫「旋转的异邦舞者」！
Anthropomorphizing... I must say, that's a great idea! I've even thought of a title for the piece — let's call it "The Spinning Dancer of the Outlands"!
行啊，画好记得给我看看。
Sure, go ahead. Show me once it's finished.
噢！那当然！我差点以为你会跟我收版权费呢。
Oh, absolutely! I was half expecting you to charge me a licensing fee.
老师你可真是个好家伙。穿搭的风格也很独特，一看就是喜欢打破规则的人。
Master, you're such a great person. Your sense of dressing style is so unique — clearly someone who enjoys breaking the rules.
不像那位啰嗦的{RUBY_B#浴场侍者}达罗{RUBY_E#}老兄一样——「柯珀丝女士，请不要把画板带入池中」，「柯珀丝女士，我们打烊了，请您明晰时再来」。
Unlike that talkative {RUBY_B#Baths Attendant}Daros{RUBY_E#} —"Miss Karpos, please don't bring your easel into the pool," or "Miss Karpos, we're closing now, so please return during the Lucid Hour."
要是脑子里全是那些条条框框，还怎么当好一个画家？老师你说是吧？
If your mind is full of those rules and restrictions, how can you be a good painter? Don't you think so, master?
艺术源自生活，而生活就是泡澡。只要在这浴场呆着，灵感就会像法吉娜的蜜酿一样源源不断。
Art comes from life, and life is all about soaking in the bath. As long as I'm here in the baths, inspiration will flow endlessly, just like Phagousa's honey brew.
但说真的，要是笔自己能画画就好了——老师，既然你来了，也给我贡献点灵感吧！
But honestly, it would be great if the brush could paint by itself — Master, since you're here, why don't you contribute some inspiration to me?
聊天？那太好了，只要你不介意我们聊的东西变成我下一幅作品的主题就行！
Chat? That sounds great, as long as you don't mind if what we talk about becomes the theme for my next piece!
哈哈，这谁记得清嘛，老师你肯定也不会记得自己吃过多少块面包吧。
Haha, who even remembers that? Master, you probably don't remember how many pieces of bread you've eaten either, right?
大多数情况下，只要我得到值得挥洒颜料的灵感，就会当场找个地方作画。有的时候如果在墙壁上难以完全表达那份触动，我就把它画在其他地方，比如瓶瓶罐罐。

In most cases, as long as I get inspiration worth putting paint to, I'll find a place to paint on the spot. Sometimes, if I can't fully express that feeling on the wall, I'll paint it somewhere else, like on bottles or jars.
至于创作的主题——三成泰坦传说，两成黄金裔的故事，一成日常生活，剩下的全是{RUBY_B#夜景}欧洛尼斯的帷幕{RUBY_E#}，特适合在罐子上画一周全景。

As for themes — I've done <unbreak>30%</unbreak> Titan legends, <unbreak>20%</unbreak> stories of Chrysos Heirs, <unbreak>10%</unbreak> daily life, and the rest are all {RUBY_B#night scenes} the curtains of Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, which is perfect for painting a circular view on a jar.
…其实我家被瓶罐堆满了，这也是我天天来浴场泡着的理由…之一。
Actually, my house is full of bottles and jars. That's one of the reasons I come to the bath every day...
Can you make a living with art?
不过这个时期倒是例外…很多富人期待着救世后的价值震荡，他们会刻意找一些「可能会升值」的作品来收藏。

However, this period is an exception... Many wealthy individuals are anticipating the value fluctuations after salvation, and they will deliberately seek out artworks that "might appreciate in value" to collect.
所以要是缺利衡币，我就专画黄金裔和他们的逐火之旅，报酬刚好够我买新颜料的开销——你是不知道那些好用的颜料到底有多贵，有些还得从大地兽的碗里抢。

So if I'm short on Balance Coins, I'll just focus on painting the Chrysos Heirs and their Flame-Chase Journey. The payment will be enough to cover the cost of new paints — you have no idea how expensive those good paints are. Some even have to be taken from the bowls of dromases.
不过，最近元老院的人会委托我创作一些宣传性质的东西，他们给得相当多，但……
However, recently, the Council of Elders has been commissioning me to create some promotional works. They pay quite generously, but...
…那些人眼中的「原创艺术」更类似于一种「工具」，每次给他们画东西都让我郁闷透了。所以我就从废稿堆里随便抽一张出来，随便加两笔就交过去。

...In their eyes, "original art" is more like a "tool." Every time I paint something for them, it just depresses me. So I just grab a random sketch from the pile of discarded drafts, add a few strokes, and hand it over.
他们喜欢，我心态稳定，双赢。
They like it, and I stay calm. It's a win-win.
What have you been painting lately?
最近？主要是和一位老前辈合作，进行壁画修缮…量又大，还遍布城内各处，要不是因为憧憬那位前辈，这工作我都不想接。
Lately? Mostly collaborating with an old senior to restore murals... It's a big job, spread all over the city. If I weren't so admiring of that senior, I wouldn't even want to take on this work.
不止这个原因…偷偷告诉你。每次壁画进行修缮，负责的艺术家都会添上一两笔自己的东西。你可能觉得没什么，但经不起积少成多。举个例子——

But that's not the only reason... I'll tell you a secret. Every time a mural is restored, the artist in charge adds a few strokes of their own. You might think it's nothing, but small changes add up over time. For example —
要是我告诉你，一千个光历年来，城门口那些吉奥里亚的图样，实际上最早是艾格勒的故事，你能想象吗？
If I told you that the symbols of Georios at the city gates, which have been there for a thousand Light Calendar years, were originally the story of Aquila, could you imagine that?
一想到神谕和史书可能也因类似情况一步步变得面目全非，我就感到有些哀伤。真的是一点兴致都提不起来。
Just the thought that prophecies and historical records might have gradually become distorted due to similar circumstances makes me feel a bit sorrowful. Honestly, it dampens any enthusiasm I have.
好，慢走…我再泡一个时刻也该出去了…不，或许两个…？
Alright, take care... I should probably head out after soaking for a little longer... no, maybe two more rounds...?
好，慢走…我再泡一个时刻也该出去了…不，或许两个…？
Alright, take care... I should probably head out after soaking for a little longer... no, maybe two more rounds...?
…讨论会就快结束了，要不要再多吃点？
...The discussion will be wrapping up soon. Want to have some more to eat?
难得有随便享用浴场餐品的机会，不能浪费，得值回我为那几篇论文花费的心血！
It's rare to have the chance to enjoy the baths' food. Can't waste it, and gotta make sure it's worth the effort I put into those papers!
…你是谁？我先警告你，偷听是违反塔兰顿律法的行为，小心把你给举报了！
...Who are you? I'll warn you first, eavesdropping is a violation of Talanton's law, so be careful or I'll report you!
就是占用了我一刻钟进餐的时间，胡乱编出来的文章…等等，你又是谁？
Just the paper article I quickly put together during a 1-quint meal break... Wait, who are you again?
我警告你，偷听是违反塔兰顿律法的行为，小心我把你给举报了！
I'm warning you, eavesdropping is against Talanton's law. Watch out, I might report you!
要是想指责我不务正业，骂我偷懒，那我可必须得说——你来错地方了。云石天宫是给大家放松的场所，不是认真工作的地。
If you're here to criticize me for not being productive and call me lazy, I must say — you've come to the wrong place. The Marmoreal Palace is a place for everyone to relax, not for serious work.
就跟你说到这里，没看见我正忙着呢。忙着享受生活也是在忙！
I've said enough. Can't you see I'm busy? Enjoying life is still a form of work!
What is it... why is it you again?
嗨，正好我刚想出在下次讨论会上发表的观点，心情大好，陪你简单聊聊也不是不行。
Hey, I just figure out the point I can present at the next discussion. I'm in a good mood, so I don't mind chatting with you a little.
当然，什么时候结束，由我说了算。
Of course, when it ends is up to me.
What exactly are you doing here?
看不出来吗？我正在进行学术研究，是伟大的真理追寻者！
Can't you see? I'm conducting academic research — I'm a seeker of the great truth!
大家不是都说，泡浴有助于放松思想，充足的糖分能帮助大脑高速运转。所以，如你所见，我正在浴池的餐桌旁思考。不觉得是个很高效的做法吗？

Everyone says that soaking helps relax the mind, and plenty of sugar helps the brain work at high speed. So, as you can see, I'm thinking while sitting at the bath's dining table. Don't you think it's an efficient way to do things?
边进行工作，边补充营养。要是那些学者也能像我这样钻研问题，早就有突破性的进展了，还至于每次都在讨论会上争辩那几个话题？

While working, I also make sure to replenish my energy. If those scholars could dive into their problems like I do, there'd have been breakthroughs by now — why do they always end up debating the same old topics at every conference?
发困不是好事吗？梦境是灵感的源头，能给人许多启发。我还得虔诚地感谢塞纳托斯，每次都让我睡得那么舒服呢。
Isn't feeling sleepy a good thing? Dreams are the source of inspiration and can offer many insights. I have to sincerely thank Thanatos for always making my sleep so comfortable.
So you're just slacking off, huh...
喂，注意你的言辞！思考需要充分的闲暇，我是在厚积薄发，懂吗？
Hey, mind your words! Thought requires plenty of leisure. I'm accumulating energy for a sudden burst, you know?
算了，跟你说这些也没用。果然还是独自吃饭的时间最快乐了……
Forget it. There's no point explaining this to you. After all, the happiest time is when I eat alone...
你参加的是什么讨论会？
都是些很无聊的内容，最近讨论的主题是：由古生物的生命信息拼合得到的奇美拉，算是新物种吗？你说，是不是没事找事？

It's all really boring stuff. The recent topic was: Are chimeras, created from the combined life information of ancient creatures, a new species? Don't you think that's just making a problem out of nothing?
还鼓励所有成员都去和奇美拉来个近距离接触。哎，为了完成指标，我也当上了某只奇美拉小队的管理员，必须得监督它们工作，真是浪费时间。

They even encourage all members to get up close and personal with the chimeras. *sigh* In order to meet the quotas, I've ended up as the administrator of a chimera squad. I have to supervise their work, which is such a waste of time.
要是有这个闲工夫，还不如让我多泡会澡，指不定真能想出点什么来呢！
If I had this free time, I'd rather soak in the bath longer — who knows, maybe I'd come up with something!
…拒绝？要是不参加这个研讨会，我去哪找这么多免费的吃的？
...Refuse? If I don't attend this seminar, where else can I get all this free food?
要是不做这个奇美拉管理员，不完成生命花园的指标，我该怎么说服负责人放我随意使用浴池，还能领花园的津贴？

If I didn't take on this role as the chimera administrator and didn't meet the Garden of Life's quotas, how would I convince the person in charge to let me use the baths freely and still receive the Garden's allowance?
拒绝是不可能的，最多就是用行动抗议罢了——告诉所有人，我不想干！
Refusing is impossible. At most, I'll protest through my actions — let everyone know I don't want to do it!
但我也不辞职，让他们去急。嘿嘿。
But I'm not resigning. Let them worry about it. Heh heh.
面前的男人用种极度不可置信的眼神望着你，仿佛你说出了什么禁忌的言论。
The man in front of you looks at you with an expression of extreme disbelief, as though you've said something forbidden.
...Ridiculous. I don't want to talk to you anymore.
Why should it be up to you?
行啊，没问题，由你说了算！那就聊到这里，我还正愁找不到借口打发你走呢！
Alright, fine, it's your call! Let's end the conversation here. I was actually looking for an excuse to send you on your way!
你好，年轻人，欢迎来到云石天宫的书库…记得找书前先去把手擦干。翻阅可以随便找个墙边一靠，若是要借出…去找那边的阿波罗尼娅，填个调书单。

Hello, youngster, welcome to the repository of the Marmoreal Palace... Remember to wipe your hands before looking for any books. You can browse freely while leaning against any wall, but if you wish to borrow something, go find Apollonia over there and fill out a book request form.
哈哈，这倒是常听人问起，但要知道，卷轴也好纸张也罢，都只是一种形式，凡是载有学识的媒介，在我们这统一都可称做「书」——包括字画和石版，均在馆藏范围内。

Haha, that's a question I hear quite often. But you see, whether it's a scroll or paper, they're just forms. Any medium that carries knowledge is collectively referred to as a "book" here — this includes calligraphy, paintings, and even steles, all of which are part of our collection.
You really dare place books by the water?
哈哈，不必担心，此处的识本都受了瑟希斯的庇佑，哪怕书页被整个濡湿，也绝无损毁之忧…不过，污渍倒是防不住的，所以再重申一下，记得擦干手。

Haha, no need to worry. The texts here are all blessed by Cerces, so even if the pages get completely soaked, there's no risk of them being damaged... However, stains are another matter, so let me remind you once again — make sure to dry your hands!
你若是想随便翻翻，二柜到四柜的哲史典籍会是个不错的选择。数算在七柜，故事诗章在十五柜。另外，年轻人可能会喜欢二十柜以后的故事书…

If you're just browsing, the philosophical and historical texts in cabinets two to four would be a good choice. For math and numerical works, try cabinet seven. The narrative poems are in cabinet fifteen. Additionally, young people might enjoy the storybooks in cabinets after twenty...
I'm feeling overwhelmed. Do you have any recommendations?
I'm not interested in any of those...
嗯…看你的打扮是来自外乡，一定还没适应这边的环境吧？这本或许能让你对奥赫玛的印象更加轻松些。这是拓本，无需归还，拿着慢慢读吧。

Well... judging by your attire, you must be from out of town and haven't quite adjusted to the environment here yet? This book might make your impression of Okhema a bit more lighthearted. It's a rubbing, so you don't need to return it. Take it and read at your own pace.
在这末世中，也就只有书卷的清新味道能带给人些安宁…哈哈，安宁得都忘了自我介绍了。
In this post-apocalyptic world, the fresh scent of books is about the only thing that brings peace... Haha, I've gotten so caught up that I forgot to introduce myself.
我是书库的负责人之一，名叫泽诺托斯。在这书库中遇到的问题，都可以来找我，只要在馆内别大声喧哗，吵到别人就好。

I am one of the managers of the repository, and my name is Zenotus. Any issues you encounter here, feel free to come to me. Just make sure not to raise your voice too loudly within the repository and disturb others.
流水声不会打扰默想，反倒使思维更加清晰……
The sound of flowing water doesn't interrupt quiet contemplation. It actually clears the mind...
如何，年轻人？找到想看的书了吗？
So, youngster, have you found a book you like?
哈哈，到我这个年纪，最不缺的就是时间。你说吧，年轻人。
Haha, at my age, the one thing I have plenty of is time. Go ahead, speak your mind, youngster.
Can you tell me about the collection here?
在这奥赫玛能寻见的书，就都能在这图书馆里寻见。不是老头子我吹嘘，哪怕树庭的圣树里刻下的典籍，都不一定有这全。

Any book you can find in Okhema, you can find here in this repository. I'm not bragging, but even the scriptures carved into the sacred trees of the Grove may not have as complete a collection as we do here.
若是不信，你可以看看离我们最近的第一个书架，百余本全是馆藏目录。多亏我们一位同僚发明出了「分类编号法」，不然想找本书，简直难如登天。

If you don't believe me, you can take a look at the first bookshelf nearest to us. Our catalog alone is over a hundred books thick. We're lucky that one of our colleagues invented the classification numbering system, or else finding a book here would be as difficult as climbing into the sky.
其中，泰坦祭仪的述章居多，新人祭司们为通过教派的测验，往往一到欢喜月就会来集中借阅一番，那也是我们最忙的时候。
Among them, the majority are texts on Titan rituals. New priests, eager to pass their sect's trials, often come to focus on borrowing these during the Month of Joy. That's when we're busiest.
其次是医典、哲章、史记…同类书目彼此间多有矛盾之处，借阅的人几乎都是为了给辩论添点物证才会借下。

Next are the medical compendiums, philosophical texts, and historical records... there are many contradictions between these similar books, and most people borrow them to add evidence for their debates.
最后才是游记与创想故事，年轻人的最爱，我这老头子也读得进去。
Lastly, there are travelogues and imaginative stories, which are youngsters' favorites. Even an old man like me can get into them.
说来，最里面的架子还收了不少浴场客人自己的手稿，甚至还有些账本什么的——至于内容嘛，见仁见智了。
By the way, the innermost shelves hold many manuscripts from the bath guests themselves, even some account books... as for the content, well, it's all up to personal interpretation.
我猜你是想问，为什么会在云石天宫里建个图书馆，是吧？嗯…这要扯到几十个光历年前——记得刚好是第四十三个奥赫玛百年祭那会。

I guess you're wondering why there's a repository in the Marmoreal Palace, right? Well... this goes back several Light Calendar years ago — exactly during the <unbreak>43</unbreak>rd Okhema Centennial Festival.
那年，浴场刚刚完成它有史以来规模最大的一次全面修缮，整个光鲜亮丽了许多。但人们有所不知，那同时代表建筑师们都要没活可做了，我也是其中之一。

That year, the bath had just finished its largest renovation in history, becoming much more splendid. But what people didn't know was that this also meant the architects would be out of work, and I was one of them.
我的老朋友们担心之后的营生，我嘛，运气好些，利衡无忧，就担心起这门学问失传，一合计，把浴场的闲置区域改造了一番，成了个谁都能用的小教学室。

My old friends were worried about their future livelihoods, but I, being luckier and with a steady balance of wealth, only worried about this knowledge being lost. So, after some discussion, we decided to repurpose an unused area of the baths into a small classroom that anyone could use.
一开始，学者们也被吸引来讲学，他们四处搜集教材，用完了就堆在架子上。久了，来上课的人，反倒被来看书的人嫌吵，两边闹了几个光历年，书是越堆越多。

At first, scholars were attracted to teach here. They gathered textbooks from all over and piled them on the shelves once they were done using them. Over time, those attending the classes became annoyed by the noise from those just coming to read, and the arguments went on for several Light Calendar years, with more and more books piling up.
最后，是缇宝大人她们动用权能，把遗邦的识本全部搜集了来，在公民大会过了个表决，这地方被冠了个「学识枢纽」名头…而我这些老伙计，自然跟着不愁营生了。

Finally, Lady Tribbie and the others used their powers to gather all the knowledge from the fallen nations. After a vote in the citizens' assembly, this place was given the title of 'Knowledge Hub'... and my old companions no longer had to worry about our livelihoods.
最繁闹那阵，这书库甚至年年举办「觅宝活动」，自从黑潮的情况愈加严重之后，这传统就暂停了。等黄金裔大人完成神谕之后，说不定还能再办上几场。

During the busiest times, this repository even held an annual "Treasure Hunt" event. However, since the situation with the black tide has worsened, that tradition has been paused. Once the Chrysos Heir completes the prophecy, perhaps a few more events will be held again.
烦心…倒算不上，最多算是为时代变迁而叹上几口气罢了…
Troubling... not really. It's more like sighing at the changes of the times...
好些客人跟我提议，希望我能帮他们拓些新书看看，但他们口中的「新书」，多是些幻想曲、情爱诗。以往的哲史与数算类目，却越来无人问津。

Many guests have suggested that I help them acquire some new books, but the "new books" they're referring to are mostly fantasy tunes and love poetry. Meanwhile, the older categories like philosophy, history, and mathematics are becoming increasingly neglected.
其实这倒无妨，黄金裔们骁勇善战，人们对生活有了热情，应是好事。烦心的是这帮人身上的共性——把看书视作消遣，走马观花不说，还经常边吃边看。

Actually, it's not a big deal. The Chrysos Heirs are brave and skilled warriors, and the enthusiasm people have for life is a good thing. What bothers me, though, is the common trait among these people — they treat reading as mere entertainment. Not only do they skim through without paying attention, but they often eat while reading as well.
最近，他们甚至怂恿我在这书库四周辟出个角落当做饮食区，提供躺食的餐点…哈哈，虽说这要求其实还算合理，但我这心里总也有块疙瘩。

Recently, they've even urged me to set up a corner around this repository as a dining area, offering meals that can be eaten while lying down... Haha, though this request seems reasonable enough, I can't shake the discomfort in my heart.
也不知是该怪他们特立独行，还是该夸他们懂得生活了。谁让这旁边就杵着全翁法罗斯最好的休憩处呢？
I don't know whether I should blame them for being so unconventional, or praise them for knowing how to enjoy life. After all, right next door is the best resting place in all of Amphoreus.
I won't disturb you any longer.
没事，其实比起和我这种老头聊天，书里能学到的东西更多…闲着就去转转吧。
It's fine. Actually, there's more to learn from books than from chatting with an old man like me... Feel free to wander around when you have time.
I won't disturb you any longer.
没事，其实比起和我这种老头聊天，书里能学到的东西更多…闲着就去转转吧。
It's fine. Actually, there's more to learn from books than from chatting with an old man like me... Feel free to wander around when you have time.
这是个远离喧嚣的好地方——没有了浴池人群的烦躁，高温蒸汽带来的晕眩感也在清爽的凉风中尽数消散，无名的虫类在低唱，瀑布述说着不可解的预言。

This is a great place away from the bustle — none of the clamoring bath crowds, and the faintness brought about by the hot steam vanishes with the cool breeze. Nameless bugs trill in low song, with the waterfall whispering inscrutable prophecies.
所有景象都令你感到分外舒适，但仍有些美中不足——这里实在太过安静了。
The sights fill you with particular comfort, though it still seems like something is amiss — it's too quiet here.
…水漫琴？我见过，这是卡弥特斯的特色乐器。根据记载，卡弥特斯是座受墨涅塔赐福的遥远城邦，那里的居民个个都是极具天赋的艺术家。
...A water lyre? I've seen it before — it's a signature instrument of Carmitis. According to records, Carmitis was a distant city blessed by Mnestia. All her residents were artistic prodigies.
可惜，卡弥特斯在很久以前就消失了，连同那些珍贵的、早已失传的技艺。这座风琴摆在这许久了，始终未能找到称职的演奏者。
Alas, Carmitis disappeared a long time ago, along with those precious arts long lost to time. This water lyre has been here for a long time, unable to secure a worthy musician to play it.
美好的事物容易被摧毁，艺术总是伴随着苦难。墨涅塔的祝福，也是诅咒啊。
Beautiful things are destroyed easily, and art is always accompanied by misery. Mnestia's blessing is also a curse.
听闻这番言论，围观人群无不发出嗟叹的声音。但耳尖的你，似乎在嘈杂中捕捉到了某句异样的话语。你很确定自己并没有听错。
Hearing these words, the onlookers exhale a collective groan. But your sharp ears seem to pick up s strange phrase within the din. You are positive you have not misheard.
Maybe I can try playing it.
确实是真事，但…嗯…应该没关系，我来试试吧。
Yes, I really can... Hm... It should be fine. I'll try playing it.
真的假的？那你快去试试啊。
For real? Go try it out.
但是…嗯…应该没关系，我来吧。
But... Hmm... It should be fine. Let me try.
简单调试过后，水漫琴缓慢发出了悦耳的声响。
After some simple tuning, the water lyre slowly emits a lovely sound.
还好，看来母亲教的技巧还没有生疏。
Phew, looks like I still haven't lost the skills that Mother taught me.
各位客人，不介意的话，就由我来为大家演奏这台水漫琴如何？或许达不到故事里的水准，但作为沐浴后的消遣节目，应该是足够了。
Dear guests, if you don't mind, allow me to play a piece with this water lyre for everyone. I may not be able to perform at a level told in stories, but it should suffice as post-bath entertainment.
你好，善良的听众。希望我演奏的音乐，能为你疲惫的心灵带来些许宁静。
Hello, kind listener. I hope my music will ease your fatigued spirits.
我现在的名字是弥斯，如你所见，既非出身阔绰的贵族，也不是腰缠万贯的巨贾，只是个借琴声作消遣的普通演奏者罢了。
My current name is Misia. As you can see, I am neither a silver-spooned noble nor a purse-heavy merchant, just an ordinary musician who finds joy in melodic pastimes.
嗯…迟迟不肯离去，是还有什么好奇的吗？
Mm... You haven't left. Are you still curious about something?
水漫琴，以水流作为基础动力的乐器。身形庞大，也必须摆放在靠近水源的地点。
A water lyre, an instrument powered by flowing water. It's huge in size and must be placed in a location near a water source.
…我原本还想为您再做些更深入的介绍，但忽然想起，即便在奥赫玛，水漫琴也仅剩这一台。多做讲解，也不过是无用的知识罢了。
...I thought to give you a more elaborate introduction, but I suddenly remembered that there is only one such water lyre left, even in Okhema. It's pointless to tell you more about the instrument.
呵…传闻总是跑得比乐声还快。刚才您也在场，应该听到那些对话了吧。
Hee... News does travel faster than music. You were there as well just now, and I suppose you must have heard some things.
「卡弥特斯」…那并非是城邦的名字，而是我们居住的海湾的称呼。那是个很美的地方，轮廓明晰，色彩丰富，美得就像是幅描绘墨涅塔的画。
Carmitis... That is not a city's name, but what we call the bay where we live. It is a beautiful place with clear contours and vibrant colors. Its splendor is akin to a painting of Mnestia.
海浪拍打岩石，那便是最初的音乐。我们收集这些声响，将它们谱成旋律。
The waves crash against rocks, that is the very first music made. We collect these sounds and weave them into melodies.
奥赫玛的人们称呼它为水漫琴，但对我们来说，它就是普通的琴。我原以为这些精密的机械早已被黑潮吞没了，没想到在此处还能见到。
The Okhemans call it a water lyre. But to us, it is an ordinary lyre. I thought these intricate devices were long devoured by the black tide. I never thought I'd see one here.
I just want to enjoy some good music.
那就请您找个安稳的地方，好生歇着吧。这里离水流很近，当心沾湿了您的衣服。
Then please find a safe spot to rest. It's too close to the water here. Your clothes might get wet.
向您问好，善良的听众。您聆听这乐声也有段时间了，有什么特别的感受吗？
Greetings, kind listener. You have been listening to this music for quite a while. Do you feel anything special?
I can hear your longing for home.
…故乡么。或许有吧，但在我看来，那并非是个需要思念的地方，更像是在寻找。
...My home, hmm? Perhaps, but the way I see it, it isn't a place that needs to be thought about, rather to seek out.
卡弥特斯是受墨涅塔赐福之地，即便那儿已经没有人居住了，但艺术、浪漫与美也不会消失。只要是这琴声响起的地方，就可以供我栖居。
Carmitis is a place blessed by Mnestia. Even if no one lives there now, its art, romance, and beauty won't fade. As long as there is someplace where this melody is played, it is home enough for me.
…忧伤么。初到奥赫玛的时候，我确实有些慌张。全知全能的刻法勒背负天空，搭建起的小小庇护所，其中是否有我的容身之处？我不知道。

...Sorrow, was it? I do admit that when I first arrived in Okhema, I was a little anxious. A tiny shelter built beneath the sky that is borne by the omniscient, omnipotent Kephale. Would there be a place for me here? I did not know.
逃难路上，我见过了太多别离。艺术有无限的空间，可演奏者只能在这狭窄的天地间求活。或许是因为这样的心境，我的琴声也不可避免地染上了哀愁吧。

As I was fleeing, I witnessed too many farewells. The horizons of art are boundless, but its musicians can only eke a living in this narrow space between heaven and earth. Perhaps it is because of this mindset that my playing is inevitably tinged with sorrow.
…愉快么。这可难说，我是在为享受沐浴时光的客人演奏，若是音色太过沉郁，未免有些不识趣了吧。说到底，这乐声只能做消遣用，可算不得什么艺术。

...Joy, was it? That's hard to say. I play for the guests enjoying their baths. If my music was too melancholic, it might sour some of their moods. After all, this music is merely for entertainment, unworthy to be called true art.
不过，能让您感到愉悦，也是我的荣幸。
But, it is my honor for you to have felt joy.
…希冀么。那是自然，若是不抱有看到明日晨光的愿望，又该如何度过这个漫长的夜晚呢？即使奥赫玛不受黑夜侵袭，也不该忘记心怀信念。

...Aspirations, huh. That is only natural. If we do not cling to the hopes of tomorrow's dawn, how will we even endure this long night? Even if Okhema cannot be invaded by darkness, we should not forget to have faith in our hearts.
聊得有些多了。要是情感必须通过话语才能传递，那便是演奏者的失职，所以还是请您找个安稳的地方，继续欣赏这水漫琴的乐声吧。

We've spoken a little much. If emotions could only be conveyed through words, the musician would have failed at their duty. So I ask that you find a safe spot and continue to enjoy this water lyre's melodies.
奇美拉是奥赫玛的宝物，大家都要爱护它们呀！
Chimeras are treasures of Okhema. Everyone should cherish them!
别看它们的体型小，但非常能干。性格温柔，做事情也认真，从来不会抱怨分配的工作，最近帮城里的人们解决了好多麻烦呢。

Don't be fooled by their small size. They're very capable. Gentle, but serious about their tasks, and never complain about their assigned work. They've helped solve many problems for the people in the city recently.
不仅这些，奇美拉还拥有非常强的团队意识，懂得相互配合，也会关心它们的管理员。
Not just that, chimeras are also highly receptive to teamwork, possessing great synergy, and will care for their handlers.
跟你说，前些日子，我的心情不太好，那些奇美拉就不停地围着我转，还主动用头上的角在我腿上蹭来蹭去，逗得我直笑…哈哈，能做这的园丁可太幸福了！

Let me tell you, some days ago, I was feeling a bit down. Those chimeras kept hovering around me, and even started rubbing their horns across my leg to cheer me up... Haha, I'm so fortunate to be a Gardener here!
听起来就挺让人羡慕的。
是吧！可惜成为园丁需要很长时间的培训，不然，我得要让所有奥赫玛的人们都来亲身领略奇美拉的可爱之处！
I know, right! A pity it takes a lot of training to become a Gardener, otherwise I'd make sure everyone in Okhema gets a chance to experience how totally adorable chimeras are!
奇美拉才不是宠物，它们是人类的同伴！其余动物，包括那些已经灭绝的古生物，能有奇美拉这么聪明懂事嘛。我是没见过。
Chimeras aren't pets. They're companions for humans! Could any animal, like those extinct prehistoric creatures, compare to the intelligent and considerate chimeras? I think not.
感兴趣的话，可以常来生命花园逛逛。这里是奇美拉的培育场所和栖息地，保不准多接触个几次，你就彻底爱上它们了呢！
If you're interested, you can visit the Garden of Life more often. This is the chimeras' breeding center and habitat. You might just fall in love with them with a few more visits!
虽然奇美拉很乐意帮人们干活，但看到它们劳累的样子，我还是有点心疼……
The chimeras may be all too happy to help with work, but seeing them so exhausted, I can't help but feel a little sorry for them...
I want to learn more about chimeras.
请随便问吧，整个奥赫玛恐怕都找不到比我更了解它们的人了。
Ask away. I don't think there's anyone else in Okhema who knows more about them than me.
你应该听说过，奇美拉并非原本就生活在翁法罗斯的生物，而是花园的学者，使用「生命树种」培育出来的。
You must've heard before that the chimeras aren't actually native to Amphoreus. Rather, they were grown using the Seed of Life by the Garden's scholars.
「生命树种」记录着古生物的信息。起初学者们培育树种，是希望复活已灭绝的生物，但最终得到的结果，却是这样混合了诸多特征的奇特动物。

Prehistoric creature information is recorded in the Seed of Life. Initially, scholars grew these seeds in hopes of restoring extinct creatures, but the end result was this wondrous animal — a creature of myriad characteristics.
我们用传说中奇兽的名字为它命名，也就是「奇美拉」——由不同动物的部位组合而成的全新生物。是不是很贴切？
We named it after the legendary beast, the Chimera — a whole new lifeform composed of different animal parts. Isn't it quite fitting?
关于园丁对奇美拉的态度…
About the Gardeners' attitudes towards chimeras...
有些园丁坚持认为奇美拉的出现是个错误，但我不同意这个观点！
Some Gardeners insist that the chimeras' appearance is a mistake, but I vehemently disagree!
要我说，奇美拉是瑟希斯赐给翁法罗斯的礼物——上哪再去找这么可爱又听话的小动物呢。复原古生物只是一厢情愿的想法，我们该接受现实才对。

I say, the chimera is a gift that Cerces bestowed upon Amphoreus — where else can you find such a cute and obedient critter? Reviving creatures of the past is nothing but a pipe dream, so we should just accept reality.
现在，奇美拉和奥赫玛的人们相处得可好啦，大家都很喜欢它们。
Now, the chimeras get along so well with the people of Okhema. Everyone loves them.
我想了解生命花园的事。
I wish to learn more about the Garden of Life.
唔，我成为园丁的时间还不长，对过去的事情可能不太了解。不过请问吧，我会尽可能地为你解答。
Oh, I haven't been here long, so I'm not too sure about past matters. But ask away, and I will try my best to answer.
严格来说，生命花园是个学术组织，负责研究生命相关的知识。这里的学者很多都在神悟树庭进修过，接受瑟希斯的智慧熏陶。

Strictly speaking, the Garden of Life is an academic organization charged with researching all aspects related to life. Most of the scholars here studied at the Grove of Epiphany, where they were influenced by Cerces' wisdom.
但最近，随着奥赫玛要处理的现实问题越来越多，花园也会帮助居民们解决些实际麻烦，譬如照料大地兽啦，消除农作物的病害啦…之类的。

But in recent times, as Okhema has more realistic problems to resolve, the Garden has also become a haven to alleviate her people's worries. They can care for dromases and eliminate diseases from crops here, among other things.
还有！我们组织了好多只奇美拉小队，专门为人们工作，现在特别受欢迎。你要是遇到了困难，也可以向花园提出申请，让奇美拉来帮你！

And! We've organized many chimera squads that work specially for humans. They're super popular right now. If you've run into a rut, you can make a request at the Garden and have chimeras help you out!
虽然被称为「园丁」，但其实是学者。平时的工作就是在花园里培育和管理奇美拉，就像照看那些花花草草那样。
We may be called the Gardeners, but more accurately, we are scholars. Our usual work consists of caring and handling the chimeras in the Garden, no different from caring for flora.
说起来…我也有段时间没去树庭听讲座了。不知道他们有没有什么新发现……
Speaking of which... I haven't listened to a lecture at the Grove for quite a while. I wonder if they've made any new discoveries...
Let's talk when we have more time!
嗯，没事的时候，也可以来花园里找奇美拉玩。相信你也会像我一样爱上它们的！
Sure thing, you can drop to play with the chimeras if you're free. You'll definitely fall in love with them like I have!
奇美拉啊奇美拉，你为何偏偏是奇美拉……
Oh, chimera, chimera, why did you have to be a chimera...
没有没有，奇美拉是很可爱的生物，也很有研究价值。
Oh nothing, not at all. They're very cute creatures worth studying.
玫瑰换个名字，也依然芬芳。
A rose by any other name would smell as sweet.
奇怪，我是在哪里听过这句话吗…为什么如此耳熟？
Strange, where have I heard this line before... Why does it sound familiar?
Forget it, that feeling's not the point.
这是什么新型的精神内耗吗……
Is this some sort of newfangled mental friction...
好吧，你这么形容可能也没错。
Eh, fine, it's a good way to describe it.
这么说吧，如果你在几百年前就丢失了一只特夫犬、一匹提兰马、一只斑鸠——或者别的任何动物，时至今日，你还会继续寻找它们吗？
I'll put it this way: If you lost a Taffe dog, a Tyrian horse, a turtledove, or any other animal, would you still be looking for them in this day and age?
…抱歉，我好像把事情越说越难懂了。你愿意稍稍留步，听我略加解释吗？
...Sorry, I'm making it harder to understand. Would you be willing to stay a while and listen to my explanation?
那太好了，就让我从黑潮的威胁开始说起吧。
Wonderful, I'll start from the threat of the black tide.
这样啊…那就不打扰了。你要是对这个话题感兴趣，等闲下来了可以再来这附近找我。
I see... I won't bother you then. If you're interested in this topic, you can look for me here when you're free.
你可能听说过，为了复现那些在黑潮中灭绝的生物，我们在奥赫玛建立了这座花园，用于培育「生命树种」——某种记录着生命信息的物质。

You may have heard about the project. We're trying to revive creatures that went extinct from the black tide's destruction by building the Garden in Okhema and sowing the Seed of Life, which have information about life recorded in them.
理论上来说，用生命树种还原出来的，理应是那些消失于黑潮之中的古代生物…可如你所见，得到的奇美拉却是全新的物种。
In theory, what is restored from the Seed of Life would be ancient creatures that disappeared in the black tide... But as you can see, the chimera we grew is an entirely new lifeform altogether.
如果说奥赫玛真是最后的方舟…那么这方舟究竟在用什么形式保护我们的过去，就难免令人焦虑了。
If Okhema really becomes the final ark... Then, exactly how this ark is preserving our past is a cause for anxiety.
…唉，现实如此，由不得人抱怨。至少奇美拉很有用、也很讨人喜欢——这就足够啦。我和你说这些，也不过是一个学者的自怨自艾罢了。
...*sigh* It is what it is, so we can't really complain. At least the chimeras are useful and likable — that's enough. I'm only speaking to you from the capacity of scholarly self-pity.
消失的物种无法重现…这是怎么抱怨都不会有改变的事情。
Disappeared lifeforms can't be restored... This is something that will never change, no matter how prevalent the complaints are.
只要大家喜欢奇美拉，我们的研究…也算是歪打正着吧。
As long as everyone likes the chimeras, our research... will at least be progressing on a right path.
来聊聊翁法罗斯的古生物吧。
Let's talk about Amphoreus' prehistoric creatures.
从奇美拉自「生命树种」继承的性状来说，最值得一提的应该是菲莉丝兽、卡尼兽、还有地行龙了。你想听我说哪一种？
From the traits inherited by the chimera from the Seed of Life, what are most worthy of mention should be the Felys, the Canis, and the Terrazard. Which one do you wish to explore?
一般来说，菲莉丝兽被认为是传说中「猫」的原型。当然，也有证据说猫也是和菲莉丝兽一样真实存在的生物…不过这种学术争论我们可以按下不表。

Typically speaking, the Felys is believed to be based on the legendary "cat." Of course, there is also evidence that cats existed for real, just as real as the Felys... but let's set aside that academic debate for now.
和传说中的猫一样，菲莉丝兽拥有灵活优美的体型，直立的三角形耳朵和又大又圆的眼睛使它们成为出色的猎手，即使在光线昏暗的环境中也能轻松捕捉猎物。

Similar to the cat of legend, the Felys has a dexterous, elegant physique. Its upright triangular ears and big round eyes make them excellent hunters, able to deftly capture prey even in environments with dim lighting.
大家都认为，奇美拉智慧、狡黠的一面就是继承自菲莉丝兽的物种特征。
Most believe that the chimera's intelligence and cunning are inherited from the traits of the Felys.
卡尼兽是俗语中「狗」的学名；由于躯体强壮、对人类忠诚、能够在生活中切实出力，在黑潮来临前，它们普遍被称为「人类最好的朋友」。

The Canis is the scientific name of what we colloquially call "dogs." Its strong physique, loyalty to humans, and practical assistance in daily life earned them the title of "man's best friend" before the black tide descended.
不幸的是，可能是感官灵敏带来的副作用，卡尼兽对黑潮的抗性非常低，即便在其它动物毫无异常的环境中，卡尼兽也有可能因为黑潮的作用而突发恶性病症。

Unfortunately, perhaps a side effect of their sensitive senses, the Canis' resistance to the black tide is frighteningly low. Even in anomalous environments that don't affect other animals, the Canis would probably develop malignant symptoms due to black tide exposure.
…在卡尼兽濒临灭绝的这个时代，的确是奇美拉继承了它们「人类最好的朋友」这样的职能。
...In this age when the Canis is borderline extinct, the chimeras have indeed inherited the role of "man's best friend" from them.
地行龙是一种在黑潮刚出现的时期，就已经灭绝的野生动物，体型很小、靠吃虫子过活…但有着和奇美拉几乎相同的尾巴。
The Terrazard is a wild animal that was already extinct in the early days of the black tide. It was small in stature and subsisted on insects... but had a tail that largely resembles the chimera's.
地行龙非常胆小，习惯揣测人类的意图——继承了部分特征的奇美拉，在心性上也相当敏感，甚至像人那样拥有极其丰富的心思与性格。

The Terrazard was timid and adept at guessing the intents of humanity. The chimera has inherited a portion of these traits, for they are also emotionally perceptive, their wealth of thoughts and personalities comparable to humans, even.
顺便一说，有种观点认为大地兽就是得到了吉奥里亚赐福，并因此变得巨大的地行龙…但这应该只是两个物种在外形上略有相似之处罢了。
To add on, there is an opinion that dromases are gigantic Terrazards because they received Georios' blessing... but this is probably just due to the vague resemblance in these two species.
行吧。古生物的知识…对翁法罗斯的未来可能确实没有什么帮助。
Fine... Knowledge on prehistoric creatures... probably isn't of much help to Amphoreus' future.
Get more done and think less.
确实…如果我能全身心地投入培育奇美拉的工作，可能就不会在这里伤感了。
That's true... If I can devote myself fully into chimera breeding work, I wouldn't be wallowing in sorrow here.
奇美拉没有任何错，想复活古生物也是美好的理想，只是……
The chimeras have done no wrong, and trying to revive extinct animals is a beautiful dream, but...
…唉。在这样的环境下，个人的喜好又能改变什么呢？
...*sigh* In such an environment, what's the use of personal taste?
这就不行了？才跑了几步就累成这副德行？出去别说是我的学生，丢人！
Is that all you've got? You run a few steps, and you're in such a sorry state already? Don't go telling anyone you're my students, as you'll bring me nothing but shame!
…老…呼…老师…我们已经、绕着云石天宫…跑了二…二十圈了……
...S—Sir... Phew... We've—We've already done... t—twenty... laps around the... Marmoreal Palace...
啧，行吧，那就全体休息一刻钟，然后再来二十组俯卧撑。
Pfft, fine. Take a quint, then finish twenty sets of push-ups!
嘶——老、老师，人家讲学都是收钱…您、您是要命啊！
Ahh... S—Sir... They normally take their students' money for the lectures... N—Not their lives...
这才哪到哪，啊？就你们这小体格子，再不加紧锻炼，小心连学院大门都进不去！
What, too much to handle already? Ah, if you weaklings don't start taking training seriously, you might never make it into the academy!
不是…为啥就咱们这么特殊啊，也没见其它学派有过什么入门考核…那个投石索也太难扔了吧……
That's not what I mean... Why do we have to do this? I never saw any entrance exams for the other Schools... And that sling is way too heavy to swing...
当然是因为——只有强健的体魄，才能承载强韧的灵魂；只有强韧的灵魂，才能触及纯粹的真理！
It goes without saying, a powerful soul must be paired with a strong body, or it will never reach the pure truths!
但我们的根本目的不还是学知识吗…就您这个训练强度，怕不是要把我们都培养成竞技场英雄……
But we came here to learn... With such intense training, I'm afraid we would become arena champions instead...
我再重申一遍！我们的肉体乃是灵魂的容器，就像作物成长须得倚赖泥土的滋养，灵魂的完满也离不开肉体的丰盈——

I will say this one more time! Our bodies are the vessels of our souls! Just as the growth of crops relies on the soil's nourishment, the nourishment of the soul cannot be separated from the abundance of the body...
若是一味地追求丰产而不停耕种，却疏于对土地加以养护，那么迟早有一天，我们赖以生存的根基就会被榨干。
If you simply pursue abundant harvests and spend all your time reaping without nurturing the land, one day the very foundation of our survival will dry up and wither.
灵魂在得以质变擢升之前，就因肉体的衰败而枯萎——这将是何等的悲剧！
For the soul to wither and decline before achieving elevation because of a debilitated body... What a tragedy that would be!
很好，既然你如此有精神，待会儿再多加五组吧。
Very well! As you've got the energy to argue, finish another five sets!
啊？！不是——别啊老师，我知道错了！
Huh!? No — Please, Sir, I was wrong!
这位朋友，我见你颇有资质，有没有兴趣了解一下我们的学派？
My friend, you look competent. Are you interested in learning more about our school?
乐意效劳！那么首先，你了解「神悟树庭」吗？
Gladly! First, do you know about the Grove of Epiphany?
很好，这样我们就可以省去多余的介绍，直奔主题了——
Very good, we'll dispense with the preamble and get straight to business...
简而言之，很久以前，{RUBY_B#最初的学者}塞勒苏斯{RUBY_E#}在{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}裂分之枝，瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神躯栖居之处，带领众建立起了花园与庭院。

In short, a long time ago, the {RUBY_B#First Scholar}Thalesus{RUBY_E#} led the masses and built a garden and grove over where the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift, Cerces'{RUBY_E#} divine shell laid.
那些花园与庭院后来成为了「神悟树庭」——一个供世人醒神、求识、悟道的学院，一个在学术上兼容并包、百花齐放的圣地。

The garden and grove later became the Grove of Epiphany — an academy where people awoke their minds, sought knowledge, and invoked enlightenment. A sanctuary where academia embraces inclusivity and teems with diversity.
在翁法罗斯，人们通常将那些具有一定规模与影响的学术群体称作「学派」，而我便属于树庭七大学派中的「曳石学派」。
In Amphoreus, people usually refer to these structured and influential academic groups as Schools, and I belong to the Helkolithist school, one of seven in the Grove.
我们这一派精于对「体能与心理」的研究实践——不仅在体育锻炼、竞技活动中追求「人类的极致」，往往也能在思辨活动中强有力地击倒对手。

We are proficient in the practical study of physical and mental acuities. We don't just pursue the limits of humanity in physical training and competitive activities, but also exercise our prowess in felling our opponents in battles of wit.
没错！就像风暴击倒大树——握紧手中的石板，给予你的辩论对手强劲有力的一击！
That's right! Like a storm felling a great tree — hand clutching a slate, punching a hole through your opponent's fallacious argument!
当然，就算恰好并未携带石板也不用担心，我们的课程还包括「即兴武器近战」与「徒手格斗」，以便学生们能在各种情况下随机应变。

Of course, it's okay even if you're not carrying a slate at that time. Our lessons also include improvised close quarters combat with weapons and hand-to-hand fighting. Our students are well-equipped for any situations thrown their way.
Where are the guards? I want to make a report.
哈哈，你可真幽默，我的朋友！
正是如此！我就知道，你果然非常适合我们学派！
Exactly! I knew you were perfect for our school!
我最近都会在附近边散步边讲学，你要是感兴趣，随时可以来旁听。
I've recently been strolling about and lecturing nearby. If you are interested, you can have a listen.
I want to hear about other schools.
这个嘛…如果还想了解一下其它六大学派，我倒是不介意给你简单介绍介绍——
About them... If you still want to know more about the other six schools, I wouldn't mind giving you a brief intro...
「莲食学派」主要研究植物及其制品，但那帮家伙一个个都是苦修者，无聊得很。跟他们呆久了，怕不是正常人也要变得跟植物似的呆呆傻傻。

The Lotophagist school primarily studies plants and their products, but those fellas are all boring ascetics. Even a normal person would eventually turn into a vegetable after being in there for too long.
「山羊学派」专注于奇兽的繁殖和保护，但说白了，还不就是搞养殖的嘛……
The Caprist school focuses on the propagation and protection of bizarre beasts. But really, isn't that just simple breeding...?
还有「结绳学派」，那帮家伙排外得很，仗着自己是最早创立的学派，对谁都一副高高在上的姿态——简直恨不得在门口放个牌子，上书「不懂几何者与狗不得入内」！

And the Nodist school. Those guys are haughty exclusionists clinging on to their status as the first school to be founded, and turn their nose up on everyone else. They might as well hang a sign over their entrance that writes, "No dogs or geometrically-challenged people allowed!"
「敬拜学派」一天到晚就知道捣鼓仪式和钻研政治，弄出一堆乱七八糟的玩意，简直听得人头痛。
And all the Venerationist school knows is to fiddle with rituals and delve into politics all day, and create messy knick-knacks. They're a right headache.
还有「赤陶学派」那帮人，总嚷嚷什么「灵魂外无实体」、「存在即被感知」。有事没事就喜欢来个「信仰之跃」，不知摔残了多少学者。

And those Erythrokeramists going on about stuff like "there's no physical shell beyond the soul," "existence is to be perceived." And performing all those "leaps of faith" like they've got nothing better to do. Too many scholars have cracked their bones because of that.
至于「智种学派」…啧，姑且不论{RUBY_B#「智种学派」贤人}那刻夏{RUBY_E#}那些不敬神的疯言疯语，单就他那张嘴啊…为了你的身心健康着想，还是能离多远离多远吧。

As for the Nousporist school... Tsk, ignoring the blasphemous rantings of that {RUBY_B#Nousporist Sage}Anaxa{RUBY_E#} for now, just that yapper of his... For your own health, please stay far, far away from them.
怎么样，如此一番对比下来，果然我们「曳石学派」才是最好的选择吧！
How about it? Having compared them all, our Helkolithism is still the best, aren't we!
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
再会——散步有助于清醒地思考，有机会记得尝试一下啊！
Farewell. A walkabout helps with clearing your thoughts. Try it out when you get the chance!
知识应当是自由的，石板上的内容就应该无偿公开，藏私像什么话？哎，我说大家怎么就是不明白呢？

Knowledge should be free, and the contents on tablets should be made public without remuneration. Keeping it in a private collection, what nonsense is that? Bah, why can't everyone understand what I'm saying?
「嚷嚷」？怎么说话呢？我在宣讲我此生践行的瑟希斯之道！
Muttering? What're you talking about? I am proclaiming the path I have pursued my entire life, the way of Cerces!
在浴场演讲不太合适吧？
Not very appropriate to lecture at the bath, is it?
怎么会呢？ 浴池能让大家心平气和地坐在一块，这么好的地方，奥赫玛独此一家！
Not really? Everyone's calm and gathered in a bath. It's the most perfect place in all of Okhema!
简单介绍下，我叫尤利娅，是树庭的学者，现在是浴场的常客。我喜欢在这里跟普罗大众宣讲我一生信奉的瑟希斯之道。
An introduction is in order: I am Julia, a Grove scholar, and now a bath regular. I always enjoy the chance to regale everyone here about Cerces, the path to which I have devoted my life.
可惜，最近来听的人并不多，可能是大家都听过十几遍了。倒是你，我看你面生得很，是新来的吧，想不想听听我的惊世理论？

Alas, not many are willing to listen these days. Maybe because they've heard it dozens of times. But you, you're an unfamiliar face. You're new, aren't you? Care to listen to my mind-blowing theories?
好呀，我想听听有多「惊世」。
Sure, I'd like to know how "mind-blowing" they are.
哈哈，我刚才老远就看到你了，模样不凡，定是个聪明人，我果然没看错！
Haha, when I spotted you from afar just now, I thought you have an extraordinary energy — must be a clever person! I just knew I wasn't wrong!
算了吧，我对这些不感兴趣。
Hold it right there. I'm not interested in this stuff.
啧，我看你样貌不凡，没想到竟是和树庭那群老古板一样的庸人，真是可悲。
Tsk, you look like an extraordinary person, but you're just as intransigent as those old farts in the Grove. What a shame.
其实在浴场这儿，我最常讲的永远只有两个话题——一个是抱怨像我姐姐那样短视的家伙们，一个则是我的「知识开源论」。
In this bath, I only ever talk about two topics. One of them's complaining about short-sighted crooks like my elder sister, and the other is my Open-Source Knowledge Theory.
你别看树庭号称什么「智慧殿堂」，什么「瑟希斯庇佑的圣地」，其实都是些虚名。
The Grove may have monikers like the "Erudite Temple," "Cerces' Blessed Sanctuary" and whatnot, but they're all just lies.
石板上的内容要付费阅读，会议交流也要收费入场，普通居民根本没有接触这些知识的机会。
You have to pay to read the slates' contents, and it's paid admittance for meeting discussions. Ordinary citizens have no chance to even come into contact with such knowledge.
可你看看奥赫玛，泰坦的奇迹随处可见，凡人有什么资格收费？知识为什么要付费？法吉娜会对泉水收费吗？刻法勒会对光照收费吗？

But look at Okhema — the Titans' miracles can be seen throughout her streets. What right do mortals have to charge a fee? Why is knowledge behind a paywall? Would Phagousa charge for their springwater? Would Kephale make you pay to bask in its light?
所有知识都该对公众开放，你要是想从树庭学点什么，来找我，我会免费教你。让我姐姐那种拿学问谋利的家伙看看，真正的知识是怎么传播的！

All knowledge should be shared with the public. If there's anything you wish to learn from the Grove, just approach me, and I'll teach you everything free of charge. I'll show those selfish scholars like my sister how true knowledge should be disseminated!
知识为什么要付费？法吉娜会对泉水收费吗？又不是我姐姐那种…哦，是你啊。怎么，想来听我宣讲「知识开源论」了吗？
Why do I have to pay for knowledge? Would Phagousa charge for their springwater? It's not like it's my sister's... Oh, it's you. What's going on? Here to listen to my Open-Source Knowledge Theory?
Yes, can I speak with you?
当然，我又不是树庭的老古董，就知道故作姿态。我最喜欢和大家聊天了，灵感总是不经意地从日常闲聊中钻进我的脑子里。
Of course, I'm not some pretentious old fart from the Grove. I love talking to everyone. Inspiration always creeps in during the most surprising situations, like banter.
你是树庭学者，都研究什么？
What are you researching as a Grove scholar?
我的研究？哦，那可太宏大了！我主要研究泰坦思维与翁法罗斯世界法则的关系。你知道吗，整个奥赫玛，不，整个翁法罗斯都是泰坦思想的具现！

My research? Oh, it's so all-encompassing! I mainly study the relationship between Titanic thoughts and the natural laws of Amphoreus. Did you know that the whole of Okhema, nay, the whole of Amphoreus, is a manifestation of the Titanic thoughts?
比如说，我发现雅努斯的思维模式可能影响了整个世界的空间结构。你有没有注意到奥赫玛的建筑总是成对出现？这可能就是雅努斯双面性的体现！

For example, I noticed that Janus' mode of thought may have influenced the entire world's spatial structure. Have you noticed that Okhema's buildings always come in pairs? This could be an allusion to Janus' duality!
还有，我在研究如何通过解析欧洛尼斯的预言来预测黑潮走向。想象一下，如果成功了，我们就能知道哪里会被黑潮侵蚀，从而提前疏散民众！
Also, I am researching on how to forecast black tide movement by analyzing Oronyx's prophecies. If I succeed, we will know where the black tide will strike next, and evacuate the people in time!
可惜，现在研究陷入了瓶颈。都怪那些只顾眼前利益的人，整天要我做*实用*的研究，搞得我连最基础的冥想都做不好！

It's a pity that my research has hit a bit of a bottleneck. It's all the fault of those self-serving scoundrels who keep wanting me to conduct practical research. I can't even perform the most basic of meditations now!
学者怎么老是待在浴池里？
Why do scholars always stay in the baths?
哈！你以为我是在偷懒吗？大错特错！我告诉你，浴池就是我最好的研究场所！
Ha! You think I'm slacking off? Huge mistake! Lemme tell you: The bath is the best research lab I can find!
首先，这里的水直接来自受法吉娜祝福的泉眼。你能想象吗？每天都能浸泡在纯粹的神性中！我在这里冥想，试图理解法吉娜的思维方式。

First, the water here originates directly from springwater blessed by Phagousa. Can you imagine that? To be soaked in pure divinity on the daily! I am meditating here to try to understand Phagousa's thought process.
其次，你看看周围的人。形形色色的学者、工匠、甚至是黄金裔，他们都会来这里。我可以直接听到最新的学术动态，而不用被那些老顽固过滤信息。

Next, look at the people around. Scholars and craftsmen from all disciplines, even Chrysos Heirs, they all flock here. The latest academic trends are within earshot, unlike the watered-down information fed through a drip by those old fogeys.
最重要的是，这里是自由的！没有人管我，告诉我该研究什么，不该研究什么。我可以尽情地思考那些看似不着边际，但可能改变整个翁法罗斯的伟大理论！

Most importantly, this is the epitome of freedom! No one to stick it to me, tell me what I should be working on or otherwise. I can ruminate on the most far-fetched of concepts that may turn out to be grand theories that can change the whole Amphoreus!
所以，别以为我是在逃避工作。恰恰相反，我在这里做的研究，比在那个被世俗观念束缚的树庭里有意义多了！
So don't think I'm trying to avoid work here. Quite the contrary, I am conducting research that is far more meaningful than whatever is in the Grove, fettered by shackles of worldly sentiments!
你跟你姐姐到底怎么回事？
What's going on with you and your elder sister?
喔，你说维普萨尼娅？她现在管财务方面的事，我和她的理念完全不合，待在家里只会天天吵架。
Oh, you mean Vipsania? She manages the financial stuff, and our ideals couldn't be farther apart. We'll just bicker every day if we're both home.
她总说什么「控制经费」「缺乏实用性价值」。拜托！你想想艾格勒，它创造光明的时候，考虑过要解决奥赫玛的照明问题吗？
