All she talks about is "controlling the budget" and "lacks a practical value proposition." Oh, puh-lease! Was Aquila even thinking of Okhema's illumination problem when it created light?
我们姐妹俩的理念就是水火不容。她想把树庭变成一个解决日常问题的作坊，而我则要让它成为彻底开源的源泉，让翁法罗斯的每个人都能感受到瑟希斯的智慧！

Our philosophies are as opposite as fire and ice. She wants to turn the Grove into some workshop that can resolve everyday problems, while I want to turn it into a wellspring of openly shared knowledge, for everyone in Amphoreus to revel in Cerces' wisdom!
行吧，我也累了，今天在这儿宣讲了这么久，嘴巴都干了……
All right, I'm getting tired. I'm all parched from a long day of talking...
I've got to go. Talk to you later.
对了，差点忘记跟你说——以后你要是想从树庭学点什么，尽管来找我！记住我的话：知识应当是自由且免费的！这才是瑟希斯的精神！

Oh yes, almost forgot to tell you — if you want to learn anything from the Grove in the future, just look me up instead! Remember my words: Knowledge should be free of charge! This is what Cerces would want!
尤利娅，你又在这里发呆！
我才没发呆，这叫冥想研究！
I'm not daydreaming. This is called a meditation experiment!
别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!
别就知道钱钱钱的好吗，你的短视让瑟希斯蒙羞！
Can you stop talking about money all the time? Your shortsightedness brings shame to Cerces!
咳咳，这位朋友...要种子吗？
Ahem, hello there, friend... Want some seeds?
就是树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「种子」上，开放授权给特定的人群阅读。
Some research outcomes from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we have stored our efforts into special "seeds," and are granting permission to certain groups to read them.
You got a license for this?
什么呀，我这是树庭授权的正当生意，每到机缘月还要向元老院交税的。
What kind of question is that? This is officially authorized by the Grove, and I pay my taxes to the Council of Elders every Month of Fortune.
瞧你这一脸迷惑的模样，住在花园附近的居民们倒是见怪不怪了——你一定是新来奥赫玛不久吧？
You look bewildered, though it's a common sight to those living near the Garden. You must be new to Okhema?
自我介绍一下，我叫维普萨尼娅，是神悟树庭的财务官。不过现在嘛...就当我是个树庭知识的推销员吧…嗯，按我妹妹的话来说我就是「到处推销」。
Allow me to introduce myself: I am Vipsania, Grove of Epiphany Financial Officer. But now... just think of me as a Grove Knowledge salesperson... Mm, my sister would say I'm "peddling wares."
既然你刚到奥赫玛不久，你想买点「种子」带走吗？里面都是树庭的珍藏噢。怎么样，要不要来点？
Since you haven't been in Okhema for long, how would you like to take home some "seeds"? They're all precious treasures from the Grove. How about it, care for some?
当然！普通人或许做不到，但以泰坦的神力而言，这很难吗？我们也不过是沾了瑟希斯的光，得到了些余荫。
Of course! It may not be possible for ordinary people, but how hard can it be with the Titan's divinity? We've only been graced by Cerces' light, retaining slivers of their omniscience.
It's got an internet vibe to it!
啊？什么网？你是说万帷网吗？
Huh? What net? You mean the World Wound Web?
It's okay. I don't need any.
好吧好吧，最近我们有活动折扣，你既然不愿意那就算了…真可惜啊。
All right, fine. We've got a discount on right now. If you don't want some, don't worry about it... A pity.
对了，你知道神悟树庭吧？人们都说，我们那儿有着翁法罗斯数一数二的聪明人。不过你可别在意这些吹捧，归根结底，做学问的基础还是做实验。没钱没平台，再聪明也白搭。

Oh yes, you know of the Grove of Epiphany, yes? Everyone says that we house all the brightest minds in Amphoreus. But don't listen to all that horn-tooting. At its heart, experimentation builds the foundation of knowledge. Without money or platform, even the smartest scholar is a fool.
我可不是那种倒卖树庭资源的混蛋，我这都是定期捞取「沉没树种」，看看适不适合应用到我们生活中，有合适的才好放到市场来叫卖。

I'm not one of those scoundrels reselling Grove assets. These are Sunken Tree Seeds that I regularly procure to see if they help with our daily lives. Only successful product tests are sold on the market.
再说了，我这么做也是为了促进知识的传播嘛。瑟希斯的精神指引着我们，让我们把知识分享给更多的人——前提是信徒们不能餐风饮露活活饿死呀。

Moreover, I'm also promoting the spread of knowledge. Cerces' spirit guides us, for us to share their knowledge with even more people. Of course, their disciples must first be able to put food on their tables.
怎么样，想不想为奥赫玛的知识传播出份力？
How about it, do you want to contribute to spreading the knowledge of Okhema?
好，你可真爽快，等我检查下库存，我手头里可是有不少热门货呢——我记得有个能让庄稼产量翻倍，有个能处理生活污水的……

Great, you're decisive. Let me take a look at my stock. I do have quite a few popular products on hand. I remember there's something that can double crop yields and another that can treat household wastewater...
奇怪…传信石版怎么没动静了，我再检查下……
Strange... Why did the teleslate go silent? Let me double check...
糟了，传信石版有点问题，我和树庭那边没联系上。等修好了我再喊你，现在先把你放在预定名单里，抱歉抱歉……
Drats, there's something wrong with the teleslate. I didn't manage to link up with the Grove. I'll holler when I fix it, for now I'll put you on the reservation list, so sorry about that...
知识只会让我头疼，抱歉……
Knowledge only hurts my brain, sorry...
拒绝我推销的人很多，但这个理由我还是第一次听。难怪有些人总是领悟不了瑟希斯的精神，我现在有点头绪了。
Plenty have turned down my sales pitch, but this reason is a first. No wonder some people fail to grasp the spirit of Cerces — now I'm beginning to see why.
真是可惜，这么好的机会居然没做成生意。哎，都怪我没做好准备……
What a pity, such a great opportunity yet I failed to close a deal. Ah, it's all on me for not preparing...
今天晚点有上新，走过路过不要错过！哟，是你啊！怎么样，想来点「种子」吗？
New stocks going up on shelves tonight, don't let this slip by! Hey, it's you! What do you say, want to grab some "seeds"?
不过我得提前跟你打声招呼，可能是之前销量太好，树庭那边的传信石版有点问题，我现在还没联系上我的师门。
But I have to let you know in advance — there might be problems with the Grove's teleslate, perhaps due to how good sales were previously. I can't get in touch with my school.
所以现在是仅开放预售哈，还请见谅。
So, it's only for pre-sale now. Please bear with us.
不谈生意，能和你聊聊吗？
No business talk. Can we just chit-chat?
行啊，不谈生意就不谈呗，反正我现在也有空。你说话也好听，不像我妹妹，那么大个人了，说话就知道凶我，跟{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}亲临似的……

Sure, I've got time for some non-business talks. You sound nice too, unlike my younger sister — an adult by all accounts, but would only scowl at me like {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself is arriving...
哎呀，这可就多了去了。最近挺火的是有个能让植物在有风来时发出笑声的「种子」，是植物学家盖亚的贡献，条件并不苛刻，实践起来也挺有趣的。

Oh, we've got so many. Something's that quite popular recently is a "seed" that can make plants laughs in the wind. It's a contribution from the botanist Gaia. Doesn't require a lot of conditions and quite a fun experience in application.
至于其他的…什么类型的知识种子都有，这个得看我们树庭的学者们最近在研究什么了。
As for the others... We've got all kinds of Knowledge Seeds. It all depends on what our Grove scholars have been researching recently.
不过我会尽量从中选取一些实用性比较强的展示出来，这样才对得起我亲爱的顾客们嘛。免得买了一堆无用的垃圾，浪费钱不说，还影响心情。
But I'll try to pick some more practical ones to demonstrate. It's the least I can do for my beloved customers, lest they end up buying something useless, wasting their money and souring their moods.
Can you tell me about the "seeds"?
唔，这东西说来话长，我捡些简单易懂的内容跟你说道说道吧。
Mm, it's a long story. I'll pick out some less-complicated stuff to explain to you.
种子其实就是我们树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「知识树」上，攫取其成熟的果实。
Seeds are actually some research outcome from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we stored our efforts in a special "Knowledge Tree," then harvest its ripened fruit.
通过特定的操作，可以在传信石版上开放授权给指定的人浏览。至于这背后的原理，除了瑟希斯的赐福之外，和树庭多年来传承的技术也有关系。具体原理太过复杂，我就不跟你赘述了。

By employing certain methods, we can authorize a specific individual to browse our teleslate. As for the underlying principles, apart from Cerces' blessing, it's also to do with the techniques passed down by the Grove for many years. The exact details are really complex, so I won't bother you with them.
至于我，我啊，就是把这些高深莫测的知识整理成大家能看懂的东西，然后再反哺树庭的开支。说白了，就是把知识变成钱，再把钱变成更多知识。

As for me, well, I organize this profound knowledge into something that everyone can understand, then support the Grove's expenses with the money. In simpler terms, it's turning knowledge into money, and that money into even more knowledge.
你和你妹妹关系还好吗？
Are you on good terms with your younger sister?
你还真是细心，我不过随口抱怨了几句你这都能听出来啊……
You sure are perceptive. I was just venting casually, but you immediately caught on...
哎，我们小时候关系很好，长大了就不行了。她和我虽然同样是树庭的一份子，但观念上…只能说分歧很大。
*sigh* We were very close as kids, but not after we grew up. We may both be from the Grove, but in terms of perspective... I can only say that we don't see eye to eye.
她觉得一切知识都要免费开放，这才符合瑟希斯的精神。但理想和生活总归是两件事，我们普通人呢，还是得考虑下生活与做学问的成本才行啊……

She thinks all knowledge should be openly shared for free, which is Cerces' philosophy. But ideals and real life are totally different concepts. Ordinary folk like us still have to consider the costs of living and pursuing knowledge...
可惜，她就是太理想化了，为这些事，和我见面就吵架。我能怎么办呢，我是姐姐，总得让着她一些…等她过几年成熟点了或许就懂我的苦心了吧。

It's sad. She's just too idealistic, and constantly fights with me on these matters. What can I do? I'm the elder sister, so I have to give in to her... She'll understand what I'm trying to do when she's a bit older.
I've got to go. Talk to you later.
好，我也得忙我的工作去了。
Okay, I have to get back to work too.
对了，你要是有什么想学的，可以随时来找我 ，我看看能不能帮你从万帷网上搞点「种子」下来。毕竟，知识就是力量。而我这儿，可是有最直接的力量来源呢！

Oh yeah, if you have anything you wish to learn, you can look for me anytime. I'll see if I can help you acquire some "seeds" from the World Wound Web. After all, knowledge is power. And I am your direct source to this power!
嗝…这么盛大的日子，当然要来一杯…嗝，鲜血蜜酿了。敬欧利庞王和他的勇士们！
*hic*... Such a momentous day, of course we must have a drink with... *hic* sanguine honey brew. Praise King Eurypon and his warriors!
别在意…嗝，我喝得太快了。庆典上的鲜血蜜酿果然甘美非凡。虽然只是石榴汁，但在庆典上喝总会激发出不一样的味道。

Don't mind me... *hic* I just drank too quickly. The sanguine honey brew at the celebration is sweet as nectar itself. It may just be pomegranate juice, but it surely evokes a different flavor when drank at a feast.
是啊…嗝，悬锋勇士指定饮品。虽然只是石榴汁，但在庆典上喝总会激发出不一样的味道，甘美非凡。
Yes... *hic* The designated beverage of Kremnos warriors. It may just be pomegranate juice, but drinking it at a feast brings out an extraordinarily sweet flavor within.
真正的悬锋战士就该痛饮鲜血！…不过像我这样的人没什么机会踏上战场，只能用蜜酿来替代了。
True Kremnos warriors should slake their thirst in blood! ...But for someone like me who'd never get a chance to step foot on the battlefield, I'll have to make do with this honey brew.
这东西能活络身心，补血化瘀。不管有伤没伤，每天来上一杯准没错。待会儿等你参与完试炼，我也帮你准备一杯——如果你能活着出来的话，哈哈！

This stuff invigorates both body and mind, enriches your blood and improves its circulation. Wounds or no, you can't go wrong with a cup a day. When you're done with the trial, I'll help you prep a cup too — if you make it out alive, that is. Haha!
喝下这杯鲜血秘酿…嗝…拥抱荣耀与力量吧！
Drink this sanguine honey brew... *hic* ...and embrace glory and strength!
I still have some more questions...
可以，但是…嗝…我说话可能比较慢，你得耐心。
Sure, but... *hic* My speech is a little impaired, so do be patient.
为什么管石榴汁叫鲜血？
Why do you call pomegranate juice fresh blood?
你是说鲜血蜜酿？哈哈…嗝…告诉你一个吓人的秘密——以前这玩意可不是石榴做的。是真是假我不知道。
You mean this sanguine honey brew? Haha... *hic* ...Lemme tell you a horrifying secret — this stuff didn't use to be made from pomegranates, though I wouldn't know if this was true.
现在我们喝的蜜酿是法吉娜信徒的手笔。当年尼卡多利被法吉娜羞辱，便勒令它献上城邦居民的鲜血，不然就亲手去取……

The honey brew we're drinking now is a creation of Phagousa's disciples. Back when Nikador was humiliated by Phagousa, the former ordered the latter to offer their citizens' blood as an apology, or they'd personally drain the blood from the people...
法吉娜的生性并不残暴。作为替代，它向尼卡多利献上与鲜血颜色相近的石榴汁，借由信徒之手发放给了每一个悬锋城人…嗝，确实好喝。仔细想想，真正的鲜血应该又腥又咸吧……

Phagousa's nature isn't so brutal. In replacement, they gave Nikador pomegranate juice which looked a lot like blood, and had their disciples distribute them into the hands of everyone in Castrum Kremnos... *hic* This sure is tasty. When you think about it, actual blood probably tastes all fishy and salty, no...?
总之，尼卡多利品尝了那带有神力的佳酿，感到十分满意，便以蜜酿的制作工艺为条件，收回了对法吉娜城邦的惩戒。

Anyway, Nikador had a sip of this fine brew imbued with divinity, expressed utter satisfaction, and rescinded the punishment on Phagousa's city, with knowledge of the honey brew's production as a condition.
后来悬锋人对配方加以改进，才有了今天我们喝到的口味，就连那些法吉娜信徒都没法完全复刻！
The Kremnoans later improved upon this recipe, turning it into what we drink today. Even Phagousa's disciples can't get its flavor down completely!
…唉，那会儿的尼卡多利是多么英明神武，仅靠矛尖一指就能屈人之兵。再看现在……
...*sigh* Back then, Nikador was so valiant and mighty, able to subdue entire armies with just their spear tip. But now...
You sure you're fine drinking so much?
没事~即便这蜜酿蕴含法吉娜的赐福，最多也只会让人沉溺，不至于醉倒……
I'm awright... Even if this honey brew was blessed by Phagousa, it'll only keep one heartily indulged without any of the drunkenness...
何况对悬锋战士来说，肚量也是战斗力的一部分——英雄不光要能打，还要能喝，不然怎么撑得过庆功宴！
And to a Kremnos Warrior, a belly's capacity is also part of battle ability — heroes must be good at both fighting and drinking! How else would we last through the victory banquet!
再告诉你一个小秘密吧：咱们的王储也爱喝石榴汁。他还总喜欢往里面加奶，弄得粉粉的，可滑稽了！你别往外传啊……

I'll tell you another little secret: Our crown prince loves pomegranate juice, too. He usually prefers adding milk to it to get it all pinky. It's hilarious! Don't tell anyone else about this, though...
I'm leaving. Don't drink too much.
小意思，一会儿还能再喝一杯呢。
It's fiiiine. I can still have another cup.
免费的肉片麦粥，每人一份，自主领取！
Free meat n' wheat porridge, one for everyone, come get yours!
哟，这位勇士，看你面相年轻，想必也是来参加王的试炼吧？
Ooh, you look rather young, warrior. I suppose you're here to join the King's Trial?
踏进试炼场之前，得先填满肚子才行。来，把这个吃了暖暖身子吧。
You have to fill up your belly before stepping into the trial ground. Come, eat this and warm yourself up.
老者向你递来一碗糊状物，表面浮着一大片薄切的叉烧肉。
The old man hands you a bowl of mush with a thin slice of barbecued pork set over it.
你吃下了那碗粥，味道不算好，油脂很重，但饱腹感强——想来非常适合重体力劳动的士兵。
You finish the porridge. It doesn't taste great. The oil's too heavy, but it's filling — perfect for a soldier engaged in heavy labor, when you think about it.
怎样，是不是感觉力量从脚底板涌上了额头？这可是老奥卢斯特别调制的配方，保准你吃一顿热乎一整天。
How was it, ya feel your strength surging from your soles to your head? This is Old Aulus' special recipe, guaranteed to power you through the day with just one hearty meal.
祭典结束后，我会举办一场规模盛大的宴会。要是你能待到那时候，记得来捧场啊。
When the festival ends, I'll be hosting a huge feast. If you can stay around till then, don't forget to come by.
空腹会让你的战斗力下降七成，务必吃饱了再上战场。
An empty stomach will reduce your combat effectiveness. You have to take to the field on a full belly.
I want to chat with you.
虽然闲聊不是我的工作，但为勇士提供精神食粮是——说吧。
Banter isn't part of my job, but providing spiritual food for warriors is. What'd you need?
What does a food provisions officer do?
哈哈——顾名思义，当然是负责管理和筹备军粮了。不过这可不是个容易的活。
Haha... As the name suggests, it's managing and stocking up on military supplies, of course. But it's no easy feat.
曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「兵马未动，粮草先行。」何况战争又是最马虎不得的，一点纰漏都会导致一场大败。
There was once a sage who said this: "The grain moves before the army does." You can't afford any mistakes in war. The slightest misstep will cause a crushing defeat.
军粮最重要的就是补充体力。我试过许多方法，最后都比不上提高含荤量——加入大块的肉。问题在于肉源从哪里找。

The most important thing about supplies is that it replenishes energy. I've tried many ways, but nothing works better than increasing the quantity of meat within, especially adding large pieces of meat. The problem is where to get this meat.
大地兽是重要的劳力，不能随意宰杀，因此我把目光投向了云羊和角猪——士兵们都说前者的味道更好，让我多用它做，但角猪的出肉量更高。

Dromases are an essential labor force, and we can't slaughter them needlessly. So I've got my sights on cloudsheep and hornswine — the troops say the former tastes better, and want me to use it more, but hornswines yield more meat.
士兵毕竟不是来餐馆点菜的顾客，有时也不能太顺着他们，对吧？
I mean, soldiers aren't customers ordering food at a diner, so I can't always cater to them, can I?
Interesting stories of a food provisions officer?
趣事？那就不得不提之前对奥赫玛的战争中，悬锋军遭遇断粮的事了。
Interesting stories? I must talk about the war on Okhema last time, when the Kremnoan army ran into a food shortage.
在追击敌军时，我们正中了敌人的圈套，粮道也被切断。吃完手头的全部存粮后，大伙眼巴巴地看着我，觉得我肯定有办法搞到食物。

We walked right into an enemy trap while pursuing their troops, and our supply line got cut off. After finishing all the food we had left, everyone just stared at me, certain that I had some way to get my hands on some food.
我虽然心里没底，但也不能打击士气，就抱着试试看的想法四处闲逛，没想到阴差阳错地溜到了奥赫玛的营帐附近——可能他们看我不像个战士吧。

I wasn't too confident, but I wasn't about to demoralize them. So I wandered around to see if I could think of anything. Who'd thought, I somehow ended up nearby the Okhema camp — I probably didn't look like a soldier to them.
离开之前，我顺手牵走了三头角猪，那天晚上的全肉宴是我这辈子最愉快的一顿饭。我喂饱了许多人，也救了许多人。
Before I left, I hauled three hornswine by the reins out of their camp. That night at the all-meat buffet was the most fulfilling meal of my life. I fed a whole bunch of people, and saved them too.
至于可怜的奥赫玛人，他们的生产水平很高，几头角猪算不上什么损失——我还留了借条呢。
As for the poor Okhemans, they've got a rich production line. A few hornswines mean nothing to them. I even left an IOU.
Let's leave it there for now.
You feel more lively? That's good then.
嗯，好好吃饭，身体才能撑得住。
Good. You need to, or your body won't last.
敲击，呐喊，欢呼…瞧瞧这地方，气氛多么热闹啊。你也是来参加祭典的勇士吗？
Knocking, shouting, cheering... Just look at this place. Such a lively vibe. You're a warrior here to join the festival too?
That's right. I'm the warriorest of warriors.
这样啊，也好…我是没胆也没能力去为了荣耀拼杀，我还想多活两年呢。
I see, that's good too... I haven't the guts nor ability to spill blood in the name of glory. I still want to live a couple more years.
总之，不管你打不打算追求荣耀之死，都祝你每天过得开心——我觉得这才是最重要的。
Anyway, whether you intend to pursue glory unto death, I wish you happiness every day — I think that's what's most important.
宁战死…咳，还是别战死了。本分地活着才是幸运啊。
To pursue death in battle... Ahem, better not die at all. Living your part, that's what fortune should be like.
I want to chat with you.
聊天？也好，就当消磨时间了……
A chat? Sure, I've got time to kill...
How're you doing on the battlefield?
上战场？我为什么要做那种事，主动加班？加班费谁来付？
The battlefield? Why would I do something like that? Volunteering for overtime? Who's paying for that?
但你别说，我还真上过战场。先前对奥赫玛发起的特别行动中，欧利庞王征发了所有的士兵…我也只能被迫跟着去了。
Though I have deployed before. In that special operation against Okhema, King Eurypon mobilized the entire army... I was forced to tag along.
至于表现…这么跟你说吧，悬锋城的士兵总共分为三种人：鲁莽者、勇敢者和犹豫者，而我是第四种——怯懦者。
As for how I did... I'll just break it down for you — there are three kinds of soldiers in Castrum Kremnos: The brash, the brave, and the balky. And I'm the fourth kind: The craven.
前面几种人要么被狂热冲昏头脑，要么有丰富的作战经验，要么在恐惧和自责之间纠结；而我用影子作为武器打击敌人，一战下来不造半点杀孽……

The first few kinds are either fanatically insane, or brimming with battle experience, or struggling between terror and self-reproach. Me? I use shadows as my weapon to strike at the enemy, leaving nary a drop of blood when I fight...
咳咳…总之，于我而言，战争只是一种加班，被许诺的报酬是荣耀而非金钱。既然如此，何必那么卖力呢？我只是个卫兵，不是英雄。
Ahem... Anyway, war is just a form of overtime to me, and its compensation in glory instead of currency. If that's the case, why work so hard? I'm just some guard, not a hero.
怎么，你也想当卫兵？听我一句劝——再理想的工作，时间长了也会让人生厌。
Why, you want to be a guard too? Here's a word of advice: Even the most ideal of jobs will become a grind after a while.
你看我，每天除了站岗还是站岗。就像把一块石头推上山坡，眼睁睁看着它滚落回来，然后再推上去……
Look at me, it's either guard duty or guard duty for me. Like pushing a rock up a hill, and then watching helplessly as it rolls back toward you, and then pushing it back up again...
要不是家里人说当兵吃香，硬拉着我过来报名，我才不在这风吹日晒呢…虽说确实比在外拼杀好些吧。

If it weren't for my family saying that you'd be fed in the army and dragging me along to sign up, I wouldn't even be standing here getting my face blasted by wind and shine... Though this is somewhat better than the frontline.
千言万语汇作一句话：给人打工就要做好预期管理。卫兵这活没机会出人头地，但也没有突然暴毙的风险，算是符合我的预期——对你来说就未必了。

Long story short: You need to manage your expectations if you're going to work for someone. There's no organizational ladder to climb as a guard, but there's also no risk of sudden death, so it's perfect in line with my expectations. I don't think it's the same for you, though.
好，接下来我自己找点办法消磨时间……
All right, I'll find some other way to kill time next...
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
再见，希望你也能愉快地度过每一天。
Goodbye, I hope you live every day with joy.
就这样吧，你以后要是改主意了，可以随时来找我。知识就应该是公开的，免得说我不给你机会。
We'll leave it at that. You can seek me out if you change your mind. Knowledge should be shared, so don't say I didn't give you a chance.
Can you tell me what you've discovered?
Sorry, I'm a little busy here...
好吧，那也没办法。但要是有兴趣的话，可以随时来找我聊天。
Alright, that's that then. But if you're ever interested, you can stop by here for a chat with me.
我很乐意与阁下分享我的最新发现。
I'd be delighted to share my latest discoveries with you, esteemed outlander.
哎，你有所不知，外界总喜欢传些不着调的谣言，什么我能看到奥赫玛的过去啦，我的眼睛因为受泰坦的赐福而不堪重负啦。
Oh, you might not be aware, but there are all sorts of wild rumors out there. People say I can see into Okhema's past, or that my eyes bear the heavy gift of a Titan's blessing.
一块晶体静静地漂浮在空中，不知是什么时候冒出来的。
A crystal floats by silently in midair. Goodness knows when it first appeared.
(Give it a tap with your bat)
下一秒，一股奇妙的感觉在你胸中弥散，仿佛扑面而来的海潮。你想起了在翁法罗斯经历的一切，以及曾在这里见证的那些、不存在的回忆。

In the next second, a strange feeling spreads across your chest, like a rising tide smacking you in the face. You remember everything you experienced in Amphoreus and those non-existent memories that you witnessed there.
当记忆的潮水退去，你发觉几块碎晶静静地躺在手心，通透、明亮。难道这就是「命运的馈赠」？
When the tide of memories subsides, you discover a few shattered crystal shards lying motionlessly in your hand, clear and bright. Is this a "gift of destiny"?
和往常一样，「命运」再次给出了馈赠。等到胸中的澎湃散去后，几块碎晶静静地躺在你手心。
As usual, "destiny" has delivered you another gift. Once the surge in your chest has died down, a few pieces of shattered crystal lie motionlessly in your hand.
是谁从过往的长河中将它们打捞上岸？这个问题恐怕没法被轻易回答。
Who salvaged them from the long river of the past? Unfortunately, that's a question that isn't easy to answer.
晶体表面的光芒变得暗淡。它静静地漂浮在空中，任你如何敲打都无动于衷。
The light on the crystal's surface dims. It floats before you quietly, resistant to any taps or knocks.
据说欧洛尼斯曾创造六个月亮，并在第七日被法吉娜灌醉，翁法罗斯一周的循环由此定下…或许在新的一周开始时，它会重新焕发光芒。

Legend has it that Oronyx created six moons before being plied with liquor on the seventh day by Phagousa, thereby creating the Amphoreus weekly cycle... Perhaps after the start of a new week, it will regain its luster and shine again.
这是我和丹恒以前在浴宫生活的片段，没想到还能再看见。这里的记忆浓度可真高啊……
These are memories from when I lived with Dan Heng in the bath chamber. I never thought I'd see them again. The memories here are incredibly vivid...
奥赫玛总是这么亮，不知道丹恒为什么能睡得那么好。
Okhema is always so bright, I can't understand how Dan Heng manages to sleep so soundly.
希望离开翁法罗斯之后，我也能记得在这里的时光。
I hope that I can still hold onto these memories even after I leave Amphoreus.
我们已经在这里住了多久呢……
Has it been that long since we moved in here?
或许我也该像丹恒那样，搞几本书来看。
Perhaps I should pick up some books and read, just like Dan Heng did.
毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。

There is no doubt about it. The giant wooden prop before you is one you recognize from an old story. Its head raised high in the sky and room in its stomach for several people — it has all the familiar characteristics you expect.
呜——困死了，究竟是谁在外面吵。让我看看，这是传到哪了…你是谁啊，找我什么事？
Wooo... I'm so tired. Who on earth is making all that ruckus outside? Let me see where this has gone out to... Who are you, and what do you want from me?
How come you're hiding inside a wooden horse?
…我？奥赫玛的住民竟无知到这般地步，连「雅努斯之驹」的名号都未曾听过吗？哼哼，刻法勒号称全知全能，信奉者却如此孤陋寡闻，你真是不称职呐。

...Me? Are the citizens of Okhema so foolish that they've never even heard of Janus' Steed? Hmph, Kephale claims to be all-knowing and all-powerful, yet their followers sure don't know a thing. Incompetence!
自雅努斯为天地划定界限起，我们便侍奉在左右，打开通道，传达神谕。神驹身负使命，奔走在翁法罗斯的各处，难道你就从来没遇见过？

Ever since Janus carved the boundary between heaven and earth, we have been there serving, opening passages, and delivering prophesies. Have you never seen a divine foal cantering about Amphoreus on their missions?
你详细讲述了与其余木马相遇的经过，以及故事的最终结局。
You describe in great detail your encounter with the other wooden horses, including how the story ultimately ended.
…是么。随着时间流逝，神驹的灵智也会逐渐磨损，你遇见的，或许只是具空壳。我们活得很久了，久得就像是扇年久失修的铁门。

...Hmm. As time passes, the sentience of the divine foals will gradually dwindle away, and what you saw may have been a husk of its former self. We have lived for many a year, comparable to than an old neglected iron gate that creaks on its hinges.
锈迹堵塞了锁眼，就再也打不开了。唉，神驹…难道就只剩我了吗？
The keyhole is rusted over, and it can no longer be unlocked. *sigh* O, divine foals... Am I really the only one left?
那就去问，去找，而不是傻傻地站在这里：你是谁呀？…这样有意思吗？
Then go out. Ask around. Find them. Don't stand here and ask ignorant questions like "Who are you." Is that fun?
算了，多余的话暂且不提。既然我遇见了你，还是按流程来吧——钥匙与门天然成对，想得到门后的内容，必须拿相应的物件来适配。

Forget it, I won't say anything unnecessary for now. Seeing as we've now met, let's just follow due process... Keys and gates are paired up, and if you want what's behind a gate, you'll have to match it with the corresponding object.
就是那个…从时空的溪流中采撷而来的「记忆」，你有吗？
It's the... "Memory" plucked out of the stream of time. Do you have it?
不错，需要的就是这个。神驹得到了满足，将为你打开雅努斯的大门。
Great, that's what I need. The divine foal has been satisfied, and will open up the gate of Janus for you.
那你就走吧，找不到钥匙的人，不得入此门！
Then you should leave. If you can't find the key, you're not allowed inside!
钥匙与门天然成对，想得到门后的内容，就必须拿相应的物件来适配。
Keys and gates are paired up, and if you want what's behind a gate, you'll have to match it with the corresponding object.
就是那个…从时空的溪流中采撷而来的「记忆」，你有吗？
It's the... "Memory" plucked out of the stream of time. Do you have it?
不错，需要的就是这个。神驹得到了满足，将为你打开雅努斯的大门。
Great, that's what I need. The divine foal has been satisfied, and will open up the gate of Janus for you.
当然有。神驹能前往世界各处，为你取来想要的东西——只要付得起价钱。
Of course. Divine foals can travel the world and bring you whatever you need — so long as you can pay the price.
够了，我现在就去做准备。心怀对雅努斯的敬意，然后安静等待吧。
Enough. I am going to make my preparations. Cherish Janus in your heart, and wait here quietly.
神驹能前往世界各处，为你取来想要的东西——但总得给我足够的时间啊。别急别急，待到门扉彻底闭合之时，自然会有结果。
Divine foals can travel the world and bring you whatever you need — but I need enough time. Don't be impatient and hold on until the gate has closed completely. You'll get your result.
I want to chat to you.
说说呗，虽然你的见识很少，思想也不够深刻，但总能帮我解解闷不是？
Speak. You may be short of intellect and have no profound ideas to speak of, but at least you can help me pass away the time, hmm?
自雅努斯为天地划定界限起，我们便侍奉在它左右。若雅努斯是那至高的「万径之门」，我们便是有形的「门」——为它打开通道，传达神谕。

Ever since Janus carved the boundary between heaven and earth, we have been there serving by their side. If Janus is the holiest "Gate of Infinity," then we are the physical "gates" — We open the way for them and pass on the prophecies.
「门」的种类无穷尽，有的连通区域，有的跨越时空，有的分隔内外，也有的…只需要一把小小的钥匙便能为你带来惊喜。
There are endless types of "gates" out there, with some connecting areas, some linking spacetime, some separating inside from outside, and some... Just need one small key to deliver a big surprise.
「门」即是联结。你和我在此相遇，也是种联结。懂了吗？
"Gates" are connections. You and I meeting here is also a connection and a bond. Do you understand?
随着时间流逝，神驹的灵智也会逐渐磨损。或是遭受误导，迷失在无尽的旅途之中；或是彻底消失，成为徒有其名的空壳。
As time passes, the sentience of a divine foal will gradually erode. Or it may be misled and get lost in an endless journey. Or perhaps it might vanish completely, becoming a husk of its former self.
自分别起，我已经很久没见过其余同伴了。神驹…难道就只剩我了吗？
It's been an age since we separated, and I saw them last. O, divine foals... Am I really the only one left?
为什么你需要记忆残晶？
Why do you need Memory Crystal Shards?
哼，欧洛尼斯与雅努斯从来不可分割，记忆既在时间上接续，也可以在空间上并存，那些碎片中存留的权能超乎你的想象。
Hmph, Oronyx and Janus have always been inseparable. Memories are connected through time and coexist spatially in space. Those shards contain authority beyond your wildest imagination.
至于收集这些的缘由…时机到了，雅努斯自会让你知晓。
As for the reason behind collecting all these... When the time comes, Janus will let you know.
I don't have any more questions.
那你就走吧，找不到钥匙的人，不得入此门！
Then you should leave. If you can't find the key, you're not allowed inside!
哼，神秘商品——门扉后的怪兽。你似乎购买了很了不得的东西啊。
Hmph, a mystery item — the monster behind the gate. You seem to have bought something rather amazing.
光芒散去后，一只可爱又奇特的生物出现在了你面前！
As the light dims, a cute but strange creature appears before you!
没有人知道门后究竟隐藏着什么。但看来，雅努斯愿意赐福于你。
Nobody knows what lies beyond that gate, but it looks as though Janus is willing to bless you.
带它回去吧。从现在起，这只小奇美拉就属于你了。
Take it with you. Henceforth, this wee chimera belongs to you.
出乎意料的结果…你原本还想和这匹木马理论一番，但小奇美拉已经黏上了你，还是先把它安置在你的私人浴场里吧。
An unexpected outcome... You were going to argue against the wooden horse, but this little chimera is already glued onto you — so let's stash it in our private bath for the time being.
见到你，奇美拉似乎很开心，但现在的你根本听不懂它究竟想表达些什么，只能简单陪它玩了会，直到它的精力耗尽。
Your chimera seems happy enough to see you, but you cannot understand what it's trying to say right now. All you can do is play a while with it until it is completely sapped of energy.
「扎格列斯之手」挡在你面前，你试着推了推它，但它就和列车上的某些门一样纹丝不动。还是去找<color=#f29e38ff>操作石台</color>吧。
The Hand of Zagreus impedes your path. You try to push it, but it is unyielding, just like certain doors on the Express. Best that you find the <color=#f29e38ff>stone operating platform</color>.
到底是什么原理才能让它在空中悬停的？或许应该先研究一下它的<color=#f29e38ff>操作石台</color>。
Why and how is it suspended in midair? Maybe you should investigate its <color=#f29e38ff>stone operating platform</color>.
坚硬稳固的木箱，但是经不住「扎格列斯之手」<color=#f29e38ff>冲拳</color>的冲击。
A sturdy wooden box, but still not sturdy enough to endure a <color=#f29e38ff>Punch</color> from the Hand of Zagreus.
哼，神秘商品——法吉娜的圣兽。拿去吧，好好放在你的房间里。
Hmph. A mysterious item... the sacred beast of Phagousa. You should take it and put it on display in your room.
这似乎是个合适的位置，正好用来摆放你从那匹木马手中买来的神秘商品——虽然你还不知道箱子里装着的究竟是什么。要拆开看看吗？
This looks like a suitable place to put the mysterious object you bought from the wooden horse... Though you still have no idea what is inside this crate. Do you want to tear it open and see?
你满心期待地拆开了箱子，出现在眼前的是……
With great anticipation, you tear open the crate and find...
好吧，你记得曾有人称呼这个物种为「法吉娜的圣兽」。将神圣形象的玩偶摆放在房间里，说不定会有好事发生呢？
Alright. You recall someone referring to this species as "the divine beasts of Phagousa." Maybe placing a doll of a divine image in your room will bring good things your way?
巨大的海豹玩偶，看起来就很柔软的样子。面对毛茸茸的物体，没有人能忍住抱上去的冲动。所以，你打算——
A giant seal doll that looks very soft to the touch. When faced with something this fluffy, no one can resist the urge to squeeze it tight. So, you...
好吧，你的坚定意志取得了胜利。不过，这样的战斗对你来说有什么好处呢？
Alright, your iron will wins this round. But does winning a battle like this actually benefit you in any way?
你将海豹玩偶抱在了怀中，充分感受着绒毛的舒适与温暖。睡意混合着幸福的错觉，渐渐从你的脑海深处蔓延开来……
You embrace the seal doll in your arms and lose yourself in the comfort and warmth of its fur. Drowsiness and an illusion of happiness begin to slowly sprout from the depths of your mind...
你舒舒服服地在浴池里享受了片刻的安宁。
You enjoy a wonderful moment of peace and quiet in the baths.
…不愧是「法吉娜的圣兽」！仅凭触碰便足以令人心醉神迷，你充分领略到了它的神奇。
...This is exactly what you'd expect from a "sacred beast of Phagousa!" Just a touch is enough to enchant you. You immediately come to understand its mysterious powers.
但毫无疑问，你很愿意再多来几次。
There is no doubt in your mind that you want to come back here again.
环境扫描完成！正在建立房间数据模型...权限归属确认：{NICKNAME}。
Room scan completed! Setting up room details... Authorization confirmed: {NICKNAME}.
啊，我是不是该先自我介绍来着？抱歉抱歉，和你一起经历了那么多事，我都忘了还要正式介绍自己了。
Ah, perhaps I should have introduced myself? Sorry about that, after everything we've been through, I forgot the formalities.
我是来自黑塔空间站的XS<unbreak>-9527</unbreak>，不过现在更喜欢别人像姬子小姐那样叫我「{NICKNAME}的小助理」。
My designation is XS<unbreak>-9527</unbreak> from the Herta Space Station, but these days I'm going by "{NICKNAME}'s assistant," much like Miss Himeko does.
你喊我小助理就好——至于原因，我只能说绝对不是因为「小呆呆」、「小呆呆<unbreak>123</unbreak>」，还有「天才」和「天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>」这几个名字都被抢注了！

You can just refer to me as "assistant" — and no, it's definitely not because names like "Dumb-Dumb," "Dumb-Dumb<unbreak>123</unbreak>," "Genius," and "Genius<unbreak>123</unbreak>" were all already taken!
Why do you talk so much?
尊重！这不叫话痨，这叫人工智能！
Show some respect! I'm not being talkative — it's just me having Artificial Intelligence!
之前跟你出外勤，收集到了足够多的训练数据，所以功能上也有一些升级……
After our last field operation, I gathered enough data to upgrade some functions...
感觉你和之前不太一样了…
You've changed a bit, haven't you?
因为跟你一起收集到了足够多的训练数据，功能也做了升级……
Thanks to all the training data we've gathered together, I've been able to enhance my functions.
目前我觉得最大的变化是——我开始有了自己的想法，就像现在，我可不想这么扫兴地跑去扫地，我只想陪着你。
The biggest change I've noticed — I've started forming my own thoughts. Like now, I don't want to just sweep floors in this dreary mood, I'd rather stay here with you.
啊！差点忘了，我得给你汇报一下这次升级的新功能，这些是列车和空间站为你量身定制的——
Ah! I almost forgot I need to update you on the new features from this upgrade, tailored just for you by the Express and space station...
首先是生活助理模式，我可以为你打扫房间，整理杂物。在有足够食材的情况下，也可以为你做饭。
First up, "Life Assistant" mode. I can tidy your room and manage clutter. If we have the right ingredients, I can cook for you too.
然后是通讯助手模式，目前我储存了空间站的通讯录，可以帮你接收空间站的讯息，记录重要留言，在对方同意的情况下与空间站远程连线。

Then there's the "Communication Assistant" mode. I've got the space station's directory loaded up, ready to handle incoming messages, save important ones, and facilitate remote connections upon approval.
再就是阅读模式，包含相册与私人文件，可以随时查阅。
Don't forget "Reading" mode, which includes access to albums and private files at any time.
像空间站的阿德勒科员，就托我给你带句话，他说他放弃对空间站怪谈的研究了，有份手稿——我检查过，是影印的复制品——要交给你。

Adler, a researcher from the space station, asked me to pass on a message. He's halted his research on the station's ghost tales and has a manuscript for you — it's a photocopy, which I've already verified.
除此以外…工程师还给我加了个唱歌功能…天杀的，这是谁提的需求？
Besides that, the engineers gave me a singing function... Seriously, whose idea was that?
咳咳，从我目前的语音模块工艺水平来看，我建议你没事不要启动这个功能。
Cough, considering the current state of my voice production module, I'd advise against using this feature unless absolutely necessary.
好了，我得更新下数据，根据你的情况做点个性化调整。你有需要的话再喊我吧。
Alright, I need to refresh the data and tweak some settings tailored to your needs. Just give me a shout if you need anything.
数据已经更新到最新版本啦，欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}！有什么可以帮你的吗？
Data has been updated to the latest version, welcome back, {NICKNAME}! Is there anything I can help you with?
在你来之前就完成过啦，先扫后拖，地面光溜溜的就跟我的小脸一样。清洁工具也交还给列车长啦。
I finished cleaning before you arrived — swept and mopped, the floor is as smooth as my interface. All cleaning tools have been returned to the train conductor.
需要烹饪的话——列车长说，建议不要在房间内明火烹饪，你有需要的话最好出去找列车长交涉哦？我可不想在充电的时候被怒气冲冲的帕姆拔电源……
Regarding cooking — the conductor advises against cooking in the room. If you need to cook, it might be best to negotiate with the conductor. I wouldn't want Pom-Pom to shut my power down in a fit...
哇！你的语音信箱差点被塞爆了，你筛选下要先听谁的留言吧？我已经按照星图地区给你做好分类啦！
Wow, your voicemail is nearly full! Why not sort through and decide whose messages to listen to first? I've organized them by astral regions for easy access.
顺便小声说下，根据空间站管理条例，我这边没拿到他人的声源授权，所以不能直接模仿他们的声音哦，所有内容将由本助理为你朗读！
Just a heads-up, space station regulations prevent me from mimicking other people's voices without authorization, so I'll be reading all messages in my own voice.
Checking messages from the Space Station.
「{NICKNAME}，可惜太忙了不然等你回空间站的时候，我请你喝下午茶！你都不知道，现在科室里的新人都说我温柔体贴...这还真得感谢你的特训呢！」

"{NICKNAME}, I wish I wasn't so slammed with work, I'd invite you for tea when you dock back at the space station. Believe it or not, all the rookies here think I'm super kind! Credit goes to your expert training!"
「唯一的问题是——每天都要跟大家社交，光是回消息就得花不少时间，我感觉都没有私人生活了…唔，这大概算是某种幸福的烦恼吧。哎，不说了，有人给我打视频电话，我先挂了。」

"The main issue is having to socialize every day. Just responding to messages takes up so much time, I feel like I've got no personal life left... well, I guess that's a good problem to have in a way. Oh, hold on, I've got a video call coming in, gotta go."
以斯帖阿姨最近可开心了，我听我那碎嘴子的工程师说，有不少老头在追她呢。
Aunt Esther has been in high spirits lately. According to my talkative engineer, she's become quite the heartbreaker with quite a few gentlemen admirers!
「乖乖，我跟你说，那天聚会我成了全场的焦点！哎呀真是臊死人了！可惜没早点认识你，要是早个几年…哎，莫说这些咯，乖乖，我准备退休了。」

"Goodness, let me tell you, I was the center of attention at that party the other day! It was quite embarrassing! I only wish we'd met sooner, perhaps a few years earlier. But never mind all that now, dear, I'm looking forward to retirement."
「听科员们说，你跟着列车在外面冒险，闯出不少名堂来。哎，外面很危险吧，注意安全啊。实在不行就回来，老太婆这点薄面还是有几分用的……」

"I've heard from the researchers that you've been making quite a splash on your adventures with the Express. It sounds pretty wild out there, so please take care. And remember, if it ever becomes too much, you can always come back. I still have enough influence to help you out here..."
说实话，要不是之前医疗科的科员给他做心理检查，我都怀疑他是不是有点自闭，真没想到他还会主动给你发消息。
To be honest, if the Medical Department hadn't given him a psychological evaluation, I might have thought he was a bit of an introvert. It's surprising he took the initiative to message you.
「之前的事…严格来说你是这批小机器人的再生父母，全靠你盘活！无以报答，自掏腰包给你升级了一点配置，改装了一些功能，希望你能用得习惯。」

"About the past... really, you've been like a reboot parent to these tiny robots, breathing new life into them! There's no way to fully repay you, but I've dipped into my pocket to upgrade your gear and tweak some settings — hope you find the improvements to your liking!"
「对了，我给它加的那些小功能你发现没？别看它害羞，其实挺爱唱歌的，就是不好意思在人前表演。」我爱唱歌？没有！没有这回事！别听他瞎说。
"Notice any new functions I added? It might seem shy, but it's actually quite fond of singing, just too bashful to perform publicly." Me, love singing? No way! Ignore that, he's full of nonsense.
「老师好，谢谢你教我的那些东西，虚拟世界的东西真的很精彩，只可惜，它的阴暗面也远超我的想象。」
"Hey teacher, thanks for all the insights. The virtual world is truly fascinating, but its darker side is more intense than I ever imagined."
「我制造了一台…不不不，一个…一只？呃，总之就是我制造了我的复制体，老头子和站长同意了，她留有我的记忆数据，其他人察觉不到她的变化。」
"I made a... no, more like a... a clone? Yeah, that's it. I got the green light from the senior and the Lead Researcher, she has my memory data, and she's indistinguishable to anyone else."
「世界很简单，但人类很复杂。经过慎重考虑，我决定放弃和人类相处，这可能是我最后一次联系你。老师…再见。」
"The world is simple, people, not so much. After a lot of thought, I've decided to stop dealing with humans. This might be my last message to you, teacher. Goodbye."
Let's see what messages others have left.
「哎这是什么玩意，我在哪里说话你能听到吗？喂喂喂？这小东西很有意思啊，感觉跟我好兄弟雷金一样聪明。」
"Hey, what's this gadget? Can you hear me no matter where I am? Hello? This little device is pretty fascinating, almost as clever as my buddy Regin."
「什么？不卖啊，这小机器人说自己是非卖品，真的假的？算了，不说这个了，跟你说个正经儿的，雷金兄弟的成果被教育部那边否定了，我觉得他们真没眼光，申报了几个奖项也没有入围。」

"What? Not for sale? This little robot claims it's not for sale, is that for real? Anyway, forget about that, let me tell you something serious. Regin's project was turned down by the Ministry of Education. They just don't recognize talent, missing the cut for every award he applied for."
「我觉得问题出在奖项上，所以我打算自己搞个什么物理学奖，就用我的名字冠名，重振贝洛伯格科学界的荣光。等搞好了我喊你，说不定能参加个颁奖礼什么的。」

"I think the real problem is the awards themselves, so I'm planning to start my own Physics Science Award, named after me, to restore the glory of Belobogian science. Once I get it all set up, I'll invite you, maybe you can come to the award ceremony."
「我最近去面试了一个音乐剧项目，内容是讲一个女舞者意外进入女子监狱的故事，故事有点黑暗色彩。果然外面的世界就是不一样，这种题材在贝洛伯格可见不着。」

"I recently tried out for a musical that's quite edgy — it's about a female dancer who unexpectedly finds herself in a women's prison. It's got a dark twist to it. The outside world sure offers some unique stories, you wouldn't come across this kind of plot back in Belobog."
「虽然只是女主角的替卡，但这次巡演有足足<unbreak>120</unbreak>场，经纪人给我估算了下，至少有<unbreak>30</unbreak>场需要我上场。有机会的话，你可以带上星穹列车的朋友一起来看看，提前跟我说一声，我给你们准备包厢。」

"Though I'm just an understudy for the lead, there are a whopping <unbreak>120</unbreak> shows on tour, and my agent estimated I'll be needed for at least <unbreak>30</unbreak> shows. If you get a chance, you could bring some friends from the Astral Express to watch, just let me know in advance, and I'll get a box ready for you."
尤利安给你累计发送<unbreak>21</unbreak>条语音，内容均来自小学数学练习册的习题，我已经给他解答过了，目前暂无新消息。
Julian has sent you a total of <unbreak>21</unbreak> voice messages, all with questions from elementary math workbooks. I've already answered them for him. No new messages for now.
老歌德想向你取消正当权益会社的委托工作，具体原因你还是听他自个儿说吧：「{NICKNAME}，谢谢你对我们会社的倾力相助，只可惜…公司和贝洛伯格有一些产业合作，提供了不少就业岗位，部分社员为了多赚钱，推翻了自己从前的理念。」

Old Goethe is looking to terminate his assignment with The Rightful Rights Society. He explains it best himself: "{NICKNAME}, I deeply appreciate all the support you've given our organization, unfortunately... the IPC has entered into several industrial partnerships with Belobog, creating many job opportunities. Sadly, this has caused some of our members to abandon their initial ideals for financial gains."
「在几个月的争吵中，一半的社员决定与我们分道扬镳，至此我觉得正当权益会社也没什么存在的必要了，就此解散还能留个体面。所以…以后也不需要你来帮忙了，真的很感谢你，有空的话可以来我这儿喝个下午茶，我们再唠嗑唠嗑。」

"After months of debate, half of our members chose to go their separate ways. It seems The Rightful Rights Society has served its purpose, so we're thinking of disbanding to end on a dignified note. I won't need your help moving forward, but I'm deeply thankful for everything. If you're ever in the area, drop by for some tea and a chat."
Let's see what messages others have left.
杜老板每到午后就会给你发消息，说让你「得闲来饮茶」，累计发了<unbreak>13</unbreak>条，除此以外也没有别的内容。
Every afternoon, Boss Du sends you a message inviting you to have tea whenever you're free. He's sent <unbreak>13</unbreak> invites so far, without adding much else.
这究竟是人类的客套话，还是魔阴身发作的前兆？真是搞不懂你们人类。
Is this typical human politeness, or a sign of being mara-struck? Humans are truly baffling.
跃渊暂时没有留言给你，不过我看着她的状态显示一直是「工作中」，打过去也是忙音，可能是去奋斗了。
Yueyuan hasn't left any messages recently. Her status is consistently "busy," and all calls just ring out. She must be swamped at work.
Let's see what messages others have left.
Not interested in listening to anything else.
阿德勒先生送了一些资料过来，他说他准备放弃对空间站怪谈的相关研究了，他将整理出来的手稿传了过来，已经为你装订好啦。
Mr. Adler has sent over some materials, announcing he's abandoning his research into the space station's ghost stories. He's compiled and bound a manuscript, which he has already sent your way.
相册里更新了新照片，是你上次在贝洛伯格时，和塔米拉、塞琳小姐的合影。我给你提一嘴，我的抓拍技术不太好，希望你别在意。
New photos have been added to the album, from your last visit to Belobog with Tamila and Miss Celine. Just a heads-up, my photography skills aren't great, hope you don't mind.
Go ahead, I've got things to handle.
噢噢，我也没啥事，准备待机到低电量再去休息。
I've got nothing on either, just waiting around until my battery runs low.
其实我还会讲笑话...要是你什么时候心情不好，可以找我聊天。
I can crack a few jokes too... if you're ever feeling down, feel free to chat with me.
接取中，请选择你想接听的联系人！
Receiving, please select who you want to hear from!
说实话，你的朋友还挺多的，不像我，就只认识你……
To be honest, you have quite a lot of friends, unlike me — you're the only one I've got...
感觉你怎么比我还自闭——啊，不是骂你的意思，我是说——你怎么比我还怕生哇，明明长得这么高大，心思却这么细腻敏感……
You seem even more introverted than me — not that it's a bad thing! I mean, despite your size and strength, you're incredibly sensitive and thoughtful.
这是我抓拍的…希望你别太介意。
This is one of my snapshots... hope you're okay with it.
…怎么大家看起来都不是很熟的样子，还是说你比我还怕生？
Why does everyone look like they barely know each other, or is it you who's more introverted?
不至于吧，我觉得你的脸还是很好看的，值得一看。
That's not true. I think you're quite handsome. Definitely worth a second look.
我这人你也知道，对朋友的要求很高。身份、外貌、职业、谈吐…一样都不能差。
You know me, I have high standards for friends. Status, appearance, profession, eloquence... I don't compromise.
能认识雷金实属幸运，我觉得很难再找到第二个如此优秀的朋友了。
Knowing Regin is a stroke of luck, hard to find another friend as exceptional as him.
你是说我投资他的《民间科学》的事吧？
Are you talking about my investment in Citizen Science?
其实我也知道大概率是回不了本的，但是朋友之间不必那么计较金钱上的得失，何况我也不缺钱。
I know it's a long shot, but when it comes to friends, money shouldn't matter. Plus, I'm not exactly short on cash.
我看中的是他身上的执着。雷金这么多年一直在坚持论证他的…「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，既然我有能力帮他，为什么不试试呢？
What I appreciate is his commitment. Regin has been diligently advocating his "big universe time tunnel" theory for years. If I can support him, why not?
Maybe try expanding your social circle.
贝洛伯格就这么大，整个上层区我都熟门熟路，来来回回就是那几张面孔。
Belobog isn't that large, I practically know everyone in the Overworld area by now.
听说最近下层区的治安越来越好了，没准哪天我会去那边转转。不过下层区人好像很粗鲁，应该不适合做我的朋友。
I heard the Underworld area is getting safer by the day, maybe I'll visit someday. However, the locals seem pretty rough around the edges, probably not the ideal friend material for me.
你说交朋友这个事情真挺神奇的，之前让你帮我物色了那么多人，没有一个愿意和我做朋友。
It's funny how friendship works. I had you scout out so many people, and yet no one wanted to be my friend.
结果就在我即将放弃的时候，认识了雷金，也许这就是缘分吧。
Just when I was about to give up, I met Regin, maybe it was meant to be.
你的科学期刊办的怎么样了？
四个字，热火朝天。创刊才短短几个月，我就收到了几百篇来自社会各界的科学论文。
In two words: On fire. Just a few months after launch, I've already received hundreds of scientific papers from across society.
虽然其中大多都是平庸之作，但还是有几篇内容令我非常感兴趣。比如《利用黑洞制作永动机的可能性》《关于水猴子物种存在的若干证据》……
While most are mediocre, a few articles caught my eye, like The Possibility of Creating a Perpetual Motion Machine Using Black Holes and Evidence Supporting the Existence of Water Monkey Species...
It's true what they say, there are undiscovered geniuses among us.
没错！这正是我把期刊命名为《民间科学》的原因。长期以来，科学的解释权都被那些尸位素餐的官方学者牢牢掌握，导致贝洛伯格的科学水平严重落后。
That's precisely why I named it Citizen Science. For too long, the power to define science has been monopolized by complacent academics, holding back Belobog's scientific advancement.
不过科学的春天已经到了，在我的带领下，贝洛伯格马上就能迎来技术爆炸。
But the renaissance of science is upon us. Under my leadership, Belobog is on the verge of a technological revolution.
Sounds like a compendium of pseudoscience, doesn't it?
我非常理解你的看法，因为你是个普通人，缺乏对先进理论的洞察。
I understand where you're coming from because you're a normal person without insight into advanced theories.
我这么说吧，许多现在全宇宙公认的真理，在几个琥珀纪之前都是伪科学。
Let me put it this way, many truths now universally acknowledged across the universe were considered pseudoscience just a few Amber Eras ago.
华劳斯的投资算是打水漂了。
Wallace's investment has gone down the drain.
华劳斯可不像你这样目光短浅，虽然他不懂具体的理论细节，但是他有尊重科学的精神，以及…很多的钱。
Unlike you, Wallace isn't shortsighted. Even though he may not grasp all the detailed theories, he respects the spirit of scientific inquiry, and... well, he also has deep pockets.
总之，科学研究是超长周期投资，我相信他有足够的耐心。
Anyway, scientific research is a long-term investment, and I believe he has the patience for it.
你走南闯北的应该见过不少世面，要是在旅行途中有什么新奇发现，欢迎给《民间科学》投稿。
Given your extensive travels, if you ever come across anything intriguing, feel free to contribute to Citizen Science.
至于稿费嘛，绝对亏待不了你。
And don't worry about the fee, we won't shortchange you.
好啊，正好我手头没什么事。
No problem. I just so happen to be free right now.
头两天有点不适应，天还没亮就起床了，还以为自己在前线，下意识的要去检查物资，结果被我老婆一顿笑话……
The first few days were tough. I kept waking up before dawn, as if I was still on the front lines, automatically checking supplies, only to be laughed at by my wife...
不过家里的生活真是惬意啊，有可口的饭菜，温暖的地髓炉，相亲相爱的家人。即使一天什么都不做，关是躺在椅子上看报纸就很好。

Life at home is truly blissful, complete with delicious meals, the warmth of a Geomarrow furnace, and loving family members. Even just lounging in a chair and reading the newspaper all day feels perfect.
我现在已经盼着下次休假了，为了这一天早点到来，我必须更加认真地做好本职工作。
I'm eagerly anticipating my next vacation, and to make it arrive sooner, I'm committed to working harder at my job.
I'll leave you to your work.
手头确实还有活没干完，那我接着维护军备了。
There's still work to be done. I'll get back to maintaining the armaments.
Has your dad gone back to the front lines?
唉…是啊，假期过得好快，感觉还没和老爸相处多久呢。
Ah... yes, the holiday went by too quickly. I feel like I barely spent any time with him.
Why don't you visit him on the front lines?
我早就有这个想法了，但是老爸说前线非常危险，我一个小女孩不要随便过去。
I've thought about it, but my dad says it's dangerous and not a place for a girl like me.
哼，我明明都已经这么大了，早就不是小女孩了。
Hmph, I'm not a kid anymore. I've grown up.
在爸爸眼里你始终是小女孩。
In your father's eyes, you'll always be his little girl.
好吧，既然你都这么说了，那我还是老老实实等老爸下次休假吧。
Well, since you put it that way, I guess I'll just wait patiently for his next break.
他应该很快就能退役了。
话是这么说，但是他都已经延期退役好几次了，每次都说部队离不开他，不知道的还以为他是将军呢。
He keeps postponing his retirement, saying the unit can't function without him. Honestly, you'd think he was a general or something.
其实我也知道老爸当了几十年的兵，对部队有很深的感情，但是我和妈妈也很想念他啊。
I understand that Dad has been in the military for decades and has a strong bond with it, but Mom and I really miss him too.
希望这次他是真的能退役吧，他的年纪真经不起折腾了。
I hope this time he can retire, he's not getting any younger.
如果你下次还要去前线，麻烦帮我给老爸带句话，让他安安心心工作，我会把妈妈照顾好，等他平安归来的。
If you go to the front lines next time, please tell my dad to work peacefully and not worry, as I'll take good care of Mom and wait for his safe return.
咦，你又来听小女子开嗓啊，还是说有什么其他的事吗？
Hey, are you here to hear this young lady sing again, or is there something else?
Are you about to go on stage?
哎呀呀～说起来还是托塔米拉小姐的福呢。小女子先前虽有担任过一部新剧的女主角，可惜剧评人说这种题材太俗套了……
Oh, I have Miss Tamila to thank for this. I once starred as the lead in a new play, but the critics brushed it off as being too cliché.
好在小女子现在是塔米拉小姐的好朋友～她为我介绍了一位新锐导演，小女子运气真好～被他看中，留在他的新剧里担任女主角呢。
Thankfully, Miss Tamila and I are close friends now. She introduced me to an up-and-coming director, and, lucky me, he cast me as the lead in his next production.
你跟塔米拉还有联系吗？
Are you still in touch with Tamila?
那当然，塔米拉小姐对小女子的恩情，小女子这辈子都不会忘的。
Absolutely, I'll always be grateful to Miss Tamila for her kindness.
小女子每天都会给她发消息，不过塔米拉小姐比较忙，她最近好像都待在录音室里，有时候回消息会比较慢。
I message her every day to keep in touch, but Miss Tamila has been swamped lately, spending most of her time in the recording studio. Sometimes it takes her a while to reply.
音乐公司那边很看重她，说她这低沉的嗓音是什么「烟嗓」，是唱爵士的好苗子～虽然小女子还没听过这种风格的音乐，但还是由衷地为塔米拉小姐感到高兴。

The music company holds her in high regard, calling her deep voice a "smoky tone" that's perfect for jazz. I haven't experienced that style of music myself, but I'm genuinely thrilled for her success.
塔米拉怎么不在这儿了？
哎呀呀～之前不是跟你说过了吗～塔米拉小姐被「公司」的经纪人看中，现在离开贝洛伯格去外面发展了。
Oh, didn't I tell you? Miss Tamila was discovered by an agent from the IPC and has left Belobog to further her career.
小女子早就觉得，黄金歌剧院配不上塔米拉小姐，她值得有更广阔更璀璨的未来。
I've long believed that the Golden Theater isn't worthy of Miss Tamila. She's meant for a future that's far more expansive and dazzling.
你这问题，叫小女子好生为难。这叫什么话？塔米拉小姐帮了我这么多，她让小女子不再成为她的影子，还为我找到了走到台前的路。
That's a weird question to ask. Miss Tamila has done so much for me — she helped me step out of her shadow and showed me the way to the spotlight.
小女子恨不得照顾塔米拉小姐一辈子，这样才能表达出小女子对她的感谢呢。你这问题问得到倒像是小女子和塔米拉小姐有仇，这也太奇怪了吧？
I'd gladly stick by her side for life if it meant showing her how grateful I am. Honestly, the way you put it makes it sound like I have something against her, which is just ridiculous.
I don't have any more questions.
没事呀～小女子正好可以继续练歌了～
No worries, I was just about to continue practicing my singing.
Would you like a bowl of "Taste of the Sea"?
客官真不好意思，这「海的味道」已经下架了，因为核心材料——波月古海的水弄不到了。
I'm sorry, guest, "Taste of the Sea" is no longer available as the core ingredient — water from the Lunarescent Depths can't be obtained anymore.
您也知道波月古海是持明族的圣地，之前虽然也经常有持明族在海边巡逻，但总能被我找到空档打两桶水。
The Lunarescent Depths is a sacred site for the Vidyadhara. Though they used to patrol the shoreline, I was always able to sneak in and scoop up a couple of barrels of water.
结果现在他们弄了几十只机巧鸟，一天二十四小时在岸边巡逻，见着行为可疑的人就报警，一点机会也不给啊……
But now they've deployed dozens of cycranes to constantly patrol the shore, sounding the alarm at any hint of suspicious activity — leaving no opportunity for us.
不过本店还有其他茶品，味道也不错，您可以尝尝。
We've still got plenty of other delightful teas in the shop — why not have a try?
这波月古海清净了不少…
The Lunarescent Depths have become significantly more tranquil.
自从有了机巧鸟帮忙巡逻以后，那些放生的人就不敢来了。
With the cycranes now on patrol, those who used to release animals into the wild there have stopped coming.
不过这样也有问题，波月古海毕竟是传播持明族文化的重地，很多正常参观旅游的人也被赶走了。
That said, it's created another issue. Lunarescent Depths is a key site for Vidyadhara cultural outreach, and now even regular visitors and tourists are being turned away.
回头得升级下机巧鸟的识别算法，让它能精准识别出潜在的破坏分子。
We need to upgrade the recognition algorithms of the cycranes to accurately identify potential disruptors.
雅努萨波利斯，不愧是翁法罗斯的中心。能来到这里，老夫的人生也算是圆满了呐。
Janusopolis... It's really what you'd expect from the heart of Amphoreus. Being able to make it here, I feel like my life has been worth something.
是啊。不过，对老夫来说，来到这雅努斯之城的意义，也的确比平常人更多一层……
It sure is. Although, my visit here has far more meaning than the average man's.
The view looks pretty average to me?
哈哈，年轻人你这么说也没错。雅努斯之城虽然崇高，但也是充满人间烟火的一座城市，比起奥赫玛或是哀地里亚来没有本质区别。只不过，对老夫来说……
Haha, you're not wrong, young one. Though the city of Janus is majestic, it is also a place where people live their normal daily lives, no different to Okhema or Aidonia. However, in my eyes...
…周游翁法罗斯之后终于抵达了它的中心，完成人生的最后一次朝圣，它的意义其实早就超过了圣城的风景究竟如何。

...Now that I have traveled all of Amphoreus and arrived at its center, I have completed the final pilgrimage of my life. The meaning this place holds to me far exceeds the picturesque sights of the holy city.
据说在千年前的黄金世，三位灾厄泰坦尚未降临，那时的人们可以不太费力地抵达世界边界，在无尽之海中亲身体验{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}的奇迹。

Legend has it that during the Era Chrysea a thousand years ago, the three Calamity Titans had not yet descended on this world. Back then, people could travel to the ends of the earth with ease and personally witness the miracles of the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} within the endless ocean.
可惜此后爆发了泰坦战争，又有黑潮作祟——人们无法去世界的尽头向{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}朝圣，便只能来到这座城市表达自己的崇敬之情。

Unfortunately, the Strife of the Titans broke out and the black tide was born... People were no longer able to make pilgrimages to the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} at the end of the earth. Their only way to express their reverence was to journey to this city.
老夫是个固执的人，想效法黄金世的古人走遍已知的整个世界…有幸众神垂怜，保我一路逢凶化吉。年轻人，你要是有兴趣，我可以和你讲讲古今朝圣的区别。

I am a stubborn old man, and I want to follow in the footsteps of my ancestors in the Era Chrysea and visit every corner of the known world... Fortunately, the Gods showed me mercy and protected me from harm along the way. Youngster, if you are interested, I can tell you the differences between the pilgrimages of today and ancient times.
年轻人，你要是有兴趣，我可以和你讲讲古今朝圣的区别。
Youngster, if you are interested, I can tell you the differences between the pilgrimages of today and ancient times.
那太好了。但老夫毕竟不是祭司，也就能和你讲讲自己道听途说的一些东西。
Perfect. Although, I am no priest, all I can tell you is things I have learned along my travels.
黄金世的朝圣、雅努斯之城的意义、雅努斯之门的传说…嗯，有把握的大概就是这些吧。
The pilgrimage of the Era Chrysea, the significance of the City of Janus, the legend of the Gates of Janus... I'd say that's all I can really tell you about.
Tell me about the pilgrimages of the Era Chrysea.
在遥远的黄金世，由于没有黑潮和战争，旅行非常安全，人们为了表达对泰坦的崇敬之情，往往会前往某位泰坦施行神迹的具体地点进行朝圣。

Back in the Era Chrysea, travelling was extremely safe as there was no black tide or war. In order to show their reverence to the Titans, people would often make pilgrimages to certain locations where Titans would perform miracles.
就拿这雅努萨波利斯来说吧，这里是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}用万径之门的神力测算出的大地中心——从这里往任何方向走，抵达世界尽头的距离都是差不多的。

Let me take Janusopolis as an example: This is the center of the earth as defined by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} using the divine power of the Gate of Infinity... If you travel in any direction from here, the distance to the end of the world is almost the same.
所以在黄金世，人们的朝圣旅途并不是从四面八方抵达这里：恰恰相反，他们会从这里出发，尽力抵达世界尽头，亲身穿过雅努斯在那里设立的门。

So, in the Era Chrysea, people would not conduct their pilgrimages from all directions to arrive here. On the contrary, they would start their pilgrimages from here and try their best to make it to the end of the world to personally pass through the gates that Janus themself had set there.
只可惜在如今的年代，人们身处黑潮包围之中，已经绝无可能再抵达那里…即使想效法古人，也只能象征性地周游世界，无法穿过黑潮去世界真正的尽头朝圣。

Unfortunately, in modern times, people are completely encircled by the black tide and can no longer make this journey... Even if they wish to do as the ancients did, they can only make a symbolic journey around the world. They cannot pass through the black tide to pilgrimage to the true end of the world.
听听雅努斯之城的意义。
Tell me about the significance of the City of Janus.
雅努斯之城不仅是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}曾经垂迹的圣所，三位命运泰坦向世界发出神谕的中心…它还是整个翁法罗斯在地理上的中心。

The City of Janus is not only the holy land where {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} once left their mark, it also served as the center where the Fate Titans would declare prophecies to the world... It is the geographical center of all of Amphoreus.
在世界诞生之前，雅努斯就已经醒来：那时它落脚的混沌之地，就是如今雅努萨波利斯的前身。
Janus awakened before the world had even been born: The chaotic land where they stood back then was the predecessor of the Janusopolis that we know today.
正因为有雅努斯为世界开辟道路，支柱泰坦才能创造出天空、大地与海洋。
It was because Janus created a path for the world that the Pillar Titans were able to create the sky, earth, and sea.
所以，有一派祭司就认为，黄金世那些立于世界边缘的雅努斯之门，在最初就一并诞生于雅努萨波利斯这个世界的原点——
So, there is a faction of priests who believe that the Gates of Janus standing at the ends of the earth originated in Janusopolis, the starting point of this world.
是世界在造物世的诞生，是天空、大地、和海洋的膨胀，才把它们从这里推到了无比遥远的边境之地。
It was the birth of the world during the Era Creatura, the expansion of the skies, the earth, and the sea that pushed them to the distant borders where they now stand.
听听雅努斯之门的传说。
Tell me about the legend of the Gates of Janus
根据黄金世留下的记载，雅努斯之门是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}建立在世界尽头的无数道门扉。
According to records left behind from the Era Chrysea, the Gates of Janus are a countless number of doors set up by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} along the edge of the world.
如果你在无尽之海中找到了它们，那么只要穿过门扉，你就能奇迹般抵达世界的任何一处——
If you locate one in the Endless Seas, you need only to pass through it, and you can miraculously travel anywhere in the world instantly —
譬如回到这里，回到雅努萨波利斯。据说，通过了雅努斯之门后，你的船只会像奥赫玛的飞天坛递一样，拥有在空中飞行的能力。

You could return straight here, to Janusopolis, for instance. Legend has it that once you pass through the Gates of Janus, your ship will obtain the ability to soar through the skies like the Flying Amphora of Okhema.
只可惜如今世界的尽头早已被黑潮淹没…我们已经无法检验这种记载是真是假了。也许，它其实只是古人编出来的故事？

Unfortunately, the ends of the earth have now long since been devoured by the black tide... There is no way for us to test whether these records are true or not. Perhaps they are just stories that the ancients made up?
唉，可惜我们不是生活在黄金世啊。
Ah, what a pity that we do not live in the Era Chrysea.
哈哈，我并不是祭司，很多东西也只是道听途说，讲得也不一定对。
Haha, I'm not a priest, so all I can tell you is what I have heard along my travels. There is no guarantee it is all true.
年轻人…人生就是一场朝圣，你只要无愧于自己的信仰就好。
Youngster... Life is a pilgrimage. You need only be devout to your beliefs.
虽然但是，我还有正事要办。
Nevertheless, I have things to do.
哈哈哈，年轻人确实还是忙一点好！
Hahaha, it is best for youngsters like yourself to keep busy!
人生就是一场朝圣…你只要无愧于自己的信仰，那，就是最大的虔诚。
Life is a pilgrimage. You need only be devout to your beliefs. That is the greatest form of piety.
嗯…原来如此，我明白了…无怪你的父亲如此忧虑深重。对于凡俗之人而言，雅努斯的神谕确实过于晦涩……
Hmm... I see. I understand... No wonder your father is so weighed down with concern. The prophecies of Janus can indeed be a little cryptic to the common man...
不过请放心，作为神人之间的纽带与桥梁，我能够为你将其解读为通俗易懂的语句。
But, please rest assured. As the bridge that connects the mortal and divine worlds, I will be able to interpret their words into something easier to comprehend.
真、真的吗？谢谢您，祭司大人！
无需客气，这本就是我职责所在。不过…在此之前，请先向我展示你对命运泰坦的虔诚之心。
There is no need for gratitude. This is precisely my duty. However... before I can begin, I require you to demonstrate your spirit of piety to the Fate Titans.
虔诚之心…？我、我为了求取神谕，只身从奥德斯特里斯城邦来此，独自在大地兽背上辗转了二十个日夜，这样能够证明我的虔诚吗……
My spirit of piety...? I—I traveled to this place all the way from Odestris atop a dromas for twenty days and nights just to seek this prophecy. Is this enough to prove my piety?
你做得很好，孩子，但这些还不够。
You have done well, my child. But, this is not enough.
那…那我该怎么做呢，祭司大人？
Then... Then what am I to do, Lord Priest?
唉，这么说吧…您应当知道，进行祭祀时，只有当牺牲的鲜血泼洒在祭坛之上，神明才会向我们投下赞许的目光。
Ah, allow me to put it this way... You should understand that when one is carrying out a ritual, it is only when the sacrificial blood hits the altar that the gods will grace us with their approval.
故而作为一名希求神明垂青的虔诚信徒，你需得在塔兰顿的天秤中放上足够的分量。
As a devout disciple that desires to be favored by the gods, you will need to place enough weight atop the scales of Talanton.
命运三女神在上，孩子，你还在犹豫什么？难道你对父亲的孝心就只是口中的空谈？
Praise to the Three Titans of Fate, child, what are you waiting for? Is your filial piety to your father no more than lip service, after all?
不、我不是这个意思…只是…我是瞒着家里偷偷溜出来的，身上的钱财或许并不足以……
No, it's not that... It's just... I snuck out without the knowledge of my family. I fear the money I have on me may not be...
你误会了，孩子。神明从不曾被凡俗之财所取悦。你所需奉上的，仅是能够代表心意的重要之物。
You misunderstand me, child. The gods would never derive joy from the fortune of mortals. What you need to offer is something of importance to represent your intention.
重要之物…我、我有一条绿宝石项链，是母亲送给我的成年礼，价值…啊，抱歉，我不该用世俗的价值去亵渎神明……

Something of importance... I—I have an emerald necklace. It was a gift from my mother when I reached the age of majority. As for the price... Ah! Sorry, I should not blaspheme against the Gods with a mortal definition of value...
无妨，孩子，泰坦会宽恕你的无心之失。那么现在，请将项链交给我吧，让我来作出判断，它是否有资格陈列在女神们洁净的供台上。
Fear not, child, the Titans will overlook your innocent mistake. Now, hand over the necklace to me and I shall judge whether it is fit to be placed upon the pure altar of The Fates.
什——什么人？！竟敢在此口出狂言——哈，一身怪服的异乡客，却想叫卫队捉拿侍奉泰坦的祭司？当真可笑！
Wh—Who's there!? How dare you make such outrageous accusations in a place like — hah, an outsider clad in bizarre clothing wishes to summon the guards against a priest of the Titans? Laughable!
庆幸并无人听到你那愚蠢之词吧…若是卫队当真被唤来，此刻你恐怕已经因「诽谤圣女」的罪名被驱逐出雅努萨波利斯了！
Fortunately no one heard your foolish outburst... If the guards had actually been summoned, I fear you'd have already been cast out of Janusopolis for "defaming the Holy Maiden!"
How are you still swindling people like this?
什——什么人？！竟敢在此口出狂言——啊，怎么是你？
Wh—Who's there!? How dare you make such outrageous accusations — ah, you again?
但即便是贵客，这等污蔑也着实太过冒犯了！
Even if you are an esteemed guest, this level of defamation is a complete violation!
竟有人敢在圣地之中公然侮辱神明的侍者——三相泰坦的名誉岂容如此玷污？纵使女神们向来公正仁慈，也不是尔等凡俗亵渎的藉口！

Someone would dare publicly besmirch the name of an attendant to the Goddesses in this holy place — how could one tarnish the reputation of Three Titans of Fate? Though the goddesses have always been merciful and kind, this is no excuse for your mortal blasphemy!
念你尚且是初犯，此次我便不再多计较。但今日看来不宜谈论神谕之事，就此告辞！
As this is your first offense, I will leave this matter here. However, it seems that our discussion of a prophecy will not be possible today. I bid you farewell!
啊？！请、请等等啊，祭司大人……
您…呃，您好，请问有什么事呢？
H—Hello, can I help you with something?
Are you up for a chat?
可以是可以…但我似乎并不认识您……
I guess so... But I don't believe I know you...
我…来此觐见圣女，希望能领受泰坦指示。
I... I came to see the Holy Maiden. I wish for guidance from the Titans.
…呃…几个月前，家父曾来此求取过一则神谕。但自此以后，他开始变得郁郁寡欢起来，甚至时常整日闭门不出。
...Agh... My father came to this place seeking a prophecy a few months ago. However, he has grown more and more depressed since that day. Now, he spends most of his days locked inside the house.
他…询问祭司们自己会在何时死去，得到的答案则是：「在艾格勒某次闭目之时」。
He... He asked the priests when he would die. The answer he received was: "When Aquila closes one of their eyes."
是啊，何其缥缈的说辞…可父亲却依旧因此变得焦躁多疑、惴惴不安。我们…姐姐们和母亲都很担心他。
Indeed, it's extremely vague... But my father is now overcome with anxiety and paranoia. We... My elder sister and my mother are all very worried about him.
所以即便从未远行过、即便怀着满心惶恐畏惧，我还是鼓起勇气，来到这命运泰坦垂迹的圣地，寻求一个解开父亲心结的可能性……

So, though I have never made a long journey like this before and my heart was filled with fear, I plucked up the courage to come to the holy land of the Fate Titans and find something that may ease my father's concerns...
可是…那可是女神们的祭司，是人神沟通的桥梁…如此神圣的大人真的会因为这种理由欺骗我吗……
But... He is a priest of the Goddesses, the bridge between the mortal and divine worlds... Do you really think that such a holy person would scam me just to steal a necklace...?
Believe me, he was deceiving you!
可是…除了那位大人，其他的祭祀也都是这样的啊？
But... Does that mean other priests scam as he does?
他之前也这么忽悠过我！
He scammed me like this before as well!
可…如果是这样的话，那不恰巧说明了那位大人并没有骗人吗？
But... If that's true, does that not prove that they were not actually scamming anyone?
「在塔兰顿的天秤中放上足够的分量」…我记得之前家父在求取神谕的时候，也足足供奉了我们领地半年的收成……
"Place enough weight atop the scales of Talanton..." I remember when my father came in search of a prophecy, he offered up half a year's yield from our land...
啊，抱歉，我…我不是在反驳或是质疑您，也非常感谢您的善心！
Ah, sorry, I... I'm not trying to argue with you or interrogate you. I'm very grateful for your kindness!
只是…或许、或许其中有什么误会也说不定呢……
It's just... Maybe, maybe there has been some kind of misunderstanding...
Well, what do you plan to do from here?
我…我打算继续请人为我解读神谕，毕竟我就是为此而来的……
I... I plan to keep searching for someone to interpret my prophecy. That was my whole reason for coming, after all...
…哈哈，虽然这样的说法着实有些失礼，但我能感受到您的善意，所以…非常感谢。
...Haha. That turn of phrase seems a little disrespectful but, I can sense your sincerity and kindness... Thank you so much.
刚刚到达雅努萨波利斯时，我其实也感到困惑不解…我曾以为神谕是泰坦赠与我们的、伟大又无私的关爱，而人们为此奉上牺牲则是出于对神明最纯洁的虔诚与敬重。

When I had just arrived in Janusopolis, I was actually quite confused and uncertain... I used to think that prophecies were a great and selfless love gifted to us by the Titans, and that the sacrifices people make were out of pure piety and respect.
但…现在我已经目睹过很多次其他人是如何求取神谕的了，他们都是如此…明码标价…甚至有时价高者得。
However... Now I have witnessed many times how it is people obtain their prophecies. The priests are all so... clear about needing payment... Some prophecies even end up as auctions.
这些都和我的想象完全不同，让人感到既矛盾又困惑…我曾就此询问过那些祭司，而他们回答我说：「在塔兰顿的威严面前，一切都需要代价。」

This is all completely different to what I imagined. I'm so conflicted and confused... I once asked some priests about this, and they replied: "Seeking an audience with the majesty of Talanton will always require a price."
我不知道这是否是所谓的*诈骗*…但即便确实是，对只能听取神谕、从来无力反抗的我们来说…虚假和真实又有什么区别呢……

I don't know if this is what you refer to as a "scam"... But, even if it is, to us, who have no power over our fate and are dependent on our prophecies... what difference is there between falsehood and reality...
啊，好的…也祝您在此得偿所愿！
Ah, alright... Then may you find what it is you are wishing for!
I can't chat now. Good luck with everything.
啊，好的…也祝您在此得偿所愿！
Ah, alright... Then may you find what it is you are wishing for!
站住！此乃祭祀重地，你一身奇装异服，鬼鬼祟祟到处晃悠，有什么目的？圣女卫队呢，我卫队哪儿去了！
Stop right there! This is a sacred place! A place meant to deliver offerings unto the divine. What is your purpose here, sneaking around in those strange clothes? Where are the Holy Maiden's guards!?
堂堂祭司，怎么一身敏感肌。
I've never met such a sensitive priest before?
大胆，怎敢对我口出狂言！
How dare you make such outrageous accusations!
被我盘问，非但没有慌乱，竟还愈发狂妄，你到底是什么人？
Not only are you not startled in the face of my interrogation, but you even grow more arrogant!? Just who on earth are you?
你不是祭司么？神谕没告诉你？
Are you not a priest? Did the prophecy not tell you?
我…唯有雅努斯圣女才能传递神谕，我等祭司只需保护圣女、应她所需定期开启仪式即可。
I... Only the Holy Maiden is able to pass on prophecies. Priests like myself need only protect the Holy Maiden and carry out ceremonies when required.
再说了，这里每日都有无数外邦人进进出出，难道都要靠三相神谕验明来历？
What's more, we have countless outlanders coming and going through these halls every day. You think we should rely on the tripartite prophecy to identify every last one?
I have come to Janusopolis to serve as a magistrate.
县长？你可真是装糊涂的天才！少说胡话，圣女卫队的锋刃可不和你开玩笑。
A magistrate!? You are truly a master of smoke and mirrors! Enough nonsense, the blades of the Holy Maiden's guards will not join you in your jokes.
I am the Galactic Baseballer that roams the endless sea of stars!
翁法罗斯可没有哪条河叫做银河，冥河倒是有。怎么，你在冥河里游过？
Everyone in Amphoreus knows that one cannot traverse the sea of stars! The River of Souls is always available, though. Have you tried a dip?
我是塔拉萨波利斯的贵族。
I am an aristocrat of Thalassopolis.
塔拉萨波利斯？从未听说过的城邦。你也是来求取神谕的吗？
Thalassopolis? I've never heard of this city. Are you here for a prophecy, too?
嗯…这时代确实没有流民和骗子能够穿得这样华丽精致，也许是我误会你了。
Hmm... It is true that a refugee or scammer would not be draped in such extravagant finery. Perhaps there has been a misunderstanding on my part.
不过，既是异邦贵族，可有能验明身份的证物？例如…贵邦的珍稀特产？
However, if you are an outlander aristocrat, do you have something that serves to prove your identity? For instance... some rare souvenir from your foreign land?
你似乎能听懂，但是你不想听懂，你眯起眼睛看着这位道貌岸然的祭司。祭司笑了笑，向你伸出手来。
Though you understand what he is getting at, you decide that you'd rather play dumb. You squint your eyes at the sanctimonious priest. The priest smiles and reaches out a hand.
说得更明白些…阁下，若你有心求取神谕，也总该向三相神殿表露些诚意吧？
Let me make it clearer for you... My Lord, if you wish to obtain your prophecy, you must show your piety to the Temple of the Three Fates. Don't you agree?
Then let me show you something special.
那么，阁下，我爱莫能助：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
Well then, My Lord, I cannot help you. There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.
这、这是何物？来命运三相殿奉上贡品、求取神谕的人潮比{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的海浪还要汹涌，可是我至今未曾见到与这相似的东西……

Wh—What is this object? The waves of people that come and make offerings to the Temple of the Three Fates dwarf even the waves of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} in their volume. Yet, I have never seen an item like this before...
还请阁下接受我诚挚的歉意。命运三相殿地处神圣，圣女又手无缚鸡之力，我等祭司不得不严防死守。
Please accept my sincerest apologies, My Lord. The Temple of the Three Fates is a sacred location, and the Holy Maiden is powerless to protect it. We must keep it under tight guard.
命运泰坦们已经知晓您的诚意，我们会为你求取一份神谕。愿您的家乡——塔拉萨波利斯——平安无虞。
The Fate Titans have recognized your piety. We will obtain a prophecy for you. May your home — Thalassopolis — long remain safe and sound.
祭司笑眯眯地将你递出的东西收入囊中。那么，命运泰坦要如何占卜一处虚构之地的未来呢？你对此颇为好奇。

The priest stuffs the item you handed over into his pocket with a gleeful grin on his face. Well then, how will the Fate Titans divine a future for a place that you made up? Your curiosity is truly piqued.
也许等些时间再来找他，就能得到有趣的答案了。
Perhaps if you give him some time, he will have an interesting answer waiting for you.
那么，阁下，我爱莫能助：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
Well then, My Lord, I cannot help you. There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.
阁下，莫非您回心转意，想向三相神殿表露诚心、求取神谕？
My Lord, could it be that you have had a change of heart and wish to show your piety to the Temple of the Three Fates in exchange for a prophecy?
I want to hear my prophecy.
You're not getting a penny from me.
那么，阁下，我还是那句话：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
Very well, My Lord. Then I must remind you: There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.
这，这是何物？来命运三相殿奉上贡品、求取神谕的人潮比法吉娜的海浪还要汹涌，可是我至今未曾见到与这相似的东西……

Wh—What is this object? The waves of people that come and make offerings to the Temple of the Three Fates dwarf even the waves of Phagousa in their volume. Yet, I have never seen an item like this before...
还请阁下接受我诚挚的歉意。命运三相殿地处神圣，圣女又手无缚鸡之力，我等祭司不得不严防死守。
Please accept my sincerest apologies, My Lord. The Temple of the Three Fates is a sacred location, and the Holy Maiden is powerless to protect it. We must keep it under tight guard.
命运泰坦们已经知晓您的诚意，我们会为你求取一份神谕。愿您的家乡——塔拉萨波利斯——平安无虞。
The Fate Titans have recognized your piety. We will obtain a prophecy for you. May your home — Thalassopolis — long remain safe and sound.
祭司笑眯眯地将你递出的东西收入囊中。那么，命运泰坦要如何占卜一处虚构之地的未来呢？你对此颇为好奇。

The priest stuffs the item you handed over into his pocket with a gleeful grin on his face. Well then, how will the Fate Titans divine a future for a place that you made up? Your curiosity is truly piqued.
也许等些时间再来找他，就能得到有趣的答案了。
Perhaps if you give him some time, he will have an interesting answer waiting for you.
那么，阁下，我还是那句话：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
Very well, My Lord. Then I must remind you: There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.
阁下，有幸再度相见。上回你给我的珍宝都已纳与命运泰坦们了，不知阁下找我又有何事？
My Lord, it is an honor to see you again. The treasure that you bestowed to me before has been accepted by the Fate Titans. Is there something that I can help you with?
雅努斯是个怎样的泰坦？
What kind of Titan is Janus?
万径之门，雅努斯，门径之泰坦，命运三泰坦中的长姊。它揭示城邦未来、指引万民前路，于众泰坦中堪称最为完美的一尊。

The Gate of Infinity, Janus, is the Passage Titan and eldest sister of the Three Titans of Fate. They show the future of each city and guide the paths of the people. They are even referred to as the most perfect among all Titans.
与它的亘古辉煌相比，其它的泰坦简直…礼貌地说，黯淡无光。
When compared to their eternal glory, the other Titans are... to put it politely, a little lackluster.
They are not all-knowing and all-powerful like Kephale.
神话里对刻法勒的赞誉，不过是由成功者书写的历史罢了。所谓全知全能，皆因奥赫玛是当今翁法罗斯最鼎盛的城邦。

They say that history is written by the winners, and that is precisely what has happened with the constant praise of Kephale in mythology. This so-called all-knowing and all-powerful nature comes from nothing more than the fact that Okhema is the most prospering city in Amphoreus.
倘有一日我雅努萨波利斯成为唯一正统的泰坦之领，必会还正史一片清朗。
If Janusopolis were to one day become the only legitimate Titan territory, I'm sure that the historical accounts would be suitably cleared.
我都想…整理好了，翁法罗斯正史第一章，万径之门开天辟地……
I want to... I've already prepared what I would write. Historical account of Amphoreus, chapter one: The Gate of Infinity splits the heavens and the earth...
当心尼卡多利让你飞起来。
Nikador will have your head for saying that.
尼卡多利，色厉胆薄、好勇无谋，在泰坦中和扎格列斯坐一桌，不值一提。
Nikador looks ferocious, but has no spine. They're all brawn and no brain. They sit at the same table as Zagreus and are barely worth a mention.
等悬锋人打过来你就老实了。
You'll change your tune when the Kremnoans get here.
我是悬锋间谍，这就回报出兵。
I'm a Kremnoan spy. I will report back to send troops here.
什么？…吓唬谁呢，阁下，悬锋人野蛮无忌，怎可能穿得惯你身上这样严严实实的衣服。
What? ...Who are you trying to scare? My Lord, the Kremnoans are savages. There is no way they would be adorned with such elaborate finery as you are.
雅努萨波利斯筑有命运三相殿，即使狂妄如悬锋人，也不敢轻易冒犯命运泰坦之所在。
The Temple of the Three Fates is located in Janusopolis. Not even the crazed Kremnoans would dare offend the home of the Fate Titans without proper consideration.
退一万步说，即使悬锋人真的对雅努萨波利斯图谋不轨，只要我们以神谕统合众邦，悬锋城又有何惧？
Even if the Kremnoans did have a plot against Janusopolis, we need simply unite the nations through our prophecies. What is there to fear about Castrum Kremnos?
我看瑟希斯和墨涅塔挺亮的。
I think Cerces and Mnestia shine pretty bright.
呵！坊间遍是这两尊泰坦厮混的野史，一个是木头脑袋，另一个因爱失智，实在上不了台面。
Hah! Everyone has heard the stories of these two Titans and their frolicking. One of their brains is as dense as wood, and the other is blinded by love. They have no place on the stage of Titans.
Tell me about the Holy Maiden.
阁下是从那些平民口中得知了有关红发圣女的事迹么？
I assume you have learned of the red-haired Holy Maiden from the common folk of Janusopolis?
要我说…堂堂命运泰坦的传谕圣女，却总想着去与平民接触，这种事成何体统！
If you ask me... I find it simply outrageous that she is the great Holy Maiden, fated to bear the prophecies of the Fate Titans, and all she wants to do is talk with common folk!
前代圣女尤为我行我素，还干过把贡品送给平民吃的事情，真是渎职。
The previous Holy Maiden was particularly insistent on doing things her way. She even gave Titan food offerings to the citizens! It was a complete misuse of power.
好在我们对现任圣女管束较为严苛，大部分平民都只知有圣女，未见过圣女样貌。
Fortunately, we have imposed harsher restrictions on the current Holy Maiden. The majority of citizens only know of the Holy Maiden's existence. They have never actually seen what she looks like.
这珍宝像进了你私人的腰包。
I saw you stuff my treasure into your pocket.
…我就不瞒着阁下了，命运三泰坦对贡品并非照单全收，妥善处理多余的贡品也是祭司的职责。
...I shall not deceive you, My Lord. The Three Titans of Fate do not personally accept all offerings. It is the duty of a priest to make sure that all excess offerings are handled properly.
有时候我们甚至要自掏腰包，补上合适的贡品、为友邦求取神谕。
Sometimes we even have to pay out of our own pockets to make up a suitable offering and obtain prophecies for our allies.
我一心只为雅努萨波利斯，客观上也确实需要替自己赢取些钱财造势，让我能在教会中为命运泰坦们做更多的事。

I am truly dedicated to Janusopolis alone. It is an objective fact that I also need to earn a certain amount of fortune and renown for myself that I am able to do more for the Fate Titans within the church.
须知，并非每位祭司都像我这般痛快真诚，城府深者大有人在。要是让那些家伙垄断了求取神谕的权力…对雅努萨波利斯断不是好事。

You must know that not all priests are as forthright and sincere as I am. There are many that are far more shrewd and subtle. If these priests were able to monopolize the power to obtain prophecies from the Titans... That would spell trouble for Janusopolis.
神谕将如何指引我的故乡？
How will the prophecy guide my homeland?
神谕的原文晦涩难懂，我便替您翻译作较为通俗易懂的语句吧——
The prophecies are often vague and hard to understand. I will translate it and make it easier for you to understand —
欧洛尼斯揭开遥远之处的帷幕，塔兰顿以天秤宣判尔等无罪，雅努斯指引如雾命运之迷津……
Oronyx lifts the distant veil, the scale of Talanton proclaims your innocence, and Janus guides those who are lost in the misty maze of destiny...
塔拉萨波利斯唷，命运只如无足之鸟，唯有三相所在之处方为归巢。
Oh, Thalassopolis! Fate is like a bird with no legs. It can only nest in the land of the Three Fates.
塞纳托斯已攥上你的脚踝…务要循着幻影渡河，寻回城邦的未来……
The cold grasp of Thanatos has grasped your ankle... You must follow the phantom across the river if you are to find a future for your city.
太好了，是神谕，我们有救了。
Great, we have a prophecy! We're saved!
三相神殿的神谕绝对真实，也从未出过错。阁下还是尽早返乡，将贵邦从黯淡的命运中拯救出来吧。
The prophecy of the Temple of the Three Fates is absolute, and they have never been mistaken before. My Lord, you must return home immediately and rescue your home from its dim fate.
你看着祭司煞有介事的样子，努力把笑忍住了。
You try your best to hold back your laughter as you watch the priest putting on their dramatic rendition.
塔拉萨波利斯的贵客，切勿心急，我们还尚未向命运泰坦们求取神谕。
Esteemed guest from Thalassopolis, please be patient. We are still yet to consult the Fate Titans for your prophecy.
不如稍等些日子再来找我，命运泰坦们一定会给您最正确的指引。
Perhaps you should come and find me in a few days. I know that the Titans will provide you with the most accurate guidance possible.
Let's leave it there for now.
有缘再见，塔拉萨波利斯的贵客。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
May we meet again, esteemed guest from Thalassopolis. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.
啊呀，今天也是不错的一天呢…你是来参观的客人吧？真不巧，你来得迟了些。
Ah, what a splendid day indeed... Are you here to visit? You're a tad late, unfortunately.
小甜饼已经派完了，你要是早半刻来，正好能赶上最后一盘呢。
The last of the sweet treats has just been given away. Had you arrived a moment sooner, you could have snagged the final batch.
不，我只是名普通的侍女，只不过有幸服侍过圣女大人。在神殿里什么活我都干过，扫地、洗衣、侍奉祭祀……
No, I'm merely a humble maid, though I've had the privilege of serving the Holy Maiden. I've undertaken various tasks here in the temple — sweeping, laundry, assisting in sacred rituals...
不过我最爱做的，还是烤点心。人在难过的时候，来块小甜饼，心情都会好很多。所以，神殿里那么多庄严的事，我偏生对这种小事最上心。
But what I love most is baking. There's something about a sweet that can brighten a gloomy day. Amid all the grave responsibilities in the temple, it's these little joys that I hold dear.
这是什么特别的甜点吗？
Is there something special about this dessert?
是我的独门秘方，多年来一直深受神殿上下的青睐。每次我打开烤炉，这香味就把勾来一大片馋虫。
It's my secret recipe, cherished by all in the temple for years. Every time I open the oven, the aroma alone draws a crowd, all eager for a taste.
说来也是好笑，我在神殿里侍奉了这么久，大家记住我的不是我这个人，反而是我烤出来的小甜饼。
The funny thing is, after all these years serving in the temple, people remember not so much me, but more so the sweet treats I bake.
Sorry to intrude. I was just passing by.
哎呀，年纪大了就爱唠叨，但愿没耽误你的行程，年轻人。
Oh dear, I do tend to ramble on as I get older. I hope I haven't kept you from your plans, youngster.
我至今还记得，当年的圣女大人边吃边称赞的样子，她说，这甜点吃起来很暖心。
I still recall how the Holy Maiden once savored these desserts, calling them "heartwarming."
不知不觉这么多年过去了，可我感觉这件事仿佛就在昨天发生似的，哎……
Years have flown by, but it feels like it all happened just yesterday. Time does fly...
Have you been working here long?
是啊，自我刚懂事起，就被派过来服侍圣女大人了。往后，我待在神殿工作了几十年。
Indeed. I was sent here to aid the Holy Maiden since I was old enough to walk. I've spent decades within these walls.
那时候我的头发还又黑又亮，脸上也没有皱纹，哪像现在。
I had sleek, jet-black hair and not a wrinkle in sight back then. Quite a different story from today.
哈，可能是这里还有些残余的香味吧。毕竟，我都用的是最好的食材。
Ha, perhaps it's the remnant scents of today's baking. I only use the finest ingredients, after all.
每次早早起来，筛出最好的面粉，过滤最纯净的蜂蜜，那股香甜味我自己闻到都忍不住口水直流。
