Every morning, I wake early to sift the finest flour and strain the purest honey. The sweet aroma is so tempting, even I can't help but start to drool.
这些年来，我见过太多人走进神殿，有些人是为了求得泰坦们的神谕，有些人是为了寻找些什么。
Over the years, I've seen many come to seek the Titans' prophecy or search for something profound within these temple walls.
但有些人只是想散散心，或者找个说话的地方…每个人都有自己的故事，
But some might just need a place to think or a listening ear... Everyone has their own tale to tell.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，虽然我不知道你是为了什么，但要是有时间，可以常来跟老婆子说说话，喝杯热茶，吃点小甜饼，或许能从中找到你想要的答案。
{F#My girl}{M#My boy}, though your quest is unknown to me, feel free to stop by anytime for a chat over hot tea and treats. You might just find what you're looking for.
啊呀，又见到你了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我就说，今天也是不错的一天呢。
Ah, there you are again, {F#my girl}{M#my boy}. I knew today was going to be good.
是有什么事吗，还是说想吃点小甜饼？我刚把面团揉好放进烤炉，要不等一会儿？
Do you need something, or are you craving some sweets? I just put a fresh batch in the oven. Care to wait a bit?
I was hoping to chat with you.
好，聊什么都可以，没想到还有人愿意听老婆子我唠叨。
Sure, we can chat about anything. It's not often someone's interested in an old lady's ramblings.
Can you show me how to make these sweet treats?
哎呀，终于有人问这个了，大家都只喜欢吃，一个个的都懒得做。其实很简单的，就是要用心些，来，我教你，可记好咯。

Ah, finally someone wants to learn this! Everyone just loves eating, but no one wants to bother making it. It's quite simple — you just need to put in some effort. Come on. I'll teach you, so pay attention.
首先面粉要过筛，蜂蜜要选最纯净的。然后嘛，做点心得用心，揉面团的时候要根据不同人的口味来，烤制的火候也是。

First, sift the flour well and choose only the purest honey. Then, you need to put your heart into the process of baking. It's crucial to tailor the dough to suit individual tastes and to get the baking just right.
最重要的是，烤制的时候记得向泰坦们祈祷，为接下来要品尝小甜饼的人送上你诚挚的祝福，这个步骤千万不能少，要不然吃起来就不是那么个味道了。
Most importantly, when baking, always offer a prayer to the Titans, blessing those who will enjoy your treats. Skipping this step means they just won't taste as delightful.
Did you serve the Holy Maiden once?
这个嘛…我曾被指派为以前某位圣女的侍女，哎，说是圣女，其实不过是个小姑娘。吃点心的时候甚至会偷偷藏一块，我问她为什么，她说想留着跟我分享。

Yes, I once served as a maid for a previous Holy Maiden. Despite her title, she was just a young girl. She'd even sneak a piece of dessert away while having snacks, and when I asked her why, she said she wanted to save it to share with me later.
哎，每次看到她那个眼神，我的心都感觉要化了。虽然那时候我还没成家，但是…咳咳，说句大逆不道的话——从那时候起我就觉得她跟我的孩子没什么两样。
Her gaze always made my heart melt. Even though I had no children of my own at that time... *cough* It may sound sacrilegious, but I felt as if she were no different from a daughter to me.
当然，这些话咱们私下说说就算了，你可千万别传出去，影响不好。
But let's keep this conversation between us. It wouldn't be right to spread such personal reflections.
你平常都在神殿里做什么？
What do you normally do around the temple?
能做什么呀，我能做的无非是些家长里短的事咯。
What else can I do? My days are filled with simple, essential chores.
打扫神殿，然后准备点心。有时候年轻的祭司们会来找我们老家伙聊天，问问以前的事。闲下来就在这儿坐着，给路过的人倒杯茶。
Cleaning the temple, then prepare treats. Sometimes the young priests seek wisdom from us elders. When it's quiet, I just sit here, offering tea to those who pass by.
日子虽然平淡，但我觉得很充实，神殿就是我的家。
Life might be simple, but it's fulfilling. This temple is my home.
I don't have much else to say.
没事没事，你先忙你的吧，这年头能有人愿意听老婆子唠叨已经很难得了。
No worries. You carry on with your day. It's rare these days for anyone to care for an old lady's stories.
It's okay. I just came to check on you.
哎，你这孩子，可太客气了。要是觉得累了，可以随时过来坐坐。
Ah, you're too kind. If you ever need a break, feel free to come over and talk to me anytime.
愿泰坦们保佑你，年轻人…也保佑那些迷茫的人们。
May the Titans bless you, youngster... and all those who wander in search of clarity.
…所以我们今天也要好好努力才行呀～啊，有人来了。
...So, let's make the most of today — oh, it looks like someone's approaching.
你好，看你的样子，是外地来的朋友吗？我叫达娜叶，这一带我挺熟的，需要我带你到处参观一下吗？
Hello, you seem to be from out of town. My name's Danae, and I know this area well. Do you need a guide?
啊…没有啦，都是些力所能及的小事，不算什么。
Ah, it's nothing. These are just small acts within my power. Nothing noteworthy.
啊？没有没有，我不是神殿的工作人员…当然是免费啦！
Ah? No, I don't work for the temple... It's certainly free!
Sorry, but I'd like to explore on my own.
噢噢，没问题，那就不打扰你啦。
Oh, sure thing. I won't bother you any further.
不必拘谨啦，母亲从小教我的——要像圣女大人那样，有余力就去帮助别人。
No need for formality. My mom taught me from a young age to be like the Holy Maiden — always lend a hand whenever possible.
所以在闲暇时候，我们一家还会过来做些义务劳作，像是清理杂草啊、擦灰什么的。
So, my family volunteer here in our spare time, tackling chores like pulling weeds and dusting.
我从小就在神殿附近长大，附近的人都认识我，你要是不放心，可以向他们打听打听。
I've lived near the temple my whole life, and everyone around here knows me. If you have any doubts, you're welcome to ask the locals about me.
这个…怎么说呢，虽然爸爸听到会很高兴，但我们是为了报恩——很久以前，母亲还是个小女孩的时候，欠过圣女大人的人情。
Well, my dad would be thrilled, but we're here to honor an old debt — when my mother was just a little girl, she owed a significant favor to the Holy Maiden.
她小时候生活非常困苦，经常饿肚子。有一天实在饿得受不了，就偷偷溜进神殿想找点吃的，结果就被抓现行了。
Growing up, my mother faced severe hardships and often went without food. One particularly desperate day, she snuck into the temple hoping to find something to eat but was caught red-handed.
那时候，偷窃神殿供品可是重罪。但当时的圣女大人不仅没有惩罚她，问清事由后还给了她满满一大包的小甜饼，让她平安回家了。

Back in those days, stealing from the temple was considered a grave offense. However, the Holy Maiden at the time chose not to punish her. After listening to her plight, she even gave my mother a bag full of sweet treats, allowing her to return home safely.
自那以后，妈妈就把家搬到了神殿附近。她总说，既然受过圣女大人的帮助，就应当把她的恩情传下去。

My mother decided to move near the temple after that. She always maintained that since she had benefitted from the Holy Maiden's generosity, it was her responsibility to continue spreading that goodness.
当然可以呀，我自幼在这附近长大，这里的屋檐、石柱，甚至墙角的每一寸青苔我都再熟悉不过了。
Absolutely! I've grown up here and know every part of this place — the eaves, the columns, and even the moss on the walls.
你看门口的台阶，表面有些断裂的痕迹，那是因为朝圣的信徒太多，以至于石阶不堪重负——
See the steps at the entrance? They're a bit worn and cracked, a testament to the many pilgrims that have passed through here —
据说在很久以前，命运三泰坦会在此现身，回应人们的祈祷。不过那都是很久远的事了，现在基本都由祭司们和圣女大人负责传达它们的神谕。

Legend has it that, centuries ago, the Three Titans of Fate would manifest here to respond to the prayers of the people. But those days are long gone. It's primarily the priests and the Holy Maiden who relay their prophecies now.
对了，我看你好像是远道而来，走了很久吧？要不要先去休息一下，需要向导的话可以随时来找我~
You've traveled a long way. Why not rest up for now? If you need a guide, I'm usually around.
是你呀，我记得…你不是本地人对吧？找我有什么事，是需要向导吗？
I remember now — you're not from around here, are you? What brings you to me? Do you need a guide?
I was hoping we could talk...
Sure. What would you like to discuss?
Could you share more about your mother?
妈妈的事啊…那个关于圣女大人是如何拯救她的故事，我听过无数遍了，但是每次听她讲，我都觉得特别温暖。
The story of how the Holy Maiden saved my mother... I've heard it countless times, but it still warms my heart every time I hear it.
她那时候还小，在那个冰冷的雪天，家里连一粒面包屑都没有，她在神殿外面徘徊了很久，在墙根下发现一个很小的洞，最后实在饿得受不了了，就钻了进去……

She was very young. It was a bitterly cold, snowy day, and she didn't even have a single crumb to eat at home. She lingered outside the temple for a long time before discovering a tiny hole at the base of the wall. Overwhelmed by hunger, she crawled through...
她想爬到神像脚下偷点供品，但是被看管的祭司发现了，妈妈说她吓得浑身发抖，以为自己肯定死定了。结果祭司将她带到审讯室的时候，圣女正巧也在。

She intended to steal some offerings at the statue's feet but was caught by a priest. My mom told me she trembled with fear, convinced her fate was sealed. However, when the priest took her to the interrogation room, by chance, the Holy Maiden was also present.
圣女轻声问：「…你多久没吃饭了？怎么这么瘦？」然后就请她吃了自己的茶点，确认她恢复力气后，塞了一大包点心让她背回家。

The Holy Maiden spoke gently. "How long have you been without food? You are thin as a stick?" After offering my mother some of her snacks and ensuring my mother had enough strength, she packed a large bag of treats for my mother to take home.
圣女大人还叮嘱，要她好好照顾自己。这么多年来，母亲一直想报答，可惜普通人没法轻易与圣女接触。母亲只好把这份感激之情向我们传承下去。

The Holy Maiden also urged her to take care of herself. Over the years, my mother has always wanted to repay the kindness, but meeting the Holy Maiden isn't something we can simply do. Instead, she instilled that deep gratitude in us.
你每天在这里忙些什么？
What do you usually do here each day?
没事的时候，我会帮忙打扫下附近，比如顺手拔点杂草，刮刮外墙上的青苔什么的。
When I have some spare time, I pitch in with tidying up around here — pulling weeds, scraping moss off the walls, and the like.
除此以外，你应该知道的——就是给游客指指路，担任下义务向导什么的。
Besides that — as you probably know — I help visitors find their way around, acting as a volunteer guide.
毕竟这里的路挺复杂，神殿里还有很多地方是禁止入内的，刚来的时候容易走丢，万一惹上什么麻烦就不好了。
Given the complexity of the paths here, and with many areas being off-limits, it's easy for newcomers to get lost, which could lead to trouble.
你有遇到什么有趣的人吗？
Have you met any interesting people here?
唔，说不上有趣，毕竟来这里的人形形色色，各有各的故事。
Well, not necessarily interesting, as everyone who comes here has their own story to tell.
有专程来朝圣的信徒，有研究历史的学者，也有来探索未来运势的商人。
The temple attracts devout pilgrims, scholars studying history, and merchants looking to glimpse their future fortunes.
要我说，这里面最有趣的或许还是侍奉泰坦们的那些祭司吧…还有圣女大人，不知道在他们眼里，我们这样的普通信徒是什么样。
I find the priests who serve the Titans and the Holy Maiden the most intriguing of all... It makes me curious how they view us mere regular followers.
Let's stop here for now. Goodbye.
好，路上小心哦。要是在这儿遇到了麻烦，需要帮助什么的，记得来找我～
Alright, take care. If you run into trouble and need help, remember to look me up.
It's nothing. I was just passing through.
噢，有机会再聊。要是在这儿遇到了麻烦，需要帮助什么的，记得来找我哦～
Oh, let's catch up in the future. If you run into trouble and need help, remember to look me up.
Feel like talking for a bit?
啊…没问题。要聊聊奥赫玛推理协会的故事吗？我的那几位朋友…他们都是很好的人。
Ah, sure. Would you like to hear about the Okhema Deduction Society? My friends... they are wonderful people.
尼科马库斯比我们的年龄都大一些，性格也更沉稳。他是「绳结学派」贤人的首席秘书，负责招募新人的工作。他标准很严格，听说上任以来总共也只招了两人。

Nicomachus is a bit older than us and is known for his calm and collected nature. He holds the position of head secretary for the Nodist Sage, in charge of recruitment. Known for his stringent standards, he's reputed to have recruited only two people since his tenure began.
尼科马库斯加入推理协会的原因，说起来有点好笑——他是为了和科洛埃小姐有更多私下相处的时间才报名的。不过他确实博学多才，看过的故事比我们都多。
He joined the Deduction Society partly to spend more personal time with Miss Clio, which is... quite a ridiculous reason. He is a capable scholar at heart, though, and he's read more than any of us.
说到他的趣事…啊，这还是安德烈告诉我的。有次尼科马库斯和一个「智种学派」的学者公开辩论，谈到泰坦的权能是否至高无上时，他竟然这样提供论据——

As for an amusing tale about him — this one comes from Andre. Once, Nicomachus was in a public debate with a Nousporist scholar about whether the Titans' powers are absolute. Nicomachus offered this kind of argument —
「自然对数的圆周率倍的单位虚数幂再加一等于零，所以泰坦的权能至高无上，证毕！」
"The power of pi times the natural logarithm, raised to the power of the imaginary unit plus one, equals zero, thereby proving the absolute power of the Titan. Q.E.D."
——后来大家发现他那时是急着想上厕所。
Turns out, he just really needed a bathroom break.
安德烈——啊，也就是安德烈亚斯，他是我们几个之中最年轻的，和我一样都是奥赫玛土生土长的居民。他是刻法勒的信徒，因为家里有个不敬神的哥哥而经常头痛不已。
Andreas is the youngest of us, born and raised in Okhema just like me. He's a devoted disciple of Kephale, though his brother's lack of reverence frequently gives him headaches.
安德烈是从传信石版上看到我发的会员招募信息以后加入的，他虽然很虔诚，但生活并不古板，喜欢参加这些类似我们这样奇奇怪怪的活动小组。
He joined us after seeing my recruitment post on the teleslate. Though deeply faithful, he isn't old-fashioned and enjoys participating in unusual activities like ours.
他还是奥赫玛棍球协会的成员，据说打棍球的水平比「曳石学派」的很多人还要好…不过这个也有可能是他自吹自擂的结果。
He's also a member of the Okhema Stickball Society, rumored to play better than many from the Helkolithists, though that might be his own brag.
不论如何，我本希望在他加入之后，协会能够吸引到一些更年轻的同好，从而可以开展更多的活动…唉。
I had hoped his joining would bring in more young people so we could do more together, but alas.
科洛埃小姐算是协会的创始成员。事情的起因是她有一次来浴场玩，正好碰见我和几个人在图书室读推理小说。她和我们刚好喜欢同一个作家，就这么聊起来了……

Miss Clio is practically a founding member of the society. It all started when she came to the baths and bumped into a few of us reading detective novels in the library. She happened to like the same author as us, and that kicked off our conversation...
后来我们几个在浴场偶遇的同好就互相留了联系方式，成立了这个自封为「奥赫玛推理协会」的活动社。
Then, since we kept seeing each other at the baths, our group exchanged contacts and established what we now proudly call the "Okhema Deduction Society."
因为没有什么定期活动，随着时间推移，不时有旧人退出、偶尔才有新人加入…到今年就只剩下了我们四个活跃分子。
Without regular gatherings, the group's dynamics shifted over time, and members have come and gone... Now, just the four of us remain actively involved.
我原本构思过一些活动企划，但因为他们都是树庭的工作人员，闲暇时间经常被用来做各种研究课题，就……
I had envisioned several activities for us, but since everyone else is employed at the Grove, their free time is usually taken up by all sorts of research projects, so...
…唉。命运有时候就是这么蛮不讲理。
…我？呃，我的事情好像没什么可讲的。
...Me? Well, there isn't much to say.
我以前给浴场当过保安，给商队当过护卫，不过现在只能做一些从边远地区为大家寻找失物的委托。
I used to work security at the baths and served as a guard for caravans, but now my gigs are mostly about retrieving lost items from remote areas for everyone.
这工作听上去有点像所谓的「冒险者」，但其实不过每天在传信石版上跟进树庭发布的各种信息，推测黑潮的活动情况，从中规划一条相对安全的寻物路线……

While it might sound like the life of an "adventurer," it's mostly about checking on the teleslate information from the Grove, predicting the movements of the black tide, and mapping out a relatively safe route for retrieval missions...
…没多少技术含量，算是个看天吃饭的活计吧。
...It's not a skilled job, really. Just one that depends on the whims of fate.
I have nothing more to chat about.
哦，没关系。最近是多事之秋…您也要多注意安全。
Oh, that's alright. These are tumultuous times... Take care and stay safe.
Sorry, I was just passing through.
哦，没关系。最近是多事之秋…您也要多注意安全。
Oh, that's alright. These are tumultuous times... Take care and stay safe.
「死亡是大自然的常态。不平凡的是我们活着。」
"Death is nature's norm. What is extraordinary is that we live."
现在想起尼科马库斯说过的这句话…真是五味杂陈。
When I reflect on this line from Nicomachus now, it stirs a complex mix of emotions...
哎，这位朋友，对小玩意感兴趣不？拉冬城的祭仪烛台，哀地里亚的奶酪块，圣女大人亲手做的玩具，开价合适，全都能卖！
Hey there, friend! Interested in knick-knacks? I've got ritual candlesticks from Ladon, fine cheese from Aidonia, and toys handmade by the Holy Maiden herself — all at great prices!
瞧你说的什么话——我向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓，宣传什么就是什么！一个字都假不了！再说，我哪有能力搞来假的？
What an accusation! By {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, I swear what I advertise is what you get! Not a word of falsehood! Besides, how could I possibly procure counterfeits?
Where did all these items come from?
当然是靠进货啦！我向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓，这些全是产地直销，可谓正统的无本实诚买卖！
It's all about sourcing! By {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, I swear these are all directly from the producers, genuinely honest dealings!
就拿这埃杜利亚的羽笔来说吧，用的可是艾格勒身上掉落的羽毛！那城邦离得多远啊？让大地兽吃撑了全速赶路，都得从纷争月走到机缘月去。

Take this feather pen from Idilia, for instance. Made from feathers shed by Aquila! That city-state is miles away. Even if a dromas gorged itself and ran at full speed, it would have to leave in the Month of Strife and only get there in the Month of Fortune.
说来也巧，那地方的朝圣者昨天组团来了，带了好多贡品，我看它堆在边上，模样也别致，就悄悄进了货。总共就这么一个，先到先得！

Funny enough, a group of pilgrims from that place came through yesterday, bringing loads of offerings. One of them caught my eye — it looked pretty unique — so I snagged it for the stock. There's only one, so it's first come, first served!
哎，果然你也不理解。劝你别去揭发，只会让那些卫兵白白收笔贿赂。
Ah, as expected, you don't understand me either. Trust me. Don't bother reporting it. It'll just end with the guards pocketing bribes for nothing.
我会详细给你解释，就别在那种人身上浪费时间了，用利衡币就能收买的人，跟他们对上眼我都觉得晦气！
I'll explain the whole thing to you, but don't waste your time on such people. Associating with those who can be bought with Balance Coins is bad luck for me!
附近的卫兵看了你一眼，却无动于衷。
A nearby guard glances at you but remains indifferent.
哎，你也不理解。但我会详细解释的，别在那种人身上浪费时间了，用利衡币就能收买的人，跟他们对上眼我都觉得晦气！

Ah, you don't understand me either. I'll explain the whole thing, but don't waste your time on such people. Dealing with anyone who can be bought off with Balance Coins just feels like inviting bad luck!
不要把我跟那些小偷混为一谈，我是塔兰顿的信徒，贪赃徇私的事我绝不做！再说，我自己也压根不缺钱，根本不会为了生计而偷窃！
Don't lump me in with those thieves. I am a disciple of Talanton, and I would never engage in corruption! Besides, I'm not short on money, so I wouldn't steal to make ends meet!
但你要知道，如果我不拿，那些贡品的下场会如何？不是被祭司偷偷吞了，就是堆起来全丢进海里。合适吗？不合适啊！

But think about it — what would happen to those offerings if I didn't take them? They'd either be secretly pocketed by the priests or tossed into the sea. Does that sound right to you? Absolutely not!
身为{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的追随者，我有义务让所有物品的价值得到公正评判。为此，即便要背上偷盗的骂名，我也心甘情愿。

As a follower of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, it is my solemn duty to ensure every item is assessed with fairness and justice. For this cause, I'm even willing to bear the shame of being called a thief.
So you consider yourself a righteous man?
行了，不必多言，这就是我坚持的律法，问心无愧。
Nevermind then. This is the law I uphold, and my conscience is clear.
话说回来，你要是不买，我们可以互相行个方便。但如果有感兴趣的，我们就再聊聊？
Anyway, if you're not buying, maybe we can both excuse ourselves. But if you're interested, we can keep talking.
——密底斯泰歇的图章，放凉的贡果派，全都可卖，全都好价！
— Mythemis' seals and chilled pies make from offering fruits! Everything's for sale, all at great prices!
嗨，是你啊。怎么样，对做买卖有兴趣了吗？
Hey, it's you. So, what do you say? Interested in making a deal?
问吧问吧，正好这会儿没什么生意。
Go ahead. Business is slow right now.
「我，达格拉，塔兰顿的忠实信徒，向天秤起誓——我将遵从内心的律法，为物品的价值得到公正对待而永远抗争。此心可鉴，至死…方休！」

"I, Dagra, a devoted disciple of Talanton, swear upon the scales — I shall fight tirelessly for the fair valuation of all things, abiding by the law within my heart. Let this conviction stand, until death... and beyond!"
话说回来，卫兵们不理解，说这就是偷窃，还要让祭司抓捕我。但他们不也暗地里往自己口袋里塞吗？可笑！
As for the guards, they just don't get it. They call it theft and want the priests to arrest me. But aren't the priests the same ones secretly stuffing their own pockets? Ridiculous!
听说你还拿过圣女的东西？
Have you ever taken anything from the Holy Maiden?
唉，实话说，我真心对不起圣女大人。上次进货的时候，误拿了她的手工制品，导致她一直把我当个小偷。但圣女大人的小玩意…不得不说，都是划时代的产物。

Ah, to tell the truth, I do owe the Holy Maiden an apology. The last time I was stocking up, I accidentally took one of her handmade creations, and she's seen me as a thief ever since. But her trinkets... I've got to admit, they're revolutionary creations!
想想，雅努斯密径的微型版、远距离传信的杯子，甚至还有会动的奇兽模型…我太想让它们展露在世人面前了，所以后来按捺不住心情，又拿了几次。

Just imagine — a miniaturized version of Janus's Hidden Passage, a cup that enables long-distance communication, and even animated models of wondrous beasts... I couldn't help myself. I was so eager to show these wonders to the world that I ended up taking a few more.
The Holy Maiden would never waste anything.
都这样了，你还说自己不是偷？
Even after all that, you still insist you're not stealing?
别急，或许你也听说了，圣女的物品到最后都是要被祭司没收的，理由是什么「将借来的时间归还给命运」…明眼人都听得懂这是什么意思吧？

Hold on. Perhaps you've heard that all things belonging to the Holy Maiden are ultimately confiscated by the priests, with the excuse of "returning borrowed time to destiny"... But let's be honest. Anyone with a bit of sense knows what's going on.
要是我不拿，最后不都便宜了那些祭司。圣女能留下什么呢？什么都没有！
If I don't take them, they'll just end up benefiting those priests. What would the Holy Maiden have left? Nothing!
唉，虔诚信徒所行之路，总是遍布荆棘啊。
Ah, the path of a faithful disciple is always riddled with thorns.
Quit taking what isn't yours and live an honest life.
哈哈，那是你践行的律法，我可没必要遵从。不过我理解，在这里还能遇见如此坚持正义的人，想必你也会受到塔兰顿的赞扬吧。
Ha, that's your law to follow, not mine. But I get it. Running into someone so devoted to justice around here is a rare thing. I'm sure Talanton would commend you for it.
回见。愿命运泰坦们庇佑你！
Farewell. May the Fate Titans bless you!
Quit taking what isn't yours and live an honest life.
哈哈，那是你践行的律法，我可没必要遵从。不过我理解，在这里还能遇见如此坚持正义的人，想必你也会受到塔兰顿的赞扬吧。
Ha, that's your law to follow, not mine. But I get it. Running into someone so devoted to justice around here is a rare thing. I'm sure Talanton would commend you for it.
回见。愿命运泰坦们庇佑你！
Farewell. May the Fate Titans bless you!
阁下，冒昧打扰。我曾看到您从神殿内走出来，但只有相关人员才能进入那片区域。看您的打扮不像是普通的朝圣者，烦请告知您的身份？

Forgive my intrusion, esteemed one. I noticed you emerging from the temple, a place reserved for authorized personnel. Given your attire, you don't appear to be a regular pilgrim. May I ask who you are?
The Holy Maiden asked for me to be here.
怎会…是圣女大人的客人吗！
How could it be... are you a guest of the Holy Maiden?
听闻圣女大人深居简出，若是她亲自邀请，想必您也是位行位高权重的祭司！很荣幸能认识您！
I've heard the Holy Maiden rarely shows herself in public. If she personally invited you, then you must be a priest of considerable rank! It's truly an honor to meet you!
未来…您是在暗示岁月的权能吗？莫非您是一位来自异邦的欧洛尼斯祭司？
The future... Are you alluding to the power of time? Could it be that you are an Oronyx priest from other cities?
嗯，我确实听说最近会有圣女大人的贵客来访，如此就说得通了！很荣幸能认识您！
Ah, that would make sense. I recently learned that the Holy Maiden was expecting an esteemed guest. It's truly an honor to meet you!
阁下，虽然我们才刚相识，但我有一个不情之请，还请您原谅…您面见过圣女大人，能否透露下她是位怎样的人？
Esteemed one, though we've just met, I have a small favor to ask. Please forgive me... You've seen the Holy Maiden, so could you share what she's like?
很遗憾…我只是个卫兵，并没有踏入内殿的权限……
Regrettably... I'm just a guard, and I don't have the privilege to enter the inner sanctum...
I know little about her myself...
这样啊，好吧…我只是个卫兵，从未被允许踏入内殿，所以很好奇……
I see, well... I'm just a guard, never allowed inside the inner sanctum, so I'm curious...
就算是只言片语也好，请您讲讲吧！
Even a few words would be appreciated. Please share!
拗不过这位热情的卫兵，你只好简单描述了番记忆中的圣女模样……
Unable to resist the guard's enthusiasm, you briefly describe the Holy Maiden as you remember her...
啊啊…正如神谕所说，她果然是位善良的人…阁下，还请收下我的谢礼，请将它视作我对命运的进贡……
Ah... just as the prophecy foretold, she truly is a kind soul. Esteemed one, please accept this token of my gratitude — consider it my humble tribute to destiny.
I'm afraid I can't accept this.
啊…我忘了您来自异邦，和雅努萨波利斯这边的习俗不同。
Ah... I forgot you're from a foreign city. Customs here in Janusopolis must be unfamiliar to you.
不会不会，您没有责怪份量太少，已经让我很惶恐了。对…我忘了您来自异邦，习俗不同……
No, no, the fact that you didn't comment on how little it is has me on edge. Oh... I forgot you're from a foreign city, and our customs must be unfamiliar to you.
多么清廉的大人啊，与圣殿的祭司完全不同…我对您的感激之情无以言表。阁下，若是有要了解的事，请尽管来找我。我必定知无不言！
Such integrity, esteemed one, so unlike the temple's priests... I'm deeply grateful. Noble one, if there's anything you wish to know, please feel free to inquire. I'll share everything I can!
异邦的祭司阁下，很高兴再见到您！您今日的气色也很好，想必是命运眷顾！有什么是我能帮到您的？
Priest from the outlands, it's good to see you again! You look great today. Destiny must favor you! How may I assist you?
What is your view on the Titan faith?
不不，像我这种卫兵，怎敢对祭祀这种大事妄加议论啊！实在是诚惶诚恐……
No, no, as a mere guard, how could I dare to comment on something as sacred as a ritual? The very thought makes me uneasy...
请您放心，祭司们的教诲我会铭记——{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为我们指引前路，而{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的教典正是卫士的根基！
Rest assured, I heed the teachings of the priests. — {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guides our path, and the scriptures of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} are the foundation of every guard!
相比这个，不如您再跟我多讲讲圣女大人的事吧！她是位怎样的人？是否就像神谕说的那样，模样优雅，话语足以震慑人心？
Rather than that, tell me more about the Holy Maiden! What is she like? Is she truly as graceful and commanding as the prophecy foretold?
考虑到这里是「过去」的空间，稍微透露些应该也不要紧，但你并不了解他所熟知的那位圣女，那么……
Considering this is the "past," revealing a little should be fine, but you don't know which Holy Maiden he's referring to, so...
你描述了缇宝给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
You describe your impression of Tribbie, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...
哦哦，热情烂漫！正符合神谕的描述，与前代圣女如出一辙，多么令人欣喜的传承啊！
Oh, so spirited and full of life! She's exactly as the prophecy foretold, just like the previous Holy Maiden. What a wonderful legacy!
你描述了缇宁给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
You describe your impression of Trinnon, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...
哦哦，冷静而知性的少女，她尽责的信念实在让人感动…多么伟大的人物啊！
Oh, such a calm and intelligent young woman. Her dedication to duty is truly inspiring... What a remarkable individual!
你描述了缇安给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
You describe your impression of Trianne, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...
哦哦，活泼顽皮的圣女！即便受到命运眷顾，仍旧保留着心中那份纯真，多么难能可贵啊！
Oh, a lively and spirited Holy Maiden! Even with destiny's favor, she still retains her innocence. How rare and precious!
感谢您，祭司阁下！阁下的话语令我蒙受神恩，我可真是太幸运了！
Thank you, Honorable Priest! Your words are a blessing to me. I truly am fortunate.
…啊，能得到阁下的认同，实在不胜荣幸…感激涕零…嘶嘶。
...Oh, to receive your acknowledgment is the greatest honor... I am deeply grateful.
不瞒您说，我在奥莱诺斯的老家一直都维持着坚定的信仰，对泰坦的捐赠额度也是全城数一数二。家人从小就教我祈祷的流程，希望我能为信仰献身。

In my hometown of Oleinus, I've always been deeply devoted to my faith. My contributions to the Titans are among the highest in the city. From a young age, my family taught me the sacred rituals of prayer, instilling in me a hope to one day dedicate my life fully to the faith.
如今，我如愿来到雅努萨波利斯，但却被告知身份不够，无法进入圣殿。幸蒙父母赐我的健硕身躯，得以成为卫士，供奉薪饷的七成给泰坦，继续践行我的信仰。

Now, I have come to Janusopolis as I wished, but was told I am not eligible to enter the sacred temple. Fortunately, my robust physique allowed me to become a guard, dedicate seventy percent of my salary to the Titans, and continue the practice of my faith.
有同僚嘲笑我的行为，说祭司们有私心，我这样的行为毫无意义。但是…「虔诚的信念，比起对错更为重要。」这是我的家人教我的第一课，我对此无比感激。

Some of my peers make fun of me, saying the priests are self-serving and that what I'm doing is pointless. But my family always taught me that "faith is about devotion, not about being right or wrong," and I'm truly grateful for that lesson.
有其余见到圣女的办法吗？
Is there another way to see the Holy Maiden?
阁下，您的意思莫非是…按照规定，动用雅努斯迷津进行卜算，需要有卫士陪同，这样…就能带我在不违背律法的前提下进入内殿？
Esteemed one, are you suggesting...? According to the rules, using Janus' Maze for divination requires a guard's presence, which... would allow me to enter the inner sanctum without breaking the law?
So you've been planning this, eh?
让您见笑了，这是我在脑中模拟了千百遍的情形，路线图我早就规划好了。阁下，事不宜迟！我们……
You caught me. This is a scenario I've rehearsed in my mind a thousand times, and I've planned the route in detail. Esteemed one, there's no time to waste! We should...
…还是算了吧。辜负了阁下好意…请恕罪，我绝没有消遣的意思，只是刚才那瞬间，我回想起了神谕。
...Forget it. I shouldn't have misinterpreted your kindness... Please forgive me. I had no intention of being disrespectful. It's just that... at that moment... I recalled the prophecy.
「为使门径璨璨生辉，继任者将息心隐居，免受叨扰」——那是前前前代圣女踏上朝圣之旅后的第一条神谕，数百个光历年前，由命运三相殿的祭司代为传达。

"To keep the passage radiant, the successor must live in seclusion, undisturbed." This was the first prophecy issued centuries ago by the Holy Maiden countless generations ago, conveyed through the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates hundreds of Light Calendar years ago.
曾听闻圣女大人和蔼亲切，而能进入圣殿的，多半都是贡献良多的虔诚信徒，我想所谓的「叨扰」，指的可能就是我这样不自知的家伙吧。
I've heard the Holy Maiden is approachable and kind, and those allowed into the temple are often faithful disciples. Perhaps the "disturbance" refers to unaware individuals like myself.
有您对圣女大人的描述，已经足够滋养我的信念了！请放心，我会全力以赴，保卫雅努萨波利斯远离一切威胁！
Your words about the Holy Maiden are more than enough to inspire my faith! Rest assured, I will do everything to protect Janusopolis from all threats!
I won't bother you anymore, farewell.
是！您慢走，祭司大人。愿圣女的慈爱永远与您，还有我同在！
Yes! Safe travels, noble priest. May the Holy Maiden's mercy be with you, and with me as well!
I won't bother you anymore, farewell.
是！您慢走，祭司大人。愿圣女的慈爱永远与您，还有我同在！
Yes! Safe travels, noble priest. May the Holy Maiden's mercy be with you, and with me as well!
最近对你的印象有改变！
Lately, my impression of you has changed.
咦，是吗？方便问一问阁下，是在何时、因何事，产生了什么样的印象变化呢？
Oh? Really? If I may ask, when and because of what did your impression change?
When we went to the Grove together.
的确，相伴旅行能让人发现朋友身上不为人知的一面。即使是相识已久的缇安老师，在这次树庭之行里，同样露出些隐蔽的性情。
Indeed, traveling together often reveals sides of a friend that were previously unseen. Even Trianne, whom I've known for so long, showed hidden sides of her personality on this trip to the Grove.
至于阁下…也让我看到此前并不了解的一面。例如，阁下虽然和缇安老师一样洒脱纯粹，可关键时刻又很靠得住呢。
As for you... you, too, showed me a side I didn't know. For example, while you're as carefree and pure as Trianne, you're also incredibly reliable in critical moments.
诶？问我对阁下的初印象吗？说来可笑，当时看到阁下与白厄站在一块儿，我还以为奥赫玛又迎来一位板正的救世主了呢。
Oh? What was my first impression of you? Funny story — when I first saw you standing with Phainon, I thought Okhema had welcomed yet another upright Deliverer.
你很会照顾人们的心情。
You're good at taking care of people's emotions.
啊，谢谢夸奖…这大概要多谢我与死亡打了千年的交道，作为刽子手，对将死之人的心理已经训练出极为细腻的揣度……

Ah, thank you for the compliment... I suppose I have to thank the thousand years I've spent brushing shoulders with death. As an executioner, I've trained myself to deeply understand the minds of those nearing their end...
…阁下怎么沉默了？…地狱笑话又是什么意思？
Why are you silent? And... what does this phrase "black comedy" mean...?
比初印象要有趣、可亲得多。
You're much more approachable and interesting than my first impression of you.
啊…阁下愿意这么说，我很开心。我平素深居简出，又身负死亡的诅咒，已经很久没有认识新的朋友了，也许给人的初印象确实有些冰冷……

Ah, I'm glad you think so. I've spent much of my life in seclusion, bearing the curse of death, so it's been a long time since I made new friends. Perhaps my initial impression does come across as cold.
阿格莱雅大人曾嘱咐我待人更加亲切温柔些。可人们对我不是退避三舍就是恭敬有加，似乎这份隔阂并不那么容易消弭吧。
Lady Aglaea once advised me to be gentler and more amiable in my demeanor. But people either avoid me altogether or treat me with great reverence — this distance is not so easily bridged.
那么，我就把阁下的这番话作为勉励吧。希望在不远的将来，阁下能在我身上看到更加可喜的改变。
Let me take your words as encouragement, then. I hope that in the near future, you'll see even more welcoming changes in me.
你真的要独自返乡、抵御黑潮？
Are you really going to return home alone and face the black tide?
记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往回忆中的言语，因其承载的情感而重现……
The fragment of memory seems to waver — words once spoken are reappearing now due to the emotion they contain...
…假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
If all goes well, we may not meet again. Thank you for everything you've brought to Amphoreus.
Train more, stay up late less.
男孩子独自出门，保护好自己。
Stay safe out there. A lone boy can get into a lot of trouble.
没了你我们可怎么办，呜呜呜。
*sob* ...What are we going to do without you?
…呵，开拓者，又开始说胡话了么？
I don't think I have more to chat about.
That is all I have to say. Farewell.
如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.
此去恐无归期。我能否将后背交给你们，恳请你们…继续协助逐火的征程？
With this departure, I fear that I will never again return. Can I entrust you to watch my back... and to continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey in my absence?
What do you think of the Chrysos Heirs?
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
The new god of Strife... Mydei!
决然接下「天谴之矛」的火种，以不容置喙的王令终结悬锋王朝，又为族人带来荣耀的崭新未来……
He decided to accept the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury, ended the dynasty of Kremnos with an unquestionable royal decree, and brought his people a new future of glory...
说来有趣，近来我在悬锋人的闲谈里，已经能听见「愿迈德漠斯捍卫你」这般的祝愿了。
Interestingly, the phrase "May Mydeimos protect you" has started to appear in the conversations of Kremnoans.
如今孤身把守悬锋、将黑潮尽数拦截的迈德漠斯，在众人心目中，已然当得起翁法罗斯守护者一称。
Now remaining alone at Castrum Kremnos and holding back the entirety of the black tide, Mydeimos has undoubtedly earned the title of Guardian of Amphoreus in the hearts of the people.
…不知在送别缇安后，阁下对吾师的印象是否有所转变。
...After you bid farewell to Trianne, has your impression of my teacher changed?
她们并非如外表看上去的那般无忧无虑…在缇安之前，无情的命运已将千万次同样悲伤的离别交予她们，而吾师的步伐却从未犹疑。
They are not as carefree as they appear... Before Trianne's loss, merciless fate had already brought them countless similarly sad partings, yet my teacher's steps never faltered.
…愿我们都能如吾师所期盼的那般，与诸多逝者在那鲜花芬芳的西风彼岸重逢。
...May we all, as my teacher hopes, reunite with the many departed at the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring.
Castorice, the one with a mysterious backstory.
与她相处的这些时日，想必你已发觉，遐蝶比绝大多数人要更加热爱生活、珍视生命。这样的人却身负死亡的诅咒，不能不说是命运的玩笑。

Now that you've spent time with her, you must have noticed that Castorice cherishes life and loves living far more than most. For someone like her to bear the curse of death — it's nothing short of a cruel joke by fate.
至于她的身世…不如直接找她当面询问吧？呵…她可不是个擅长拒绝的孩子啊。
As for her backstory... why not ask her directly? Heh... She's not the kind to easily refuse others.
与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
…无缺的英雄。时至今日，我仍会如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。
...The perfect hero. To this day, that is still the opinion I have of Phainon. As the most perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.
尽管他未能承载尼卡多利的火种…但这并不意味着他有失资质。
Although he could not bear Nikador's Coreflame... that does not mean he lacks the qualifications.
属于他的命运，将在不远的未来，如同烈阳一般冉冉升起。
His destiny will rise like the blazing sun in the near future.
你们的大表演家，那刻夏。
愚钝的阿那克萨戈拉斯，树庭七贤人之一，从事渎神的「炼金术」研究，行事狂狷不羁、独爱口放厥词。
Anaxagoras the fool, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove, who engages in heretical alchemical research and acts with reckless arrogance, loving to spew nonsense with abandon.
「金织」与智种学派贤人的宿怨无需隐瞒，但我向你陈述的并非偏见，而是坊间对他最广为流传的画像。而他真正的面相，要由你自己判断。

The grudge between the Goldweaver and the Sage of Nousporism needs no concealment. However, what I've described is not prejudice, but rather the image of him most widely known in the public eye. His true nature? That's for you to judge.
Hyacine, whose smile is really sweet.
上次与你介绍风堇时，我提到她是「昏光庭院」的首席护理师。但事实上，她也是这个组织的继承人与管理者。
The last time I introduced Hyacine to you, I mentioned she is the chief healer of the Twilight Courtyard. But in truth, she's also the heir and manager of this organization.
「昏光庭院」存世已久，只是因天空一族式微而逐渐凋亡。风堇让这个名号再临世间，以微光与温柔疗愈众人…想必也背负着殷切的梦想吧。

The Twilight Courtyard has existed for a long time, though it faded into obscurity with the decline of the Sky people. Hyacine has brought this name back into the world, healing others with her gentleness and light... She must be carrying her own deep dreams and aspirations.
I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.
I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.
无论哪位黄金裔，都是此世不可或缺的英杰。我其实也无权代替这个时代评判他们，因为他们都承载着这个世界的未来。
Every member of the Chrysos Heirs is a hero who this world cannot do without. Even I have no right to cast appraisal on them on behalf of this era, because they all shoulder the future of this world.
I want to chat with Tribbie!
当然可以！小灰想聊些什么呢？又想听*我们*给你唱预言的歌谣吗？
No problem! What would you like to discuss, Little Gray? Do you want to hear our song of prophecy again?
我想…听听你们旅行的故事。
I want to... hear stories of your travels.
当然可以啦！*我们*在世间旅行千年，每个人都有丰富有趣的经历呢！小灰具体想听什么故事呀？
Of course! We've traveled the world for thousands of years — each of us has countless rich and fascinating experiences. What kind of story would you like to hear, Little Gray?
想听听缇宝经历的故事。
I want to hear about Tribbie's experiences.
*我们*吗？*我们*记得自己离开雅努萨波利斯的时候，手里还拿着家乡的纺锤。
We? We remember that when we left Janusopolis, we still held the spindle of our homeland in our hands.
那时候可天真了，还以为半神就能用纺锤能纺出命运的丝线，将朋友们联系在一起……
Back then, *we* were so naive — thinking that as demigods, *we* could use the spindle to spin threads of destiny and tie our friends together.
那纺锤后来在战火中丢失了。*我们*的旅途也并不顺利。没有黄金裔愿意响应*我们*的号召，甚至还有坏蛋把我们丢进了牢中监禁……
But that spindle was lost in war. Our journey wasn't smooth either. Not a single Chrysos Heir was willing to heed our call. Worse still, there were villains who imprisoned us in a cell...
直到刻律德菈找到了*我们*，是她让黄金裔们团结一心，将神谕变作律令。
Until Cerydra found us. It was she who united the Chrysos Heirs and turned the prophecy into law.
真想也让你认识一下她，只可惜…没有这个机会了……
I wish I could introduce her to you, but alas... that opportunity is long gone.
想听听缇宁经历的故事。
I want to hear about Trinnon's experiences.
缇宁她安静又知性，很久以前*我们*一块儿从雅努萨波利斯离开的时候，她抱着一小块石板，想要把自己的知识和理想传达给所有响应号召的黄金裔。

Trinnon is quiet and intellectual. Long ago, when we left Janusopolis together, she carried a small stone tablet, hoping to convey her knowledge and ideals to all the Chrysos Heirs who answered the call.
她一开始遇见了一群好心的吟游诗人，在他们的保护下行走诸邦。
At first, she encountered a group of kind-hearted bards who protected her as they traveled across many lands.
可是，凡人的生命脆弱无比，百年之后，她就又变成独自一人，而且比以前更不爱说话了……
However, mortal lives are fragile, and a hundred years later, she was alone again. By that time, she spoke even less than before...
I want to hear about Trianne...
…小灰，不用欲言又止的，*我们*已经没那么难过啦。与缇安的告别仪式都已经结束了，再不将脚尖指向明天，缇安也会伤心、生气的。

...Little Gray, there's no need to hesitate. We're no longer that sad. We've already held a farewell ceremony for Trianne. If we don't turn our toes toward the future, Trianne will feel sad — and even angry.
言归正传。缇安是*我们*中最勇敢的一个，最早出发的时候，她手里拿着一把小木剑，哼哧哼哧地想亲自去降伏泰坦呢！
Back to the topic. Trianne was the bravest among us. When she first set out, she held a small wooden sword, huffing and puffing as she dreamed of taking down a Titan herself!
可惜，结果似乎不大好。她被几名泰坦眷属从拉冬追到埃普斯，那可真是一段惊心动魄的逃亡……
Sadly, it didn't go so well. She was chased by several Titankins all the way from Ladon to Epos in a thrilling escape...
不过，缇安很骄傲地告诉*我们*，正因为被眷属追赶、不得不反复施放「百界门」的经历，她才能成为*我们*中最娴熟的门匠呢！

But Trianne proudly told us that it was precisely because of those experiences — being chased by the Kins and repeatedly forced to use "Century Gate" — that she became the most skilled gatekeeper among us!
缇宝老师，我想学「百界门」！
Master Tribbie, I want to learn how to use the "Century Gate"!
小灰，好有志气！可普通人怎么想都不可能学会「百界门」的啦。
Ambitious, Little Gray! But it is impossible for ordinary folks to understand how to use the "Century Gate."
…不过小灰只是看几眼就能学会欧洛尼斯奇迹，听上去也是一件不可能的事情…难道，小灰真的是天才？
...That being said, you took one look at Oronyx's Miracle and learned how to use it. That should've been equally impossible... Could Tribbie be wrong and you are a genius all along, Little Gray?
好，决定了，*我们*来教你使用百界门，来创造奇迹吧！
Alright, it's decided. We will teach you how to use the Century Gate! Let's create some miracles!
小灰，请你在心底呼唤「万径之门」，感受空间的摇曳，聆听遥远的彼方在你耳边的呢喃……
Little Gray, please call out the "Gate of Infinity" from the bottom of your heart. Feel the wavering of space and listen to the distant murmurs in your ears...
然后，把你感受到的这股力量，像是撒网一样丢出来！
Then, cast out the power that you sense, like it's a net!
…小灰，吓*我们*一跳。但门径好像没打开诶……
...Little Gray, you scared us! And it doesn't seem that the gate is opened...
不对不对！小灰用力过猛啦，听上去好像要把空间都给消灭掉啦！
No, no! That's far too violent, Little Gray! It sounds like you want to completely annihilate space itself!
感受不到，不如界域定锚。
I cannot feel it. Shall I use a Space Anchor?
那是什么…难道是*我们*不知道的雅努斯神迹吗？
What is that? Is it some kind of miracle of Janus that we do not know about?
看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！

It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Little Gray. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!
嗯…小灰已经和缇宁一起去到往世的雅努萨波利斯，看到过*我们*的过去了吧？
Little Gray, you've traveled with Trinnon to the past Janusopolis and seen our past, haven't you?
缇宁所看见、听见的事物，*我们*也都清楚地感知到了。那段因漫长岁月而蒙尘的往事，借欧洛尼斯的手擦拭，又再度明亮起来。
Whatever Trinnon has seen and heard, we also sense. Those dusty memories, buried beneath the weight of time, have been polished by Oronyx and now shine brightly once more.
*我们*的妈妈…有关她的记忆是*我们*最宝贵，可也最容易失去的回忆…因为有她陪伴的日子太美好，以至于*我们*总不敢沉湎其中。
Our mother... Memories of her are our most precious treasures, yet also the easiest to lose. Those days she spent with us were so beautiful that we hardly dared to immerse ourselves in them.
可太久不回想的记忆，等到真的想重温的时候，才会发现它们已然模糊不清，仅在零星几个夜晚，以梦境的方式送给*我们*一个久别重逢的轻吻……
But memories left untouched for too long become blurred when one finally tries to recall them. They return only fleetingly on rare nights, like a gentle kiss of reunion in our dreams...
比如说，曾有人问*我们*身上戴着的五瓣花有什么意蕴，*我们*三人使劲想呀想，却始终想不起来。
For instance, someone once asked us about the five-petal flower we wear. We racked our brains, but no matter how hard we tried, we just couldn't remember its meaning.
托小灰的福，*我们*可算是想到，这种五瓣花，其实就和妈妈紧密相关……
Thanks to you, Little Gray, we finally realized that this five-petal flower is deeply connected to our mother...
啊，小灰或许还不知道。*我们*的妈妈叫做莫忒丝…这正是我们身上所佩五瓣花的名字。这种花在雅努萨波利斯的传说里，象征着思念、感恩，以及跨越时空的爱。

Ah, Little Gray, you might not know — our mother's name is Mortis, and this flower we wear is named after her. In the legends of Janusopolis, this flower symbolizes longing, gratitude, and love that transcends time and space.
「拥有三重生命之人」…岁月的磨蚀下，*我们*都快忘记这原本的名字。
"The one with three lives"... Time's erosion meant we have almost forgotten this original name.
可是，跨越了万千门径、经历过数次分裂与破碎，*我们*也早已不是最初的缇里西庇俄丝了……
Yet, after crossing countless gates and enduring splits and fractures, we are no longer the Tribios we once were...
千年以后，如命运所暗中谕示，背负雅努斯神权、行于逐火途中的黄金裔，只有三位。
A thousand years later, as if fate quietly decreed it, there are only three Chrysos Heirs continuing the Flame-Chase Journey and bearing the divinity of Janus.
她们分别是缇宝、缇宁，和在彼岸静静等候的缇安。
They are Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne who wait silently on the other shore.
关于后来的雅努萨波利斯……
About what happened to Janusopolis afterward...
在*我们*离开雅努萨波利斯后，这座城邦的黑暗愈发深重。继任的圣女遭受了较之*我们*更加严峻的控制…比如，现在生活在奥赫玛的「传谕梦母」。

After we left Janusopolis, the darkness that shrouded the city grew heavier. The Holy Maidens who succeeded us endured even stricter control — such as the current "Oracle Dreammother," who resides in Okhema.
*我们*不知道，故乡遭受的苦难究竟是*我们*的错，还是暗中酝酿已久的祸根，也不知道究竟该对故乡抱持什么样的情感……
We don't know if the suffering of our homeland was our fault or if it was a calamity brewing in secret for a long time. Nor do we know what kind of emotions we should harbor toward our homeland...
只是…在许多年后，听闻雅努萨波利斯最终陷落、沦为如今仄暗的重渊，*我们*还是会忍不住数次故地重游。
But... many years later, when we heard of Janusopolis' final downfall and how it twisted into the dim abyss it is today, we couldn't help but revisit the place several times.
Let's not dwell on it for now.
嗯，小灰说得对…偶尔回想过去，是为了从珍贵的人那里得到力量。可要是过分沉溺于往事…就看不清前路了。

Mm, Little Gray, you're right... Looking back on the past every now and then is meant to draw strength from those one holds dear. But if one indulges too much in the past... one will lose sight of the path ahead.
Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!
好呀好呀，「明天见」可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Little Gray!
圣城…大家都很喜欢这里。无论历经多少失却与离别，只要还能看见奥赫玛的昼光，未来就一定明亮。

The holy city... Everyone loves this place. No matter how much everyone loses or how many farewells everyone endures, as long as humanity can still see Okhema's daylight, the future will always be bright.
嗷呜！你好，我是属于你的奇美拉，请问有什么需要我做的吗？嗷呜——
Awooo! Hello, I'm your chimera. Is there anything you need me to do? Awooo—
我是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}神圣造物嗷呜，不要把我和那些缺乏智慧的生物混为一谈。我也是要面子的嗷呜。
I am a sacred creation of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, awoo! Don't lump me in with those unintelligent creatures. I have my pride, awoo!
好吧，你突然开始好奇——要是佩佩生活在这个世界，究竟会归在哪位泰坦麾下？
Alright then, you suddenly wonder — if Peppy lived in this world, which Titan would he follow?
How about you bark a few times for me?
小奇美拉用极其清澈的眼神望着你，发出了与平时截然不同的轻柔叫声。
The little chimera gazes at you with exceptionally clear eyes, letting out soft, tender calls completely different from its usual tone.
Hey. Stop the fake cute sounds.
嗷呜——累死了。这就是你喜欢的类型吧，满意了嗷呜？
Awooo— this is exhausting. Is this the type you like? Are you satisfied, awooo?
我都做到这个程度了，以后不准说奇美拉不可爱，嗷呜嗷呜！
I've gone this far, so from now on, don't you dare say chimeras are not cute! Awooo awooo!
你是说生命花园的那些奇美拉吧，它们过很辛苦嗷呜！
Ah, you mean those chimeras in the Garden of Life? Their lives are so hard, awoo!
听说最近来了个魔鬼监工，成天让它们干活，还要以排行榜的第一名为目标，可你说嗷呜…队伍名次，和奇美拉的生活有什么关系嗷呜？

I heard there's been a devil of a taskmaster lately, constantly pushing them to work and demanding they aim for first place in the leaderboard. But you tell me, awoo... does the rank have anything to do with the lives of chimeras, awoo?
我不想工作嗷呜，就逃到这来了。你要好好对待我嗷呜！
I don't want to work, awoo, so I escaped here. You'd better treat me nicely, awoo!
没想到吧，那个人就是我！
For your information, that taskmaster is me!
I'm going to sell you to the Garden!
嗷、嗷…嗷嗷…我只是一只可怜又弱小的奇美拉，不要对我抱有任何期待嗷呜！
Awooo... Awo... awo... I'm just a poor, weak Chimera — don't expect anything from me, awoo!
There isn't anything I want for now.
嗷呜——那我就继续躺平了。有事情再叫我嗷呜。
Awooo — then I'll just rest here. Come back to me if you need anything, awoo.
I want... to give you a hug.
遐蝶如今身在冥界，守候着翁法罗斯的生死流转。现在你之所见，只是复现而出的残像。
Castorice is now in the nether realm, guarding the cycle of life and death for Amphoreus. What you see now is simply a reflection, a lingering shadow of the past.
记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...
谢谢你，为我实现这个心愿。
Thank you for fulfilling this wish of mine.
彼岸…十分寒冷，也是人们口中的哀伤之地。
The shore across... is cold, and is also referred to as the land of sorrows.
但凭借这一抹心跳，和怀抱的温热，冥界仿佛也变作温柔的归处。
Yet with this heartbeat, and the warmth of that embrace, the nether realm somehow seems to be a gentle sanctuary.
Thank you for bringing me back to the mortal world.
And now, I can finally be certain...
我的触碰，我的拥抱，并非只有冰冷的剥夺……
My touch and embrace can do more than just bring ice-cold loss...
它同样带着生命的体温。
They also carry with them the warmth of life.
嗯…我要留在这里，拥抱自己的命运了。
I will stay here and embrace my destiny.
冰冷的死荫…将由我来照亮。
I will illuminate the cold shadow of death.
在冥界，记得给我寄冥信片。
In the nether realm, don't forget to send me a "nether postcard."
记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.
别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。
Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world.
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
Castorice, who remains behind in the nether realm.
…遐蝶，找到了她在漫长岁月里踽踽独行、一直追寻的答案。
...Castorice finally found the answer she's been searching for all these years, walking alone in the long journey.
我会为吾师她们忧虑，曾对万敌心怀忌惮，也总替白厄未来将负的重担而不安。
I worry for my teacher and the others, I was once fearful of Mydei, and I am always uneasy about the weight of the burden that Phainon will carry in the future.
唯有蝶，向来无需我耗费心力——
Only Cas has never needed my concern —
我心中有数：当她念出自己追寻已久的答案后，其命运便能迎来圆满。
I knew that once she finds the answer she's long sought, her fate will finally be fulfilled.
与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
…无缺的英雄。时至今日，我仍会如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。
...The perfect hero. To this day, that is still the opinion I have of Phainon. As the most-perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.
托阁下的福，如今逐火之旅将近终点，世人企盼已久的新世界已然在向我们招手。
Thanks to you, the Flame-Chase Journey is nearly at its end, and the new world the people have long awaited is now reaching out to us.
而属于白厄的命运，也已步步趋近…他将如烈阳一般冉冉升起，接下我的职责，为翁法罗斯的人们照亮前路。
As for Phainon's destiny, it too approaches step by step... He will rise like a blazing sun, take on my responsibilities, and light the way for the people of Amphoreus.
你们的大表演家，那刻夏。
The Great Performer among you, Anaxa.
阿那克萨戈拉斯，我与他积怨已久，也原以为这样一位渎神的学者会一直是逐火之旅的阻力。
I've held a grudge against Anaxagoras for a long time, and I once thought that such a heretical scholar would always be a hindrance on the Flame-Chase Journey.
但他的学说，却再度驳斥信仰，以自己的性命掀起了弑神的骇浪……
But his philosophy has once again refuted faith, and stirred up a torrent capable of slaying gods with his life...
阿那克萨戈拉斯的一生都在追逐着真理，他是个优秀的学士。祝他在新世界能够得偿所愿吧。
Anaxagoras dedicated his life to seeking the truth. He was an exceptional scholar. I hope that, in the new world, he finds what he was searching for.
Hyacine, who has a really sweet smile.
上次与你介绍风堇时，我提到她是「昏光庭院」的首席护理师。但事实上，她也是这个组织的继承人与管理者。
The last time I introduced Hyacine to you, I mentioned she is the chief healer of the Twilight Courtyard. But in truth, she's also the heir and manager of this organization.
「昏光庭院」存世已久，只是因天空一族式微而逐渐凋亡。风堇让这个名号再临世间，以微光与温柔疗愈众人…想必也背负着殷切的梦想吧。

The Twilight Courtyard has existed for a long time, though it faded into obscurity with the decline of the Sky people. Hyacine has brought this name back into the world, healing others with her gentleness and light... She must be carrying her own deep dreams and aspirations.
赛法利娅…她曾是黄金裔们亲密的伙伴，也曾与我们朝夕相处、嬉笑怒骂。
Cifera... She was once a close companion of the Chrysos Heirs, someone we spent our days laughing, arguing, and sharing joys and sorrows with.
可不知从何时起，她突然变得与我们那般疏离，整日在奥赫玛之外漂泊羁旅，连与她面对面道声好都是那么奢侈。
But somewhere along the way, she became distant and spent all her days wandering beyond Okhema, and it became a rare luxury just to greet her face-to-face.
是「翻飞之币」的火种令她不堪重负，还是厌倦了黄金裔的使命，抑或是…我不知何时犯下的无名罪愆，无可挽回地惹恼了她……

Was it the Coreflame of the Coin of Whimsy that became too much for her, or did she simply grow weary of the Chrysos Heirs' mission? Or perhaps... it was some nameless fault of mine, some mistake that irreparably angered her...
…呼，抱歉，我有些失态了。近来，我的状态总不大好。
...Phew, sorry, I lost my composure. I haven't been feeling well lately.
无需替我担心。都已捱过那么久的岁月了，至少，我该能见证逐火之旅结束的那一天……
Don't worry about me. After all these years, at least I should be able to witness the day the Flame-Chase Journey comes to an end...
I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.
我要听旧昏光庭院的历史！
I'd like to hear more about the history of the old Twilight Courtyard.
旧昏光庭院的故事…当然可以。正好今天有空，我就和灰宝聊聊吧！
The story of the old Twilight Courtyard... Of course. I have some free time today, so I'll have a chat with you, Grayie!
很久很久以前，在艾格勒的空中堡垒里，生活着不同部族的空中子民。
Long ago, in Aquila's sky fortress, there lived Sky denizens from various tribes.
在他们之中，有人尊崇烈阳的灼热，有人喜欢阴雨的清凉，有人偏爱冬雪的壮丽，有人向往微光的柔和。
Among them, some revered the scorching heat of the sun, some enjoyed the coolness of rain, some marveled at the grandeur of winter snow, while others longed for the soft glow of twilight.
不同部族的天空子民虽然都领受着艾格勒的祝福，彼此间却因信仰不同，总会产生不必要的冲突，直到一位伟大的黄金裔英雄现世……
Though all the Sky tribes received Aquila's blessings, their differing beliefs led to unnecessary conflicts, until the emergence of a great Chrysos Heir hero...
不知道灰宝有没有听说过我的先祖，「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝？
I wonder if you've heard of my ancestor, Seliose the Daythunder Knight?
在缇宝大人她们传布了救世的神谕后，塞涅俄丝可是第一个响应号召、击败泰坦的黄金裔哦。
When Lady Tribbie spread the prophecy of salvation, Seliose was the first Chrysos Heir to answer their call and defeated a Titan.
那为何艾格勒的火种没有归还？
But why wasn't Aquila's Coreflame returned?
据说在艾格勒将被击败的时候，天空也即将与泰坦一同坠落。为了防止世间万物被苍穹碾碎，塞涅俄丝不得不支撑起天空……

It's said that when Aquila was on the verge of defeat, the sky itself was also about to fall with the Titan. To prevent the world from being crushed by the heavens, Seliose had no choice but to hold up the sky...
Mortal slaying gods — could that really be true?
灰宝，先祖塞涅俄丝也是黄金裔哦。可不要忘了，不久之前，你不也和白厄阁下他们一起击败了强大的尼卡多利吗？
Grayie, my ancestor Seliose was a Chrysos Heir as well. Don't forget that you and the others defeated mighty Nikador together not long ago.
在塞涅俄丝击败艾格勒后，天空的子民们就来到了大地生活。
After Seliose defeated Aquila, the denizens of the sky descended to live on the earth.
他们被塞涅俄丝挑战苍穹、支撑天空的牺牲壮举所感动，决心弥合曾经种群之间的分歧，构建出大家都能和谐相处的居所。

They were so moved by Seliose's heroic act of challenging the Titan and holding up the sky that they decided to bridge the divides between their tribes and create a place where all could live in harmony.
…这就是天空后裔和昏光庭院的由来啦！
...And that's how the descendants of the sky and the Twilight Courtyard came to be!
呀，灰宝！今天阳光特别不错，谢谢刻法勒，你也是来晒太阳的吧。
Ah, Grayie! What a gorgeous sunny day, thank Kephale. You're here to soak up some sun too, aren't you?
还是说…你是有什么烦心事，想要找人倾诉一下？
Or perhaps... Is there something on your mind that you want to talk about?
I just want to chat with you!
好呀，我也很乐意和灰宝聊天呢！
Sure! I'd love to talk with you too, Grayie!
昏光庭院是个什么样的组织？
What kind of organization is the Twilight Courtyard?
昏光庭院呀…曾经，它是一个弥合阴晴晨昏的疗愈之所，天空后裔和谐共处的族群。
The Twilight Courtyard... once, it was a healing haven for bridging day and night, where the descendants of the Sky coexisted in harmony.
在漫长的岁月中，战争、黑潮，诸多的灾难与阴霾使它失去了光彩，并最终解离、消逝。
But over the long years, war, the black tide, and countless disasters and shadows stole its radiance, and eventually, it dissolved and faded away.
而在翁法罗斯坠入永夜之后…我在树庭重新建立起了昏光庭院。
After Amphoreus fell into eternal night... I rebuilt the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove.
我本想重建那疗愈人心的庭院，但或许是我太爱操心，总要给每位来访的朋友解决身体上的问题。因为我希望当他们离开时，从心灵到身体都能焕然一新。

I wanted to recreate that heart-healing courtyard, but maybe I'm just too much of a worrywart — I can't help but try to address everyone's physical ailments whenever they visit. I hope that they're renewed both in body and spirit when they leave.
结果…大家就把昏光庭院当作是医疗机构，把我叫做首席护理师啦。
And so... everyone started treating the Twilight Courtyard like a clinic and calling me the chief healer!
大家都喜欢你和你的庭院。
Everyone really likes you and your courtyard.
对一名志在抹去患者伤痛的医师来说，最让人开心的事情莫过于此啦。
For a healer determined to erase their patients' pain, nothing makes me happier than hearing that!
还想听旧昏光庭院的历史。
I'd like to hear more about the history of the old Twilight Courtyard.
啊，旧昏光庭院的故事…那可就太长、太长啦。下次有机会再和灰宝讲吧！
Ah, the story of the old Twilight Courtyard... that would be a very long tale. Way too long, in fact. Let's save it for another time, okay, Grayie?
风堇有什么喜欢做的事吗？
What do you enjoy doing, Hyacine?
嗯…我觉得平时的日常生活，就是足够令我喜欢的事情了。
Hmm... I think my normal, everyday life is what I really enjoy.
请你闭上眼睛想象——在林叶簌簌、凉风习习的庭院中，到处是闪闪发亮的饰品和软乎乎的抱枕，餐桌上摆着可口的蜜饯和暖融融的茶水。

Close your eyes and imagine this — a courtyard with rustling leaves and a cool breeze. Shimmering ornaments and fluffy cushions are scattered everywhere, while the dining table is laid with delicious sugary preserves and warm, soothing tea.
一束微光从头顶的天井滑下来，它并不耀眼，却足够填满整个庭院。
A soft, glimmering ray of light streams in from the skylight above. It's not blinding, but just bright enough to fill the entire courtyard.
而你与你的朋友们，就在这样一个童话般的场景里畅聊，聆听彼此的烦恼，纾解身心的疲敝……
And there you are, with your friends, in this fairytale scene, chatting freely, sharing your worries, and easing the fatigue plaguing each other's minds and souls...
I feel all warm and fuzzy!
嘿嘿，也有人觉得这样的场景能带来扫去烦躁的清凉感哦。
Hehe, and others might say such a scene would give them a cool and refreshing feeling, one to wash away their worries.
温暖而不炎热，凉爽而不寒冷…疗愈心灵的秘境，本就应该能让不同的人感受到相近的安心啊。
Warm, but not stifling. Cool, but not chilly... A sanctuary of healing should bring everyone the same sense of comfort, even if they themselves are different.
Just can't picture that. It feels like a dream.
是吗？其实，初次听闻昏光庭院的许多人，也都觉得这只是个美好的梦。
Really? Actually, many who first hear about the Twilight Courtyard think it's just a lovely dream, too.
不过，这样也不坏。因为等大家真的看到了庭院，就会有种美梦成真的惊喜感了！
But that's not a bad thing. Because when they finally see the courtyard for themselves, they're in for a wonderful surprise — it's like their dream has come true!
最近我在奥赫玛到处转悠，寻找合适的角落，我想在奥赫玛重新建造一处昏光庭院。
Recently, I've been wandering around Okhema, looking for the perfect spot to rebuild the Twilight Courtyard.
到时候，灰宝一定要常来坐坐呀！
When it's ready, Grayie, be sure to visit often, okay?
翁法罗斯的医术是什么样的？
咦，灰宝居然也对医术感兴趣吗？看来你果然很适合加入我们呢！
Oh? Grayie, you're actually interested in the art of medicine too? Seems like you really are a great fit for us!
在遥远的黄金世，人人都拥有没有尽头的漫长生命。直到塞纳托斯降临，疾病、痛苦和死亡才开始降临大地。
In the ancient Era Chrysea, everyone had endless, immortal lifespans. It wasn't until Thanatos descended that illness, suffering, and death arrived.
畏惧苦痛、厌恶苦痛并渴望战胜苦痛的人们成为了这方世界的第一批医师。他们从零开始，摸索着治愈创伤的办法。
Those who feared pain, detested it, and sought to overcome it became the first healers in our world. They started from nothing, slowly learning how to treat injuries and ailments.
经过千年的积累，行走大地的医师们总结出了许多可靠的知识。如果要用最简洁的方式和灰宝阐述的话，那就是：轻者用药调养，重者手术治疗，危者施加祝福。

Over millennia, the healers wandering the land accumulated a wealth of reliable knowledge. If I were to summarize it for you, Grayie, it'd be something like: For minor ailments, we use medicine to nurse them back to health. For serious injuries, we perform surgeries. And for those in critical condition, we invoke blessings.
我知道灰宝来自遥远的天外，在其他的世界，人们又是用什么样的方法治愈伤患的呢？
But I know you come from a faraway land beyond the sky, Grayie. How do people in other worlds heal the sick and wounded?
葫芦…是那种腰细肚鼓的中空果实吗？莲食学派的植物著论里好像有提到，不过在现在的翁法罗斯已经很少见了。

Gourds... You mean those hollow fruits with slim waists and rounded bellies? I think they're mentioned in the botanical treatises by the Lotophagists, though they're quite rare in the Amphoreus of today.
原来葫芦还能治病吗…要是树庭还保留着这类植物的种子就好了。
So gourds can even be used for healing? If only the Grove still had seeds from plants like that...
三角形的小旗子，挥一挥就可祛除人们的病痛…好方便的道具，要是我也能有这样的一面神奇的旗子就好啦。
Small triangular flags that can cure ailments just by being waved around... What a convenient tool! I wish I had a miraculous flag like that too.
棺材？！是我想的那个，死者长眠所处的大匣子吗？
Coffins!? You mean the large boxes where the deceased are laid to rest?
唔…实在想象不到，棺材该怎么用于治疗……
Hmm... I really can't imagine how coffins could be used to cure people...
好呀，欢迎灰宝再来找我聊天！
Sure! I'd be happy to chat with you again, Grayie!
好呀，欢迎灰宝再来找我聊天！
Sure! I'd be happy to chat with you again, Grayie!
你好，搭档！这段日子辛苦了…你果然在翁法罗斯逐笔写下了属于自己的英雄史诗。未来的逐火征程里，还请继续与我们并肩作战！
Hey there, partner! Must've been tough for you lately... Sure enough, you've been writing your own epic in Amphoreus. Let's keep on chasing that flame together, you and me!
你专程来找我，是有什么要紧事吗？我随时可以帮忙！
Did you come looking for me because there's something urgent you need help with? I'm ready anytime!
I want to chat with you.
当然可以！你想聊些什么？
Of course! Anything you'd like to talk about?
我喜欢做的事情还挺多。但论得上爱好的…恐怕也就只有战斗和鉴宝了。
There are quite a lot of things I enjoy. But as for what I'd call a hobby... I'm afraid only fighting and treasure appraisal make the cut.
对吧？我喜欢挥剑时那种心无旁骛、只为将对手击倒的感觉。
Right? I love that feeling of being completely focused while swinging a sword, thinking of nothing but defeating the opponent before you.
但是万敌却说我并非真正热爱战斗……
But Mydei says I don't truly love battle...
「唯有生死一线悬的瞬间，你才能从救世的职责中短暂脱身。」这是他的原话。
"It's because you can only briefly free yourself from the duty of saving the world in those fleeting moments at the threshold of death." That's what he said.
哈…我哪有那么高尚啊。比起我，如今独自在悬锋城的万敌，背负的职责才更沉重吧？
Ha... I'm not that noble. Compared to me, Mydei carries far heavier duties alone in Castrum Kremnos, don't you think?
Treasure appraisal? Really didn't expect that one from you.
可别小看了我，我和西塔罗斯先生学了很久的鉴宝技术，现在已经是小有所成。
Don't sell me short like that — I studied treasure appraisal with Mr. Theodoros for a long time, and I've made some good progress. I'm on my way to being an expert.
我为数不多的日常零用，除了武器的维护，基本都花在这个副业上了。
Aside from maintaining my weapons, most of my modest daily expenses go toward it.
倒不是有多喜欢收藏古玩…练习鉴宝，总需要批量收购那些似真似假的货品。只是，或许是我运气不佳，往往买下一麻袋，满满的全是赝品……

It's not that I'm particularly fond of collecting antiques... Practicing appraisal requires buying lots of items that might or might not be genuine. But, perhaps due to my bad luck, I often end up with a whole sack full of fakes...
预言中的黄金裔有许多个吗？
Are there many Chrysos Heirs in the prophecy?
有的搭档，有的。预言中的黄金裔当然不止一个了，一共有十二位，都是能够归还火种、承袭泰坦神权的英雄。
Yes, partner, there are. The prophecy speaks of way more than one — twelve Chrysos Heirs in total, each a hero capable of returning the Coreflames and inheriting the divinity of the Titans.
但只有你被称为救世主。
But you're the only one called the Deliverer.
哈哈…初次听到这样的称呼的时候，我还有些害臊呢，毕竟老大不小了，早就不是当初那个举着木剑、口口声声要拯救世界的稚子了。
Haha... When I first heard that title, I felt a bit embarrassed. After all, I'm not exactly a kid anymore, the kind who'd wave a wooden sword and prattle on about how they're going to save the world.
不可否认，直到加入逐火之旅，我依然觉得自己不够成熟，尤其是在与诸位伙伴相较之时……
To be honest, even after joining the Flame-Chase Journey, I still felt pretty immature — especially when compared to my companions.
我没有阿格莱雅的思虑与手腕，没有万敌的信念与心性，没有遐蝶的理智与审慎…而与缇宝老师她们比起来，我还少了一份乐观与执着。
I don't have Aglaea's foresight and strategy, Mydei's conviction and resilience, or Castorice's rationality and caution... I even lack Tribbie's optimism and determination.
可是，我却被伙伴们称作最完美的黄金裔，被奥赫玛的人民奉为救世主。
Yet, my companions call me the most perfect Chrysos Heir, and the people of Okhema revere me as the Deliverer.
鼓励、希冀，还有渴求与祈祷…我的肩上，背负了太多不可辜负的东西。
Encouragement, hope, yearning, and prayers... The heavy burdens my shoulders bear are ones that I cannot possibly let down.
所以，我也不能妄自菲薄。救世主的名号…坦然相受，又有何妨？
So, I've come to terms with it. If they call me the Deliverer... why not gracefully accept the title?
但现在好像不足十二个。
But there don't seem to be twelve of you right now.
阿格莱雅曾说…逐火是不断失却的旅途。早在千年之前，同样有一批伟大的黄金裔，歃血为盟、共同踏上击落泰坦的征程。
Aglaea once said... the Flame-Chase is a journey of constant loss. A thousand years ago, another group of great Chrysos Heirs forged a blood pact and embarked on a journey to strike down the Titans.
也许是命运使然…第一次逐火之旅虽成功归还了数枚火种，却在血与泪中遗憾告败。
Perhaps it was fate at work... Though they succeeded in returning several Coreflames during the first Flame-Chase Journey, it ended in blood, tears, and failure.
那批英雄前辈，以生命铸成伟业，为人们积攒了信心、指引了前路。
Those heroic predecessors laid the foundation for greatness with their lives, gave the people confidence, and pointed the way forward.
虽不见其人，但每次前往创世涡心、聆听泰坦之声时，总能感觉到前辈们的英灵仍与我们相伴而行。
Though we can't see them, every time we head to the Vortex of Genesis or listen to the voices of the Titans, I can feel the spirits of our predecessors alongside us.
关于盗火行者和你的过去……
About the Flame Reaver and your past...
哈…我看上去有那么脆弱吗？好像每位与我相处了一段时间的战友都会觉得我有段沉重到难以放下的过去。
Haha... do I look that fragile? It seems that every companion I've spent time with assumes I have a past so heavy it's hard to let go of.
其实还好啦！在见到盗火行者以前，我或许还会被那段阴影所紧缚，毕竟在童年的我看来，那道高大的黑色身影是那样残忍而不可战胜。
Honestly, it's not that bad! Before I encountered the Flame Reaver, I might have still been bound by that shadow. After all, as a child, I saw that tall, black figure as cruel and invincible.
但是…当与它面对面对峙、剑锋相交之时，那段深埋回忆中的悲惧，便会燃为奔腾的战意与怒火。
But when I stood face-to-face with them, crossing blades, those buried fears and sorrow ignited into a surging battle spirit and anger.
They are not just your enemy.
没错。如今，盗火行者站在逐火之旅的对立面，它是奥赫玛的敌人，是所有对「再创世」抱有美好期待的人们的敌人。
Exactly. Now, the Flame Reaver stands in opposition to the Flame-Chase Journey. They are the enemy of Okhema and all who hold beautiful hopes for the Era Nova.
或许你会认为，如今我有了「公报私仇」的机会。
You might think I've now gained the chance for personal revenge.
但请你相信我…我的私仇，在翁法罗斯的未来面前，根本微不足道。
But trust me... my grudge pales in comparison to Amphoreus's future.
They've already been defeated by us.
没错。集合众英雄的力量，我们在悬锋城将他合力击败了。看万敌那一击的威力，他就算侥幸没有彻底陨灭，也一定已经元气大伤。

That's right. With the combined strength of the heroes, we defeated it in Castrum Kremnos. With Mydei's final strike alone, even if it managed to avoid complete annihilation, it must be gravely weakened.
不过，我们绝不能掉以轻心。在他卷土重来以前，我一定会想办法磨砺剑锋，保护伙伴们…至少，决不让缇安老师那样的悲剧在我眼前再度发生。

Still, we can't let our guard down. Before it returns, I'll sharpen my blade to protect my companions... At the very least, I won't let tragedies like what happened to Trianne happen before my eyes again.
That's all for now. Let's chat next time!
Sure. Feel free to find me any time!
Nothing urgent for now. Let's chat next time!
Sure. Feel free to find me any time!
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
缇宝…没想到她还有那样的过去。
Tribbie... I didn't expect her to have such a past.
身为雅努萨波利斯的圣女，她曾经受万人敬仰，却因偷窃火种而饱受敌意。那些曾发誓保护她的卫士，将矛头对准了她。

As the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, she was once revered by thousands, yet she suffered great hostility for stealing the Coreflame. Those guards who once swore to protect her turned their spears against her.
为了传递神谕，她将身躯化整为零、分散为万千个体，以至自我的边界都逐渐模糊，心智退化为孩童……

To deliver the prophecy, she shattered her body into countless pieces, scattering herself into myriad forms, until even the boundaries of her sense of self blurred, and her mind regressed to that of a child...
如今就连缇安，仅存的三者之一，也耗尽了力量。今后，门匠的职责将由缇宝继续履行。她已下定了决心，*她们*已下定了决心。
Now, even Trianne, one of the last three, has exhausted her strength. From now on, the duty of the gatekeeper will be carried on by Tribbie. She has made her decision — they have made their decision.
逐火…果真是不断失却的旅途。
Losses... are indeed a constant on the Flame-Chase journey.
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
你想起那个狮子般的男人。据说狮子的一生会经历许多次迁徙，最后在距离出生地很遥远的地方落脚……
You recall the leonine man. It's said that a lion's life is marked by many migrations, eventually settling far from where it was born...
迈德漠斯，悬锋的新王，他曾一度在奥赫玛收获同伴和认可。但为了世界的明天，他选择离开，投身于永无止境的战争。
Mydeimos, the new king of Kremnos, once gained companions and recognition in Okhema. Yet, for the sake of the world's future, he chose to leave and devote himself to endless war.
或许正是因为这份荣耀与担当，归乡的游子终结了悬锋王朝千年以来沐血代冠的传统。命运果真被他战胜了。
Perhaps it was precisely this honor and responsibility that allowed the homecoming wanderer to end the thousand-year Kremnoan tradition of being crowned in blood. Fate was indeed conquered by him.
Then, I wish he achieves victory in every fight.
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
袭击树庭的怪人…到底是何方神圣？
The strange entity who attacked the Grove... who could they be?
你想起那浑身黑衣的蒙面剑士，他不算强大，但比你见过的任何敌人都要诡异。寻常战斗中足以致胜的手段，在他面前却三番五次地失效……

You recall the masked swordmaster clad in black. It wasn't particularly powerful, but it was more bizarre than any enemy you've faced. Techniques that would normally secure victory failed repeatedly against it...
难道他是黑潮的化身？又或是某位泰坦的孑遗？若非万敌及时继承了「纷争」的神力，那牛皮藓似的家伙怕是要再追杀你们一阵。
Could it be an embodiment of the black tide? Or perhaps the remnant of some Titan? If not for Mydei inheriting the divinity of "Strife" in time, that persistent foe might have kept pursuing you.
如今，它已然落败。但就像「钟表小子」系列动画中的鳄鱼老板那样，反派很难真正被杀死——它们总是会从不知哪个下水道里重新爬出来。
Now, it's been defeated. But like the Crocodile Boss in the "Clockie" series of cartoons, villains are hard to truly kill — they always seem to crawl back out of some unknown sewer.
应该不会太棘手…大风大浪都挺过来了。
It shouldn't be too troublesome... we've weathered far greater storms.
你是…啊，我在公民大会上见过你，你和阿格莱雅大人、白厄大人并肩而立，我记得你的名字…叫{NICKNAME}对不对？
You're... Wait, I've seen you before! At the citizens' assembly, standing with Lady Aglaea and Lord Phainon. Your name is {NICKNAME}, isn't it?
没错，看来我已经很有名了。
That's right. Seems I've made quite a name for myself.
哈哈，有名归有名。可不全是好名声呀。
Hah, you certainly have. Though not all of it is good.
错的，请叫我银河球棒侠。
Wrong. Call me the Galactic Baseballer.
哈哈，做好事、做坏事都不留名，是吧？
Hah! So you do good deeds or bad ones, all while staying incognito?
你看错了，我不认识黄金裔。
You've got the wrong person. I don't know any Chrysos Heirs.
不不不，我可没有看错，毕竟我也在现场嘛。
Oh, no, I didn't mistake you. I was there. I saw it myself.
我是隶属于元老院的记录员，据我所知，外乡人{NICKNAME}曾在奥赫玛城中擅自打开宝箱取走财物，打碎飞天坛递，还让黄金短矛在闹市穿梭……

I'm an archiver for the Council of Elders. According to our records, the outworlder {NICKNAME} once opened a treasure chest in Okhema without permission, shattered the Flying Amphora, and let the Golden Short Spear fly through a bustling market...
我错了，请不要让我赔偿。
I'm sorry! Please don't make me pay for damages!
这些事情，我都没有做过。
I didn't do any of those things.
…可你都是堂堂正正当着大家的面做的呀。
...But you did. And in full view of everyone.
记录员，你应该记些正事。
Archiver, maybe you should focus on more serious matters.
实不相瞒，这确实就是正事。
您误会了，我并非是向你索赔，我也不是警告…等等，你是不是因为我在给元老院做事，就暗自将我当成坏人了？
Look, I'm not seeking reparations, and I'm not here to threaten you either. Wait, do you think I'm some kind of bad guy just because I work for the Council of Elders?
The Council of Elders... Aren't they all bad guys?
当然不是啊！咱单位一部分人的立场，不代表我本人的立场。
Of course not! A handful of people don't represent the entire Council — or me, for that matter.
拿我问罪的人都是坏人！
Anyone accusing me is a bad guy!
那您的善恶标准还挺松弛的。
Your standards for good and bad seem... flexible.
首先，我先声明，我不是你理解的「坏人」。我只是树庭结业不久的学生，给元老院做事纯粹是为了丰厚薪酬，绝无任何政治立场。
For the record, I'm not who you think I am. I'm just a new graduate from the Grove, working for the Council of Elders purely for the generous pay. I have zero political stance.
我刚才提到的事，虽然都确实记录在案，但我跟那些老顽固们不一样，这些事我都打算睁一只眼闭一只眼，没打算找你问责，只是想确认一下你就是那个人罢了——

All those things I mentioned are in the records, yes, but unlike the old fossils in the Council, I don't plan to hold you accountable. I just wanted to confirm that you're the person in those records...
我想着你和我一样都是年轻人，你可能像我一样对政治没那么感兴趣…你不知道，这里尽是满嘴政治的老人，我都快闷死了。也许我们能聊得来……

Because, honestly, I think you're like me: Young and uninterested in politics. You wouldn't believe how suffocating it is, being surrounded by people who talk about nothing else. I thought maybe we could relate...
怎么样，救救黎明云崖的年轻人，和我聊一会吧？
How about it? Save a fellow youth from the Dawncloud and chat with me for a while?
「我们站在光历的转折点上！」哎，这句话我自己都不太信……
"We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar!" Ugh, even I don't believe that nonsense...
这里的人说话都好无聊啊，我上辈子做了什么要惩罚我一个年轻人来这种地方上班…幸好有你{NICKNAME}，能陪我随便聊会天吗？

The people here are so dull. What did I do in a past life to deserve this punishment — working in this place with nothing but old men for company? At least there's you, {NICKNAME}. Would you keep me company for a bit and just... talk?
Come on. Just a small talk.
当然，还得靠您和我降低这里的平均年龄。聊点什么呢？
Of course, it's up to us to bring down the average age around here. So, what should we talk about?
你说你是刚从树庭结业的学生？
You mentioned you just graduated from the Grove?
没错，之前我是那刻夏老师的学生。不知道您是否了解那刻夏老师，作为老师他人是挺好的，可就是说…他的课程没法转化为专业技能……
That's right. I studied under Professor Anaxa. Not sure if you've heard of him — he's a good person and a decent teacher, but... his courses don't exactly translate into practical skills...
经常有这种「不实用」的专业…
Sounds like one of those "impractical" fields...
都怪我选专业的时候光顾着看哪个老师长得帅了。
Well, it's my fault for choosing a major just because the professor was good-looking.
我明明听说那刻夏很注重实践。
I heard Anaxa emphasizes hands-on practice, though.
实践是有实践，但没有什么工作需要这种实践。
Oh, there's plenty of practice — it's just not the kind of practice that translates into any real occupational skills.
所以我认清了现实，早早结业，领受父母之命出来找工作了。元老院的工作就是家父推荐来的——也因此，我躲过了树庭惨案。

So, I came to terms with reality, graduated early, and followed my parents' advice to start job hunting. My father recommended this position at Council of Elders — which, incidentally, helped me avoid the Grove tragedy.
尽管我不算个好学生，但我很喜欢那刻夏老师…如果不用考虑我那糟糕的成绩，我还是想继续待在树庭里钻研学业。
Even though I wasn't the best student, I really liked Professor Anaxa. If it weren't for my poor grades, I'd have loved to stay in the Grove and focus on my studies.
听上去，你不想在这继续工作？
Sounds like you're not too keen on staying in this job.
怎么说呢…我每天都有无数次离职的冲动，但是它们终究只是冲动，不会付诸实践。毕竟日子还得过，我需要这份工作。
Well... I think about quitting at least a dozen times a day, but it's just that — thoughts, not actions. Life has to go on, and I need this job.
它薪酬待遇好，工作本身也不复杂，主要是和各种各样的权贵沟通——事实上，我精通于此，我比大部分老前辈做得更好。

The pay is great, the benefits are excellent, and the work itself isn't complicated. Most of it involves liaising with various elites — and honestly, I'm better at it than most of the old-timers here.
真正让我抱怨的是，我预感十年后，二十年后、甚至三十年后，我的工作内容都会一成不变，而我迟早也会变成我讨厌的老顽固。

What really gets to me is the thought that ten, twenty, or even thirty years down the line, I'll still be doing the exact same thing. And eventually, I'll become one of those stodgy old bureaucrats I can't stand.
每当我和家里抱怨这些的时候，他们就会说「你看看外面都怎样了，你有这么一份工作就很了不起了」…他们说的没错，我会继续干下去。
Every time I complain about this to my family, they just say, "Look at the world out there — having a job like yours is already remarkable." They're not wrong. So, I'll stick with it.
工作是工作，生活是生活…
Keep your personal life separate from your work...
还是你懂我，我会把它们分得很清楚的。
Exactly! You get me — I keep the two separate.
肯定有很多人羡慕你的工作。
There must be plenty of people who envy your position.
肯定会有的吧，人们总是对不了解的工作有所向往。
Probably. People always admire what they don't really understand.
…工作内容我就不奢求有所改变了，只求能多来点年轻同事。
...I've given up hoping for changes in my job, but I do wish for more young colleagues around here.
有没有什么元老院的黑幕？
Any scandals of the Council of Elders you can share?
黑幕可还行…我不知道什么黑幕。不过嘛，我这里有一些非常不靠谱的八卦，没人知道那是真是假，我给你讲讲。
Scandals? Hah, I wouldn't know anything about that. But I do have some wildly unreliable gossip. No one knows if it's true or not — want to hear it?
Let's skip it. I'd like to stay alive.
你放心，没人相信那是真的。
Don't worry. No one actually believes it.
All right, spill it — I'm all ears.
嘿嘿，我就知道你感兴趣。
Ah, I knew you'd be interested.
在我刚来的时候，有个元老，名字我就不方便说了，年事已高，元老院指派了一名活泼开朗的年轻人去照料他的起居。
When I first joined, there was a senior senator — I'll skip his name — who was quite elderly. The Council assigned a bright, cheerful young person to look after his daily needs.
我本来以为我能认识下年轻的同事，但是吧，我的上司让我别去打招呼，什么也别问，我这人也听话，就真的什么也没问。

I thought it'd be a chance to get to know a fellow junior colleague, but my superior told me not to approach them, not to ask anything, and to just mind my own business. Being the obedient type, I did exactly that.
一段时间以后，那位元老逝世了。再过了一段时间，听说元老们又递补了新成员——问题就出在这里！
A while later, the senator passed away. Not long after that, they appointed a new member. Here's where it gets weird!
那位新成员看着和当时照料元老的年轻人长得一模一样，可就是神情不是很像，她不再活泼开朗了，反倒一副老态龙钟的样子。
This new member looked exactly like the young caretaker, except their demeanor had completely changed. They weren't cheerful anymore — just weary and aged beyond their years.
这就是我那非常不靠谱的八卦了，你记在心里便好，不要告诉别人。
And that's my utterly unreliable bit of gossip. Keep it to yourself, though. Don't go spreading it around.
元老院的前辈们说「我们站在光历的转折点上」，或许真的如此。再见，希望我们都能顺利越过转折点。
The senior senators love saying, "We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar." Maybe they're right. Goodbye. Hope we both make it through this turning point.
元老院的前辈们说「我们站在光历的转折点上」，或许真的如此。再见，希望我们都能顺利越过转折点。
The senior senators love saying, "We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar." Maybe they're right. Goodbye. Hope we both make it through this turning point.
尤瑞托斯，<unbreak>30</unbreak>万利衡币…埃姬娜，<unbreak>750</unbreak>万衡币…保卢斯，<unbreak>200</unbreak>万利衡币……
Eurytos, <unbreak>300,000</unbreak> Balance Coins... Aegina, <unbreak>7.5</unbreak> million Balance Coins... Paulus, 2 million Balance Coins...
…{NICKNAME}？也欠我钱吗？你这家伙别打扰我核对账单啊……
...{NICKNAME}? Do you owe me money too? Hey, don't distract me while I'm checking my accounts!
Is this some kind of extortion list?
勒索？开什么玩笑，瞧好了，这可是账单——上面的人都欠我钱！
Extortion? Don't be ridiculous. Take a good look — this is an accounting ledger. Everyone on it owes me money!
你…先别说话，我记得你，阿格莱雅身边的贵客，对不对？我可没有记错人吧。
You... Wait a minute, I know you. You're Aglaea's esteemed guest, aren't you? I'm not mistaken, am I?
我对你印象还不错，所以{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，以后要是缺钱了，可以随时来找我帮忙——鉴于你的贵客身份，我可以不要利息。
I've got a good impression of you, so if you ever find yourself short on cash, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, feel free to come to me for help. Given your status, I won't even charge interest.
Are you running a charity now?
呵呵，并非慈善。不是所有人都能有这样的待遇。
Charity? Far from it. Not everyone gets this kind of privilege.
对陌生人警惕点没什么坏处，不过我是诚心提供帮助。
There's nothing wrong with being cautious around strangers, but I assure you, I'm offering genuine help.
我知道你有些顾忌，这么和你说吧——我是个「暴发户」，从下面上来的那种。
Let me put it this way — I'm what people refer to as "nouveau riche," someone who made it big from the ground up.
这黎明云崖的老顽固们瞧不起我，我也瞧不起他们，但是我总得想办法在这里站稳脚跟，你说对吧？我就特别愿意和你这样年轻有为的人交流。

The old geezers on Dawncloud look down on me, and I don't think much of them either, but I still have to establish myself here. You get what I mean? That's why I enjoy talking to young, capable people like you.
换句话说，我将对你的帮助视为一种投资，我相信我的眼光。哈哈，这样吧，先给你一些「小心意」就当是交个朋友了。
Think of my help as an investment — I trust my instincts. Haha, here, consider this little gesture a token of friendship.
怎么样，打算接着聊聊吗？
What do you say? Want to keep chatting?
嗯？{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我们算是认识了，有什么想聊聊的吗？
Hmm? {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, now that we know each other, is there anything you'd like to talk about?
Can we just chat about anything?
行啊，你想知道什么就随便问吧。
Of course. Ask me anything you want.
What kind of business are you in?
哦，这个啊…也没什么可隐瞒的——我是靠奥赫玛之外的黑潮发财的。
Oh, that? It's no secret — I made my fortune outside Okhema, in the black tide.
逃难的人需要大地兽搬运行李，我会提供大地兽；有人需要食物和取暖，我会提供营帐和食物…我提供各式各样的帮助，只不过它们并不是无偿的。
When refugees needed dromases to haul their belongings, I provided dromases. When they required food and warmth, I offered tents and supplies. I provide all kinds of aid — just not for free.
很多人瞧不上这个，觉得我不地道——但恕我直言，如果没有我，谁能帮上他们？如果我没有收钱，谁能持续帮助他们？
A lot of people look down on this kind of work, calling it unscrupulous. But let me be blunt — without me, who else could help them? And without charging, who could sustain this kind of assistance?
当然了，会有很多人指责我的。他们希望我只有救人的善心，而放弃发财的野心——这黎明云崖里有太多这样站着说话不腰疼的家伙了。

Of course, I get plenty of criticism. People want me to save lives with a pure heart, free of ambition. This place — Dawncloud — is full of self-righteous types who sit comfortably while judging others.
所以，我想到了一个解决方法——只要这些占据着道德制高点的人能给我钱的话，我会提供救援，我可以不收逃难者一分一毫。
So, I came up with a solution: If those moralistic types want me to provide aid for free, they can pay for it themselves. I'll waive all fees for the refugees.
Care to guess how many of them actually step up to fund it?
You mentioned the old-timers look down on you?
哈哈，这你就有所不知了——有些个长老啊、贵族啊，之所以能坐在他们现在的位置上，不过是仰赖祖辈积德，含着金奶嘴生下来的。
Haha, let me tell you something — some of these elders and aristocrats only hold their positions because of their ancestors' luck. They were born with a silver spoon in their mouths.
但如今这世道…那些外邦的就不说了——不远万里逃难过来，能带多少家当？就连本地也有不少贵族，只剩下一点表面体面。
These days, though... Let's not even talk about the foreigners who fled here with barely anything to their name. Even among the local aristocrats, many are just keeping up appearances.
我手上有份账单，上头全是向我借钱的蠢货——本事没有，架子倒是不小…瞧不起我，但还是要向我这种「暴发户」赔笑脸。
I've got a ledger full of these fools who borrowed money from me. They may look down on me, but they still come groveling to this "nouveau riche" when they need cash.
可惜，我也对他们有所求，我也会借给他们。他们瞧不起我，我也瞧不起他们，事实如此，不影响我们之间的利益关系。
Sure, I lend it to them — because I also need something from them. They despise me, and I despise them. It doesn't change the fact that we're tied together by mutual interests.
你讨厌贵族还借他们钱？
You despise the aristocrats, yet you still lend them money?
这么说吧，有些钱，我明知道他们还不上，但还是会借，你知道为什么吗？
Let me put it this way — some money I know they won't be able to pay back, but I still lend it to them. Do you know why?
就因为他们说话「有分量」，而我可以用上。
Because their words actually make a difference, and that's what I want.
在我看来，奥赫玛的管理者，无论是元老院、还是黄金裔，都不过徒有其名——每年税金浪费了不少，效率远不如我们这些商人。

To me, Okhema's administration — whether it's the Council of Elders or the Chrysos Heirs — is just an empty shell. Every year, so much tax money is wasted with little to show for it. The bureaucrats can't hold a candle to us merchants when it comes to efficiency.
奥赫玛想要进步，就需要更先进、更实际的社会架构与管理方式。我有心成为这个伟大变革的推动者，奈何我只是个「平民」。
If Okhema wants progress, it needs a better, more practical system of governance. I'd love to spearhead that change, but alas, I'm just a "civilian."
他们有权，而我有钱。我该怎么做已经不言而喻了吧！
They have power, and I have money. Surely, you can see where this is going.
啧…等我改变奥赫玛的行政效率时，你就会知道的。
Tch... Well, you'll understand when I've streamlined Okhema's governance.
You deserve an offer... from a certain Corporation.
…公司…什么公司？我自己就是老板。
...Corporation? What corporation? I'm my own boss.
我的理想是独立于奥赫玛管理者之外，拆解官僚机构，削减多余监管法规和浪费的开支，让陈腐的管理者早点滚出黎明云崖。

My ambition is to create an administration independent of Okhema's rulers — one that dismantles the bureaucracy, slashes excessive regulations, and cuts wasteful spending. It's time to send those antiquated officials packing from Dawncloud.
Let's talk later. I've got things to do.
有缘再见啦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，正好我手头还有些账目没处理完……
Until next time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. Speaking of which, I've got some ledgers waiting for me...
Let's talk later. I've got things to do.
有缘再见啦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，正好我手头还有些账目没处理完……
Until next time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. Speaking of which, I've got some ledgers waiting for me...
啊，这位贵客，请留步——您不是奥赫玛土生土长的住民，对吧？
