Ah, esteemed guest, please wait a moment — you're not a native of Okhema, are you?
…像我这样的外乡人还挺多的？
...Are there many outworlders like me here?
Actually, I am an outworlder, too.
我从小看着负世泰坦长大的！
I grew up watching the Worldbearing Titan!
Haha, you've got a sense of humor...
是这样，我呢，名叫忒斯庇斯·米里奥多卢，是一名来自米里奥斯的剧作家。
Well, let me introduce myself. I'm Thespis Mylonopoulos, a playwright from Milios.
我离开自己家乡的时间已经太长了，很多关于家乡的印象已经开始模糊，和奥赫玛渐渐重合在了一起…我需要有一处将它们区分开的「地标」——
I've been away from my homeland for so long that my memories of it have started to blur, merging with my impressions of Okhema. I need a "landmark" to keep them distinct.
你看，那巨大的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}奥体，它沉默不语地俯视着我们，如此的惊诧感，只有在黎明云崖才会感受得尤其深刻。
Look at that colossal {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, who gazes down at us silently, and its imposing presence is uniquely profound here on Dawncloud.
…故乡覆灭时，我正在奥赫玛巡演，无家可归的我，自那以后就定居在了奥赫玛。现在想来，我生活于此的时光早已超过了故乡「米里奥斯」。
...When my homeland fell, I was touring Okhema. Left without a home, I've lived here ever since. Now, I've spent more years in Okhema than I ever did in Milios.
…不好意思，您的家乡是怎样的呢？
...I'm sorry, but what was your homeland like?
看来您和我有着相同的烦恼。
Seems like we share a similar predicament.
那是辆星间旅行的列车！
That was an Express traveling between the stars!
我没听懂，就当您是将群星当作了故乡吧。
I'm not sure I understand, but I'll take it that you see the stars as your homeland.
能听见那绵延百里的汽笛。
The sound of a whistle stretching for miles...
…听上去那是您离开家乡时的声音。
...That must be the sound you heard when you left your homeland.
我经常向奥赫玛城中的外乡人打听他们的故乡，在不同人口中，故乡虽然有不同的描述，却有着相近的「韵脚」——也许所有人的故乡都共享一处。
I often ask the outworlders here in Okhema about their homelands. Though their descriptions vary, there's a common "melody" to them — as if all homelands share a single origin.
那是一座看不见的城市，但她是我们灵魂的的永恒归宿…我有生之年最大的愿望，就是以自己的家乡为原型，创造一部永世流传的伟大戏剧。
It's an invisible city, one that serves as the eternal resting place for our souls. My greatest wish in life is to create a timeless play inspired by my homeland.
抱歉，占用了您不少时间，请收下这份小小礼物。当然，如果您喜欢戏剧，我们可以再深入聊聊……
Sorry to take up so much of your time. Please accept this small token. Of course, if you're a fan of theater, we can talk more...
人生一世，能真正接触并熟悉的人不过数百…但戏剧提供了一扇窗口，能让我们近距离凝视一些平常不会触碰的人性角落。
Life is short, and the people we truly know and understand might number only in the hundreds. But theater opens a window, letting us gaze closely into corners of humanity we'd otherwise never touch.
故乡，那座看不见的城市，正在我的思绪中逐渐成型。想必与您交谈一番，我还会有所收获吧，怎么样，打算再聊聊吗？
My homeland — that unseen city — is gradually taking shape in my mind. I believe that by talking with you, I'll find even more inspiration. So, what do you say? Shall we continue this conversation?
I'd like to chat with you.
当然，我喜欢「随便聊聊」。关于故乡，关于戏剧，关于你我的当下，让我想到哪说到哪。
Of course, I enjoy casual conversations. Whether it's about homeland, theater, or the present moment, let's see where our thoughts take us.
你在创作以故乡为原型的戏剧？
You're writing a play inspired by your homeland?
没错。不过她既是故乡，也并非故乡——她是千万人共同的故乡。
Yes. But it's both my homeland and not my homeland — it's a homeland shared by countless others.
请您想象一座云端之上的城市，它的结构像干燥的浴球：人们在城市何处生活，那里就会「吸水」膨胀；而这被比作「水分」的介质，正是市民们的欲望和记忆。

Imagine a city floating above the clouds, structured like a dried bath sponge. Wherever people live, that part of the city "absorbs water" and swells. The "water" represents the desires and memories of its citizens.
基于此，本质上完全不同的许多城市，都以同样的名字出现在云端之上…她既是信徒们的圣城，也是弄潮儿的时尚之都，更是学者的书院、勇者的兵营……

Because of this, many fundamentally different cities appear in the clouds under the same name. It's the holy city for believers, the fashion capital for trendsetters, a library for scholars, a barracks for warriors...
由于这个城市的名字有着如此之多的含义，渐渐地，人们反而不再使用那个名字，而只用「城市」称呼自己的家乡。
Over time, the name of the city gained so many meanings that people stopped using it altogether. Instead, they simply called it "The City."
只是，在那座城市里有一件奇怪的事——从邻居到过客，几乎每个人都在为这片土地上自己看不见的部分感到不安。
However, there's something strange about this city — everyone, from neighbors to passersby, feels uneasy about the parts of the city they cannot see.
比如说…信徒担心学者的研究让城市神秘不再，学者担心勇士的冒险为城市树立了过多敌人；勇士又讨厌弄潮儿的奢华，弄潮儿厌恶信徒的不思进取…诸如此类。

For example, believers fear that scholars' research will strip the city of its mystery. Scholars worry that warriors' adventures bring too many enemies to the city. Warriors resent trendsetters for their decadence, while trendsetters despise believers for their complacency.
这些市民对一切都充满抱怨，大家的唯一共识，是只有{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}会公平地对待他们。
These citizens complain about everything, yet they all agree on one thing: Only {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, treats them all fairly.
好——作为一出悲剧的舞台，那座城市大致来说就是这样。
Well... That's what the city looks like as a stage for my tragic play.
我向来追求雅俗共赏…你的意见，我会考虑进去的。
I strive to create works that appeal to both the refined and the common audience. Your feedback will certainly help me improve.
呵呵，太好了，我起初还有点担心观众会不理解呢。
Wonderful! I was a bit worried that the audience might not understand at first.
我打算用「米里奥斯」来命名这个城市——纪念一下我那在黑潮中毁灭的故乡！
I've decided to name this city "Milios" — a tribute to my homeland, destroyed in the black tide.
要不聊聊你的过去的经历？
Would you mind sharing your experiences?
我的过去啊…要从何说起呢？正如你所知道的，我是米里奥斯人，不是奥赫玛人——不过我定居奥赫玛的起因，可能和大部分外地人不太一样。
My experiences, huh... Where should I begin? As you can see, I'm a native of Milios, not Okhema. But the reason I settled here might be quite different from most outsiders.
算起来那也是很多年前了…那时候我自觉年少成名，和志同道合的几个演员朋友一起，凑了点路费就打算开启一场环游整个世界的巡回演出。
It happened many years ago... Back then, I thought I was a rising star. A few actor friends and I, driven by shared ambition, scraped together enough money to embark on a grand tour around the world.
奥赫玛是我们的第四站，我们在这里的表演终于收获了大家的欢迎，也打算在这里多停留一段时间，多积累一些经验和财富。

Okhema was our fourth stop. It was here that our performances finally received genuine applause. Encouraged, we decided to stay a little longer, hoping to gain more experience and earn a bit of wealth.
其实最为主要原因是，钱兜已经见底，我们不得不留下挣些返乡路费。
Though honestly, the main reason was that we were broke. We had no choice but to stay and make enough money to afford our journey home.
当时我们不可能想到，这个决定救了我们所有人一命——就在第二个月，米里奥斯被黑潮毁灭，据称无人生还。
Little did we know, that decision saved our lives. Just two months later, Milios was consumed by the black tide. They say no one survived.
从此故乡，就成了我永远的精神故乡了。呵呵。
And so, my homeland became my eternal spiritual sanctuary. Haha.
我对戏剧不熟，有什么理念吗？

理念吗…虽说我的确写过不少剧本，但可能并没有什么能称之为「理念」的东西。
Philosophy? Hmm... I've written plenty of plays, but I wouldn't say I have anything grand enough to be called a "philosophy."

As for debates like "tragedy is deeper than comedy" or "comedy is more constructive than tragedy"... I don't really care. I'm open to trying different story structures.
如果说真的有什么故事是我拒绝创作的——那大概只有「无论如何都无法让我获得感动」这一种情形吧。
If there's one kind of story I absolutely refuse to write, it's the kind that fails to move me — no matter what I do.
人们常说，深刻理解角色的人生、拥有和角色同样充沛的感情是「演员的自我修养」…对剧本创作者来说，当然更必须如此。
People often say that deeply understanding a character's life and emotions is an actor's preparation. For a playwright, this is even more essential.
你搞戏剧真的能赚到钱吗？

Haha! That's a good one. Yes, money is the foundation of everything. Nobody remembers a play that leads to bankruptcy.

But, just like the finest ingredients only need the simplest seasoning, when it comes to making money through art, the most crucial thing is "to become your own audience."
You mean if you like it, it'll sell?

Sometimes, there's an inherent conflict between the market and the act of creation itself. Let me give you an example. Imagine a playwright known for romantic dramas.

In this age consumed by the black tide, many audiences have lost interest in love stories. For this playwright, the real challenge isn't just writing — they must understand why people have turned away from romance.
如果不想清楚这一点…那么即使这位剧作家，在纯艺术的意义上创作出了伟大的作品…恐怕也只会叫好不叫座吧。
If they can't figure that out... even if they produce a masterpiece in the purest artistic sense, it'll likely go unappreciated, or worse, unnoticed.
一切艺术作品都不过是时代的涟漪。而致力于从时代逃脱的创作者——所谓「真正的」艺术家，很难用艺术去养活自己。
Every work of art is just a ripple in the tide of its time. Those who strive to escape their era — the so-called "true artists" — often find it hard to sustain themselves through their creations.

这是留在密底斯泰歇附近的铭文——
This is an engraving near Mythemis —
此处安眠着狄米特尔，一个可怜但诚实的人，他极其擅长出海钓鱼，这条大马林鱼竟然长达十八尺。
Here lies Dmitrios, a poor but honest man. He is exceptionally good at sea fishing. This marlin measures an incredible <unbreak>18</unbreak> feet long.
直到，塞纳托斯，因嫉妒他的功绩，将他逐出了这行。
Until Thanatos, jealous of his achievements, drove him out of the business.
把他钓上钩，放置于此地。
They caught him with a hook and placed him here.
Thank you. That's all for now.
You can come back any time.
You seem to know a lot about epitaphs.
我并不了解它们，我在太多的石碑前徘徊过。
I don't understand them. I've simply been wandering in front of too many graves.
人们对逝者的悼念，不仅仅止于入土为安。竖起一块墓碑，留下只言片语，都是对逝者一生恰如其分的认可，来完成这漫长的告别。

Mourning continues beyond the act of burial. To erect a tombstone and to leave behind a few words... These are appropriate ways to acknowledge the life of the deceased and steps toward completing this long farewell.
可是漫长的一生，又如何用短短的三言两语诠释呢？那些前人的挣扎、欢乐、悲剧与胜利的记录，总会有一些对后人的启示吧。
But how does one define a long life with just a handful of words? The records of struggle, joy, tragedy, and victory of those before would surely hold some revelation for generations to come.
墓志铭蕴含着令人动容的力量，而参观墓地的体验无可替代，请让我推荐给你。
Epitaphs possess a deeply moving power, thus the experience of visiting a graveyard is invaluable. Please allow me to recommend it.
Say hi to Castorice for me.
I will give her your regards.
负世的至高之神，您是否会再度回应我们？
Worldbearing Titan most high, will you once again answer my prayers?
啊，抱歉…是我失态了，最近总是忍不住自言自语。你也是来寻求指引的吗？
Ah, sorry... I've lost my composure. Lately, I can't help but talk to myself. Are you here looking for guidance as well?
我叫涅柔娅，是名再普通不过的祭司，承蒙{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}眷顾，愿为信众尽些绵薄之力。
I'm Nereia, just an ordinary priest. By the grace of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, I strive to offer whatever small comfort I can to the faithful.
打扰了，我只是随便看看。
Sorry to intrude. I'm just watching.
是这样啊，你是刚到奥赫玛来的外邦遗民吧？这个时节，确实有很多人来寻求庇护。
I see... you must be a foreigner who's just arrived in Okhema, right? Many come seeking refuge.
对了，看你有些面生，打扮也不像是我们这儿的人。你是第一次来吧？这里是奥赫玛最神圣的地方。
By the way, you look unfamiliar, and your clothes don't seem like ours. This must be your first time here, yes? This is the holiest place in Okhema.
如果之后遇到什么困难，随时都可以来找我，我们这里永远向迷途者敞开大门。
If you ever find yourself in need, don't hesitate to come find me. Our doors are always open to the lost.
在这里，即使是最绝望的人，也能找到一丝希望。我见过太多徘徊在生死边缘的灵魂，最终都在刻法勒的见证下重获新生。
Here, even the most hopeless soul can find a sliver of hope. I've seen many spirits teetering on the edge of life and death, only to be reborn under Kephale's guidance.
这世上有两种「死亡」——身体的消逝与心灵的沉沦。前者我是无能为力，但后者……
There are two kinds of "death" in this world — the death of the body and the floundering of the soul. As for the former, I can do nothing, but the latter...
只要心中还尚存着一丝光明，就永远不会被黑暗吞噬，刻法勒的教诲永远指引着我们。
As long as there's a flicker of light in the heart, darkness will never consume it. Kephale's teachings will always lead the way.
嗯…黑潮肆虐，所有人都在寻找一个容身之所，而奥赫玛，或许就是大家最后的希望了。
Hmm... The black tide ravages everything, and people are searching for shelter. Okhema, perhaps, is the last hope for all of us.
这是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}给我的使命。在这乱世，我们更要守望相助。
This is the mission {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has given me. In these turbulent times, we must help and support one another.
从我记事起就在圣殿侍奉。那时{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}还会经常显现神迹，回应信众的祷告……
I've served in the temple since I was little. Back then, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would often perform miracles, responding to the prayers of the faithful...
可现在…哎，情况虽然不同了，但至少我还能为他人带去一点慰藉。
But now... Alas, things are different, but at least I can still offer some comfort to others.
抱歉，我又说了这么多。初次见面就这样喋喋不休，希望没让你觉得困扰，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照耀你前行的路。
Sorry for rambling so much. I hope it didn't trouble you. May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s light guide your way forward.
…这么多年过去了…欢笑，泪滴，奥赫玛的回忆……
...So many years have passed... Laughter and tears are all part of Okhema's memories.
哎，是你啊，年轻人，你来找我是有什么事吗？
Ah, it's you, young one. What brings you here?
There's something I'd like to ask you.
你有得到过刻法勒的回应吗？
Have you ever received a response from Kephale?
有，不过那是很多年前的事了。那时候我还很年轻，刚成为祭司不久。它的声音是如此温暖，给予我莫大的勇气与力量。
Yes, but that was many years ago. Back then, I was still young, just a new priest. Kephale's voice was so warm, giving me great courage and strength.
如今想来，那奇迹仿佛就在昨日。但现在…它已经许久未曾开口了。但我始终，这沉默或许也是一种考验。
Now, looking back, that miracle feels as if it happened just yesterday. But now... it's been a long time since Kephale spoke. But I always think... maybe this silence is a test too.
How are things in Okhema lately?
我平日里都在侍奉刻法勒，很少到外面去，因此对奥赫玛其他地方的情况，我了解的不多。
I spend most of my days serving Kephale and rarely venture outside, so I know little about the rest of Okhema.
不过，黑潮无休止地蔓延，最近每天都有新的流民过来。他们在祈祷的时候声音都在抖，我猜想，奥赫玛的整体情况恐怕也不乐观。
However, the black tide spreads ceaselessly, and every day brings new refugees. When they pray, even their voices tremble. I'm afraid the overall situation in Okhema is far from hopeful.
Why did you become a priest?
这是个很长的故事…幼年时的我偶得眼疾，是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神迹救了我，使我重见光明。
It's a long story... In my childhood, I suffered from an eye condition. It was a miracle from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that saved me and restored my sight.
从那以后，我就决定用余生回报它的恩典。虽然…它已经很久没有回应过我的祷告了，说来惭愧，有时连我自己也会感到动摇。
Since then, I dedicated the rest of my life to repaying their benevolence, even if it's been long since they last answered my prayers... I'm ashamed to say that sometimes, even I waver.
但看到还有这么多人坚持相信着刻法勒，我就知道必须继续坚持下去。至少，我还能为其他人做点什么…我们都是彼此的光，这可是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的教诲。

But I know I must persevere, seeing so many others hold onto their faith in Kephale. At the very least, I can still do something for others. We are all each other's light — This is what {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} teaches us.
当然，侍奉它的远不止我一位祭司，我与同僚们分工合作，共同侍奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}。
Of course. I'm not the only one who serves {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. My colleagues and I work together, fulfilling our respective roles.
不过说来好笑，他们总说我太过温和，对信众太过包容。但在我看来，正是这份包容，才是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}最重要的教诲。

Though, amusingly, they often say that I'm too gentle and too forgiving with the followers. But to me, this very compassion is what embodies {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} most important teaching.
That's all I wanted to ask.
刻法勒在上，愿我们都能在黑暗中找到前行的勇气……
By Kephale, may we all find the courage to move forward in the darkness...
你忙吧，还是不打扰你了。
I'll let you get back to your work.
再见，年轻人，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}指引你。
Goodbye, young one. May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} guide you.
刻法勒在上，愿我们都能在黑暗中找到前行的勇气……
By Kephale, may we all find the courage to move forward in the darkness...
你手里被硬塞了一把硬币。
A handful of coins is stuffed into your hand.
你的另一只手里也多了一把硬币。
Now you also have a handful of coins in your other hand.
见你两手满满，他把硬币直接塞进了你的口袋。
Since both of your hands are occupied, he stuffs the coins into your pockets instead.
No, wait. I can't take this.
俗话说，免费的东西是最贵的。你强行把手里的硬币还给了他。
The saying goes that free things come at the highest price. You forcibly return the coins to him.
不必介怀，这是贵族的义务。
No need to worry. It is a noble's duty.
我看你的衣着太过保暖，想必是十分畏寒…虽无法想象你的过去有多么疾苦，但至少我可以提供帮助。这些利衡币你拿去，添置些需要的器物吧。

I noticed that you're dressed too warmly and imagined you must be sensitive to the cold... I can't imagine how difficult your past must have been, but at least I can offer some help. Take these Balance Coins and use them to buy whatever you need.
铭记，并向众人宣扬——是奥德里西安的「门瑟」家长子，泰坦勋章的持有者，立志引导人们前行的贵族，尤里萨·门瑟本人，于刻法勒的注视下，向你伸出了援手。

Remember this and tell everyone — The eldest son of House Mentes of Odressian, holder of the Titan Medal, and a noble who's determined to lead the people forward — Ulysse Mentes, offered you a helping hand under the gaze of Kephale.
是奥德里西安…算了，无妨。有人问起时，只要说是尤里萨帮了你便好。
Odressian. It's fine. If someone asks, just say that Ulysse helped you.
没错，这值得费心去记。但要实在想不起来，有人问起时，只要说是尤里萨帮了你便好。
Yes, it is worth doing so. But if you have trouble recalling and someone asks, mentioning that Ulysse helped you is enough.
在这黎明云崖，我许久未见过一位如此值得帮助的民众了。身为贵族，空揽头衔却不履行义务，实在有失风度。而今日，你让我的家名璨璨生辉，我必须向你表达感谢。

Here at Dawncloud, I've not seen a citizen so worthy of assistance in a long while. As a noble, it is unbecoming of me to possess the title yet neglect my duties. Today, you've restored honor to my family name again, and for that, I must thank you.
I think there's been a huge misunderstanding...
这样啊？嗯…如果冒犯到你，请允许我致歉。
Is that so? Well... Please allow me to apologize if I've offended you.
无论如何，若是有需要，便相告于我吧。身为贵族，我诚然乐于倾听民众的请托。
In any case, should you find yourself in need of help, please let me know. It is my pleasure as a noble to hear the people's pleas.
噢，又见面了，亲爱的民众。你是来寻求帮助的吗？
Oh, we meet again, dear citizen. Are you looking for help?
解答民众的疑惑也是贵族的义务，请问吧。
It is also my duty as a noble to answer the people's queries. Please ask away.
You said you are a nobleman...
的确，但并非奥赫玛的贵族——奥德里西安的「门瑟」世家，以律法的名义，向你致意。
Indeed, but not of Okhema. In the name of the law, House Mentes of Odressian greets you.
我的曾曾曾…曾？咳，四代前的曾祖父。他为奥德里西安王出谋划策，平定了边域的纷争，成为建国时的十五元老之一。
My great-great-great... great? Ahem, ancestor, four generations back, served the king of Odressian. He quelled border conflicts and became one of the fifteen founders of the city-state.
之后，六人卷入纷争而亡，三人投狱，两人为追寻法吉娜的秘酿离去。而我的祖先战时资助过一位平民，在她的掩藏下躲过了刺杀，建立了门瑟家的荣耀。

Afterward, six of them perished in conflict, three were imprisoned, and two left in search of Phagousa's ambrosia. My ancestor aided a commoner during the war and escaped assassination under her shelter, establishing the honor of House Mentes.
作为四大贵族之首，祖先定下的家训是「成为民众的方向」。可惜，我年轻时不太理解，自视甚高，干下了许多蠢事…不过，如今也已无关紧要。

As the first of the four great noble Houses, our family's founding principle is "To become the path for the people." Unfortunately, my younger self, in his arrogance, did not grasp the essence of these words and committed many foolish deeds... But the past is the past.
彼时黑潮压境，家族直系恐怕只剩我一人了。举城迁来奥赫玛时，我护住一人，又被黄金裔阁下所救，那时我才理解，何为「贵族的荣耀」。

With the black tide at our doorsteps, I'm afraid I am the only surviving heir of my family. It was during the great migration to Okhema, when I sheltered another and was in turn rescued by the Chrysos Heir, that I finally understood the meaning of a noble's honor.
很遗憾，并非所有贵族都有如我一般的责任心。况且，每个家族的荣耀各不相同，所以我们的做法一定也格位有差。以我家乡举例——
Regrettably, not all nobles share my sense of responsibility. Besides, each family honors different qualities, thus our actions naturally vary. Take my homeland, for example —
「诺提亚」家崇武，坚信身先士卒是其存在意义，从未视管民生，但民众仍将他们视为塔兰顿的至高践行者。

House Notios values martial prowess and firmly believes their purpose of existence is to lead the charge. Although they never concerned themselves with governance, the people still consider them to be paragons of Talanton's will.
反观「朱卡」家，身为律法协编，当家却一味谋权谋私…到头来，民众给他们起了个诨号——叫「信扎格列斯的」。
On the contrary, House Zukas, compilers of the law, was led by one consumed by greed and ambition... In the end, the people gave them the nickname "Zagreus followers."
再谈异邦，斯廷法洛最显赫的世家，乃是吉奥里亚圣殿的祭司一族，他们一心为泰坦，乃至在民众看来有些霸道，但却从未有人指责他们违背荣耀。

Now to the outlands. The most prominent family of Stymphalia is the priest clan of the Temple of Georios. They are pious devotees to the Titan, bordering domineering in the eyes of the people, yet no one ever accused them of dishonor.
这便是贵族的规则。但说白了，因人而异罢了。即使是奥赫玛，也有着严重缺乏身为贵族自知的元老。他们也该被丢到黑潮里洗一洗，说不定就好了。

These are the rules of nobility. But in reality, it all depends on the individual. Even in Okhema, there are elders who sorely lack the self-awareness befitting a noble. Perhaps a thorough rinse in the black tide would do them good.
你在奥赫玛这里是做什么的？
What are you doing in Okhema?
履行贵族义务，参与议会的讨论，为城邦与民众谋求长存，我为此职责深感自豪。可惜，我的一票与民众的一票相当，奥赫玛还是太过保守了。

Performing my noble duties, participating in council discussions, and seeking long-term solutions for the survival of the city-state and its people. I take great pride in this responsibility, but alas, my vote is equal to any other. Okhema remains overly conservative.
不过…最近我倒是需要谋求个副业。哈哈，没想到身为显赫世家的继承人，有朝一日还会被财务所困，实在丢人。
However... lately I find myself in need of a side venture. Hah, who would have thought the heir to a prestigious family would one day face financial troubles? It's truly embarrassing.
And you still gave me money?
呵，区区资金之忧，怎能与贵族的义务相提并论。
Hmph, these financial worries pale in comparison to the noble's duty.
Doesn't the Council of Elders compensate you?
哦？你提醒我了，说不定是有的…有空我去问问看。
Oh? You make a fair point, that may be true... I shall ask when I have the chance.
无需忧心，我的「店铺」已经在筹备中了。虽说我的侍从一直念叨「进货也需要钱」之类的怪话，但这都是小事。我相信，一切很快会步上正轨。

Worry not, my "store" is already being set up. Though my attendant keeps uttering strange things like "We need funds for the inventory," I pay these trivial matters no mind. I believe everything will soon fall into place.
That's all from me. Good luck.
嗯，去吧。愿塔…不，愿刻法勒庇佑我们。
Yes, go now. May Talan... No, may Kephale protect us.
That's all from me. Good luck.
嗯，去吧。愿塔…不，愿刻法勒庇佑我们。
Yes, go now. May Talan... No, may Kephale protect us.
又一位前来祈祷的善信？让我看看…你可懂得如何向至高的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}行礼？
Another faithful has come to pray? Let's see... Do you know the proper way to greet the great {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}?
无需忧心，圣城的光芒依旧，只要「祭仪」流程完整，我将为你赐下{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
Do not worry. The light of the holy city still shines. As long as the ritual is properly followed, I will bestow the blessing of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} upon you.
你看起来很有信心…不过越是寻常之事，就越是不能怠慢。
You seem confident... However, the more ordinary the task, the more diligent one should be.
将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。别学那些狂妄的学者，在神像前大放厥词。

Place your offering on the altar, put your palms together, and recite the prayers three times with sincerity. Do not follow the examples of those arrogant scholars, spouting nonsense in the presence of divinity.
哼，至少你没有撒谎。我在此地侍奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}几十年，每日晨昏的祭仪从不敢怠慢——
Hmph, at least you know better than to lie. I have served {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} here for decades, and never have I neglected the morning and evening rituals —
将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。别学那些狂妄的学者，在神像前大放厥词。

Place your offering on the altar, put your palms together, and recite the prayers three times with sincerity. Do not follow the examples of those arrogant scholars, spouting nonsense in the presence of divinity.
Excuse me, I'm just passing through.
年轻人，不敬泰坦可没有好果子吃！
Young one, you'll regret not paying the Titan due respect!
看看这些圣像、这些祭坛…{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}始终庇护着他虔诚的子民，连凯妮斯元老也常来此地祈祷。她深知敬畏之心的重要。

Look at the sacred statues and these altars... {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has always watched over their devout followers. Even Elder Caenis frequents this place for her prayers. She understands the importance of reverence.
不像某些人，自诩智慧却连最基本的礼数都不懂。哼，真该让他们尝尝亵渎神明的代价。
Unlike some, who flaunt their wisdom yet lack the most basic etiquette. Hmph, they ought to learn the consequences of blasphemy.
记住了，善信。唯有坚守信仰、恪守祭仪，才能得到泰坦的庇佑。若你想学习正统的祭仪，随时可来寻我。当然，前提是…你得有敬畏之心。

Remember this, young follower — Only by holding onto your faith and observing the rituals can you receive the Titan's protection. If you wish to learn the proper rituals, you are welcome to seek me any time, given that you do so with a reverent heart.
怎么了，又是你？来寻求泰坦的指引吗？
You again? What is it? Have you come to seek the Titan's guidance?
呵呵，只要你心够诚，为人机警点，保证祭仪不出错，我会为你求来刻法勒的赐福。
Ho-ho, as long as your heart is sincere and your actions careful, perform the ritual flawlessly, and I shall request Kephale's blessing on your behalf.
There's something I'd like to ask you.
祭仪啊，这可是我们与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}沟通的唯一途径，也是我们向它展现诚意的重要方式。
The rituals are the only way we communicate with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. They are vital means through which we demonstrate our sincerity.
不同的祭仪代表着不同的含义，祭仪的每个动作、每句话语都有其深意，不可轻易更改——这些都是历代祭司传承下来的珍贵仪轨。

Each ritual carries its own meaning. Every gesture and every word are imbued with profound significance and must not be altered. These are the sacred traditions passed down through generations of priests.
可那些狂妄的学者，尤其是那个阿那克萨戈拉斯…他们竟敢说这些都是无用的形式！他们懂什么？连最基本的敬畏都不懂，也配谈论祭仪？

Yet those arrogant scholars, especially that Anaxagoras, have the audacity to claim these rituals to be meaningless formalities! What do they understand? They lack even the most basic reverence for the divine, yet think themselves experts on rituals?
黑潮肆虐，祭仪真的有用吗？
The black tide has been wreaking havoc. Do rituals really work?
放肆！你是与那些渎神者为伍吗？竟敢质疑泰坦了？
How dare you! Do you conspire with those blasphemers? How dare you question the Titans!
黑潮不过是对信徒的考验。越是危难时刻，越要坚守信仰。否则和那些无知的庸人有何区别？！
The black tide is but a test for the faithful. The more dire the times, the more steadfast in our faith we must be. Otherwise, how are we any different from the ignorant masses?
Can you tell me about yourself?
我现在的生活无非是坚持每日的祭仪，之后还要为信众诵读圣训，解答疑惑，没什么可聊的。
My life now simply consists of daily observance of rituals, followed by readings of the sacred text to the faithful and answers to their queries. There's little else to speak of.
但若要说从前…我只能说，从辅祭到这个位置，全凭虔诚与坚持。我每日尽心侍奉泰坦，从不敢有丝毫懈怠。

But if you mean the past... I can only say that I rose from an acolyte to this position with nothing but piety and perseverance. Every day, I serve the Titan with diligence, never allowing myself the slightest slack.
就像现在，若非我坚持正统，恐怕早就被那些「学者」蛊惑了。你说是不是？这世道，光有虔诚还不够。得懂得审时度势，才能真正守护信仰。

Take now for example. If I hadn't upheld the traditions, I would have fallen victim to the honeyed words of those "scholars," wouldn't you agree? In these times, piety alone is not enough. One must also assess and adapt to the situations around to truly protect one's faith.
That's all I wanted to ask.
好了，我也该准备新的祷文了。
Very well. I must prepare the new prayers now.
你回去之后，坚持每日敬拜泰坦，对你绝对有好处。记住，唯有虔诚的信徒，才配得上神明的眷顾。
When you return, make sure to venerate the Titan daily. It will surely benefit you. Remember, only the devout are worthy of divine favor.
你忙吧，还是不打扰你了。
I'll let you get back to your work.
愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}保佑你。
你回去之后，坚持每日敬拜泰坦，对你绝对有好处。记住，唯有虔诚的信徒，才配得上神明的眷顾。
When you return, make sure to venerate the Titan daily. It will surely benefit you. Remember, only the devout are worthy of divine favor.
看啊，黎明云崖——即使在这最接近黎明机器的地方，我也能闻到阴谋与诡辩的恶臭。
Look at Dawncloud Cliff — even here, closest to the Dawn Device, I can smell the stench of conspiracy and sophistry.
元老们沐浴着黎明机器的光辉，却没有天父那般背负世界的魄力，只敢用淬毒的匕首戳刺英雄的脊梁……
The elders bask in the glory of the Dawn Device, yet they lack the determination of the sky father to bear the weight of the world. They only dare to stab heroes in the back with poisoned daggers...
Got it. This one's the Sarcastic Garmentmaker.
阿格莱雅本人来了都没你能说。
Even Aglaea herself wouldn't be as talkative as you.
The Council of Elders isn't that bad, is it?
我并非有意针对任何人，只是一想到公民们被花言巧语蒙骗的样子，就难以按耐胸中的怒火……
I don't mean to target anyone, but the thought of citizens being deceived by sweet words makes it hard to suppress the anger in my chest...
也希望你不要忘了自己的任务，贵客，我们都有未完成的使命。
I hope you don't forget your task, honored guest. We all have unfinished missions.
你会来见我，说明你已经有了进展——至少我希望如此。
You've come to see me, which means you've made progress... at least I hope so.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
你本该更敏锐些的。我可以提醒你，只要提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>就好。
You should have been more perceptive. I can remind you, as long as you provide <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.
衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.
嗯…有位织者渴望光明。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某处的壁炉上</color>，向火光步步靠近呢。
Hmm... A weaver longs for light. The golden thread brings news that it is approaching the flames on <color=#dbc291ff>a fireplace somewhere</color>.
嗯…有位织者心怀信仰。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>拱廊尽头的墙面上</color>，聆听他人的告解呢。
Hmm... A weaver holds faith. The golden thread brings news that it is listening to confessions on <color=#dbc291ff>the wall at the end of the arched walkway</color>.
嗯…有位织者不畏艰辛。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的石壁上</color>，向最高处攀登呢。
Hmm... A weaver fears no hardship. The golden thread brings news that it is climbing to the highest point on <color=#dbc291ff>the stone walls of Dawncloud</color>.
嗯…有位织者重视荣誉。金丝带来消息，它正率领着忠实的仆从<color=#dbc291ff>飞天坛递</color>践行求索之旅，追寻着真理的足迹呢。

Hmm... A weaver values honor. The golden thread brings news that it is leading its loyal servant, the <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, on a journey of discovery that follows the footsteps of truth.
嗯…有位织者胸怀大志。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>与负日者遥相眺望</color>，期待着重新扬帆起航呢。
Hmm... A weaver has great ambitions. The golden thread brings news that it is <color=#dbc291ff>gazing at the Sunbearer from afar</color>, awaiting the chance to set sail again.
嗯…有位织者信心满满。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>树丛中</color>，考验来往旅人的眼力呢。
Hmm... A weaver is full of confidence. The golden thread brings news that it is testing the eyes of passing travelers in <color=#dbc291ff>the bushes</color>.
嗯…有位织者蒙受召唤。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>描绘着多目的盲者的壁画上</color>，为纹饰增添光彩呢。
Hmm... A weaver has been summoned. The golden thread brings news that it is adding luster to the patterns on <color=#dbc291ff>the mural that portrays the many-eyed blind one</color>.
嗯…有位织者心性单纯。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>围栏的挂饰上</color>，用铃声复诵愿望呢。
Hmm... A weaver is pure-hearted. The golden thread brings news that it is reciting wishes with the chimes on <color=#dbc291ff>the fence ornaments</color>.
嗯…有位织者笃信宿命。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高悬旗帜的石柱上</color>，等待命定之人找到它呢。
Hmm... A weaver believes in destiny. The golden thread brings news that it is waiting for its destined one to find it on <color=#dbc291ff>a flag-bearing pillar</color>.
嗯…有位织者不甘沉沦。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的一处瀑布中央</color>，与激流搏斗呢。
Hmm... A weaver refuses to give up. The golden thread brings news that it is battling the rapids in <color=#dbc291ff>a waterfall on Dawncloud</color>.
没有记忆残晶，我们该如何追溯若虫的踪迹？等你得到之后再来找我吧。
Without Memory Crystal Shards, how can we trace the nymphs? Come back when you have some.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
不错的功绩，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
A fine achievement, honored guest. Now, I will begin unraveling one of the many prophecies.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...
「虫鸣指引着朝圣之路。」算是相当直白了。
"The chirping of insects guides the pilgrim's path." Quite straightforward.
在黎明云崖，唯一能称得上朝圣之路的，就是泰坦断崖的那条长阶了吧。
In Dawncloud Cliff, the only path that can be called a pilgrim's path is the long staircase at the Titan Cliff.
你已经拿到石板了，贵客，希望你不是来消遣我的。
You've already obtained the stone slab, honored guest. I hope you're not here to waste my time.
这是为你准备的奖励，拿着吧——只有它能为我提供些许参与感。
This is the reward prepared for you. Take it. Only this can give me a sense of participation.
Can you give me more hints?
「虫鸣指引着朝圣之路。」算是相当直白了。
"The chirping of insects guides the pilgrim's path." Quite straightforward.
在黎明云崖，唯一能称得上朝圣之路的，就是泰坦断崖的那条长阶了吧。
In Dawncloud Cliff, the only path that can be called a pilgrim's path is the long staircase at the Titan Cliff.
即使我也不得不承认，你确实是位尽职的英雄。愿你行于坦途之上。
Even I must admit, you are indeed a dutiful hero. May your path be smooth.
这里已经没有更多若虫了。你做到了应做的，英雄。
There are no more nymphs here. You've done what was needed, hero.
其他地方应该还有没收集的若虫，去帮助我的衣匠同伴们吧。
There should be more nymphs elsewhere. Go help my fellow garmentmakers.
你已经身负找寻一只若虫的使命了，先专心完成它吧。
You're already tasked with finding a nymph. Focus on completing that first.
一尊衣匠突兀地站在这里，透露出一丝茫然。
A garmentmaker stands here abruptly, exuding a sense of confusion.
Why is the garmentmaker still chasing me!?
Did Cipher send you here too?
是时候打开天窗说亮话了…
衣匠不语，只是站在原地——也许它想假装没有听见，又或是同样对眼下的情况感到困惑。
The garmentmaker remains silent, just standing there, perhaps pretending not to hear, or equally confused by the situation.
抱歉，贵客，我也不清楚自己为什么会出现在这儿…或许这是阿格莱雅大人计划的一部分？
Sorry, honored guest, I'm not sure why I'm here either... Perhaps it's part of Lady Aglaea's plan?
算了，来都来了，就让我们继续履行职责吧。记得好像是捉虫之类的……
Never mind. Since I'm here, let's continue our duties. I think it's something about catching bugs...
你好啊贵客…提醒我一下，接下来是要做什么来着？
Hello, honored guest... Remind me, what am I supposed to do next?
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
嗯…我忘了。或许<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>能让我想起来……
Hmm... I forgot. Maybe a <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shard</color> will help me remember...
衣匠缓缓接过记忆残晶，不慌不忙地炼化。
The tailor slowly takes the Memory Crystal Shard and refines it without haste.
我想起来了…有位织者与蝴蝶颇为交好。它正在<color=#dbc291ff>亡语蝶嬉戏的枝干前</color>，喃喃着要加入它们呢。
I remember now... A weaver is quite fond of butterflies. It's murmuring about joining them in front of <color=#dbc291ff>the branch where the Eulogistic Butterflies play</color>.
我想起来了…有位织者仍处在阳光下，和<color=#dbc291ff>露台上的宝箱</color>位置相同。贵客或许得用些特殊手段才能找到它。
I remember now... A weaver is still in the sunlight, at the same spot as the <color=#dbc291ff>treasure chest on the terrace</color>. You might need special means to find it.
我想起来了…有位织者自称是女王的骑士，它正骑着<color=#dbc291ff>飞天坛递</color>在庭院里巡逻、等待着英雄们归来呢。
I remember now... A weaver claims to be the queen's knight. It's patrolling the courtyard on a <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, awaiting the return of heroes.
我想起来了…有位织者喜欢思考哲学问题。它正位于<color=#dbc291ff>沐浴阳光的瀑布上</color>，思考瀑布的变化呢。贵客或许得用些特殊手段才能找到它。

I remember now... A weaver enjoys pondering philosophical questions. It's located <color=#dbc291ff>above the sunlit waterfall</color>, contemplating the changes of the waterfall. You might need special means to find it.
我想起来了…有位织者发誓抵御黑潮，它正潜伏在<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮造物附近的花丛里</color>，等待着敌人露出破绽呢。
I remember now... A weaver has sworn to resist the black tide. It's lurking in the <color=#dbc291ff>flower beds near the black tide's creations</color>, waiting for the enemy to show a weakness.
我想起来了…有位织者曾是宝库的管理员，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>王室的宝库内</color>独自慨叹呢。
I remember now... A weaver was once the administrator of the treasury. It is now sitting in the <color=#dbc291ff>royal treasury</color>, sighing to itself.
我想起来了…有位织者曾是王室护卫，它如今仍在戍守<color=#dbc291ff>大殿的侧厅</color>，贵客得先通过它的考验才行。
I remember now... A weaver was once a royal guard. It is still guarding the <color=#dbc291ff>side chamber of the main hall</color>. You must first pass its test.
我想起来了…有位织者一见月亮就格外欢喜，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>适合观月的台阶尽头</color>，欣赏双月同天的景象呢。
I remember now... A weaver is overjoyed at the sight of the moon. It is admiring the sight of two moons in the sky at the <color=#dbc291ff>end of the moon-viewing steps</color>.
我想起来了…有位织者一只想要去往彼岸。它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>双月高塔上</color>，试着用自己的方式抵达冥界。
I remember now... A weaver has always wanted to reach the other side. It is hiding on the <color=#dbc291ff>Twin Moon Spire</color>, trying to reach the nether realm in its own way.
我想起来了…有位织者小心翼翼又充满好奇心。它正趴在一座<color=#dbc291ff>隐秘房间的双开大门上</color>，猜测门的背后有什么呢。
I remember now... A weaver is cautious yet full of curiosity. It is lying on the <color=#dbc291ff>double door of a hidden room</color>, guessing what lies behind the door.
贵客忘了吗？我已经为你揭晓了一只若虫的位置…等找到它之后再来吧。
Have you forgotten, honored guest? I've already revealed the location of a nymph... Come back after you've found it.
关于若虫，我有些问题想问。
I have some questions about the nymphs.
我尽力回答…如果我还能记得答案的话。
I'll do my best to answer... if I can still remember the answers.
贵客指的应该是亡语蝶？它们并非浪漫的信徒，而是塞纳托斯引渡亡魂的使者。
You must be referring to the Eulogistic Butterflies? They are not believers of Romance but messengers of Thanatos, guiding souls to the afterlife.
亡语蝶仅靠一丝执念存留于世，没有灵魂、亦没有怀揣赐福，贵客无需在意它们。
Eulogistic Butterflies exist in this world by a thread of obsession, without souls or blessings. You need not pay them any mind.
若要分辨亡语蝶和创生若虫，我有一个小技巧——所有的若虫都有触角，那些没有的就是亡语蝶啦。
To distinguish between Eulogistic Butterflies and Creation Nymphs, here's a tip — all nymphs have antennae, while those without are Eulogistic Butterflies.
那些萤火虫也是若虫吗？
嗯…贵客可能会感到奇怪，但答案是「没错」。
Hmm... You might find it strange, but the answer is "yes."
若虫拥有许多种形态。究竟以什么面貌示人，取决于被赐福的灵魂拥有何种品质。
Nymphs take on many forms. The appearance they assume depends on the qualities of the blessed soul.
坚强而理智的灵魂化作甲虫，踏实前行；浪漫而感性的灵魂化作蝴蝶，翩然起舞……
Strong and rational souls become beetles, moving forward steadily. Romantic and emotional souls become butterflies, dancing gracefully...
而那些志向高远或胸怀宽广的灵魂，则会被捏塑成萤火虫，用自己的光芒点亮黑暗。
And those with lofty ambitions or open minds are shaped into fireflies, using their light to illuminate the darkness.
至于它们为什么出现在这里…阿格莱雅大人曾经说过一个解释，但我忘了……
As for why they appear here... Lady Aglaea once gave an explanation, but I've forgotten it...
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
嗯…对哦，接下来该我发力了。我看看……
Hmm... Right, now it's my turn to act. Let me see...
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...
"Push open the door of the past," yadda yadda...
不行了，我一看谜语就头疼。既然贵客已经拿到金织了，我还是继续做个迷糊衣匠吧。
No. I can't do it. Riddles give me a headache. Since you've already obtained the golden weave, I'll just continue being the confused garmentmaker.
对了，这座古城中有只奇怪的若虫，叫声和其他飞萤们都有所不同…它似乎知道些内幕，贵客可以去找它问问。
By the way, there's a strange nymph in this ancient city. Its call is different from the other fyreflies... It seems to know some inside information. You might want to go ask it.
阿巴阿巴…贵客似乎已经拿到石板了？正好我一看谜语就头疼。
Blah blah... It seems you've already obtained the stone slate? Good, because riddles give me a headache.
这是给贵客的奖励，我就继续做个迷糊衣匠好了。
This is your reward, honored guest. I'll just keep being the confused garmentmaker.
Can you give me more hints?
你搜集了足够的若虫，然后我帮忙解封了一则预言…好吧，你想听的应该不是这个。
You've collected enough nymphs, and I helped unseal a prophecy... Well, that's probably not what you wanted to hear.
但我真的不擅长解谜——你看我的名字就知道。所有答案都藏在金织里了，快去找吧~
But I'm really not good at solving riddles... just look at my name. All the answers are hidden in the golden weave. Go find them~
对了，这座古城中有只奇怪的若虫，叫声和其他飞萤们都有所不同…它似乎知道些内幕，贵客可以去找它问问。
By the way, there's a strange nymph in this ancient city. Its call is different from the other fyreflies... It seems to know some inside information. You might want to go ask it.
Goodbye... Don't forget to come back.
你好啊贵客…啊嘞？已经没有更多若虫了。
Hello, honored guest... Huh? There are no more nymphs here.
唔…其他地方应该还有没收集的若虫。请你去帮助我的衣匠同伴们吧。
Hmm... There should be more nymphs elsewhere. Please go help my fellow garmentmakers.
再创世之后的世界啊…届时的人们会去往哪里呢？
The world after the Era Nova... Where will people go then?
只是回想起阿那克萨戈拉斯的那番言论，感到有些后怕罢了。
I was just recalling Anaxagoras's words, and it made me feel a bit uneasy.
回想起阿那克萨戈拉斯的那番言论，恐怕不会如此简单。
Recalling Anaxagoras's words, I'm afraid it won't be that simple.
恐怕不会是什么好地方…
It probably won't be a good place...
我同意。回想起阿那克萨戈拉斯的那番言论，结局或许比单纯的死亡还要糟糕。
I agree. Recalling Anaxagoras's words, the outcome might be worse than simply death.
倘若有什么手段能让人们在新世界也得以留存的话……
If only there were a way for people to remain intact even in the new world...
罢了，就当是一位衣匠的呓语吧。
Never mind. Just consider it the ramblings of a garmentmaker.
多亏贵客你先前搜集的石板，金丝得以为我指出更加明确的方向。
Thanks to the stone slates you collected earlier, the golden threads have pointed me in a clearer direction.
这些石板的主人，那位名叫库玛的女预言家确实犯下过禁忌：她曾试图染指「浪漫」的权柄，好让自己化身若虫、从塞纳托斯指缝中逃脱。
The owner of these slates, the prophetess named Kuma, did indeed commit a taboo: She tried to seize the authority of Romance to transform herself into a nymph and escape Thanatos's grasp.
她的研究存在许多纰漏之处，不过对我来说仍有价值。若能得到更多织者的赐福，我就能找到一个行之有效的改进方法。
Her research has many flaws, but it still holds value for me. With more blessings from the weavers, I can find an effective way to improve it.
这样一来，阿格莱雅大人的愿望也能……
This way, Lady Aglaea's wish can also...
About the flickering of the nymphs...
看样子贵客注意到了，有何吩咐？
It seems you've noticed that. What do you need?
你能让这些若虫停止闪烁吗？
Can you make these nymphs stop flickering?
贵客不喜欢吗？那我去让若虫们老实一点。
You don't like it? I'll go tell the nymphs to behave.
你能让这些若虫重新闪烁吗？
Can you make these nymphs flicker again?
如贵客所愿，我去同若虫们商量一下。
As you wish. I'll go discuss it with the nymphs.
Let's leave it at that for now.
这里是专为虔诚信徒提供的朝圣平台。你向刻法勒行礼致意，而它却没有做出回礼——可能是因为手都占着吧。
This is a pilgrimage platform dedicated to devout believers. You bow to Kephale, but they do not return the gesture, probably because their hands are full.
这里是专为虔诚信徒提供的朝圣平台。而你，阿那克萨戈拉斯，从不向那些伪神跪拜。
This is a pilgrimage platform dedicated to devout believers. But you, Anaxagoras, never kneel to false gods.
…啊，{NICKNAME}阁下，你能够平安凯旋真是太好了。
It's great to have you back, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
他的名字叫狄摩西尼，兴许阁下此前在浴场见过这位瘦削的青年。
Demosthenes. You may have seen this thin young man at the baths before.
为了从黑潮怪物手里保护一位吓得不敢动弹的孩童，这位青年受了重伤，生命垂危。
He was severely wounded while protecting a child too frightened to move from the black tide creatures. His life is now in danger.
听说他平时羞涩怕事，羡慕他人健美的身材。但在可怕的怪物面前，他毫不犹豫地用自己的脊背护住了这个孩子……

They say he's normally shy and insecure, always admiring others' athletic builds. But when those frightening monsters appeared, he immediately shielded the child with his back without a second thought...
那一击让他直到现在都没能醒来，或许…永远都醒不来了。
That attack has left him unconscious until now, and perhaps... he will never wake up again.
换成风堇小姐，一定能够把他救回来吧。要是我的医术能够更精湛一些就好了……
Miss Hyacine would definitely be able to save him if she were here. If only my medical skills were more advanced...
别自责，你已经尽己所能了。
It's not your fault. You've done everything you can.
嗯，谢谢你。身为医师，看着生命在自己眼前流逝，难免会生出一丝无助感。
Thank you. As a healer, watching a life slip away before your eyes inevitably creates a sense of helplessness.
但是，风堇小姐已经把昏光庭院托付给我了。
But Miss Hyacine has entrusted the Twilight Courtyard to me.
尽管…我还做不到像风堇小姐那样，为每位罹受苦难的伤患都展露出开朗的笑容……
Although... I still can't show a cheerful smile to every suffering patient like her...
但至少得努努力，不要露出太悲伤的表情吧。
But at the very least, I should try not to look too sad.
一段熟悉的跫音…{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，想不到在这样的时刻还能与你重逢。
A rather familiar footstep... {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, I never imagined we would meet again in times like these.
很幸运，我没有受伤。圣城卫士们把那些怪物拦在云石市集之外了。
Yes, I'm fortunate to be unharmed. The Holy City Guards managed to keep those creatures at bay, away from the Marmoreal Market.
如今于圣城中肆虐的战火，较之我幼时在雅努萨波利斯所经历的更加凶暴。
The battles currently raging in the city are far more violent than what I experienced as a child in Janusopolis.
而耳畔末日的呢喃…也从未如此清晰。
And the whispers of doom in my ears... have never been so clear.
Is there any hope left for us?
哪怕死亡已将叹息刻进人们的额骨，我们也仍能循着命运的声息继续迈步。
Even if death has etched its sighs into our skulls, we can still follow fate's whispers and move forward.
很遗憾，黑潮的洪流过于喧嚣，无论是天外之声还是命运的呢喃，我都已经无法听清了。
Unfortunately, the black tide's flood is too clamorous. I can no longer hear clearly either the voices beyond the sky or the whispers of fate.
现在的我，不过是一个普通的盲女罢了。
Now, I am simply an ordinary blind woman, nothing more.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你还记得缇宝大人的口头禅吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, do you recall Lady Tribbie's favorite saying?
如今，白日已经落幕、长夜依然无垠。不知到了下一个门扉时…我们还能否再度相见，又能否仍识得彼此呢。
Now, daylight has faded, and the long night stretches endlessly. When the next Entry Hour comes... I wonder if we'll meet again, and if we'll still recognize each other.
一切都已经结束，一切都行将逝去。
Everything has ended, everything is fading away.
我们曾经唱过的那些歌谣，那些记录着思念、幸福、哀愁和爱的曲调，从此之后都将被遗忘……
The ballads we once sang, those melodies preserving our longing, happiness, sorrow, and love, will all fade into oblivion...
在此之前，请您倾听这最后的乐曲。
Before that time comes, please listen to this final melody.
黑潮吞没卡弥特斯时，乐师们仍泰然自若地弹奏水漫琴，借着涌入街巷的波涛演奏激昂的乐曲。
When the black tide consumed Carmitis, the musicians remained calm, playing their water-soaked harps and performing passionate melodies with the waves surging through the streets.
如果说海浪是世界最初的乐声，那么用哭泣为世界的终点伴奏，未免太过残忍。
If ocean waves were the world's first music, it would be too cruel to accompany the world's end with nothing but weeping.
在这样的时刻，或许只有乐声才能掩过琐碎的杂音，将毫无意义的死亡改写为史诗般壮丽的结局吧。
At a time like this, perhaps only music can cover the meaningless background noise and transform pointless deaths into an epic, magnificent finale.
You should hurry to find shelter.
感谢您的关心，好心的听众。
Thank you for your concern, kind listener.
但没有一卷乐谱不会以休止符作结，所有的美都需要在毁灭里将自己凝为永恒。
But no musical score ends without a rest mark, and all beauty must crystallize into eternity through its own destruction.
我已经受够了担惊受怕、东躲西藏的日子。现如今，我只想在琴声中停歇，等待最后一刻的到来。
I'm tired of living in fear, hiding from place to place. Now, I just want to rest in this music, waiting for the final moment to come.
What do you think about the "Era Nova"?
起初，他们说{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}会庇佑卡弥特斯不陷落于黑潮。然后，他们说奥赫玛会永远不受黑夜侵袭……
At first, they claimed {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} would protect Carmitis from the black tide. Then, they promised Okhema would never be touched by the dark night...
虚妄的希望是一种毒药。事到如今，我已经不敢期待太多。
Empty hope is poisonous. At this point, I dare not expect too much.
不过，乐曲虽会不断反复，但每一次演奏，每一次移调、变奏，都会来带新的乐章。
However, though music repeats itself, each performance, each key change and variation creates new movements.
与其让乐曲分毫不差地重演，不如去期待未来，会有怎样不同的旋律被人们写下。
Rather than having music replayed exactly the same way, it's better to look forward to what new melodies people will write in the future.
客人，很高兴看到你平安无事…
It's a relief to see you safe and sound...
能和我说说现在的情况吗？
Can you tell me about the situation?
我不确定到底发生了什么…天空突然暗了下来，紧接着浴场上层传来了尖叫声……
I don't know exactly what happened... the sky suddenly darkened, then screams came from the upper level of the baths...
然后怪物就出现了！多亏轮班的卫士们正好在泡澡，再加上「虹彩色的薄膜」阻挡了怪物的攻击，大家才能及时撤离。
Then the creatures appeared! Thanks to the guards who were bathing during their shift, plus the "rainbow membrane" that blocked the creatures' attacks, everyone managed to evacuate in time.
把大家集中在这里是我的建议，因为怪物们似乎无法穿过这片水帘。希望外面的骚动能尽快平息，毕竟，有不少人的亲朋还在市集那边……

Gathering everyone here was my suggestion, since the creatures seem unable to pass through this water curtain. I hope the chaos outside calms down soon, especially since many people have family members still at the market...
如果就这么迎来「再创世」…
If the "Era Nova" arrives under these circumstances...
我…说实话，我很害怕这件事。如果真的按照学者所说，一切记忆都将不复存在…那活在新世界的那个人，还算是我自己吗？万一……
I... to be honest, this terrifies me. If everything unfolds as the scholars predict, and all memories vanish... would the person living in the new world still be me? What if...
——不，对不起。可能是因为在客人你面前感到放松，我才会说出这些…还请不要把我的担忧透露给其他人。
Sorry, please forgive me. I probably feel too comfortable around you to voice these concerns... please don't share my worries with others.
「再创世」的承诺，是身在此处的人们唯一的慰藉。所以现阶段，只要这样就好…嗯。
The promise of "Era Nova" remains the only solace for those of us here. So for now, this will suffice... yes.
我们刚刚和其他卫兵取得了联系，等到确定外面安全下来，他们就会护送我们去跟广场的大伙汇合……
We've just made contact with other guards, and once they confirm it's safe outside, they'll escort us to meet everyone at the Plaza...
但我还打算在这里停留一段时间。你看，接待处不能一直乱糟糟没人打理，还有积压的货物也该打个包……
But I plan to stay here a while longer. The reception area can't remain in such disarray, and there are also goods that need to be packaged...
…嗯，这都是借口。云石天宫承载着奥赫玛人的热情与回忆，它可能会打烊，但却从未冷清过。我眷恋这片水流，所以我会留在这。这…是我的固执。

Well, I'm just making excuses. The Marmoreal Palace carries the passion and memories of the Okhemans. It may close temporarily, but it has never been desolate. I'm attached to these waters, so I'll stay here. Call it... stubborn, I don't know.
如果这次危机过去，预言中的新世界却还尚未到来…那么届时，我还会在这里，欢迎您再度光顾浴场。
If this crisis passes and the prophesied new world hasn't arrived... I'll still be here, ready to welcome you back to the baths.
各位，呆在这里。安全，这里。
不太妙。怪物，一批接着一批。彩虹罩子，帮了大忙。但，人们太慌张。
Not good. Monsters, coming in waves. Rainbow dome, big help. But people are panicking.
有人发疯，冲了出去。佩特拉，去救人，却倒下了。
Some went mad, ran outside. Petros went to rescue them, but fell.
只要我，还站着，绝不会，让民众倒下。我要，一直站着。
As long as I stand, civilians won't fall. I must keep standing.
坚持一下，「再创世」就快了。
Hang on, the Era Nova is almost here.
与我，无关。这些，不想听到。在那之前死去，一切，都会白费！
Not my concern. Don't want to hear about it. Dying before then, everything, wasted!
Don't be too hard on yourself.
佩特拉，牺牲了。我那时，在做别的！如果我，再认真点的话！
Petros sacrificed himself. But I was busy, elsewhere! If only, I had paid more attention!
我，无法原谅…怪物，更无法原谅。
I cannot forgive myself... and the monsters, even so.
不要，担心我。卫士一定，守好这里，不论多久。这，是山之民的誓言。
Don't worry about me. The guards will protect this place, no matter how long. This, is the Mountain Dwellers' oath.
其他山之民的状况如何？
How are the other Mountain Dwellers doing?
很多人，去了上面。哈托努斯也，战斗，带着工匠们。我们，更健壮，赞美，吉奥里亚。
Many went upstairs. Chartonus is also fighting, leading the craftsmen. We are stronger, praise Georios.
吉奥里亚的教诲——危机时，它的子民，要成为磐岩之盾。我们，始终铭记，始终贯彻。
Heed Georios's teaching — in times of crisis, his people must become shields of stone. We always remember this, always follow it.
啊…是你啊。有你在这里，大家应该都会安心很多。
Ah... it's you. With you here, everyone should feel much more at ease.
如你所见，巡逻、维护基本的秩序。
Patrolling and keeping basic order, as you can see.
今天实在发生了太多的事…我自己其实也慌得很。但是慌没用啊，越慌越乱——赶过大地兽的人都知道。
So much has happened today... I'm actually pretty nervous myself. But panic doesn't help, it only makes things worse — anyone who's herded dromas knows this.
所以呢，也是为了我自己能冷静下来，我就这么做了。「再创世」应该和所谓的投胎差不多吧？还是希望，大家都能顺顺利利地转生……
So, partly to help myself stay calm, I started doing this. The Era Nova is probably like reincarnation, right? I just hope everyone can transition smoothly to their next life...
哦哦，和我们相比，大地兽还是冷静多了！
Oh, the dromas are much more composed, compared to us!
作为{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的宠儿，它们想必比我们更理解「再创世」的真谛……
As {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}'s beloved creatures, they probably understand the true meaning of Era Nova better than we do...
世界末日归世界末日，大家的日子还是要过的，对吧？
World ending or not, life goes on, right?
So you believe in Era Nova?
Well, you kinda have to, right?
你想，万一那位那刻夏老师在骗人，我们现在，不就相当于没几天可活了吗？可既然没几天可活——
Look, if Professor Anaxa is lying, we basically have just a few days left to live, right? But if we only have a few days—
为什么不让自己安心一点、踏实一点？
Why not let ourselves feel more secure and calm?
…那不就还是得相信「再创世」嘛，哈哈哈哈。干嘛自己折磨自己，你说是吧。
So we still end up believing in Era Nova, haha. So why torture yourself, right?
但愿下一世，我们还是大地兽的伙伴！
I hope in the next world, we'll still be partners with the dromas!
天空倾覆，大地震颤，末世终于还是来了。
The sky falls, the earth shakes, the end of days has finally come.
还有很多数据来不及保存。年轻人，你若是有空，能帮我一把吗？
There's still lots of data I haven't saved. Young one, if you have time, could you help me?
老本行罢了——坠落的巨石砸碎了花园的苗圃，打乱了一部分记录生命质素数据的「种子」，而我正试着把它们恢复。
Just my old job — falling rocks have crushed the garden nursery, disrupting some "seeds" that record life essence data, and I'm trying to restore them.
必须把文明的火种安然地送往来世—— 要是新世界没有「麦迪特瑞恩蜜果」这样的美味，我的果蔬摊可该怎么开下去啊！
We must deliver the spark of civilization safely to the next world — if the new world doesn't have treats like the "Mediterrana fig," how will I run my produce stand!
啊，多谢！像你这么热心肠的年轻人，可不多见了。
Oh, thank you! We don't see many accommodating young fellows like you nowadays.
许多资料都散落在地，来不及一一整理。请你收集自己觉得重要的数据吧，我来将它们整合起来。
Many records are scattered on the ground, too many to sort through individually. Please collect what you think is important, and I'll organize them together.
嗯，可不能少了它。它的根蒂坚固，莲叶甚至能供大地兽行走。
Yes, we can't forget that one. Its roots are strong, and its leaves can even support dromas.
据说黄金世里，许多城邦甚至会用它在浅滩搭建桥梁呢。我们来世一定也能用得上。
They say during the Golden Era, many city-states used them to build bridges across the shallows. We'll definitely need them in the next world.
呃啊…这种生物叮人很疼，还容易泛滥成灾，要不还是让它毁灭算了？
Ugh... these creatures bite painfully and often become pests. Maybe we should just let them perish?
哈哈，只是一个玩笑。所有生命都有它存在的意义。
Haha, just kidding. All living beings have a reason to exist.
我会把这些数据移到安全的书柜里。多谢你，真是帮大忙了。
I'll move this data to a safe bookshelf. Thank you, you've been a great help.
Do you believe in "Era Nova" yourself?
嗯…我在树庭研习多年，又把大半辈子花在了研究上。仰赖瑟希斯赋予的理性，在我看来，那刻夏的论证并无纰漏。
Hmm... I studied at the Grove for many years and spent most of my life doing research. By the wisdom bestowed by Cerces, I see no flaws in Anaxa's reasoning.
即便是私心上说，我也希望能在创世后找到女儿。
Even if it's just for a second, I'd love to be able to see my daughter again in the newly created world.
唉…下一世，我一定不会让她去参加什么探险队了……
Hmm... in the next life, I will never let her join any expedition again...
I have other matters to attend to.
也是，时间不多了。年轻人，要是有什么想做的事、想见的人，就尽快去吧！
That's true, time is running out. Young one, if there's something you want to do or someone you want to see, go now while you still can!
Though the dawn has faded, do not panic!
Stay away from unstable buildings to avoid injury!
The eternal night has arrived, and creation is near!
Stay calm and composed, and we will overcome this together!
In times of disaster, mutual aid comes first!
Those who commit crimes and wrongdoing shall find no mercy from the Titans!
客人你好——啊，抱歉，称呼习惯了，一时间改不过来。
Greetings, guest... ah, apologies, I'm so used to saying that, I couldn't change it in time.
没办法像之前那样招待您，请多多见谅。
I can't host you as I did before, please forgive me.
灾变发生时，我正在裁缝铺里。听说云石天宫有人受伤，急需麻布止血，我就赶忙收拾了些布匹过来。

When the catastrophe struck, I was in the tailor's shop. I heard that there were injured people at Marmoreal Palace in urgent need of material to stop the bleeding, so I quickly gathered some fabric and rushed over.
想不到情况竟然严峻到了这种地步…幸好卫士们反应迅速，否则我带的那些麻布怕是不够用呢。
I never imagined the situation had become this severe... Fortunately, the guards reacted quickly. Otherwise, the cloth I brought wouldn't have been nearly enough.
我和他在市集做了最后的告别。听说驻守城墙的卫士们损失惨重，他正准备带上铁匠铺的武器前去支援。

He and I said our final goodbyes at the market. I heard that the guards stationed at the city walls suffered heavy losses, and he was preparing to take the weapons from the blacksmith shop to support them.
您真该亲眼看看他拿着长剑的样子——那柄剑刚从锻炉里取出，淬火之前，彤红的火光映照在他的肌肉上，别提多帅气了。
You really should have seen him holding that longsword, freshly taken from the forge, glowing red hot before the quenching. The fiery light reflecting off his muscles... it was an incredible sight.
我们都清楚彼此的决意，此时说什么都是多余的。
We both understood each other's resolve. At this moment, words were unnecessary.
对我来说，那一刻的告别就已经足够了。
For me, that farewell in that moment was already enough.
是吧？我就说他是最棒的！
Right? I knew it, he's the best!
What do you think about the "Era Nova"?
…我相信阿格莱雅大人。这份她和黄金裔英雄们用生命捍卫的事业，最后一定会把我们带去美丽的新世界吧。
...I believe in Lady Aglaea. This cause, defended with the lives of her and the heroes of the Chrysos Heir, will surely lead us to a beautiful new world in the end.
只是眼下，卫士们还在为保护圣城而努力着，我们这些公民也该积极承担责任，共同挺过这最艰难的时刻。
For now, the guards are still fighting to protect the Holy City, and we citizens must also take responsibility and stand together to endure this most difficult time.
毕竟，再创世只是一个期许。在那之前，我们还是得过好自己的生活。
After all, Era Nova is merely a hope. Until that day comes, we must still live our lives as best we can.
您客气了。需要帮助的话，请尽管来找我。
You're too kind. If you ever need help, please don't hesitate to find me.
…您好，客人。如您所见，浴场现在暂停营业……
...Greetings, guest. As you can see, the bathhouse is currently closed...
…但浴池照常开放，您可以自由使用。只是侍者们…基本都下班了，还请谅解。
...But the bath pools remain open, and you are free to use them. However, most of the attendants... have already gone off duty, so I ask for your understanding.
啊…无人的浴场——放在平时能有几人得见这一幕？我们还真是幸运。
Ah... an empty bathhouse, how many people would ever get to witness such a sight under normal circumstances? We are truly fortunate.
是啊，做了一生的「服务业」，难得有机会，就让我也体验下当客人的乐趣吧。
Yes, after a lifetime in "service," it's rare to have the chance. So let me enjoy the experience of being a guest for once.
客人，我知道…您也身手不凡。要是您不介意现在这个状况，不妨去找个池子泡泡，对于平复心情…很有帮助。
Guest, I know... you are quite skilled yourself. If you don't mind the current situation, why not find a pool and take a soak? It's quite helpful for calming the mind.
What's the condition of the bathhouse?
有些怪物闯了进来…和「纷争」那次不同，它们出现得很突然。客人们有些慌乱， 但一道「虹彩色的屏障」把怪物和人们分隔开了。
Some monsters broke in... Unlike the "Strife" incident, they appeared very suddenly. The guests panicked a bit, but a "prismatic barrier" separated the monsters from the people.
泡澡的卫兵们反应迅速，抓起书库的石板文献朝怪物砸了过去，借此争取到了全副武装的时机——正可谓知识就是力量。
The bathing guards reacted swiftly, grabbing the stone tablet manuscripts from the library and hurling them at the monsters, buying enough time to fully arm themselves. Truly, knowledge is power.
后来，客人们都撤离了。浴场内只剩下歇斯底里的家伙…还有我这种眷恋着池水温暖的怪人。
Later, all the guests evacuated. The only ones left in the bathhouse were the hysterical ones... and odd people like me, who just couldn't part with the warmth of the water.
抛下一切，迎来新的世界——我求而不得。
To abandon everything and welcome a new world, that is a wish I can never attain.
人们恐惧失去珍视的记忆，而我只想遗忘过去——那与纷争相伴…化作梦魇使我难以入眠的过去。听闻一切将重启，我心怀感激。

People fear losing the memories they cherish, while I only wish to forget the past, which entwined with strife... turning it into nightmares that rob me of sleep. Hearing that everything will be reset, I feel nothing but gratitude.
…我打算在池水中迎接这份恩赐，希望不会让我等太久。
...I plan to welcome this blessing while immersed in the bathwater. Hopefully, it won't keep me waiting too long.
I'll be going now. Stay safe.
我会的。您也多保重，客人。新世界再会吧。
I will. You take care as well, guest. See you in the new world.
可曾听闻圣山之上，最后的城邦\n不朽神明岿然背负，永恒的太阳
Have you heard of the last city, on the Holy Mountain high?\nWhere the immortal deity carries the sun across the eternal sky?
哎…是您呀，有空再来听利波吟唱一曲吗？
Ah... it's you. Care to come back sometime and hear Lipos sing a song?
纷乱里白昼纵然逝去\n惶恐中生命尚存希望
Though daylight fades in the chaos,\nhope still lingers in the midst of fear.
诸神寂灭，人之赞歌理应唱响\n黑潮肆虐，希望之舟正待启航
The gods are silent, but the song of humanity must still rise.\nAmidst the ravages of black tide, the ship of hope is ready to set sail.
失乡人啊，去寻觅末世的净土吧\n别放弃火焰、清泉和丰壤
O displaced souls, go seek the pure land at the end of the world.\nDon't give up on the flames, the fresh waters, and the fertile soil.
流亡者啊，去再造幸福的庭园吧\n别忘记笑语、欢宴与佳酿
O exiles, go rebuild a garden of happiness.\nDon't forget the laughter, the feasts, and the fine wine.
Will you still write poems for me?
当然！您与英雄们的逐火之旅何其恢宏、何其壮阔，能为您创作诗歌、记录下诸位的故事，是利波此生最大的荣幸。
Of course! Talk about your Flame-Chase Journey with the heroes. How magnificent, how grand! To create poetry for you and record your stories is the greatest honor of my life.
即便黎明机器已经熄灭、即便前路充满了未知与危险，利波依旧希望能够见证您完成这段伟大的旅途！
Even if the Dawn Device have shut down, and even if the road ahead is filled with uncertainty and danger, I still hope to witness you completing this great journey!
Do you believe in Era Nova?
利波…愿意相信。对利波而言，这世上有许多美好还未曾记录、也有太多遗憾无法弥补。
I... want to believe. There are so many beautiful things in this world that have yet to be recorded, and so many regrets that can never be healed.
如果真的有再创世，利波希望能再见赫西俄德老师一面。
If Era Nova is real, I hope to see my teacher Hesiod once again.
我想对他说「谢谢」、也想对他说「抱歉」，我有一首诗歌想要送给他…还想将他介绍给父母和姐姐……
I want to thank him, and apologize to him. I have a poem for him... and I want to introduce him to my parents and my sister...
到时候利波会请老师为您创作一首诗歌——他是位可以媲美伊利亚的伟大诗人，您一定会喜欢的！
When that time comes, I will ask my teacher to compose a poem for you — He is a great poet who could rival Illia, and I'm sure you'll love it!
Let's hope we'll cross paths again in the future.
再见，可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}，愿命运指引我们再次相遇！
Goodbye, dear {F#miss}{M#sir}, may fate guide us to meet again!
马尔库斯他…他没有撒谎…他是对的，都怪我……
Marcus... he wasn't lying... he was right. It's all my fault...
呃，你好？请问你有见过一个叫马尔库斯的人，是个傻大个儿，之前经常在这附近晃悠。
Uh, hello? Have you seen a guy named Marcus? He's a big, simpleminded guy, used to hang around here a lot.
哎，马尔库斯…我现在渐渐理解他了…也许他真的能听到某些神秘的呼唤吧，只可惜……
Ah, Marcus... I'm starting to understand him now... Maybe he really can hear some mysterious calls. It's just a shame...
一个退役士兵，总喜欢讲些遇见黑潮的古怪经历。我一直以为他在编故事，拿我家人所遭遇的不幸当谈资……
A retired soldier, always talking about strange encounters with the black tide. I always thought he was just making up stories, using the misfortunes my family went through as material...
我的家人在黑潮中不幸身亡，我逃来奥赫玛投靠亲戚时，马尔库斯就在我们附近的街上晃悠。
My family died in the black tide, and when I fled to Okhema to stay with relatives, Marcus was always hanging around the street nearby.
他总说那些被黑潮带走的人还会出现，甚至会呼唤生者。我气疯了，我只想让我的家人安息。
He kept saying that the people taken by the black tide would return, that they might even call out to the living. I was furious. I just wanted my family to rest in peace.
所以每次他讲故事，我都会去反驳他。塞纳托斯在上，它平等地眷顾每一个逝者…但现在，我不确定了…也许马尔库斯真能听到某些神秘的呼唤吧。
So every time he told his stories, I'd argue with him. Thanatos up above watches over every soul equally... but now, I'm not so sure... Maybe Marcus really can hear some mysterious calls after all.
天灾那天，我被倒塌的柜子压住，是他救了我，但没过多久，他又开始神神叨叨的，一直喊着「别带走他们」，然后就冲出去了。
The day disaster struck, I was pinned under a collapsed cabinet. He saved me, but not long after, he started acting strange again, constantly shouting "Don't take them away" before rushing out.
自那以后就再也没人见过他。如果你有他的下落，请随时与我联系…我欠他太多了……
No one has seen him since. If you have any information about his whereabouts, please contact me immediately... I owe him too much...
有马尔库斯的消息了吗？
守卫告诉我，他们在城外发现了一具尸体，模样看着像是马尔库斯。但我还没确认，他们说要等遗体收敛好后才能喊我过去的。
The guards told me they found a body outside the city that looked like Marcus. But I haven't confirmed it yet — they said I must wait until the remains are prepared before I can go see.
真希望不是他…一定是他们搞错了…我要继续找他。无论如何，他救了我，我不能丢下他不管。
I pray it's not him... It must be a mistake... I'll keep searching. Regardless, he saved me — I can't abandon him now.
…那具尸体，但愿不会是他，塞纳托斯在上，求求你放过这个可怜的魂灵吧。
...That body, I hope it's not him. By Thanatos, spare this poor soul.
你觉得马尔库斯怎么样？
What do you think of Marcus?
他是个好人，只是精神…恐怕不太正常。他总觉得自己辜负了战友，总说看到队长的脸出现在黑潮里，听到同伴呼唤他。
He's a good man, though perhaps... not right in the mind. He always believed he failed his comrades, claimed he saw the captain's face in the black tide, and heard comrades calling him.
我以前觉得他在胡说八道，我骂他不尊重死者。但最近…我也开始做梦了。梦见我的妻子站在远处呼唤我，孩子们在玫瑰丛中奔跑……
I used to think it nonsense, and accused him of disrespecting the dead. But lately... I've started dreaming, too. My wife calling from afar, children running through rose bushes...
哎…马尔库斯他…或许是对的。
Ah... Marcus... perhaps he was right after all.
要是有马尔库斯的消息，请第一时间告诉我。
Contact me immediately if you hear anything about Marcus.
诶呀，没想到会在这里遇见。我们果然非常有缘啊，朋友~
Oh! Fancy meeting you here. Destiny truly binds us, my friend~
相信我，朋友，这地方可是整个奧赫玛最好的席位——无论是见证神明的谢幕，还是观看凡人的演出。
Trust me, my friend, this spot offers the best view in all of Okhema — whether witnessing a deity's final act or observing mortal theatrics.
瞧啊，人类最后的庇护所，如今再也庇护不了任何人喽。这样一出大戏，饶是扎格列斯本尊见了，都得赞不绝口吧？
Behold — humanity's last sanctuary now shelters none. Even Zagreus would applaud this magnificent spectacle, don't you think?
不过我对戏剧不怎么了解，所以也说不好，这究竟算是场悲剧、喜剧、还是闹剧呢……
Though I'm no drama critic — hard to say if this is tragedy, comedy, or farce...
唉…实不相瞒，作为一个自认合格的「扎格列斯信徒」，我始终都被自己的好奇心牵着鼻子走。
Ah... Truth be told, as a self-proclaimed follower of Zagreus, I'm forever led by my insatiable curiosity.
我曾经无数次想象奧赫玛的陷落、翁法罗斯的末日。可事到如今，一切近在眼前，我却反倒有些索然无味了……
I've imagined Okhema's fall and Amphoreus' doom countless times. Yet now that it's here... I find myself oddly... underwhelmed.
不过嘛，你们的「探险队」要是还打算招收新人的话，我可是会踊跃报名的哦？
Though should your "expedition team" seek new members... I'd gladly volunteer~
What do you know of the Era Nova?
这么说吧，关于「再创世」究竟意味着什么，恐怕就连一直信奉鼓吹它的黄金裔们，也都无法给出一个令人满意的答案哦。
The Era Nova? Let's say even the Chrysos Heirs who preach about it can't properly explain what it truly means.
「绝对的完美」、「永恒的幸福」…这些虚假的概念就像劣质的大地兽玩偶，只能为走投无路的人们提供些许聊胜于无的慰藉。
"Absolute perfection," "Eternal bliss"... Empty concepts like shoddy dromas plushies — comforting only the desperate.
虽然我对此还挺好奇的，但也仅此而已啦。比起这个，我对你们讨伐天空泰坦的经历，反倒更感兴趣些呢…那么大的宫殿究竟是怎么盖在天上的？难道说世界本无天地之分？
Curious? Certainly. But I'm more intrigued by your Sky Titan conquests... How does one build such an enormous palace in the sky? Does that mean that the sky and earth are not separated?
唉，美妙的时光总是如此短暂…希望我们还有缘再见，朋友！
Ah, how fleeting sweet moments are... Till fate reunites us, friend!
{F#女士}{M#先生}好呀！这段时间我在跟着达利安大叔强身健体。他一直在守护圣城公民们的安全，我虽然个头小，也能用自己的方式守护大家。
Good day, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I've been training with Uncle Dorian lately. While he protects the holy city, I'll guard everyone in my own way — even if I'm small!
是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}，这些日子，我又学会了不少字。
Oh, it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... I've learned many new words recently.
克帖西芬姐姐说，识的字越多，越有希望在来世成为大司铎、替大家解读神谕…虽然我不觉得神谕需要专人解读，但我会往那个方向努力的。
Ctesiphona says literacy improves one's chances of becoming a High Priestess in the afterlife to interpret the prophecy... Though I don't see why edicts need interpreting, I'll still try my best!
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你喜欢水漫琴的歌声吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, do you like the sound of the Water Lyre?
弥斯姐姐的弹奏，总是让我回想起第一次见到刻法勒的那天。如果我能把这份感动的心情写成歌唱出来就好了……
Misia's performance always reminds me of the day I first encountered Kephale. If only I could turn this moving emotion into a song...
啊！{F#女士}{M#先生}，我和阿芙罗姐姐学了很久的缝纫，但总觉得这项技能不太适合我。
Ah, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I've studied sewing with Aphrea for ages, but it never quite suited me.
所以我常常偷溜出来，做点别的事情，好在阿芙罗姐姐对我很宽松，尤其是她知道我在云崖上的经历之后……
So I often sneak out to do other things. Luckily, Aphrea's lenient, especially after learning about my time at Dawncloud...
{F#女士}{M#先生}你来啦？现在的我已经不再到处逃难了，奥赫玛就是我最后的家园，我想用自己的力量守护它。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're here. I don't wander as a refugee anymore – Okhema's my final home. I'll protect it with my own strength.
你的两个小伙伴去哪儿啦？
Where are your two little companions?
你还记得他们呀，亚森和拉缇娜，那两个小鬼，现在都可听话了！
You remember them! Yason and Lathena – both rascals behave properly now!
一个不再天天担心会被陨石砸死，另一个在安全区跑前跑后，帮助来避难的人们。
One stopped worrying about meteor strikes, the other runs around the safe zone helping refugees.
这都多亏了我们在云崖听到的「刻法勒」神谕，你说是吧？
All thanks to Kephale's prophecy we heard at Dawncloud, right?
嘘——我们一起保守这个秘密。
Shh— let's keep this secret together.
嘘——当然！我只悄悄和你一个人说，现在市集里的叔叔阿姨、哥哥姐姐，还有小鬼头们，都相信我真的听到了天父的神谕。
Shh— Of course! I'll whisper it only to you: now every adult and child at the market believes I truly heard the sky father's prophecy.
每当有人问我：希瑞雅，希瑞雅，这样的日子什么时候是个头，我们到底要怎么办？我就说：安心等待就好啦，刻法勒一定会回应我们的信仰。
When they ask "Serena, Serena, when will this end? What should we do?" I say: "Wait peacefully – Kephale will answer our faith."
这不算撒谎，对吗？拉个勾，我们一起保护大家心中希望的小火苗吧。
That's not lying, is it? Pinky promise – we'll protect the tiny spark of hope in everyone's heart.
刻法勒的小祭司，你好啊！
嘿嘿，被{F#女士}{M#先生}你这么称呼，还有点不好意思。
Hehe, {F#miss}{M#mister}, that title makes me blush!
你瞧，这儿是整个市集最开阔的地方，好多来奥赫玛避难的人都会从这儿经过，包括…从阿卡索斯第一次来奥赫玛的我。
Look, this is the most open place in the whole market. Many people who come to seek shelter in Okhema pass through here. Including... me, who came here from Icatus.
只不过，现在末日降临，又多了不少想从圣城离开，去其他城邦避难的人。
But now that the apocalypse is coming, many more people want to leave here and seek shelter in other cities.
我站在这里，是为了提醒他们——逃难是没有尽头的，不如安心留在圣城。
I stand here to remind them – fleeing has no end. Better to stay peacefully in the holy city.
奥赫玛是我们最后要守护、也最终会庇护我们的家园，一定是的。
Okhema is the last home we'll protect... and will ultimately shelter us. It must be.
现在你怎么看待「再创世」？
What do you think of the "Era Nova" now?
{F#女士}{M#先生}担心我觉得「再创世」是好心的卫兵叔叔、还有你，一起给像我这样的孩子们编织的安慰吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you worry I think "Era Nova" is just kind guards and you weaving comforting tales for children like me?
恰恰相反，我明白了，刻法勒虽然不再对人们说话，但它的庇护一刻也没有停止过。
On the contrary – I've realized Kephale's protection never ceased, though it no longer speaks to us.
如果不是命运保佑，我一定早早死在淹没阿卡索斯的黑潮里了。不会有机会来到圣城脚下，遇见照顾我的好心人们，也不敢想象有一天我能去黎明云崖。
Without destiny's mercy, I'd have died in Icatus' black tide. Never reached the holy city, met kind caretakers, nor dared dream of visiting Dawncloud.
连听到「神谕」这样的巧合，也是因为天父心怀仁慈，愿意让我怀抱着希望，并把希望传递给大家……
Even hearing the prophecy was sky father's mercy – letting me cradle hope and pass it onward...
所以，别为我担心！说不定第二天睁开眼，我们就看到重新亮起来的天空了呢。
So don't worry! Maybe tomorrow we'll wake to see the sky relit.
我会的，我是被「刻法勒」眷顾的希瑞雅。
I will – I'm Serena, blessed by Kephale!
也期待和{F#女士}{M#先生}你在新世界再次相遇哦！
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, let's meet again in the new world!
亲爱的帕门弥德，事到如今我不愿再用离奇的问题来刁难你，我只问一句：你怎么不跑呢？
Dear Parmenides, I won't plague you with strange questions anymore — just one: Why don't you flee?
希诺啊，我的老朋友，看在你竟也会关心人的份上，我就回答你：我相信灵魂不朽，它能在再创世后为我们找到新的躯体。你又为什么不跑呢？
Ha, Zeno, my old friend! Since you show concern, I'll answer: I believe souls endure, finding new vessels in the Era Nova. Why don't you flee?
与你恰恰相反，我相信灵魂与心灵同样依靠躯体存在，身死灵魂即告消散，所以再跑也毫无意义。
Contrary to you, I think souls depend on flesh – death scatters both. Fleeing's meaningless.
热爱智慧的听众啊，你又为什么不跑呢？
Oh, wise listener – why don't you flee?
Oh, I almost forgot. I'll start fleeing now.
那么，不妨就来听听我们这两位修辞学教师最后的论辩吧。如此大错特错的观点，可不能任由它流毒到来世。
Then let us hear the final debate between these two rhetoric teachers. Such gravely mistaken views mustn't be allowed to poison the afterlife.
我必须申明，灵魂是形式，躯体不过是承载灵魂的质料。假若灵魂并不存在，那么我现在在同什么对话？你的感觉、思维又寄宿于何处，你的行动又由何而起？

I must declare that the soul is but a form, and the body is merely its material vessel. If souls don't exist, what converses with me now? Where do your senses dwell, your thoughts reside, your actions originate?
答案恰恰就在躯体之中啊，帕门弥德。我的耳倾听了你的声音，我的眼看到了你的样貌，当你说蠢话时，我面颊上的血液变得更加灼热，也为你感到害臊呢。
The answer lies precisely within the flesh, Parmenides! My ears hear your voice, my eyes behold your form. When you spout nonsense, blood burns my cheeks with secondhand shame.
可如此说来，常有祭司和黄金裔可得见灵魂，你如何解释呢？
Yet priests and the Chrysos Heirs often claim to see souls. How would you explain this?
这个世界观是能看到灵魂的。
This worldview does allow us to see souls.
无知无觉，了无回应，那不过是过往的倒影，和你在镜中见到的自己并无二致。
Those unfeeling, unresponsive reflections of the past differ not from your own reflection in the mirror.
不可分割的微粒构成了我们的世界，也组成了我们的躯体。它们的运动、排列和组合并非无限，而是有迹可循的。
Indivisible particles compose our world and bodies. Their movements, order and combinations follow patterns, not infinite possibilities.
那些思考、欲念和行动——我们所谓灵魂的东西，只不过是诸多可能性中被规定好的一种。
Thoughts, desires, actions — what we call "soul" is but predetermined permutations of possibilities.
如果你被规定好永远只能思考着这些无稽的念头，未免也太可怜了。假使灵魂不存在，你口中的可能性又是由谁来规定的呢？是谁为你选择了命运？
How pitiful if you're fated to entertain such absurd notions! If souls don't exist, who dictates these possibilities? Who chooses our fates?
不，正是灵魂！灵魂作为形式，是我们存在、行动的原因和目的。它决定了我们是何物，引导躯体潜在的存在实现，使之能够成为我们自己。
No — the soul! As a form, it's the cause and purpose of our existence and actions. It defines our being, actualizing the body's latent potential to become ourselves.
这更可笑了——看看四周吧，世界在破碎，时间也早已脱轨。而我们呢，在诡辩中等死。你的灵魂一定喝蜜酿喝昏头了，才想要实现自己的这样的潜能。
Preposterous! Look around — the world shatters, time derails. Yet here we await death through sophistry. Your soul must be pickled in honey brew to seek such actualization!
你才喝昏头了呢！先天形式不是香皂，吹不出五颜六色的肥皂泡。你要多放点盐，口感才够硬。
Yours is pickled! The natural form isn't like soap, it will not produce colorful bubbles. Add more salt to harden your reasoning.
你也配对我指手画脚？我刚修剪过指甲，所以上次理发掉了不少头发。你要是惹我，可算是踢到了大地兽！
You dare lecture me? My trimmed nails caused hair loss during last haircut. Provoke me, and I'll show you the wrath of a dromas!
善语结善缘，恶言伤人心。
Kind words form friendly bonds, and harsh ones break the heart.
啊，怎么回事，我们…怎么在说乱七八糟的话？
Ah, what's happening? Why are we talking... such nonsense?
恐怕是因为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的陨落，理性和逻辑也变得不再稳固了。
Likely due to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' fall, reason and logic has grown unstable.
唉，那我们还争辩些什么呢？事已至此，我们再没有地方可去了。
Then why debate? At this point, we have nowhere left to go.
唯有这点是确凿无疑的。
阁下，这里是抵抗黑潮的前线，万勿再继续向前了。
My lord, this is the frontline against the black tide. Advance no further.
黑潮造物冲垮了防线。我和探险队赶来支援时，此处的惨状难以言喻。
Black tide creations breached defenses. When our expedition came to aid... the carnage defied description.
直到市集中的卫兵和工匠赶来支援，才勉强把防线稳固在这里。
We only managed to secure this position when guards and craftsmen rushed over from the marketplace to reinforce us.
驻守城门的卫队长…不幸在黑潮中罹难，完成了天父交给他的使命。现在，这里由我指挥。
The captain of the city gate... fell to the black tide, fulfilling his duty to the sky father. I've taken command of our forces here now.
黑潮已经被击退，但每隔一阵子就会有新的造物来袭。虽然还能勉力支撑，但更可怕的是，绝望已经开始蔓延。
We've driven back the black tide, but fresh creatures continue to attack in waves. We're holding, but worse than the attacks is how despair has begun to infect our ranks.
来不及休息，来不及疗伤，不断看着身边的伙伴倒下，却无法收殓遗体。可是黑潮永无休止——
There's no time to rest or tend to our wounds. We watch our friends fall, unable even to retrieve their bodies. And still the black tide continues relentlessly—
甚至，你能在其中看到刚刚倒下的伙伴的面影。
The worst part? Sometimes you recognize the faces of your fallen comrades among these creatures.
抱歉…也许我不该说这些。
Sorry... I shouldn't burden you with such grim thoughts.
We just need to hold out until "Era Nova"...
无论是前往新的世界，还是任由{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}用手遮住我们的双眼，无论怎么样都好……
Whether we journey to a new world or {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} draws his hands over our eyes... anything would be better than this endless fight...
刻法勒如果真的足够仁慈，它就该让这一切结束得更快一些。
If Kephale is truly merciful, they would bring this suffering to a swifter end.
我们已经吹响了集结的号角，但愿更多士卒和民兵赶来后，能让我们有一丝喘息的时机。
We've sounded the call to arms. With any luck, reinforcements will arrive soon and we might finally have a moment to breathe.
请去帮助更多人吧，阁下。这里有我们。
Please go help the others instead. We can hold our ground here.
我们想要升高时，就向上仰望。有人向下俯视，因为他已经升高。
When we wish to rise, we look upward. Those who look down do so because they've already risen above.
…没什么，只是一些对牺牲者的感想。哦，恩维尔去救他那些信{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的伙伴了，所以这里只有我。那小子命大，这点变故还死不了。

...Nothing important, just reflecting on the fallen. Avilius left to rescue his buddies — those {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} worshipers, so I'm the only one here. That boy's as tough as they come, this chaos won't be his end.
And what exactly are you doing here?
思考。你有没想过，「再创世」已经发生多少次了？
Contemplating. Tell me, have you ever wondered how many times "Era Nova" has already happened?
很好，你落进了我问题的陷阱里。
Perfect! You've fallen right into my trap.
因为我的答案其实是…无数次。
Because my true answer is... countless times.
我是说，既然没有经过太大的挑战，我们就可以迎来「再创世」——那它可能从根本上就是世界规则的一部分。
What I'm saying is, if "Era Nova" can arrive without tremendous struggle, then perhaps it's simply an inherent part of our world's cycle.
弄不好，无论我们积极努力还是消极摆烂，它都会如期到来。当然，牺牲者的规模可能完全不同，所以这两种情况也不能同日而语。
It might arrive right on schedule, whether we actively fight for it or passively accept our fate. Of course, the difference in casualties would be enormous, so these paths aren't remotely comparable.
只是一切难免让我猜测——翁法罗斯本来就是个循环的世界。在漫长的轮回中，人或许可以演化成泰坦，泰坦或许也可以演化成人，所有人都能经历所有人的故事。

But I can't help but speculate — what if Amphoreus is fundamentally a world of cycles? In these endless turns, perhaps mortals eventually become Titans, Titans become mortals, and everyone experiences everyone else's journey.
而在某一个时刻，我可以是你，你也可以是我。
And somewhere in this endless cycle, I might live as you, and you as me.
嚯。你像来古士老师一样一言不发。
Ah, you're giving me the silent treatment — just like Mr. Lygus would.
想到了翁法罗斯可能根本没有未来？那的确非常可怕…不过，我们也可以试着把它变成生存的动力。
Frightened by the possibility that Amphoreus has no future? It is terrifying... but perhaps we can transform that fear into a will to survive.
是的，没有未来…也是一种动力。因为那也意味着没有过去。
Yes, the absence of future... is also a kind of motivation. For it also means there is no past weighing us down.
呵呵，你和恩维尔一个反应。
Hehe, you and Avilius have the same reaction.
Do you believe in "Era Nova" yourself?
That depends on what you mean by "believe."
我们一定能拥有更好的世界、过上更好的生活吗？未必。
Are we guaranteed a better world and improved lives? Not necessarily.
翁法罗斯人的灵魂是不灭的吗？很可能。
Are the souls of Amphoreans immortal? Quite possibly.
Which reminds me of the "Golden Scapegoat"...
「纯黑的潮汐，在岩石上留下没有名字的水。纯粹的真实之水、死亡之水——也因此没有名字。」
The ebony tide, leaving nameless water on the rocks. Pure water of truth, water of death — thus, it remains unnamed.
「不喝这水的人，会在水中渴死；喝了这水的人，却会失去自己的名字。」
Those who don't drink this water will die of thirst in its midst. Those who drink will lose their very names.
「在这映不出容貌的水中，有全世界所有人的面孔。」
In this water that mirrors no face, all the world's countenances reside.
...It certainly feels like a metaphor for "Era Nova."
来古士老师不是也说过？我们找到的那些句子…可能是过早翻开的答案。
Didn't Mr. Lygus say as much? Those verses we uncovered... might be answers revealed before we understood the questions.
那意味着，它既谎话连篇，又充满真实。
Which means it's both full of lies and full of truth.
I suppose we'll just have to wait and see.
哦，再见！也许下次见面的时候，我们就认不出彼此了呢。
Oh, farewell! Maybe when we next meet, we'll be strangers to each other.
Now that would certainly be interesting...
又见面了，{NICKNAME}阁下。你看上去还挺精神的。找我有什么事？
Well, hello again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. You're looking rather spirited. What brings you here?
It's good to see you survived.
是啊，我还活着。说实话，起初我挺惊讶；所有被风堇姑娘用天空祝福吊住性命的人都很惊讶。
Yes, I'm still here. Frankly, I was shocked, as were all of us whose lives hung by a thread thanks to Miss Hyacine's blessings of the sky.
我们本以为，随着艾格勒的陨落，天空的神力会猝然失效，取而代之的是冥河的召唤。
We assumed that when Aquila fell, the sky's divinity would instantly fade, replaced by the calling of the River of Souls.
但是目前来看，那份来自天空的祝福并未离去，甚至…更加温暖。
But it seems the sky's blessing hasn't left us. In fact, it feels... even warmer now.
也许，这是留在天空的风堇姑娘，给病人们最后的礼物吧。
This must be Miss Hyacine's farewell gift to the afflicted, bestowed from her new home in the sky.
How are things going right now?
并不乐观。黎明云崖到处是黑潮的恶兽，战士们拼死也只能搏出寥寥几处安全区。
Far from good. Dawncloud is crawling with black tide creatures, and our warriors are dying just to secure a few safe zones.
外加「金织」女士离世、万帷网崩溃，战线间信息传递相当迟缓，给我们的战斗带来了相当大的麻烦。
And with Lady Goldweaver gone, and the World Wound Web collapsed, information barely travels between battle fronts, creating considerable difficulties for our efforts.
现在，也只能走一步看一步了。
For now, we can only take it one step at a time.
不过，多亏了阁下的援手，现在安全区的范围有所扩大，我们也能得到更多喘息的空间。翁法罗斯迎来新生前，一切还是不能大意。
However, thanks to your help, the safe zones have expanded somewhat, giving us more breathing room. Still, we mustn't lower our guard until Amphoreus is reborn.
不死的迈德漠斯牺牲了——目睹了那一幕的圣城卫士已为我送来了悲报。
The undying Mydeimos has fallen — Holy City Guards who witnessed his end have delivered this tragic news to me.
他并未如以往那样再度站起，而是如一尊光荣的雕像，在沉默中倒塌。
He did not rise again as he always had in the past, but instead fell silent like a majestic statue crumbling.
阁下，收起你的哀容吧——迈德漠斯必不愿见此。
Please, cast aside your grief — Mydeimos would not want you to grieve.
悬锋人的礼仪，便是将一切软弱的哀怨与仇债，在战场上讨回。
The Kremnoan way is to settle all weakness, grief, and grudges on the battlefield.
I need your help to translate a slate.
悬锋古语么？给我看看吧，我姑且还算精通。
Ancient Kremnoan language? Show me — I'm rather well-versed in it.
…呼。拿去吧。别问我，也别多话。你就把石板上记载的往事，当作无人知晓的故事吧。
Hmm... Here. Ask nothing and speak nothing of it. Treat the history recorded on this slate as a story known to none.
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，回应你的子民啊…为何弃我们于黑暗？我曾为你献上无数祭品，日夜诵念祷词…可如今，你在哪里？
{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, answer cries of your people! Why have you left us in darkness? I have offered I have offered, prayed day and night... but where are you now?
又一位迷途者？不不不！哈哈，不过是和我一样，又一个被抛弃的可怜虫罢了！
Another lost pilgrim? No, no! Haha, just another forsaken soul, cast aside like me!
你还好吗？你好像很激动。
Are you alright? You seem agitated.
好？哈！我能有什么不好？不过是被我侍奉一生的泰坦抛弃了而已！
Alright? Ha! What could possibly be wrong? I've only been abandoned by the Titan I've devoted my entire life to!
你不是刻法勒的祭司吗？
You're a priest of Kephale, aren't you?
噢？怎么，你曾听过我的布道？那你一定知道我过去强调过多少次要「恪守祭仪」了。
Oh? You've heard my preaching? Then you must remember how often I stressed the importance of "observing the rituals."
我只是路过，不打扰你了。
I'm just passing by. I'll leave you now.
走吧，走吧！就像{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}抛弃我们一样！
Go then, go! Just as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us all.
真是讽刺，那些虔诚的信徒…他们冒着生命危险把我从坍塌的神像下救出来，喊着「救救祭司大人」。
The irony! Those faithful followers... risking their lives to pull me from beneath the fallen statue, shouting "Save the high priest."
可笑啊，若{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}真有神力，何须这些凡人来救我？
How absurd! If {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} truly held divine power, why would mortal hands be needed to save me?
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，你究竟是为何要抛下我们！为什么你会无动于衷啊！
