{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, why have you deserted us! How can you stay silent!
为何要抛下我们！为什么无动于衷啊…又是你？你来干嘛，和我一样寻找那个失踪的泰坦吗？
Why desert us! Why stay silent— You again? What are you doing here, looking for the missing Titan like me?
在天灾降临之时，我曾向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈祷，我献上最珍贵的收藏作为祭品，可换来的…只有突然倒塌的神像与它的沉默。
When the calamity struck, I prayed to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, offering my most precious collections as sacrifices, but all I got in return... was a crumbling statue and silence.
信徒们冒着生命危险把我救出来，喊着「救救祭司大人」。真是可笑…一个无法换来神明回应的祭司，有什么值得救的？
The followers risked their lives to rescue me, shouting "Save the high priest." How absurd... what's the point of saving a priest who can't even get his god to answer?
自那以后，据我所知，我和其他同僚，还有其他信众们再也没得到过它的回应。这究竟算什么？是它抛弃了我们…抑或是…它遭遇了什么？我也不知道……
Since then, neither I, my fellow priests, nor any followers have heard anything from them. What does this mean? Have they abandoned us... or has something happened to them? I simply don't know...
那些仍然信奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的人…他们说这只是一次考验，说刻法勒从未离去…如此纯粹的信仰，而我居然嘲笑过他们的天真。

Those who maintain their faith in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}... they insist this is just a test, that Kephale never left... such unwavering belief, and I had the audacity to mock their innocence.
我曾在元老院面前大言不惭地宣扬祭仪的力量，号召人们跟随我的指引，但现在只剩下这片废墟和无尽的疑问……
There was a time when I preached before the Council of Elders about ritual power, demanding others follow my guidance. Now all I have are ruins and endless questions...
打算？我这把老骨头还能有什么打算？我倒是想一走了之，可信徒们把我从神殿里救了出来，我总不能跟{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一样抛弃他们。

Plans? What plans are left for these old bones? I wish I could simply walk away, but the faithful saved me from the temple. I can't abandon them as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us.
他们想继续祈祷，那我就带头做点祭仪，至于回应…哼！这些信众也需要我来安抚，眼下，也只能这样了。
If they wish to continue their prayers, I'll perform the rituals. As for responses... bah! These followers need my comfort as well. For now, this is our only course.
Maybe I should leave you now.
走吧，走吧！就像{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}抛弃我们一样。
Go then, go! Just as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us all.
…若你能得到这位负世之神的回应，请帮我告诉它——塞若涅斯还在等它的回应，我们需要一个解释！
If you ever get a response from the Worldbearing Titan, tell them this — Cyrones still waits for their answer. We deserve an explanation!
{NICKNAME}，怎么还在这儿闲逛，不会是…放心不下我吧？
{NICKNAME}, still hanging around? Don't tell me.... you're worried about me?
身子感觉好多了，精神更是好得不得了！
Physically, I'm much improved, and my spirits couldn't be higher!
听完我的事迹之后，大家看我的眼神都不一样了。呵呵，那些溢美之词有些言过其实，但还是听得人心里暖洋洋的。
Now that folks have heard my story, they see me in a new light. Hehe, some of their praise might be a bit over the top, but it still feels good.
说起来，克拉特鲁斯那家伙还邀请我指导这里的防卫任务呢，真拿他没办法。
Believe it or not, Krateros invited me to oversee defense operations here. What am I going to do with that fellow?
不过，我理解。能力越大责任越大，我应当背负的责任，实在是太沉重了！
But I get it. With great power comes great responsibility, and the burden I must shoulder is truly tremendous!
About the battle we just had...
多亏了那两位小贩，没有他们的牺牲，我们守不住圣殿。
We have those two merchants to thank — without their sacrifice, the temple would have fallen.
恐怕他们只是觉得好玩而已…
I think they just did it for the thrill...
即便灵魂真的会去往再创世后的世界，但这一刻，死亡带来的恐惧和伤痛仍是真实的。
Even if souls really do travel to the world after Era Nova, the fear and pain of death at that moment remain real.
不管出于什么原因，也不管用了什么方式…豁出性命，让更多人免于死亡的折磨，都是一件高尚的事。
Whatever their reasons, whatever their methods... sacrificing one's life to spare others from the torment of death is a noble deed.
但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!
商贩汇聚，征战不休的城邦也放下兵戈。街巷、圣殿的廊柱都挂满鲜花，说着不同城邦方言的人们支起帐篷，赞美彼此健美的身体，角逐月桂花环……

The merchants convene, and constantly warring city-states pause their conflicts. Streets and temple columns are adorned with flowers, people speaking different dialects pitch tents, praise each other's athletic bodies, and compete for laurel wreaths...
Don't forget to mention me in your speech.
You should get some good rest.
唉，我得赶紧养好伤。继续休息下去也不是个事啊，有那么多人盼着我出场呢！
*sigh* I need to heal fast. I can't just lie around forever — there are so many people counting on me to show up!
不怎么好，但也没差到哪去。
我，我不能走。有些大家伙们被吓坏了…得有人来照顾它们。
I—I can't go. Some of these big fellas are startled... Someone needs to take care of them.
其，其实刚刚出现怪物的时候，我怕得要死。本想跟着人流一起逃跑，但刚跑出去没多远，就看到有一只大地兽为了保护民众受了重伤……

A-actually, when the monsters appeared, I was really scared. I originally wanted to flee with the crowd, but I didn't get that far, only to see a dromas suffering major wounds while protecting the people...
回过神来，我就已经站在驿站这里了，手里拿着全套的疗伤用具……
When I came too again, I found myself standing here at the relay post with a full set of medical equipment at the ready...
…对，细想一下，还是这里比较安全，不仅有着吉奥里亚的庇佑，大家伙们也会保护我的。
...Right. Come to think of it in detail, this place is pretty safe. It's not only protected by Georios, but the big ones will also be watching over us.
周围的大地兽发出了呜嗡声，听起来像是在肯定这位勤恳寻土人的想法。
The surrounding dromases hum in agreement, as if they are in agreement with this diligent Earth Scout's thoughts.
就快了…对吧？我不担心这个，但我想知道，大地兽们…对它们而言，新世界究竟是什么？
Is coming... right? I don't worry about that, but... what's the new world going to be like... going to be for the dromases?
听说，伟大的刻法勒会确保新世界中每一个生灵都得到公平对待。这是不是代表…大地兽有可能不再是大地兽，而是变成奇美拉、海豹，或是别的什么？
I heard that the great Kephale will ensure every being in the new world is treated fairly. So... does that mean dromas might turn into chimeras, seals, or something else entirely?
又或者，我们变成大地兽，大地兽变成我们？那听上去也不错就是了…唉，吉奥里亚在上，一定要有大地兽的容身之处啊！
Or maybe we'll turn into dromas, and they'll turn into us? That doesn't sound too bad, actually... Ahh, by Georios above, may there always be a place for the dromas!
去也没地方去了，我刚刚悼念过了同僚们，之后打算专注于大家伙们身上。前段时间发明的几道新菜色，趁现在都给它们做来尝尝。

I've got nowhere to go. I just paid my respects to my fallen comrades, so after that... I'll be focusing on these big guys. Came up with a few new recipes recently — might as well let 'em try out now.
来吧伙计们，新鲜的红土刺身——
Come on, fellas! Fresh raw redsoil —
英雄阁下，你要是无处可去，不如也呆在这吧。吉奥里亚伴随着我们，没事的，都会没事的……
If you've got nowhere else to go, hero, why not stay here with us? With Georios watching over us, everything's going to be okay... It's going to be okay...
英雄阁下，我必须向你致歉……
Hero, I must apologize to you...
Sir, there's no need for that.
…从重渊离开时，我对黄金裔与救世预言尚存疑虑。而现在，我只自责于自己的愚昧。
...When I left the Abyss, I still doubted the Chrysos Heirs and the prophecy of deliverance. Now, I only blame myself for my ignorance.
信仰种种，需要生者来延续价值——直至目睹生命的消散，我方才明白。
Faith holds meaning when the living carry it forward — only after witnessing the loss of life did I finally understand.
如果世界能够重生，那一定是因为有人可以走到道路的尽头。
If the world is to be reborn, it will be because someone could walk all the way to the end of the road.
「谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻……」
"Who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole..."
希望，先一步行至西风尽头的他不会孤单。
Having gone ahead of us to the end of west wind, I hope he won't feel alone.
您现在对再创世怎么看？
What do you think of the Era Nova now?
它会到来，一定会。无数的牺牲之后，必定能有人到达终点。然后，让它成为起点。
It will come. It must. After countless sacrifices, someone will reach the end. And from there, it will be a new beginning.
无数历史，无数纷争，无数消亡，都为此刻而生。现在，我坚信这一点。
Countless histories, endless strife, lives lost beyond measure — all were meant for us to reach this moment. Now, I believe that with all my heart.
谢谢，年轻的勇士。愿命运…眷恋于你。
Thank you, young warrior. May fate... favor you.
文明的痕迹该如何跨越时空，留给千百年后的人类？
How can the traces of civilization transcend time and space, so that people a thousand years from now may find them?
你听说过多利安古城吗？在黄金战争的年代，这座古城被喷发的火山吞没，漫天的火山灰，顷刻间将整座城邦封存于时光的琥珀中——
Ever heard of the ancient city of Doria? During the Chrysos War, a volcanic eruption swallowed the city whole. And in an instant, a cloud of ash sealed an entire civilization in the amber of time —
建筑体、墙壁上镌刻的誓言，甚至尚未腐败的碗中食物……透过这些遗迹，我们得以窥见千年前的多利安文明的辉煌与温度。
Its structures, the oaths carved into its walls, even bowls of untouched food... Through these ruins, we glimpse the brilliance and warmth of the Dorian culture, frozen in time.
如今，末日的舞台被搬到奥赫玛…若我还有时间，我该如何为后人传递文明的信号？
And now, Okhema has become the stage of the apocalypse... If I still have time, how should I leave a message for those who come after us?
这些弥足珍贵的…世界毁灭的线索，黄金裔救世的壮举，文明点滴的幸福……
Such precious information... clues on the destruction of the world, the heroic deeds of the Chrysos Heirs as they try to save the world, the fleeting joys of a civilization...
You don't believe in the Era Nova?
正如我们初见时我所说，我无比期盼翁法罗斯的明天……
As I told you when we first met, I long for Amphoreus's tomorrow...
但这并不是因为我恐惧失败——欧洛尼斯令时间的长河奔流不止，即使你我毁灭，也会浇灌出下一个文明。
But it's not because I fear failure — Oronyx keeps the river of time flowing. Even if we fade away, a new civilization will eventually bud again.
比起灵魂，我更在意文明的传承。
I care more about the legacy of civilization than the soul.
你果真了解我，比起担忧这条命，我更牵挂那些岁月的见证。
You really do know me. Instead of worrying about my life, I care more about those testimonies of times lived.
哎，可没人清楚末日会以怎样的灾难袭来，该采用何种保存物件的对策，我也毫无头绪……
Ah, but no one knows what kind of disaster the end of the world will bring, or what methods we should use to save objects. I'm at a loss too...
我觉得最有可能的情况是…抬头看这火烧的天空啊！仿佛下一秒，这火球就要将刻法勒的背脊折断，坠入人间。
I think the most likely scenario is... just look at this burning sky! It feels like the fireball will snap Kephale's back and fall to the ground at any moment.
或许…我应当赶到黎明机器照拂不及的偏远城邦，将宝物埋在那里。
Maybe... I should head to a remote city, far from the Dawn Device's reach, and bury the treasures there.
例如雅努萨波利斯！虽然黑潮四伏，但它们肯定对我这些破玩意儿不感兴趣。
Like Janusopolis! Sure, it's swarming with the black tide, but they definitely won't care about my old junk.
I hope everything goes smoothly for you.
Take care of yourself as well.
对了，若遇见白厄阁下，也请将我的祝福带给他。
By the way, if you happen to see Lord Phainon, please give him my regards.
女孩望着你，一言不发，但她的眼中似乎透露着一种期盼。
The girl looks at you, silent, but there's a glimmer of hope in her eyes.
Is there anything I can help with?
女孩试着用手势与你「交谈」，虽然你不懂手语，不过迷迷接替了翻译的职责——
The girl tries to communicate with you through gestures. You don't understand sign language, but Mem steps in to translate —
（{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我见过金发的姐姐，和你在一起。）
({F#Miss}{M#Sir}, I've seen a blonde lady before. She was with you.)
再创世后，一定还能再见的。
We'll definitely see her again after the Era Nova.
女孩似乎能读懂你的唇语，她沉默了半晌，好像有些难过。
The girl seems to understand your lip movements. She's silent for a while, looking a little sad.
女孩的眼睛一闪一闪，似乎欢迎着你的到来。
The girl's eyes sparkle, as if welcoming your presence.
能和我说说发生什么了吗？
Can you tell me what happened?
（几天前，有一些可怕的人闯进我家里。我看到，他们说悄悄话，如果姐姐不消失，就要取走我的眼睛。）
(A few days ago, some scary people broke into my house. I saw them whispering, and they said that if that lady didn't disappear, they'd take my eyes.)
(They won't spare even a little kid...!)
(...Well, but it does fit their character.)
（我很害怕，但他们向我解释说，没关系，我没有做坏事，而且为了我，姐姐一定会消失。）
(I was scared, but they explained that it's okay, I haven't done anything bad, and that the lady will definitely disappear for me.)
（看上去…他们也很为难，一个人说，这件事是领导他们的人决定的。姐姐她，一定很困扰吧……）
(They seemed... quite troubled. One of them said it was the decision of their leader. That lady... she must have been troubled too...)
（不过，有一只紫色的精灵抱着宝箱路过，在那些人离开前，它好像一直在暗中想保护我。所以，我没事的。）
(But a purple sprite holding a chest passed by, and it seemed like it was trying to protect me in secret while those people were here. So, I'm fine.)
做坏事的人已经得到报应了。
The bad people have already gotten what they deserve.
（…嗯，这样一来，就不会有人欺负姐姐了，对吧。）
(...Umm, now no one will bully that lady anymore, right?)
还有什么我能帮上忙的吗？
Is there anything else I can help you with?
（{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，如果你还能见到金发姐姐，能替我向她道歉吗？）
({F#Miss}{M#Sir}, if you'd ever see the blonde lady again, can you apologize to her for me?)
Don't worry, this isn't your fault.
（但…要是我能保护自己的话，姐姐就不会被欺负了，所以，拜托你。）
(But... if I could protect myself, that lady wouldn't have been bullied. So, please...)
Take care of yourself, and I'll see you next time.
（嗯，再见，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！愿刻法勒祝福你！）
(I will. Goodbye, {F#miss}{M#sir}! May Kephale bless you!)
秘酿末日特价——不要<unbreak>300</unbreak>，不要<unbreak>200</unbreak>…全场免费，我请客！
Ambrosia's apocalyptic discount: Not <unbreak>300</unbreak>, nor <unbreak>200</unbreak>... it's all free! My treat!
当然！也别搞什么随机秘酿了，我给老顾客备了最好的。
Of course! And don't go for the random ambrosia. I've got the best reserved for regulars.
来试试这瓶千年的陈酿，从法吉娜最后的庆典上保存至今，我一直没舍得动。
Come, try this bottle of millennium-aged brew. It's been preserved since the last celebration of Phagousa. I haven't been able to bring myself to open it until now.
来，与我一同举杯！一杯敬过去快活的日子，一杯敬永不到来的明天！
Come, let's raise a toast! One glass to the happy days gone by, and another to the tomorrow that will never come!
你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽！可预想中的迷醉之意并未到来……
You raise the bottle, and down it in one go. But the expected intoxication doesn't hit...
一点没感觉是吗…呵呵，你的神经紧绷，战胜了法吉娜的神力。
No feeling at all, huh? Heh, your nerves are so tense that you've resisted Phagousa's divine power.
看来，你并不属于这里。你注定要奔赴更伟大的使命，我的朋友。
Looks like you don't belong here. You're destined for a greater mission, my friend.
Cheer up, the Era Nova is about to succeed!
再创世意味着什么，我搞不明白。
What does the Era Nova mean? I don't understand.
但，连永不熄灭的黎明机器都撑不住了，我看这就是翁法罗斯的终点了……
But even the ever-burning Dawn Device can't hold up anymore. I think this is the end of Amphoreus...
我害怕…浴场的大伙们害怕…没有人不害怕……
I'm scared... the people at the baths are scared... no one isn't scared...
那就痛饮吧！现在我感觉好多了，身上暖暖的，那种惴惴不安也消失了。
Then drink up! I feel much better now. I feel warm, and that nervousness has disappeared.
至少，这最后一次，我终于听到{RUBY_B#法吉娜}我的神明{RUBY_E#}对我说话了，它说——
At least, for this last time, I finally heard {RUBY_B#Phagousa}my deity{RUBY_E#} speak to me. They said —
「赶紧喝吧，等天真塌下来，你手头上好的秘酿就都浪费了」，哈哈哈！
"Hurry and drink up. When the sky truly collapses, your good ambrosia will all be wasted," hahaha!
嗯，也祝你好运，我的朋友。
Yeah. And good luck to you, my friend.
若真有来世，愿世界依偎在{RUBY_B#法吉娜}它{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#海洋}摇篮{RUBY_E#}中……
If there really is an afterlife, I hope the world will rest in {RUBY_B#Phagousa's}their{RUBY_E#} {RUBY_B#Ocean}cradle{RUBY_E#}...
哎，英雄阁下，我问你——到了新世界，你有什么想做的？
Hey, hero, I have a question for you — what do you plan to do in the new world?
The crisis is still here. No time to think about that.
这…是我冒昧了，不过命运泰坦在前，我们也总该向前看嘛。
Well... I may be overstepping, but the Fate Titans are ahead, and we should always look forward.
I want to be a dromas.
您居然和老师开了同样的玩笑…莫非这是某种黄金裔之间才懂的暗喻？
You actually made the same joke as my teacher... could this be some kind of metaphor only understood between the Chrysos Heirs?
好家伙，您怎么比我还疯啊。
Good heavens, you're crazier than I am.
瞧我，等到了新世界，我得先去找那刻夏老师重新拜个师，要是他答应，那我可就成了泰坦的学生了！哈哈，再要找工作岂不是平步青云！

When we get to the new world, the first thing I'm going to do is find Professor Anaxa and beg him to take me as his disciple again. If he agrees, I'll be a student of a Titan! Haha, finding a job after that would be smooth sailing!
你好像完全没有危机感嘛。
You really don't seem to have a sense of crisis.
你不知道，金织女士的事件之后，元老院饱受非议，我也被人指指点点的，这班简直上够了。

There's something you don't know. After Lady Goldweaver's incident, the Council of Elders has been heavily criticized, and even I've been pointed at. This job I have right now is just beyond my tolerance.
我脑子会不停蹦出「世界毁灭吧」的念头，结果想着想着，天就真黑了……
My mind kept thinking, "The world should end," and before I knew it, the sky turned dark...
…抱歉，这玩笑的确有些不合时宜。其实，我刚也经历了九死一生，现在满脑子只想着快点迈入新世界，好和家人朋友们重逢。
...Sorry, that joke was a bit out of place. I went through such a bad experience that all I think about now is stepping into the new world and reuniting with my family and friends.
不如说，我只能坚信再创世是事实，所有人都会迈入轮回，然后表现得一派轻松。不然，真要是陷入自我怀疑…我可能会撑不下去。

If anything, I must believe that the Era Nova is real and that everyone will step into the cycle, then act as if it's nothing. Otherwise, if I truly fall into doubt... I might not be able to carry on.
好耶，我也想去找老朋友。
Yay, I also want to meet some old friends.
可不是！哈哈，我跟在这里的人已经决定了，要笑着迎接新世界的到来，这样就不会被先一步离开的人调侃了。
Exactly! Haha, those of us here have already decided to welcome the new world with a smile. That way, we won't be mocked by those who left before us.
那个，谢谢你，英雄阁下，我听说了，我们的命都算是你救的。
Thank you, hero. I've heard that we owe our lives to you.
可能我有点多管闲事，但…如果撑不住了，别硬撑，大家随时都愿意跟你聊聊。
Maybe I'm being a busybody, but... if you can't hold on anymore, don't force yourself. We're always here if you need someone to talk to.
啊，阁下你还有正事，我就不多耽误你的时间了。请多保重，我们新世界再会吧！
Ah, I think you might have important matters to attend to. I won't take up more of your time. Please take care. We'll meet again in the new world!
是你啊，贵客…如今阿格莱雅大人已死，其他位置的衣匠们也都进入了自主模式。
It's you, honored guest... Now that Lady Aglaea is dead, the other Garmentmakers have gone into autonomous mode.
阿格莱雅大人…她一直想留下些不会被黑潮冲刷的东西，就像把字刻在石头上。哪怕我们无法战胜黑潮，也不该让存在的证明就此消失。

Lady Aglaea... she always wanted to leave something that the black tide couldn't wash away, like carving words into stone. Even if we couldn't defeat the black tide, we shouldn't let proof of our existence disappear.
如果若虫数量再多一些的话，或许她就能成功了…可要去哪儿找这么多若虫呢？
If only there were more nymphs, maybe she could have succeeded... but where would we find so many?
…贵客，我们来继续搜集若虫吧。
或许这已经没有意义…但它是我现在唯一能做的事。
Perhaps it no longer matters... but it's the only thing I can do now.
如果你愿意帮我，我会十分感激…带着阿格莱雅大人的份一起。
If you're willing to help, I'd be very grateful... and so would Lady Aglaea.
在这最后的时刻，您仍愿意去满足一个虚掷的愿望…不胜感激。
In these final moments, you're still willing to fulfill a pointless wish... I can't thank you enough.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but this requires consuming <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.
衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.
嗯…有位织者重视情谊，不愿与旧友们分离。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽站点的铃铛上</color>，目送奔赴战场的人们呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who values connections deeply and cannot bear to say goodbye to friends. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the bell of Dromas Station</color>, watching the people heading to the battlefield.
嗯…有位织者不满于美的凋零，总想为人们添加一分亮色。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>城墙外道的花坛边</color>，为匆匆离去的友人担心呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver unsatisfied with the fading of beauty, who wishes only to add a touch of brightness to others. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the flowerbed by the city wall's outer path</color>, worrying about the friends who are leaving in a hurry.
嗯…有位织者沉迷于浴池带来的乐趣。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>浴场的中央水池</color>中，不知骚乱是否打扰了它的雅兴？

Hmm... There is a weaver absorbed in the pleasure brought by the bath. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the central pool of the baths</color>. I wonder if the chaos has interrupted their enjoyment?
嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，希望逃遁进另一个世界呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, hoping to escape into another world.
嗯…有位织者想要把自己锤炼得像山之民一样坚韧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铁匠的火炉上</color>锻炼耐性呢。快让它知难而退吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to be as resilient as the Mountain Dwellers. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the blacksmith's forge</color>, honing their endurance and patience. Hurry and retrieve them before they hurt themselves.
嗯…有位织者想要让世人品尝甜美。金丝带来消息，它正把自己伪装成一块喂食大地兽的红土，你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>附近找到它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes for all lives to experience a touch of sweetness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now disguise themselves as a piece of redsoil that nourishes the dromas. You may find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color>.
嗯…有位织者通晓各种偏门知识。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的升降梯井</color>，把自己伪装成了墙壁的一部分。要抓住时机才能见到它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who possesses knowledge of all unorthodox sorts. The golden thread brings tidings: They now secretly reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the Marmoreal Palace's elevator shaft</color>, disguising themselves as part of the wall. You need to catch the right opportunity to see them.
嗯…有位织者跃跃欲试、渴望证明自己的速度。金丝带来消息，它正停在<color=#dbc291ff>一张桌子上</color>，等待着挑战者上门呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who jumps at the chance and is eager to prove its speed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>on a table</color>, waiting for new challengers.
嗯…有位织者总想成为法吉娜的圣兽。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的圣兽摊位</color>，去那里找找看吧。

Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the sacred beast of Phagousa. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide <color=#dbc291ff>within the Sacred Beast Stall in Marmoreal Palace</color>. Seek them there.
嗯…有位织者向往传说、渴望和英雄们一起冒险。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅壁画上</color>，向画中蝶诉说心中困惑呢。你得擦亮眼睛才能发现它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for legends and adventures alongside heroes. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>within a mural</color>, telling the painted butterfly about their confusion. You must sharpen your eyes to spot them.
嗯…有位织者向往高处、希望像纷争世的帝王那样手握权力。金丝带来消息，它正站在<color=#dbc291ff>俯瞰浴场的高处</color>，发表豪言壮语呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to great heights, longing to wield power like an emperor of Era Bellica. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the peak overlooking the baths</color>, making grand speeches.
嗯…有位织者因亲族失散而心怀不安。金丝带来消息，它就在<color=#dbc291ff>我们身边</color>，希望你的到来能带给它安慰。

Hmm... There is a weaver feeling uneasy because of losing contact with their family. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>near us</color>, hoping your arrival will bring them comfort.
嗯…有位织者自诩博古通今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的休息室内</color>锐评一位学者的演讲，你可以去指教一二。

Hmm... There is a weaver who prides on being knowledgeable and insightful. The golden thread brings tidings: They now offer critiques on a scholar's speech <color=#dbc291ff>in the lounge of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you could pick up a few pointers there.
嗯…有位织者喜好乐理。金丝带来消息，它正和伙伴们仍在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的水漫琴旁</color>倾听演奏，或许你也可以去听上一曲。

Hmm... There is a weaver who has a deep love for music theory. The golden thread brings tidings: They are still listening intently to a performance <color=#dbc291ff>beside the water lyre of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you might join them as well.
嗯…有位织者渴望完美。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的某根柱子上</color>，把自己伪装成一盏灯，说是要「追求极致」。

Hmm... There is a weaver who strives for perfection. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now leaning <color=#dbc291ff>against a certain pillar along the corridor</color>, disguised as a lamp, claiming they are "pursuing perfection."
嗯…有位织者非常嗜睡。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>你的私人浴宫</color>内，睡得正香呢。可以试着叫醒它。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is always quite lethargic. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie <color=#dbc291ff>within your private bath chamber</color>, sleeping soundly like a rock. Feel free to try waking them up.
嗯…有位织者个性叛逆，喜欢逆风飞翔。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>热水池上空赌气</color>。或许你能说服它？

Hmm... There is a weaver who behaves rebelliously and enjoys flying against the wind. The golden thread brings tidings: They are sulking above <color=#dbc291ff>the hot spring pool</color>. Perhaps you can persuade them?
嗯…有位织者怀念过去，感时伤悲。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>对面不远的花丛中</color>。
Hmm... There is a weaver who grows wistful with memories of the past. The golden thread brings tidings: They are lying in <color=#dbc291ff>a flower patch not far away</color>.

Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to become Janus' priest. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>on the railing at the edge of the cliff</color>, honing their skill in wall penetration. Feel free to go and test the fruits of their practice.
嗯…有位织者渴望揭开世界的真相，正在寻找聪明的伙伴。金丝带来消息，它藏身于<color=#dbc291ff>一个隐秘的竹篮内</color>，得擦亮眼睛才能找到。

Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of unveiling the world's hidden truths and is searching for a clever companion. The golden thread brings tidings: They now conceal themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a secret woven basket</color>. Look closely, and you may discover them.
抱歉…没有记忆残晶，金线千丝万缕，不知该向何处寻觅。请您之后再来吧，贵客。
Sorry... Without any Memory Crystal Shard, the golden thread can't trace their whereabouts. Please come back later, honored guest.
抱歉，金丝同一时间只能追觅一只若虫的踪迹。请先将它找到吧。
Sorry, the golden thread can only track one nymph's whereabouts at a time. Please find it first.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
Can you give me more hints?
务必小心，贵客。您能平安归来，于我们而言便是最好的消息。
Please be careful, honored guest. Your safe return would be the best news for us.
抬起头，直起腰，别一副哭丧着脸的模样。
Lift your head, straighten your back, and don't look so downcast.
假若你真的被黑潮吓破了胆，我建议至少也别让别人看出来。
If the black tide really frightens you, I suggest you don't let anyone see it.
我就不知道怕字怎么写。
I don't even know how to write the word "fear."
那么趁最后这段时间，你还可以去学学认字。
Well, maybe in this last bit of time, you could learn how to recognize some characters.
Aren't you hiding here as well?
我想你应该知道，勇气和莽撞是两回事。
I think you should know that courage and recklessness are two different things.
不过，既然仍有说笑的余力，看来你的确临危不惧。
But, since you still have the energy to joke, it seems like you're indeed unafraid in the face of danger.
恐惧是滋养黑暗的温床。它能带来一时宽慰，但放任不管，终有一日会用指端扼住我们的喉咙，从那里撕扯出血淋淋的哀告。
Fear is the breeding ground for darkness. It can provide temporary relief, but if left unchecked, one day it will tighten its grip on our throats and tear out our blood-curdling pleas.
所以，即便黎明已经逝去，即便我们的使命或许再无意义…但只要继续下去，就能证明我们并未屈服于命运。
So, even if dawn has passed, even if our mission may no longer have meaning... as long as we continue, we can prove we haven't surrendered to fate.
若发现若虫，请唤它们回来。拜托了。
If you find any nymphs, please call them back. I beg you.
贵客，即便到了这种时候，我们也仍应坚守职责。
Honored guest, even in such times, we must still uphold our duties.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
你本该更敏锐些的。我可以提醒你，只要提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>就好。
You should have been more attentive. Let me remind you, all you need to do is provide <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.
衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

Hmm... There is a weaver who longs for light. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>a certain fireplace</color>, enjoying the warmth of the flames.

Hmm... There is a weaver who fears no hardship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are climbing to the highest point on <color=#dbc291ff>the stone walls of Dawncloud</color>.

Hmm... There is a weaver who values honor. The golden thread brings tidings: They are leading the loyal servant, the <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, on a journey of discovery that follows the footsteps of truth.
嗯…有位织者胸怀大志。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>与负日者遥相眺望</color>，准备迎接浪潮的来临呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who has lofty ambitions. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>gazing remotely at the Sunbearer</color>, preparing to welcome the coming waves.

Hmm... There is a weaver full of confidence. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>hiding in the thicket</color>, avoiding an unexpected danger.

Hmm... There is a weaver who's been summoned. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the mural of the many-eyed blind one</color>, awaiting the sound of triumph.
嗯…有位织者心性单纯。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>围栏的挂饰上</color>用铃声复诵愿望，不知它的愿望是否实现了呢？

Hmm... There is a weaver who is pure-hearted. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>on the fence ornaments</color>, reciting wishes with the sound of bells. I wonder if the wish has been fulfilled.

Hmm... There is a weaver who fears no hardship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of a waterfall on Dawncloud</color>, battling the rapids.

阿格莱雅大人对此一直深信不疑，诸位果然做到了。
Lady Aglaea has always believed in this, and you have truly achieved it.
远在纷争世，金丝仍能触及天空诸邦的年代，天空诸邦也有若虫通行往来，沿着金丝的指引将消息带回大地。

Back in the Era Bellica, when the golden thread could still reach the cities in the sky, nymphs used to travel between those places and bring back news to the earth under the guidance of the golden thread.
直到「阳雷骑士」刺穿艾格勒最后的眼目，它们便再了无音讯。

我想它们孤悬此处，一定思乡心切，便在白厄阁下的同意下，追随诸位的足迹而来。

贵客，一路上有什么发现吗？

哪里还有没搜集的若虫？

Hmm... There is a weaver who travels with companions but grows dissatisfied. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a pile of storage components</color>. Go see what's troubling them.

Hmm... There is a weaver who is looking far and wide. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a suspended platform where one can see the Rainbow Bridge</color>, marveling at the breathtaking view.

Hmm... There is a weaver who is eager to teach others. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the corridor with murals</color>, waiting to enlighten passersby.

Hmm... There is a weaver who is highly knowledgeable in construction. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the celestial mural</color>, admiring the grandeur of the spectacle.

嗯…有位织者对建筑修筑颇有研究。金丝带来消息，它正躲藏在<color=#dbc291ff>穹顶的石柱上</color>，仰起头或许能发现它的踪迹。
Hmm... There was a weaver who studied architecture intently. The golden threads brought news, it's now hiding among <color=#dbc291ff>the pillars of the dome</color>. Look up, you might just spot it.
抱歉，艾格勒并不欢迎金丝的探访，没有记忆残晶，金丝无法违逆它的权柄。
Sorry, Aquila does not welcome the visit of the golden thread. Without the Memory Crystal Shard, the golden thread cannot defy their authority.
正有一只若虫等着你将它唤回呢，请先去把它找回来吧。
There's a nymph waiting for you to call it back. Go find it and bring it home first.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
Can you give me more hints?
天空的火种既被夺取，无法预料这里还会发生什么…贵客，请务必小心。
The Sky Coreflame have been stolen, who knows what may yet befall this place... Honored guest, do take care.
风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
The winds carried your message along the golden threads. Honored guest, any progress to share?
我似乎已经集齐了石板。
It seems I've gathered all the stone tablets.
我看看…没错，贵客，这就是那位预言家的全部手稿。金丝可以从中提炼出更多信息。
Let me see... That's right, distinguished guest, this is the entire manuscript of the prophet. The golden thread can extract more information from it.
现在，或许是时候向你揭露阿格莱雅大人计划的全貌了。
Now, perhaps it's time to reveal the full scope of Lady Aglaea's plan to you.
它始于一个渺小又崇高的理想：抵御黑潮。准确的说，从中活下来。
It began with a small-yet-noble ideal: to resist the black tide. To be precise, to survive it.
贵客早已知晓黑潮对翁法罗斯大地的摧残，无论人还是奇兽，都无法从它的影响下幸存——唯有一物例外。

The esteemed guest is already aware of the devastation the black tide has wrought upon the land of Amphoreus. Neither humans nor strange beasts can survive its influence, only one thing is an exception.
没错，相信贵客应该也见识过，织者能够短暂抵御黑潮的侵袭。虽不能在其中自由活动，但黑潮确实无法将它们彻底吞噬。

That's right. I believe the esteemed guest has also witnessed that the weavers are able to temporarily resist the invasion of the black tide. While they cannot move freely within it, the black tide indeed cannot completely engulf them.
这，便是从无到有的第一步。若能探明织者之秘背后的原理，终有一天，翁法罗斯的人民将不再畏惧天灾。
This is the first step from nothing to something. If we can uncover the secrets behind the weavers' mystery, one day, the people of Amphoreus will no longer fear natural disasters.
但根据眼下的测算，计划所需的若虫远远多于我们所能找到的。究竟该从哪里取得剩下的若虫，我也没有头绪。
But according to the current calculations, the number of nymphs required for the plan is far greater than what we can find. I have no idea where to obtain the remaining nymphs.
无论如何，感谢你一直以来的协助。
Regardless, thank you for your continued assistance.
感谢你，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
感谢你，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝需一路向东；西风会赐你一双捷足，勿让这份祝福消失。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You must head east. The west wind shall grant you swiftness — do not squander its blessing."</color>
曾有信使连续奔跑三天三夜，最终累毙，只为将胜利的消息传回圣城。
Once, a messenger ran for three days and three nights without rest, only to collapse and die, all to deliver news of victory to the holy city.
眼下我们当然没有胜利的消息，只有一座逐渐瓦解的城市……
But now, we have no victory to report. Only a city slowly crumbling to ruin...
或许，你也该跑起来了，贵客。
Perhaps it's your turn to start running, honored guest.
我注意到你已经获取了预言所指的目标。在业已崩坏的奥赫玛，果然发生什么都不奇怪……
I see you've obtained the object foretold in the prophecy. In a place as shattered as Okhema, nothing should come as a surprise...
总之，感谢你的协助，这是我仅剩的一点薄礼，还请收下。
Either way, thank you for your help. This is a small token of my gratitude. Please accept it.
Can you give me more hints?

<color=#dbc291ff>"The Twilight Iris holds four layers, and so do the trials ahead. Mortals may only glimpse one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color>

Beyond the sky again... The prophecies seem to house many of these cryptic terms I am unable to comprehend. It seems, honored guest, that only you can decipher them.

Now, only silence wraps around me...
Help me recall the captured nymphs.
如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。

多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.
多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.
衣匠运转一百万匹金丝之力，将你触碰过的那几只若虫拽回。
The Garmentmaker channels the power of a million strands of golden thread to pull back those few nymphs you once touched.
呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!
这边这边，你看！水面上的倒影，是不是特别可爱？
Over here, over here, look! The reflection on the water is super cute, isn't it?
嗨，见到你真高兴！是来找人家玩的吗？
Hi! I'm so happy to see you! Are you here to hang out with me?
好想在软软的麦堆里睡觉，但又舍不得和你在一起的时间，好为难呀。
I wanna lie down and sleep in a soft pile of wheat so much, but I also don't want to lose a second I could spend with you... This is so hard.
喜欢这样悠闲的时光吗？我很喜欢哦，美好的一天，从见到你开始。
Do you like relaxing days like this? I love it! Seeing you is the start of a beautiful day.
别心急，我们还有好多好多时间。慢慢来，时光会为我们停下脚步。
No rush, we've still got all the time in the world. Just take it slow. Time will stop for us.
这朵花送给你！它就像少女的心房，要用心呵护哦。
This flower's for you! It's just like a girl's heart, so you better take good care of it!
小奇美拉，怎么小小一只呢？快快长大，让我看看你会变得多可爱吧。
Little Chimera, Little Chimera, why are you so small? Hurry up and grow up, so I can see how cute you'll be!
嗯…哪里去了呢？偷偷躲在哪个小角落里，等着我去找呢？
Hmm... Now where did it go? Hiding in some corner, waiting for me to come find it?
软乎乎的小海豹，在水池里一摇一摆，嘟嘟的，嘟嘟的…真是可爱到不行~
Soft and snuggy baby seal, splishing and splashing about, all chubby and pudgy... They're just too cuuute~
好可爱的奇美拉！得给它起个甜甜的名字才行，你有什么主意吗？
What an adorable chimera! It deserves a really sweet name. Any ideas?
把种子埋进土里，等待它发芽，开出软软的花，就像是在守候一个小小的奇迹。
Planting a seed in the soil, waiting for it to sprout and its soft flower to bloom... it's like nurturing a tiny miracle.
水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!
嗯？这么没防备地睡着了…可是会被坏人盯上的，要小心哦。
Hm? Dozing off like that without a care in the world... Gotta be careful, you might draw attention from the wrong sort of people!
呀，我可以抓紧你吗…大地兽不会突然跑起来，把人家甩出去吧？
Aah! Can I hold on to you...? The dromas won't suddenly jump up and fling me off, will it?
呼…好累好累。但看着沉甸甸的麦子和你——就好开心！
Phew... I'm so exhausted! But seeing the heavy ears of wheat and you — that makes me so happy!
瞧！这个稻草人的模样，是不是和你特别像？我可是观察了好久才做出来的。
Check it out! Doesn't this scarecrow look just like you? I spent ages observing just to get it right!
哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~
Oh, you like the view here? Then let me get a good look too, so I can remember the places you like~
风车转呀转，转得好慢好慢，仿佛连时间也停下来了呢。
Round and round the windmill spins, so slow, oh so slow, so slow that it's like even time itself has stopped.
呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
*yawn*~ I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...
好舒服的风呀，真希望生活每天都能像海面一样平静。
Wow, the breeze is so pleasant! I wish every day was as peaceful as the surface of the sea.
这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.
真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！
That's so fascinating! When you talk about it like that, I wanna go see it for myself! Hehe, but I'll want you to be the guide!
要去秘境探险吗？别害怕，只要我们在一起，就什么都能做到。
Wanna go explore in the secret realm? No need to be scared. As long as we're together, we can do anything!
来玩猜谜游戏吧！问：人家在想些什么？三二一，回答！
Let's play a riddle game! What am I thinking? Three, two, one, answer!
风铃叮叮当当，就像是怦怦的心跳，好浪漫呀。
The wind chimes are ringing, just like heartbeats... It's so romantic.
想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?
故乡是很让人怀念，可更重要的，是迈出向前的脚步，对吧？
People always miss their home, but what's more important is to take the next step forward, right?
Mem gobbled it all in one bite.
Time to get a bigger pot, memi!
Why isn't the restaurant open, memi?
I wanna eat some Quillorbs, memi!
Picking mushrooms? Already did that, memi.
Picking wild berries? Already did that, memi.
Might as well just keep lying around, memi!
You'll get bored in no time, memi!
I really wanna throw a party, memi...
Yankin' seedlings with all your might...
And they'll grow faster that way, memi?
Plant first, then loosen the soil.
That's what the chief taught us, memi!
I've been shedding fur lately, memi...
The chief won't tell us, memi!
One more round of play, then we head out, memi!
No matter how hard I try, I can't figure it out, memi!
Mind the moves and rhythm, memi~
…藏哪儿好呢…诶呦，你干嘛，吓我一跳！
...Where should I hide... Ah! What the... You scared me!
What sneaky thing are you up to?
才没有！我、你…我只是在为下一次比赛踩点！告诉你，我可是村里的「捉迷藏冠军」，怎么样，厉害吧？
N—Nothing! I—I was just scoping out the next competition spot! Just so you know, I'm the hide-and-seek champion of this village! Pretty awesome, huh?
就、就是这样！我没有说大话！
Y—Yeah, that's right! Not bragging here!
…你、你怎么这么吓人！好吧，跟你说实话还不行吗——我爹要揍我，我出来避避风头。就这么简单，满意了吗？
...Wh—Why are you being so scary!? Fine, I'll come clean. My dad's gonna whup me at the moment, so I came out for a shelter. That's it. Happy now?
所以你还有什么事吗？没看我现在忙着么……
So... did you need something? Can't you see I'm busy?
Can you tell me about Phainon?
咦…你俩整天形影不离的，现在反倒来问我？哼哼，果然——村里和白厄哥关系最好的，还得是我！
Huh? You two are glued together most days, and now you're asking me? Heh! Knew it — no one in this village is tighter with Mr. Phainon than me!
偷偷告诉你，白厄哥可是注定要成为大英雄的人！这可是「神谕牌」说的，是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的旨意呢！
Let me tell you a secret: Mr. Phainon's destined to be a great hero! This is from the oracle cards. It's the will of {RUBY_B#the Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!
等我长大了，练好了怎么挥剑、怎么搭弓，就去外面找白厄哥，也做个小英雄！
Once I'm grown and master swordplay and archery, I'm heading out to find Mr. Phainon. I wanna be a little hero, too!
咳、当然啦，如果莉维娅那丫头非得求着我带她一起，也不是不可以考虑……
Ahem, well, maybe if Livia begs me to bring her along, I might consider it...
You can do it. Good luck.
好嘞，借你吉言！老爹这次绝对找不着我！
Thanks! I'll take all the luck I can get! No way dad's finding me this time!
Mr. Phainon! Over here — shhh, keep it down...
What trouble have you gotten yourself into this time?
这次真不是我的问题！最近老爹不是快过生日了吗，我寻思给他整块皮子做个护手，这几天就没少往林子里跑。
This one really wasn't my fault! As my dad's birthday's coming up, I thought I'd make him some gloves outta leather, so I've been out in the woods a lot lately.
结果…结果因为稍微旷了那么几节课，皮西厄斯老师找上门了……
But... but I skipped a few classes to do it, and now Miss Pythias is on my tail...
直接和你老爹说不就行了吗？
Couldn't you just explain everything to your dad?
那可不行！说了不就一点儿惊喜都没了吗！要是没法让他边震惊边夸奖我，这些天的努力可就白费了！
No way! That'd spoil the fun! If I can't get him shocked and impressed at the same time, all this effort will go to waste!
再说了…你看他像是会听我解释的样子吗，哪次不是二话不说，先拎着藤条给我一顿抽……
And besides... does he look like someone who listens to explanations? Every time it's the same thing — no questions, just the cane!
别、别在意那种细节啦！我这次又不是为了出去玩才旷课……
D—Don't sweat the details! It's not like I skipped class just to goof off this time...
先说好，白厄哥，你可别卖我啊，不然这次，我屁股铁定得开花。
But promise me, Mr. Phainon, you won't rat me out, okay? Or my behind's really gonna be toast.
要是之后我老爹问起来，你就说我在谷仓那边，反正我平时都往那躲。
If my dad asks, just say I'm by the granary. That's where I usually hide anyway.
行了行了，别念啦——都这么多回了，我还能不知道你要说什么嘛。
Alright, alright, I get it already — you've said it a million times. I know what's coming.
听老爹的话、好好练射箭、不许挑食、不许旷课、不许欺负莉维娅…还有什么遗漏的吗？
Listen to dad, practice archery, no picky eating, no skipping class, no bullying Livia... Did I miss anything?
You've got a good memory, I'll give you that.
那必须的！皮西厄斯老师要是有你这么能念叨，我的成绩肯定特别好。
Of course! If Professor Pythias nagged like you do, I'd probably be top of the class.
光记住没用，要做到才行。
Remembering it isn't enough. You gotta do it.
别的都好说，最后那条纯属冤枉——那丫头可凶了，谁敢欺负她啊！
Everything except that last one is fine. That girl's fierce. I mean, who'd even dare to bully her?
总之，放心吧白厄哥，我可是你的头号小弟。就算你出去闯荡了，我也能把村子里的小崽子们治得服服帖帖。
Anyway, don't worry, Mr. Phainon. I'm your number one follower. Even if you leave to explore the world, I'll keep all the brats here in line.
等哪天，你们成了大英雄，我和莉维娅就去投奔你们。要给我讲你们在其他城邦的冒险故事，带我吃好多好吃的！
And when you two become legendary heroes, Livia and I will come join you. You've gotta tell us all about your adventures and feed us tons of delicious stuff!
It's a deal. Don't you dare forget!
I've got stuff to take care of. See ya.
好嘞，我得先想办法把自己藏好…回见！
Got it. I need to find a better hiding spot anyway... Catch you later!
呦，这不是和白厄一起的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}吗，难得见你自个儿在外边晃悠。
Well, well, isn't this the {F#young lady}{M#young lad} who's always with Phainon? Rare to see you wandering around alone.
来，尝尝我今早刚熏的肉干——涂了野蜂蜜，香得很，年轻人应该都喜欢。
Here, try some smoked meat I made this morning — coated it with wild honey. Smells amazing, perfect for young folks like you.
This is delicious! You got more?
哈哈哈，有的有的，你想吃多少就吃多少。
Hahaha, you bet! You can eat as much as you want.
这是我上周猎的鹿，肉质特别好，炖完之后又香又嫩，可惜你没赶上口新鲜的……
This is from a deer I bagged last week — real tender meat. Would've been even better fresh out of the pot... too bad you missed it.
回头有机会让你尝尝我炸的鱼吧，保准是你没见识过的独家手艺。
Next time, I'll let you try my fried fish. Bet you've never tasted anything like it!
你知道白厄小时候什么样吗？
Do you remember what Phainon was like as a kid?
哈，瞧这话说的，他现在不也还没长大呢吗。不过…要说他小时候，和我家兔崽子其实还挺像的。
Haha, come on now. He's still pretty much a kid, isn't he? But yeah... when he was younger, he was a lot like my little rascal at home.
男孩子嘛，就这样，哪个不是满脑子英雄故事，天天想着拯救世界。别看他现在一本正经的，小时候可喜欢拎着树枝在麦田里打滚……
Boys are all the same — heads full of hero stories, always dreaming of saving the world. Don't let his serious face fool you. He used to roll around the wheat fields with a branch...
对了，你要是想学怎么逮田鼠，可以找他教你。那小子技术可好了。
By the way, if you wanna learn how to catch field mice, he's the one to ask. That kid's got real skills.
I've got to do something else. Gotta get moving first.
Sure. Come by again when you've got time.
白厄，你来得正好，看到披索了吗？
Phainon! Good timing. Have you seen Piso around?
What kind of seeds are these?
一种粉百合，之前打猎的时候在林子里见过，昔涟听说了，就拜托我给她带些回来。
Pink lilies. Spotted them while hunting in the woods. Cyrene heard about it and asked me to bring some back for her.
唉，小姑娘总是那么客气，不就是顺手的差事，还特意烤了面包送来当谢礼。
She's always so polite. It's just a small favor, but she even baked me bread to say thanks.
差点忘了，我还晒了树莓干，你拿点，也给她带过去些吧。
Right, almost forgot. I've got some sun-dried raspberries too. Take some and give them to her as well.
Did Piso tick you off again?
可不是！老师都找到家里来了，说这小兔崽子最近老是旷课。
You bet! His teacher came knocking, said the little rascal's been skipping class lately.
我本来要找他好好说道说道，但那小子今天一大早就不见人，准是知道我要揍他，提前躲出去了。
I was about to have a real talk with him, but to my surprise, he vanished first thing this morning. Must've known what was coming and ran off early.
He might be over by the granary...
行，我过会就去把他逮回来，谢了啊。
Got it. I'll go drag him back in a bit. Thanks for the heads-up.
没事，我自己再四处找找，反正今天不进林子…哼，我还能治不了他？
No problem. I'll keep looking. Not heading into the woods today anyway... Hmph, he thinks he can outrun me?
唉，那个小混蛋，但凡能有你一半省心就好了……
*sigh* That little scamp... If only he were half as easy to deal with as you...
决定好什么时候出发了吗？我之前顺手逮了几只肥兔子，已经腌好晾上了，走之前记得来拿。
You guys set a date to head out yet? I caught some fat rabbits the other day, and they're all cured and ready. Make sure you swing by to grab them before you leave.
I... I haven't made up my mind yet...
没事，我懂。没想好就慢慢想，反正也不急着赶这一天两天的。
No worries. I get it. Take your time. No need to rush it.
但我觉得吧…外面的世界挺大的，去看看也好。你瞧，我打了一辈子的猎，但恐怕网子里的鸟到过的地方都比我多。
But if you had to ask... it's a big world out there. Worth seeing a bit of it. I've hunted all my life, but I bet the birds caught in my snares have seen more than I ever will.
哈哈，好，等日子定了就告诉我，我去渡口给你们送行。
Haha, alright. Once you've picked a day, let me know. I'll walk you to the ferry myself.
要我说啊，年轻人该多出去闯荡闯荡，肯定怎么都比一直窝在这里强。
If you ask me, I'd say young folks should go out there and see the world themselves. It's gotta be better than staying stuck here forever.
等倦了、累了，就往回走——村里的炊烟啊，总是比艾格勒醒得都早。
And when you get tired, just come home. The smoke in the village always rises earlier than Aquila.
I'm heading off. See you later.
去吧去吧，我待会也要去找那臭小子了。
Go on then. I've got a certain brat to hunt down myself.
噢，是你啊。难得村子里来了个客人——不错吧，这片田？
Oh? It's you. Not every day a guest shows up in this village — Nice field, huh?
Did you plant all this wheat yourself?
哈哈哈，怎么可能！这么大一片，要全让我打理，准得累垮了。
Hahaha, not a chance! A field this size? If I had to tend it solo, I'd collapse from exhaustion.
是吧！今年长势好得很，瞧这颜色，不比{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的裙子漂亮？
I know, right? The crop's looking fantastic this year. Look at that golden hue, doesn't it outshine {RUBY_B#Romantic Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s dress?
来了都是自家人，别见外。这么好的天气，回头等咱家葡萄酿好了，记得和我家孩子一起去麦田里坐坐，晒晒太阳，吹吹风…不是我吹牛，那感觉舒服得很呢！

You're one of us now, no need to be shy. With such fine weather, once our grapes have fermented, be sure to take my kids out to the wheat fields. Sit in the sun, feel the breeze... I'm not bragging, it feels great.
白厄，你小子！可算回来了。放着农活不干，跑哪儿去了？
Phainon, you brat! You're finally back. Skipping out on chores again, where did you go?
Me? Haha, I was just out back in the warehouse.
哎…又摆弄你那些个黄金战争时期出土的宝贝呢。实话说了吧，就你那爱不释手的小瓦罐，我估计多半是披索他爷爷当年用过的腌菜坛。
Hah... Messing with those ancient treasures from the Chrysos War again, weren't you? Be honest, that little clay jar you're so obsessed with? I'd bet it's just Piso's granddad's old pickle crock.
先不争这个，老爸。我只是想说……
Let's not argue over that now, Dad. What I wanted to say is...
哈，你不说我都忘了！臭小子，手脚麻利，就说随我，你妈还不信……
Ha! I almost forgot! Kid, you're quick on your feet, just like me. Your mom still doesn't believe it...
…什么时候出发？我和你妈去送你。
...When are you leaving? Your mother and I will see you off.
后天{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}。你就别送了，大清早的，田里的活忙也忙不完。
At the {RUBY_B#morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} of the day after tomorrow, you don't have to send me off. It's too early, and the field work never ends.
I'll be fine on my own. Really.
行吧，听你的。臭小子，那会儿连个锄头都举不起来，一转眼就要去悬锋城学剑了……
Alright, have it your way. Kid, not long ago you couldn't even lift a hoe, and now you're off to Castrum Kremnos to train with a sword...
哀丽秘榭要是没了这片麦田…都不知道要怎么数季节呢。
If Aedes Elysiae ever loses this wheat field... I don't even know how we'd keep track of the seasons.
哈哈…我恐怕很长时间都没法帮你和老妈收麦子了啊。
Haha... I'm afraid I won't be around to help you and Mom harvest for a long while.
瞎操心。我俩身体结实得很，就算少了你，咱这个家日子还是照样过……
Don't worry about it. Your mother and I are still strong as a pair of oxen. Even without you, we'll keep this household running just fine...
好好学武艺，别想那些有的没的。就算当不了神话里的救世主，守不住这个世界所有人，你也得回来守好咱这座小村庄啊。

Focus on your swordsmanship. Don't get lost in idle thoughts. Even if you never become the Deliverer they sing about in legends or can't protect the whole world, you still need to come back and protect this little village of ours.
哈…都说多少次了，我才当不了救世主呢。
Hah... How many times do I have to say it? I'm not cut out to be some Deliverer.
哎呀，你是白厄的朋友吧？欢迎欢迎。不好意思，我刚从田里出来，身上有点脏……
Oh? You're a friend of Phainon? Welcome, welcome! Sorry, I just came in from the fields and got a bit messy...
Have you been busy with the fields?
呵呵，还好。耕耘月和收获月是最要出力的时候，其他时间谈不上太忙。
Hehe, not too bad. The Month of Cultivation and Month of Reaping are the toughest, but the rest of the time's pretty manageable.
Hard work's a kind of joy, isn't it?
呵呵，是呀。看到那些茁壮生长的麦子，金灿灿的…任谁都会开心哪。
Hehe, it surely is. Seeing the wheat grow tall and golden... it just makes me smile, you know?
喔，你瞧我，光顾着聊天都忘招待你了。
Ah! Look at me — got so caught up chatting I forgot my manners!
来，就当自己家吧。等我家孩子回来，给你们尝尝我最拿手的蜂蜜烙饼，还有最近刚熏的肉！
Come on in, make yourself at home. Once my kid's back, I'll have you all try my best honey suncake, and the smoked meat I just finished curing!
呵呵，看你这表情…行李收拾好了？
Hehe, look at your expression... got your bags all packed?
还真是什么都瞒不过你…嗯，收拾好了，后天出发。
Can't hide anything from you, huh... Yeah, I'm all set. Heading out the day after tomorrow.
谁叫你是我的好孩子呢。从小到大，你想做什么，抬抬手我就知道啦。
You've always been easy to read, my sweet child. Since you were little, I just had to glance your way to know what's on your mind.
你之前说…是要去悬锋城，对吧？不知道那里离咱们的哀丽秘榭有多远？
You said... you're going to Castrum Kremnos, right? I wonder how far that is from our Aedes Elysiae?
哈哈，我也不知道。听说悬锋城像大地兽一样，会慢慢到处走动呢。
Haha, no clue. I heard that Castrum Kremnos roams around slowly, just like a dromas.
别担心，老妈，等学成我就回来了。而且，悬锋城搞不好走着走着，哪天还能路过咱们这儿呢。
Don't worry, mom. Once I finish my studies, I'll come straight home. Who knows? Maybe one day that city will wander right past our village.
呵呵，那妈可要时不时到谷堆上看看，有没有像山一样的大地兽来哀丽秘榭附近了。
Then I'll have to keep watch from the haystack. Just to see if a mountain-sized dromas is headed for Aedes Elysiae.
到时候，我和你爸就在家里开锅，备上好吃的等着。你看到麦浪和炊烟，就知道家在哪儿啦。
When that day comes, your dad and I will fire up the stove, get a feast ready. You'll see the golden fields, the kitchen smoke curling — and know you're home.
哈，就算没有炊烟，我也能找到家在哪儿。除了老爸，应该没人比我更熟悉这片麦田了。
Hah, even without the smoke, I'll always know where home is. I know these wheat fields better than anyone — except dad, maybe.
等我回来…我想吃蜂蜜烙饼，配熏鹿肉和橄榄汁！
When I get back... I want honey suncake, with smoked venison and olive juice!
就知道你想吃这个。要是交了朋友，也别忘了领回家看看，咱们和村里人一定摆场宴会，好好招待。
Knew you'd say that. And if you make any friends, bring them home. The whole village will throw a proper feast to welcome them.
没问题！真不知道在外面能见识到什么样的人呢。
You got it! I can't help wondering the people I'll meet out there.
呵呵…妈相信你，一定会有许多真诚善良的人和你一起同行。
Hehe... I believe in you. You'll definitely find kind, sincere people to walk beside you.
记得：你也一定要用真心对待他们，别让他们难过、失望哪。
Just remember to treat them with the same kindness. Never let their hearts go cold or hopes turn sour, okay?
不会的，妈。我一定不会让大家失望…也不会让你和老爸失望。
I won't, mom. I won't let anyone down... not them, not you, and not Dad.
啊，你是白厄的朋友吧，欢迎。
Ah, you must be a friend of Phainon's. Welcome!
不巧，现在正是农忙的时候，学校不开课，不然还想让你给孩子们讲讲外面的事呢。
Not the best timing, though. It's a busy season in the fields right now, and the school's on break. Otherwise, I'd have loved for you to tell the kids a bit about the outside world.
我对村子里的学校有些好奇…
I'm actually curious about that village school...
这里吗？那我来介绍下吧。我把村里的所有孩子按照年龄分成了三个班，每个班上课的时间，教的课程都各不相同。
Oh? Then let me give you a quick tour. I've divided all the village kids into three classes by age. Each group has different lessons and schedules.
小班教算术、几何和品德，中班教地理和祭祷仪式，大班的话，就是让孩子们钻研自己喜欢的东西了，老师只会作为引导。

The little ones learn arithmetic, geometry, and morals. The middle group studies geography and our prayer ceremonies. As for the oldest, they're free to explore what interests them. Teachers just guide them along the way.
听起来很轻松对吧？都是些基础课程，毕竟，孩子们再长大点就得去帮父母务农了，用不上那些复杂的知识。
Sounds pretty relaxed, doesn't it? Just the basics. After all, once they grow a little older, they'll be helping their parents in the fields. So, no need for complicated knowledge.
不过，我还是希望他们有天能走出村子，去外面的世界看看啊。
Still... I do hope that one day, they will step beyond the village and see the world for themselves.
How are the kids doing lately?
还是老样子，一刻不抓，上房揭瓦。就连我最近没收的小玩具，也比白厄那个时候花样多多了——
Same as always — turn your back, and they're climbing the curtains. Even the toys I've confiscated lately are way more creative than in Phainon's time.
你能想象吗？虽说只有个外形，但有的孩子已经能拿木头削个小木马出来了。哈哈，说不定很有当雅努斯祭司的潜质呢。
Can you believe it? Though it's just a rough shape, some kids can already carve little wooden horses by hand. Hah, maybe we have some future priests of Janus in the making!
Let's catch up again when there's more time.
好呀，像你这样见识丰富的贵客，孩子们一定会欢迎的。
Gladly! I'm sure the kids would love meeting someone with your experience and stories.
白厄，你曾说打算离开哀丽秘榭，去外面的广阔天地远行，准备做得怎么样了？
Phainon, you once said you wanted to leave Aedes Elysiae and explore the wider world. How's that going?
嗯，那就好。村子里的生活总是很平静，但到了外面，还是得多留个心眼。
Good to hear. Life here is quiet, but out there... you'll need to stay sharp.
There are still a few things I haven't figured out...
呵呵，你从前就是个心思细密的孩子，总是考虑得很多。
Hehe, ever since childhood, you've always had a careful mind — always planning ahead.
没关系，就算决定不离开也无所谓，我都会支持你的想法。冒险能增长见识，但留下来过平稳的生活也是种选择。
But it's okay. Even if you decide to stay, I'll still support you. There's value in adventure, yes — but living a quiet, steady life is also a choice worth making.
总之，别给自己太大压力，按心里的想法前进就好。
Just don't pressure yourself. Whatever you choose, as long as it's what your heart tells you... that's enough.
至于你拜托我收集的关于树庭的信息，现在倒是有些眉目了。
As for the info of the Grove you asked me to look into, I've managed to dig up a few leads.
虽然老师没去过，但听说，树庭各学派的贤人都是极其卓越的智者，学识渊博，技艺超群。若是你能师从其中一位继续深造，肯定会大有收获吧。
Though I've never been there myself, they say the sages of its various schools are all brilliant minds — learned, skilled, and deeply respected. Studying under one of them would surely take you far.
这么说…倒确实想去看看了。
In that case... I've gotta see this myself.
Just wait till I come back a master!
呵呵，有志气当然是好事。不过…我还听说，神悟树庭崇尚辩论与独立思考，学术风气极为自由，各种惊世骇俗的理论层出不穷。

Hehe, that's the spirit. But... I've also heard the Grove of Epiphany places great value on open debate and independent thinking. The academic scene is extremely free — so much so that bizarre and radical theories pop up all the time.
你要是真去了。求学时，还是得擦亮眼睛，仔细分辨为好。
If you really plan to go, you'll need to keep your eyes sharp. Learn what you can, but be careful to discern what's what.
嗯，听我唠叨这么久，你也该烦了。去忙自己的事吧。
Well, I've rambled enough — you must've had your fill. Off with you now.
刚刚那只蝴蝶去哪了…咦，我认得你，你是白厄哥哥的好朋友！
Where did that butterfly go... Oh, I know you! You're Phainon's friend!
不是捉，只是在观察！那是只翅膀带星斑的银翅蝶，可好看了……
Not chasing. I'm just observing! That one was a Silverwing Butterfly, the kind with little star-shaped spots on its wings. So pretty...
对了，你喜欢蝴蝶吗？莉维娅认识好多漂亮的蝴蝶哦，也知道它们住在哪里。
Do you like butterflies? I know lots of beautiful ones! I even know where they live.
我可以带你一起去看——只要你愿意和莉维娅成为好朋友的话！
I can take you to see them — if you promise to be my friend!
Can you tell me about Phainon?
白厄哥哥啊…他又温柔、考试成绩又好、做事又可靠，村子里的大家都喜欢他。
Phainon? He's super gentle, always gets good grades, and you can count on him for anything. Everyone in the village likes him.
不过…悄悄告诉你，我还是更喜欢昔涟姐姐一点。
Buuut... between you and me, I like Cyrene just a tiny bit more.
等我长大了，要像昔涟姐姐那样，变成一个又独立又强大的女孩子，然后去看看外面的世界！
When I grow up, I want to be just like her — strong, smart, and independent. Then I'll go out and see the world for myself!
I've got to run. See you around.
再见。有空的话，记得来找莉维娅一起去看蝴蝶哦。
Bye-bye! Come find me anytime if you want to go see butterflies together!
白厄哥哥！我为你准备了临别礼物哦，开心吗？
Phainon! I prepared a farewell gift for you. Aren't you happy?
太好啦，我可是翻了好些绘本，才在《小妖精历险记》的插图里找到了这款！
Yay! I had to flip through so many picture books before I found the perfect one in The Tiny Fairy's Adventure!
说好了，这是我们之间的小秘密，你可别提前告诉她哦！
Pinky promise! It's our super-duper secret. Don't spoil the surprise!
哼哼，现在还不能让你知道，不然就没有惊喜啦。
Heh heh, I can't show it to you yet, or it won't be a surprise.
不过…作为补偿，我可以偷偷告诉你，笨蛋披索也给你准备礼物了哦。只是他脸皮很薄，不好意思说出来！
Buuut... to make up for it, I can tell you a little secret — that dummy Piso also prepared something for you! He's just way too shy to say anything.
嗯，我知道！莉维娅会认真读书，学好多好多的知识。
I will! Livia's going to study hard and learn lots and lots of things!
然后，等我长成大孩子，就带笨蛋披索一起冒险、拯救世界！
Then, when I'm a big kid, I'll drag that dummy Piso with me, and we'll go on adventures and save the world together!
白厄哥哥，你说…还要过多久，我们才能变得像你一样厉害呢？
Hey, Phainon... how much longer do you think it'll take for us to be as amazing as you?
Don't worry. It won't be long.
好想赶快长大啊…呜，哀丽秘榭的日子，为什么就不能过得更快些呢？
How I wish I could grow up faster... Why do the days in Aedes Elysiae have to go by so sloooow...
Growing up isn't always a good thing.
我知道啦。但是，我也想去外面冒险，去遇见好多好多有意思的事。呜……
I know. But I still wanna go outside, and see all sorts of exciting things. Agh...
Do re mi, mi re do~
妖精迷路采花蜜，寻寻觅觅穿林径~
Fairies wander, nectar sweet, tiptoe past the clover sheets~
村长眯起老花眼，树荫底下笑眯眯~
Village chief, blinks and winks, smiling under shady trees~
...Whew, guess it's just a false alarm.
在我巡逻的日子里，不允许任何事故发生！
Nothing's allowed to go wrong on my patrol!
这个音符是棕黄色的，像故事里说的秋收的田野。
This note is brownish-gold, like an autumn harvest field in the tales.
阳光晒着懒洋洋的麦穗，风吹过送来香甜的气息……
Lazy wheat swaying under the sun, a breeze carrying the sweet smell...
总有一天，迷境里也会有这样的麦田吧？
Maybe one day, the maze will have fields like that too?
这个声音，好像在吸溜白白芋面迷。
That sound... it's like someone slurping creamy taro noodles, mem.
真想把面条嗦个不停，一直到肚子撑得鼓鼓的迷。
How I want to slurp and slurp until my belly's all full and round, mem.
你有没有觉得，「啦」这个音圆滚滚的？
Don't you think the note "la" sounds round and bouncy?
好像大家一起手拉着手转圈圈，我最喜欢了迷~
Just like everyone holding hands and spinning in circles. I love that, mem~
Oh? I haven't seen you before.
我和大家约好了去草地里追蝴蝶，风铃一响就出发。
We've all promised to chase butterflies in the meadow today. Once the wind chime rings, we're off.
你要是有心情，也可以和我们一起迷。
If you feel up to it, come along with us, mem!
迷！今天在熬汤的时候睡着了，被村长揪住教训了半天。
Mem! The chief caught me dozing off while cooking the soup today. I got a big lecture this time.
但是一听到这个音，就感觉心里暖洋洋的，心情好多了迷。
But when I hear this note, it feels all warm and cozy inside. And suddenly, everything's better again, mem!
不要敲了迷！这个点正是大家打盹的时候。
Stop ringing that, mem! This is prime nap time for everyone.
我刚梦见田地里的藤蔓长成了参天大树，到处挂满了白色的小花，风里都是甜甜的香气，怎么闻也闻不够。
I just dreamt the vines in the fields had grown into towering trees, covered in little white blossoms. Even the breeze smelled so sweet... I could've sniffed it forever.
我要回去继续睡，把这个梦做完迷！
I'm going back to sleep and finishing that dream, mem!
「哆」是最稳重的音符，无论其他音符多顽皮，它都永远不会改变迷。
"Do" is the steadiest of all notes. No matter how playful the other notes get, it'll never change, mem.
生活也要过得一丝不苟，马马虎虎可不行迷！
That's how life should be lived too — steady and precise. No slacking, mem!
每当晚风吹拂风铃，叮铃叮铃声穿过林隙，回家的时间就到了迷。
When the evening wind stirs the chimes to life, their ting-a-ling drifts through the rustling forest leaves... That's the time to go home, mem.
我也正纳闷呢。怎么刚到田地里，一天就已经过去了迷……
Huh, weird. I just stepped into the field, and the whole day's already gone, mem...
You wanna join the dance too?
只许用「徕」一个音符伴奏的舞会马上就要举行啦，敲风铃就当你报名了迷。
The "re"-only dance is starting soon. Ring the wind chime, and you're in, mem!
虽然暂时只有我们俩，但是这样一来，你也不用担心被抢走舞伴了迷！
Well, it's just the two of us for now. But hey, look at the bright side — no competition for dance partners, mem!
无论听多少遍都不会腻。
I could listen to it forever and never get bored.
不过，再不去送信就要迟到了迷！
Still... I better go deliver that letter, or I'll be late, mem!
明明走两步就能见面，大家为什么还要写信呢？真想不通迷……
But really — why write letters when you could just walk over and talk in person? Doesn't make sense, mem...
是不是觉得身体被旋律洗涤，心灵轻盈地就要飞了起来？
Can you feel the melody washing over you? Like your soul's about to take flight?
这就是「咪」的魔力，我的生命和灵魂，统统都可以献给这个音迷～
That's the power of "mi." My life, my soul, all of it belongs to that one note, mem!
"Mi"! The most solemn, the most sacred note of all!
听村长说，岁月为妖精揭晓的预言里，就是用这个音念诵我们的名字的迷！
The chief says that in the prophecy revealed to the fairies by Time, our names were chanted with this very note, mem!
迷路迷境已经许久未有人踏足了，你的到来，可让这森林热闹了不少哪！
The paths to Membrance Maze have long been forgotten. Your arrival has brought the forest back to life!
既然草叶和藤蔓敞开怀抱将你接纳，既然久远的歌谣指引你来到此处，我们也会把你视作贵客，一同围在篝火边，分享雨露、故事和欢笑。

Since the leaves and vines have opened wide to welcome you, since ancient songs have guided your steps — we too shall treat you as an honored guest. We'll gather 'round the fire and share the rain, the stories, and the laughter.
呵呵…到那时，记得给大家也讲讲自己的故事啊。
Hehe... when that day comes, don't forget to tell us your story, too.
How did you become a village chief?
呵呵。那是很久以前的事了。那时嫩芽尚未长成参天大树，树桩中的年轮仍旧能够数清，迷境也不像这般拥挤。
Hehe... that was a long time ago. Back then, saplings had yet to stretch toward the sky. You could still count the rings inside a tree stump. And the Maze wasn't nearly as full as it is today.
最早来到这里的妖精，一些去了密林深处嬉游，一些一睡就不愿醒来。我呢，不知该去哪里，哪儿需要就去哪帮上一把。
The first fairies to arrive — some ran off to play in the deep woods. Some fell asleep and never wanted to wake up. As for me, I simply wandered to wherever help was needed.
不知过去了多久，村落渐渐越来越繁盛，也不知从哪天起，呵呵…孩子们便开始称呼我为「村长」了。
I don't know how long it's been. But little by little, the village grew more lively. And then, one day — hehe... the children just started calling me "Chief."
And what does a chief do?
呵呵，当村长，可不像你想象的那么容易。耕种、汲水都需要我来安排。妖精间起了争执，也得我来调解。
Hehe... being a chief isn't as easy as you think. Planting crops, drawing water — I have to handle it all. And when the fairies get into fights, I'm the one who has to break them up.
除此之外，还要向迷境深处祷告，聆听岁月的呼唤，解读它降下的预言。
Then there's the praying — to the heart of Maze. Listening to the whispers of time, interpreting the prophecies it leaves behind.
然后，还有等待。等待预言实现，等待命运真的降临我们身边——等待是最重要的工作哪。
And above all, there's the waiting. Waiting for the prophecy to come true. Waiting for fate to draw near. Waiting, you see, is the most important job of all.
一定要来，我们约好了。孩子们听了外面的故事，一定会高兴地直翘尾巴哪。
You have to! It's a promise. When the little ones hear your tales from the outside, they'll wag their tails with joy!
Soup... drawn from spring water at the mountain's source.
泉水煮沸后沁人心脾的甘甜，恰到好处地和白白芋的甜香糅合在了一起迷。
Once boiled, its crisp sweetness blended perfectly with the scent of white taro, memi.
Seasoning... rock salt from deep beneath the earth.
只可惜盐粒过粗，火候也有所欠缺。汤浑浊不清，白白芋的口感也过硬了些迷。
But alas, the grains were too coarse, and the heat wasn't quite right. The soup turned murky, and the white taro came out a little too firm, memi.
Wait, you couldn't tell what it was?
Now you've made me hungry, too.
迷！任何人都不许质疑我专业的味蕾。菜里的每滴调料，我都能尝出来迷！
Memi! No one's allowed to question my professional palate! I can taste every single drop of seasoning in that stew, memi!
这是…屋檐上的灰尘。迷，为料理增添了几分岁月的沉淀。
This is... dust from the rooftop. Memi, a sprinkle of time's essence added to the stew.
这是…锄头柄的倒刺。迷，仿佛能感到收获的艰辛。
This is... a splinter from a hoe's handle. Memi, you can almost taste the toil of the harvest.
这是…妖精手背上的毛发。迷迷？
This is... hair from the back of a fairy's hand. Mem?
是谁在做菜前不洗手迷！
Who started cooking without washing their hands, memi?
太生气了，迷！我让妖精们间隔一段时间就给田地间浇些水，它们竟然说我异想天开。
I'm furious, memi! I told the fairies to water the fields regularly, and they called me a delusional dreamer!
为什么天空会下雨，为什么山泉会往下流，又为什么要把水洒进田地？
Why does the sky rain? Why do springs flow downhill? And why do we pour water into the fields?
那么多技艺都失去了传承，那么多学识都被我们忘记，那么多美妙的诗歌，都变成了毫无意义的「迷迷迷」！
So many crafts have been lost. So much knowledge forgotten. So many lovely poems have become nothing but meaningless notes of "Memi Memi Memi"!
想当年我到处闯荡时，看见过漫山遍野的麦田，每一株麦穗都有妖精的手掌那么大。
Back when I wandered far and wide, I saw wheat fields blanketing the hills — every ear of grain as big as a fairy's hand.
唉，我猜你肯定也没见过迷。
Alas... I bet you've never seen that either, memi.
How did you ever leave that place?
我早就忘记了。说不定我是搬家来迷境的，也说不定是在久远的梦里见过迷！
I've forgotten. Maybe I moved here. Or maybe... maybe I dreamed of the Maze long ago, memi.
唉，真是一代不如一代了迷。
Alas, every generation, worse than the last, memi.
都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!
这位顾客您好，请问您要来点什么？
Welcome, dear guest! What would you like to order today?
刺刺球蜜饯、刺刺果酿、炉烤刺刺球派、刺刺沙拉、刺刺球果酱，我们这里应有尽有，请随意挑选迷~
Candied Quillorb Berries, Quillorb Fruit Brew, Oven-Baked Quillorb Berry Pie, Quillorb Salad, Quillorb Berry Jam — we've got it all, memi! Please, take your pick!
不好意思，其实连刺刺球都没有迷。我只是在练习餐厅服务员的礼仪。
Sorry, memi. Truth is, we don't even have any Quillorbs. I was just practicing my restaurant service lines.
虽然迷境里的餐厅荒废很久了，但我从小就梦想成为服务员迷。每天都能端着热乎乎的菜肴，吃不限量的员工餐，这一定是世界上最好的工作迷！

Even though the restaurants in the Maze have long been closed, I've always dreamed of being a server, memi! Carrying hot dishes fresh from the kitchen, unlimited staff meals every day — that must be the best job in the world, memi!
我、我甚至觉得自己就是为此而生的迷！
I—I even think I was born for it, memi!
但在此之前，必须勤加练习。
But before that... I need to practice, and practice hard.
「都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！」
"Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, come and try it, memi!"
迷！迷迷！抬起头，不要向干旱的天气弯腰。
Memi! Mem! Lift your head. Don't bow to the dry weather.
这段时间很难捱，但希望就在眼前，一定要坚持住迷！
Times are tough right now, but hope is just ahead. Hang in there, memi!
使出全力冲出泥巴，你们就能看到这个美丽的世界，还有我，一直守候在你们身边迷！
Push through the mud with everything you've got, and you'll see how beautiful the world is. And me, memi — I am right here, always waiting by your side!
嘘！别吵，我在和种子们聊天迷。
Shh! Not so loud. I'm talking to the seeds, memi.
最近总不下雨，田地干巴巴的，种子也不发芽。所以我想给它们打气迷！
It hasn't rained in ages, the soil's gone dry, and the seeds won't sprout. So I'm cheering them on, memi!
加油——等你们结出果实，我一定会把你们做成整个迷境最美味的菜肴，一口不落地全吃下肚迷！
Hang in there! When you bear fruit, I'll turn you into the most delicious dish in the Maze — and eat every last bite, memi!
二十二颗蝉蜕，十五颗半鹅卵石，以及七枚花瓣。我的全部家产，四舍五入下能买下半个迷境迷。
Twenty-two cicada shells, fifteen and a half cobbles, and seven flower petals. That's my entire fortune — rounded up, I could buy half of the Maze, memi.
花瓣枯萎就不值钱了，但是我不在乎迷。你知道为什么吗？因为我有的是钱迷！
Wilted petals aren't worth much anymore, but I don't care, memi. You know why? Because I'm rich, memi!
So how did you earn all that?
I haven't the slightest clue, memi.
那天我刚想用花瓣换颗刺刺球吃，结果一阵风吹来，把花瓣吹进了小溪。
That day, I was just about to trade a petal for a Quillorb, when a gust of wind blew it into the stream.
我正迷迷地叹气，突然发现，脚边全是亮晶晶的鹅卵石！命运实在是太捉弄人了迷！我一气之下，就把它们都丢了出去迷。
I sighed a big Mem sigh. Then I looked down — and my feet were surrounded by shiny, glittery cobbles! Fate really is full of surprises, memi! I got so mad, I just tossed them all away, memi.
结果鹅卵石砸中树杈，蝉蜕像下雨一样哗啦啦落下来了迷。
Then the cobbles hit a tree branch, and the cicada shells came raining down like a summer storm, memi.
一下子什么都拥有了，好空虚迷。该用它们去换什么呢？
In an instant, I had everything. And it felt so empty, memi. What should I spend it all on?
Buy a feast! Throw a banquet!
听得我肚子迷迷叫了迷！我也好想吃香喷喷的菜肴。
Now you've made my tummy rumble, memi! I wanna eat something warm and delicious too.
不过，就算悬赏一颗鹅卵石的重金，找遍整个迷境，恐怕也找不到一位合格的厨师迷……
But even if I offered a whole cobble as a reward, I doubt there's a single proper chef left in all the Maze, memi...
雇佣妖精，夺取剩余价值。
那是什么迷？完全理解不了，但是听起来好可怕迷！
What's that, memi? I don't get it at all, but it sounds terrifying, memi!
I don't want to talk to any rich fairies!
哼，我也很忙的迷。钱多得实在花不完，得忙着花迷！
Hmph! I'm super busy too, memi. I've got more money than I can spend, so I'm busy spending, memi!
新来的客人，欢迎迷！你也被我的舞蹈迷住，移不开眼睛了迷？
Hey there, new guest. Welcome, memi! Got your eyes stuck on my dance? Can't look away, huh, memi?
也难怪啦，这支舞我练习了好久，每个动作都刻在脑袋里了。
Well, no surprise! I've been practicing this routine forever. Every move is etched into my head!
对了迷，你有没有遇到过其他练舞的妖精？
By the way, memi, have you come across any other dancing fairies lately?
They always run off the moment I get close.
I thought maybe they were just itchy.
哼哼，看来大家都想要偷偷练习，在舞会上惊艳所有人迷。
Hehe, looks like everyone's sneaking in some practice, all hoping to wow the crowd at the dance party, memi!
舞会马上就要开始，我也得准备亮相了，记得来支持我迷~
The dance is starting soon. I need to get ready to shine! Don't forget to come cheer for me, memi~
迷，新来的客人，你真的来参加舞会啦！
Memi! You really came to the dance, new guest!
这身打扮…你是打算扮演故事里的冷酷骑士吧？没准你也可以角逐舞会的桂冠呢~
That outfit... are you dressed as a cold, mysterious knight from a story? You might even win the dance crown yourself~
每次大树开始抽芽，我们就会举办新的舞会，然后采最鲜嫩的枝条做成桂冠，戴在最出色的舞者头上。
Every time the big tree sprouts new leaves, we host a new dance. We pluck the freshest twigs to weave into a crown for the finest dancer.
迷，偷偷告诉你，赢家能得到大树的祝福，实现一个心愿哦！
Memi, I'll let you in on a secret. The winner gets the big tree's blessing and one wish!
往届的赢家都许了什么愿？
What have past winners wished for?
迷迷，身为舞者，许的愿望当然是——
Mem, as a dancer, the only wish worth making is—
"Let the dance go on forever and ever!"
好想知道海的那边是什么，可是我既不会驾船，也不会游泳嘤~
I really want to know what's beyond the sea, but I can't sail, and I can't swim, eep~
听说有一句开海辟路的祷言——
I heard there's a sea-splitting prayer—
我很厉害的嘤~只要有我在，小鸟们就不会来偷吃麦穗啦！
I'm amazing, eep~! As long as I'm here, no bird's gonna steal a single grain!
Could always toss a chimera in here too.
站…站在巨人的肩膀上，也是一种本事嘤！
Standing... standing on the shoulders of giants counts as being capable too, eep!
这位{F#少女}{M#少年}，我看你双眼炯炯有神，来玩个游戏吧！
You there, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, those eyes are shining bright! Let's play a game, shall we?
看看你的视线能否跟上我的速度嘤~
Let's see if your gaze can keep up with me, eep~
Can you guess where I am?
找到我啦！你的目光果然锐利，可不可以再陪我玩一次嘤~
You found me! Eagle eyes indeed! Wanna play again, eep?
答案错误，看来我的身影成功让你眼花缭乱了嘤！
Wrong guess! Looks like I really did dazzle your vision, eep!
求你了，来猜吧！回应我嘤！
Come on, pleeease. Take a guess! Say something, eep!
听说每一批出去闯荡的孩子，都会在离开村庄前许下约定：等长大之后，一定要在这棵树前重聚。
I heard that every group of children who went out of the village would make a promise before leaving: When they grew up, they'd meet again before this tree.
有时他们会走上不同的道路，但友谊坚固如初，好像不受岁月磨损一样。
Sometimes, they would step on different paths, but their friendships remained as strong as ever, as if time could never wear them away.
时光流转，生生不息，我又何时才能等到我的那只虫呢……
Time passes and life circles. When will I find that dear friend of mine...
飞得越高，望得越远，整片麦田的景象尽收眼底——这都是农民伯伯们辛勤劳作的成果嘤。
The higher you soar, the farther you see. From up here, you can take in the whole wheat field — all the fruits of the farmers' hard work, eep.
我真希望自己有羽毛和翅膀，像麦垛上的布谷鸟一样……
I wish I had feathers and wings, like the cuckoo that perches on the haystack...
不对，我好像确实有翅膀嘤！
Wait — don't I already have wings, eep!?
吓…吓我一跳！还好人家会飞，不然就要掉下去了嘤！
Y—you scared me! Good thing I can fly, or I'd have fallen, eep!
每次飞过远方的麦田，看着农民伯伯们辛勤劳作，人家就不由得去想……
Every time I glide over the wheat fields and watch the farmers toiling away. I can't help but think...
要是有能自动播种的魔法就好了嘤。
Wouldn't it be wonderful if there were magic that could plant seeds all on its own, eep.
看到那边的石堆了嘛？是我的杰作嘤~
See that stack of stones over there? That's my masterpiece, eep~
只要保持平衡，就能把大石块垒在小石块上……
As long as you keep your balance, you can pile the big stones right on top of the small ones...
你是否好奇，晒不到太阳的树洞里为什么会有关于太阳的壁画呢？
Ever wonder why there's a mural of the sun inside a tree hollow where no sunlight reaches?
我也想不明白，也许是景观计划的一部分嘤~
I don't get it either. Maybe it's part of a landscape design, eep~
多漂亮的小木屋呀，好想进去看看嘤！
What a lovely little cabin. I really want to take a peek inside, eep!
是我敲门的声音太轻了，还是屋主人不在家？
Was I too soft when I knocked? Or maybe the owner isn't home?
总之只好下一个门扉时再来拜访嘤~
Oh well, I'll visit again at the next Entry Hour, eep!
对不起，这里已经满员了嘤！
But you're the only one here!
好吧，只要你把我拉起来，我就把桌子让给你。
Fine, pull me up and the table's yours!
这就是我的起床路线嘤！
This is how I wake up every day!
你循着先前听到的异响，用力将声音的源头从地里拽了出来。
Curious about the strange noise, you firmly tug its source right out of the ground.
喂，你这家伙，收获月还没到，为什么要把我拔出来嘤？
Hey! What's the big idea? The Month of Reaping isn't here yet!
看到那片菜地了吗？只要像萝卜一样在地里待够时间，我就能变成很多个我啦！
See that vegetable garden? If I stay buried long enough like a radish, I'll sprout into many copies of myself!
But radishes don't glow like you do.
哼，现在说什么也来不及了。我要备战下一个耕耘月了嘤！
Hmph, say what you will! I need to prepare for the upcoming Month of Cultivation!
种瓜得瓜，种豆得豆，种萤得萤，嘤……
You reap what you sow~ Whether it's melons, beans, or fireflies... *sob*
I actually wanted to try the swing...
这只若虫努力地提着风铃，试图给出某种提示——希望它不会感到疲惫。
The nymph is trying its best to lift the chime. Looks like it's trying to tell you something. Hope it doesn't get too tired.
是你呀，贵客…我们又见面了。
Well hello, my esteemed guest... we meet again.
This has to be a dream.
某种程度上，你说得没错。因你活跃的思想，我才得以在此出现。
In a way, you're right. I exist here thanks to your active imagination.
Are you from the new world?
或许情况并非如此。相较于外部世界，我与你的关系更为密切。
I don't believe so. My connection to you is more intimate than to the outside world.
哀丽秘榭的环境似乎受某种特殊力量影响，将我从你的记忆中塑型，称其为魔法也不为过。
Aedes Elysiae is influenced by a unique power that molds me from your memories — magic, one might say.
与此身躯一并继承的，还有感知织者的能力，以及搜集若虫的使命。想必贵客对我往昔的作用印象深刻。
In this form, I inherit the ability to sense weavers and the duty to collect nymphs. I'm sure you recall my former purpose.
无论如何，感谢你一直以来的协助。若发现若虫，仍请拨冗相助。
Regardless, thank you for your continued assistance. If you find any nymphs, please lend a hand.
We meet again, my esteemed guest.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
贵客若能提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>，我 可将其化作记忆中的金丝去寻找若虫。
Provide me with <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>, and I'll weave them into golden threads to track down the nymphs.
衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.
嗯…有位织者望洋兴叹。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>海滨码头</color>极目远眺，思索着渡海的通径呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who longs for distant shores. My golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the coastal dock</color>, staring across the waters, dreaming of passage to the other side.
嗯…有位织者满腔热忱。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>麦田边的稻草人上</color>，守护着耕耘的果实呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is filled with passion. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a scarecrow next to the wheat field</color>, watching over the fruits of cultivation.
嗯…有位织者擅长借助环境掩蔽身形。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>屋旁的麦垛中</color>，期待与行人的视线较量一番。

Hmm... There is a weaver who excels at blending in with their surroundings. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>a stack of wheat next to the house</color>, waiting to make eye contact with passers-by.
嗯…有位织者感伤于岁月变迁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>秋千旁的大树下</color>，与跨越时间的童梦为伴。

Hmm... There is a weaver who laments the changes along the river of time. The golden thread brings tidings: They are under <color=#dbc291ff>a tree next to a swing</color>, enjoying a childhood dream that transcends time.
嗯…有位织者向往更高的天际。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院二楼的窗台外面</color>，俯瞰麦田的景色呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of soaring to greater heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>outside a window on the second floor of the Sacrament Courtyard</color>, admiring the wheat fields from above.
嗯…有位织者专注于保持平衡的艺术。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>石堆旁的花丛中</color>，欣赏着自己的作品呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is trying to perfect the art of balancing. The golden thread brings tidings: They are in <color=#dbc291ff>a flowerbed next to a pile of stones</color>, admiring its own creation.
嗯…有位织者被妖精的景观装饰吸引。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>画着太阳的石壁前</color>，琢磨壁画的含义呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is attracted by the fairy's scenic decorations. The golden threads bring tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a stone wall with a drawing of a sun</color>, pondering the meaning behind the mural.
嗯…有位织者好奇妖精居所的内部结构。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>带有梯子的树屋门前</color>，想要参观拜访呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is curious about the interior construct of the fairy's residence. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a door to a treehouse with a flight of stairs</color>, hoping to pay a visit.
嗯…有位织者率真随性。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>覆着叶片的餐桌上</color>，懒洋洋地休息呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who is laid-back and free-spirited. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a dinner table strewn with leaves</color>, lounging languidly.
嗯…有位织者模仿妖精的耕种动作。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>紧邻田地的道路一侧</color>，静候收获月的成果呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who imitates how the fairy farms. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hiding at <color=#dbc291ff>a side of a pathway right next to the crop field</color>, patiently waiting for the harvest in the Month of Reaping.
请谅解，贵客。我需要更多与记忆相关的力量，来增强自身感知若虫的能力。
Please understand, my esteemed guest. I need more power associated with memories to heighten my sensitivity to nymphs.
遗忘远比铭记困难。当前所追踪的若虫正占据着我的思绪，还是优先将其唤回吧。

我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
感谢你所做的贡献，贵客。如此多的织者嘤鸣，令我想起众多预言中的一则。
Thank you for your dedicated work, my esteemed guest. The symphony of weaver chirps reminds me of a special prophecy.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...
「乐章演奏的最高潮处。」嗯…哀丽秘榭的妖精一族喜爱音乐，善于演奏竖琴，以其乐声来营造载歌载舞的氛围。
"At the climax of the symphony." Hmm... The fairies of Aedes Elysiae have a passion for music, excel at playing harps, and use their melodies to create a festive atmosphere.
去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.
预言中还提到「风铃」和旋律，也许与这只勾着风铃的若虫相关。

恭喜，贵客。你走在时间的前沿，完成了预言的试炼。

记忆永不落幕，贵客，我会在此守候。
The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest. I will remain here, waiting.
The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest.
Some of those nymphs really are bugs!
这个嘛，作为往昔记忆的载体，若虫很容易受到混乱信息的影响：穿墙、闪烁、卡顿、原地不动…相信你已经在它们身上见到了许多异象。

Well, nymphs are basically vessels of old memories, so they're very prone to glitches: phasing through walls, blinking around, lagging, freezing in place... I'm sure you've seen plenty of weirdness from them.
我也曾试图干涉它们的行为，可惜这些异象无法稳定复现，我难以定位问题的具体所在……
I did try to fix their behavior, but those glitches are so random I couldn't even pinpoint the source...
但我相信，随着再创世的降临，一切都将变得简洁有序，若虫们的行为也不会那么「BUG」了。
Still, I believe that with Era Nova's arrival, everything will become clean and orderly again. Even the nymphs will stop being so "buggy."
How did the stone tablet turn into an apple?
嗯…请见谅，贵客。这件物品并不在我的数据库中，我不敢轻易做出解读。
Hmm... forgive me, honored guest. This item isn't in my database, and I dare not interpret it without more information.

你一定是经历了一场难以想象的冒险，才能够得到它吧。或许在未来的某个时刻，它会起到重要作用也说不定。
You must've gone through a tough adventure to get your hands on it. Who knows? Perhaps one day, it'll prove to be vital.
昔涟发出均匀的呼吸声，看上去睡得正沉。
Cyrene's steady breathing suggests she's sleeping soundly.
呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!

It's been a while since my return to the Courtyard. I thought about writing to my mother. After all, I, the Dux Brumalis, am a pillar of the Twilight Courtyard.
社会边角料，妈妈小骄傲。

你以为我不想吗？军中事务处理完一桩还有十桩，甚至连宴会期间都有琐事，哪有时间回家……
You think I don't want to? There are ten more military matters waiting, after each one's done. Even during the banquet, there are trivial issues. How can I find time to go home...
再说了，天空之民都应以塞涅俄丝为榜样，必须永远昂首不怠，才有机会再登天空、重铸荣耀……

Besides, all Skyfolk should look to Seliose as their example. Only by holding their heads high and never growing complacent can they have a chance to ascend to the skies once more and reclaim their glory...
不过我妈说，昏光庭院的许多后辈也开始以我为榜样了，哈哈！

My past? Haha, I never thought someone other than Verginia would be interested in those histories of yore!
也不怕你笑话，我的家族是一支孱弱的冬之民，早在黄金战争初期，所居的天空堡垒便被悬锋城击落，因而不得不在大地上流徙。

Not that I'm afraid of a little playful teasing. My family hails from a frail branch of the Winterfolk. Back in the early days of the Chrysos War, the sky bastion we lived in was struck down by Castrum Kremnos, forcing us into exile on the earth below.
听说过天空英雄塞涅俄丝吧？她的直系血脉在来到大地后便创立了昏光庭院，我们闻讯后加入，这才结束了百号人的流离之苦。

You've heard of the sky hero Seliose, right? Her direct bloodline founded the Twilight Courtyard after descending to the land, and we joined them upon hearing the news. That's how the suffering of our scattered hundred finally ended.
至于我…我就是家族十几代来公认最具天赋的战士。率军直取坎帕首府、对阵悬锋贼寇九战七胜，这般荣耀的军功不计其数。

As for me... I'm recognized as the most gifted warrior in our family in over a dozen generations. I led the army to seize the capital of Campa, fought nine battles against the Kremnoan bandits and won seven... Such honors and feats are too many to count.
就连我的爵位，也是亲手挣得的。用武器指着君王要求赐爵，除了我之外，全翁法罗斯也找不出第二个了吧？
Even my title, I earned it with my own hands. Pointing a weapon at the monarch to demand a title, there's likely no second soul in all of Amphoreus who's done the same, is there?
…当然，面对臣子这般无礼，还能放声大笑、先罚后赏，凯撒这样的人，也找不出第二个了。
...Of course, there's no one else like the Imperator who can still laugh in the face of such insolence and punish before rewarding after, either.
将来？自然是煊赫荣耀——凯撒的荣耀，我的荣耀，还有家族的荣耀。
Future? Unrivalled glory, of course. Of the Imperator, of my own, and of my family.
我会帮凯撒征服她想要的领土，令我塞涅卡的威名不下于天空英雄塞涅俄丝，而后领导昏光庭院实现夙愿——
I will aid the Imperator in conquering the lands she desires, and I, Seneca, shall be as renowned as Seliose the sky hero, leading the Twilight Courtyard to fulfill their dreams—
如天空一般庇佑弱小的族群，使他们不必畏惧命运的无常。
Protect the weak like the Sky, so that they need not fear the unpredictability of fate.
哦，你或许不愿听这些太过遥远的事情吧，还是把视线拉近些。
Oh, you probably don't want to hear about something that far away. Better zoom in on the nearer future.
很久以后，或许这宴会行将结束，逐火再度启程。黄金裔将击落那些苟延的泰坦，而我，也会如愿夺得天空的权柄。
A long time after, perhaps this celebration will end, and the Flame-Chase will re-embark. The Chrysos Heirs will defeat those Titans hanging on for dear life, and I will claim the authority of Sky.
到那时…先让这翁法罗斯刮上几年暴风雪如何？

But I loved everything r—romantic! I loved beautiful headscarves, loved burrowing in the library reading stories, and most of all, I l—loved reciting poetry!
离开悬锋城后，我做了一段时间的吟游诗人。偶然间，我写的英雄颂歌被凯撒大人看到了，便被接引入军、为逐火作传。
After leaving Castrum Kremnos, I spent some time as a bard. By chance, the Great Imperator saw my heroic ode and brought me into the army to serve as a chronicler for the Flame-Chase Army.
等我完成《落木逐火英雄纪》，就能报、报答凯撒大人收留的恩情了吧。

毕竟，在海洋之后，还有诡计、死亡、天空、纷争…那么多厉害的泰坦要讨伐，我这么孱弱的黄金裔，说、说不定就死在哪场恶仗里了呢。
After all, after Ocean, there are still Trickery, Death, Sky, Strife... With so many mighty Titans to overcome, a weak Chrysos Heir like me... m—might just end up throwing my life away in battle.
至于凯撒大人许诺的未来……
As for the future the Great Imperator promised...

不过，真到了那个时候，我的伙伴们，还、还有阿波罗尼，一定会在我身后大声鼓励的吧！
